authors_text: Yuanhan Zhang,Yichao Wu,Zhenfei Yin,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu
title: Robust Face Anti-Spoofing with Dual Probabilistic Modeling
title_zh: 通过双概率建模实现稳健的人脸反欺骗
abstract: The field of face anti-spoofing (FAS) has witnessed great progress with the surge of deep learning. Due to its data-driven nature, existing FAS methods are sensitive to the noise in the dataset, which will hurdle the learning process. However, very few works consider noise modeling in FAS. In this work, we attempt to fill this gap by automatically addressing the noise problem from both label and data perspectives in a probabilistic manner. Specifically, we propose a unified framework called Dual Probabilistic Modeling (DPM), with two dedicated modules, DPM-LQ (Label Quality aware learning) and DPM-DQ (Data Quality aware learning). Both modules are designed based on the assumption that data and label should form coherent probabilistic distributions. DPM-LQ is able to produce robust feature representations without overfitting to the distribution of noisy semantic labels. DPM-DQ can eliminate data noise from `False Reject' and `False Accept' during inference by correcting the prediction confidence of noisy data based on its quality distribution. Both modules can be incorporated into existing deep networks seamlessly and efficiently. Furthermore, we propose the generalized DPM to address the noise problem in practical usage without the need of semantic annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this probabilistic modeling can 1) significantly improve the accuracy, and 2) make the model robust to the noise in real-world datasets. Without bells and whistles, our proposed DPM achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple standard FAS benchmarks.
summary: The field of face anti-spoofing (FAS) has witnessed great progress with the surge of deep learning. Due to its data-driven nature, existing FAS methods are sensitive to the noise in the dataset, which will hurdle the learning process. However, very few works consider noise modeling in FAS. In this work, we attempt to fill this gap by automatically addressing the noise problem from both label and data perspectives in a probabilistic manner. Specifically, we propose a unified framework called Dual Probabilistic Modeling (DPM), with two dedicated modules, DPM-LQ (Label Quality aware learning) and DPM-DQ (Data Quality aware learning). Both modules are designed based on the assumption that data and label should form coherent probabilistic distributions. DPM-LQ is able to produce robust feature representations without overfitting to the distribution of noisy semantic labels. DPM-DQ can eliminate data noise from `False Reject' and `False Accept' during inference by correcting the prediction confidence of noisy data based on its quality distribution. Both modules can be incorporated into existing deep networks seamlessly and efficiently. Furthermore, we propose the generalized DPM to address the noise problem in practical usage without the need of semantic annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this probabilistic modeling can 1) significantly improve the accuracy, and 2) make the model robust to the noise in real-world datasets. Without bells and whistles, our proposed DPM achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple standard FAS benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的兴起，人脸反欺骗（FAS）领域取得了长足的进步。由于其数据驱动的性质，现有的 FAS 方法对数据集中的噪声很敏感，这将阻碍学习过程。然而，很少有工作考虑 FAS 中的噪声建模。在这项工作中，我们试图通过以概率的方式从标签和数据的角度自动解决噪声问题来填补这一空白。具体来说，我们提出了一个称为双概率建模（DPM）的统一框架，具有两个专用模块：DPM-LQ（标签质量感知学习）和DPM-DQ（数据质量感知学习）。这两个模块都是基于数据和标签应形成相干概率分布的假设而设计的。 DPM-LQ 能够生成稳健的特征表示，而不会过度拟合噪声语义标签的分布。 DPM-DQ 可以通过基于噪声数据的质量分布来校正噪声数据的预测置信度，从而消除推理过程中“False Reject”和“False Accept”带来的数据噪声。这两个模块都可以无缝、高效地融入现有的深度网络。此外，我们提出了广义的 DPM 来解决实际使用中的噪声问题，而无需语义注释。大量实验表明，这种概率建模可以 1）显着提高准确性，2）使模型对现实数据集中的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们提出的 DPM 无需花哨的功能，即可在多个标准 FAS 基准测试中实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dual Probabilistic Modeling (DPM)的框架，通过同时建模标签和数据噪声，提升人脸识别防欺骗（FAS）的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有FAS方法因数据驱动特性对数据集中的噪声敏感，而现有研究鲜有考虑噪声建模，导致模型在真实场景中表现不稳定。
AI.method: 设计DPM框架包含两个模块：DPM-LQ（标签质量感知学习）和DPM-DQ（数据质量感知学习）。DPM-LQ通过概率分布避免标签噪声导致的过拟合，DPM-DQ通过修正预测置信度消除数据噪声。此外提出通用DPM无需语义标注即可处理实际应用中的噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明DPM在多个标准FAS基准测试中达到SOTA性能，显著提升准确率并增强对真实世界数据集噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过双概率建模有效解决FAS中的噪声问题，为实际应用提供了高效且无需标注的噪声处理方案。

search_text: Robust Face Anti-Spoofing with Dual Probabilistic Modeling 通过双概率建模实现稳健的人脸反欺骗 The field of face anti-spoofing (FAS) has witnessed great progress with the surge of deep learning. Due to its data-driven nature, existing FAS methods are sensitive to the noise in the dataset, which will hurdle the learning process. However, very few works consider noise modeling in FAS. In this work, we attempt to fill this gap by automatically addressing the noise problem from both label and data perspectives in a probabilistic manner. Specifically, we propose a unified framework called Dual Probabilistic Modeling (DPM), with two dedicated modules, DPM-LQ (Label Quality aware learning) and DPM-DQ (Data Quality aware learning). Both modules are designed based on the assumption that data and label should form coherent probabilistic distributions. DPM-LQ is able to produce robust feature representations without overfitting to the distribution of noisy semantic labels. DPM-DQ can eliminate data noise from `False Reject' and `False Accept' during inference by correcting the prediction confidence of noisy data based on its quality distribution. Both modules can be incorporated into existing deep networks seamlessly and efficiently. Furthermore, we propose the generalized DPM to address the noise problem in practical usage without the need of semantic annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this probabilistic modeling can 1) significantly improve the accuracy, and 2) make the model robust to the noise in real-world datasets. Without bells and whistles, our proposed DPM achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple standard FAS benchmarks. 随着深度学习的兴起，人脸反欺骗（FAS）领域取得了长足的进步。由于其数据驱动的性质，现有的 FAS 方法对数据集中的噪声很敏感，这将阻碍学习过程。然而，很少有工作考虑 FAS 中的噪声建模。在这项工作中，我们试图通过以概率的方式从标签和数据的角度自动解决噪声问题来填补这一空白。具体来说，我们提出了一个称为双概率建模（DPM）的统一框架，具有两个专用模块：DPM-LQ（标签质量感知学习）和DPM-DQ（数据质量感知学习）。这两个模块都是基于数据和标签应形成相干概率分布的假设而设计的。 DPM-LQ 能够生成稳健的特征表示，而不会过度拟合噪声语义标签的分布。 DPM-DQ 可以通过基于噪声数据的质量分布来校正噪声数据的预测置信度，从而消除推理过程中“False Reject”和“False Accept”带来的数据噪声。这两个模块都可以无缝、高效地融入现有的深度网络。此外，我们提出了广义的 DPM 来解决实际使用中的噪声问题，而无需语义注释。大量实验表明，这种概率建模可以 1）显着提高准确性，2）使模型对现实数据集中的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们提出的 DPM 无需花哨的功能，即可在多个标准 FAS 基准测试中实现最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为Dual Probabilistic Modeling (DPM)的框架，通过同时建模标签和数据噪声，提升人脸识别防欺骗（FAS）的鲁棒性。 Yuanhan Zhang,Yichao Wu,Zhenfei Yin,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yun He,Xinlin Ren,Danhang Tang,Yinda Zhang,Xiangyang Xue,Yanwei Fu
title: Density-preserving Deep Point Cloud Compression
title_zh: 保持密度的深度点云压缩
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Project page is available at https://yunhe20.github.io/D-PCC
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Project page is available at https://yunhe20.github.io/D-PCC
abstract: Local density of point clouds is crucial for representing local details, but has been overlooked by existing point cloud compression methods. To address this, we propose a novel deep point cloud compression method that preserves local density information. Our method works in an auto-encoder fashion: the encoder downsamples the points and learns point-wise features, while the decoder upsamples the points using these features. Specifically, we propose to encode local geometry and density with three embeddings: density embedding, local position embedding and ancestor embedding. During the decoding, we explicitly predict the upsampling factor for each point, and the directions and scales of the upsampled points. To mitigate the clustered points issue in existing methods, we design a novel sub-point convolution layer, and an upsampling block with adaptive scale. Furthermore, our method can also compress point-wise attributes, such as normal. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results on SemanticKITTI and ShapeNet demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art rate-distortion trade-off.
summary: Local density of point clouds is crucial for representing local details, but has been overlooked by existing point cloud compression methods. To address this, we propose a novel deep point cloud compression method that preserves local density information. Our method works in an auto-encoder fashion: the encoder downsamples the points and learns point-wise features, while the decoder upsamples the points using these features. Specifically, we propose to encode local geometry and density with three embeddings: density embedding, local position embedding and ancestor embedding. During the decoding, we explicitly predict the upsampling factor for each point, and the directions and scales of the upsampled points. To mitigate the clustered points issue in existing methods, we design a novel sub-point convolution layer, and an upsampling block with adaptive scale. Furthermore, our method can also compress point-wise attributes, such as normal. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results on SemanticKITTI and ShapeNet demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art rate-distortion trade-off.
abstract_zh: 点云的局部密度对于表示局部细节至关重要，但现有的点云压缩方法却忽略了这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的深度点云压缩方法，可以保留局部密度信息。我们的方法以自动编码器的方式工作：编码器对点进行下采样并学习逐点特征，而解码器使用这些特征对点进行上采样。具体来说，我们建议用三种嵌入对局部几何和密度进行编码：密度嵌入、局部位置嵌入和祖先嵌入。在解码过程中，我们明确预测每个点的上采样因子，以及上采样点的方向和尺度。为了缓解现有方法中的聚集点问题，我们设计了一种新颖的子点卷积层和具有自适应尺度的上采样块。此外，我们的方法还可以压缩逐点属性，例如法线。 SemanticKITTI 和 ShapeNet 上的大量定性和定量结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的率失真权衡。

AI.tldr: 提出一种深度点云压缩方法，保留局部密度信息，以实现更优的率失真权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有点云压缩方法忽略局部密度信息，导致细节丢失，需设计能保留密度信息的压缩框架。
AI.method: 基于自编码器结构，引入密度嵌入、局部位置嵌入和祖先嵌入，结合预测上采样因子与自适应尺度的子点卷积层，实现密度感知的点云压缩。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和ShapeNet数据集上达到最优率失真性能，有效保留几何细节与属性信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模局部密度与自适应上采样机制，显著提升了点云压缩质量，为密度敏感型压缩任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Huipeng Zhou,Yu-an Tan,Yajie Wang,Haoran Lyu,Shangbo Wu,Yuanzhang Li
title: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Examples with Restructure Embedded Patches
title_zh: 通过重组嵌入式补丁提高对抗性示例的可迁移性
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various computer vision tasks. However, the adversarial examples generated by ViTs are challenging to transfer to other networks with different structures. Recent attack methods do not consider the specificity of ViTs architecture and self-attention mechanism, which leads to poor transferability of the generated adversarial samples by ViTs. We attack the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs by restructuring the embedded patches of the input. The restructured embedded patches enable the self-attention mechanism to obtain more diverse patches connections and help ViTs keep regions of interest on the object. Therefore, we propose an attack method against the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs, called Self-Attention Patches Restructure (SAPR). Our method is simple to implement yet efficient and applicable to any self-attention based network and gradient transferability-based attack methods. We evaluate attack transferability on black-box models with different structures. The result show that our method generates adversarial examples on white-box ViTs with higher transferability and higher image quality. Our research advances the development of black-box transfer attacks on ViTs and demonstrates the feasibility of using white-box ViTs to attack other black-box models.
summary: Vision transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various computer vision tasks. However, the adversarial examples generated by ViTs are challenging to transfer to other networks with different structures. Recent attack methods do not consider the specificity of ViTs architecture and self-attention mechanism, which leads to poor transferability of the generated adversarial samples by ViTs. We attack the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs by restructuring the embedded patches of the input. The restructured embedded patches enable the self-attention mechanism to obtain more diverse patches connections and help ViTs keep regions of interest on the object. Therefore, we propose an attack method against the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs, called Self-Attention Patches Restructure (SAPR). Our method is simple to implement yet efficient and applicable to any self-attention based network and gradient transferability-based attack methods. We evaluate attack transferability on black-box models with different structures. The result show that our method generates adversarial examples on white-box ViTs with higher transferability and higher image quality. Our research advances the development of black-box transfer attacks on ViTs and demonstrates the feasibility of using white-box ViTs to attack other black-box models.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器 (ViT) 在各种计算机视觉任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，ViT 生成的对抗性示例很难转移到具有不同结构的其他网络。最近的攻击方法没有考虑ViTs架构和自注意力机制的特殊性，这导致ViTs生成的对抗样本的可转移性较差。我们通过重构输入的嵌入补丁来攻击 ViT 中独特的自注意力机制。重构的嵌入补丁使自注意力机制能够获得更多样化的补丁连接，并帮助 ViT 保留对象上的感兴趣区域。因此，我们提出了一种针对 ViT 中独特的自注意力机制的攻击方法，称为自注意力补丁重组（SAPR）。我们的方法实现简单但高效，适用于任何基于自注意力的网络和基于梯度可转移性的攻击方法。我们评估了具有不同结构的黑盒模型的攻击可转移性。结果表明，我们的方法在白盒 ViT 上生成了具有更高可转移性和更高图像质量的对抗性示例。我们的研究推进了针对 ViT 的黑盒传输攻击的发展，并证明了使用白盒 ViT 攻击其他黑盒模型的可行性。

AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在白盒ViT上生成的对抗样本具有更高的迁移性及图像质量，适用于多种基于自注意力的网络。
AI.conclusion: SAPR方法推动了针对ViT的黑盒迁移攻击研究，验证了利用白盒ViT攻击其他黑盒模型的可行性。

search_text: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Examples with Restructure Embedded Patches 通过重组嵌入式补丁提高对抗性示例的可迁移性 Vision transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various computer vision tasks. However, the adversarial examples generated by ViTs are challenging to transfer to other networks with different structures. Recent attack methods do not consider the specificity of ViTs architecture and self-attention mechanism, which leads to poor transferability of the generated adversarial samples by ViTs. We attack the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs by restructuring the embedded patches of the input. The restructured embedded patches enable the self-attention mechanism to obtain more diverse patches connections and help ViTs keep regions of interest on the object. Therefore, we propose an attack method against the unique self-attention mechanism in ViTs, called Self-Attention Patches Restructure (SAPR). Our method is simple to implement yet efficient and applicable to any self-attention based network and gradient transferability-based attack methods. We evaluate attack transferability on black-box models with different structures. The result show that our method generates adversarial examples on white-box ViTs with higher transferability and higher image quality. Our research advances the development of black-box transfer attacks on ViTs and demonstrates the feasibility of using white-box ViTs to attack other black-box models. 视觉转换器 (ViT) 在各种计算机视觉任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，ViT 生成的对抗性示例很难转移到具有不同结构的其他网络。最近的攻击方法没有考虑ViTs架构和自注意力机制的特殊性，这导致ViTs生成的对抗样本的可转移性较差。我们通过重构输入的嵌入补丁来攻击 ViT 中独特的自注意力机制。重构的嵌入补丁使自注意力机制能够获得更多样化的补丁连接，并帮助 ViT 保留对象上的感兴趣区域。因此，我们提出了一种针对 ViT 中独特的自注意力机制的攻击方法，称为自注意力补丁重组（SAPR）。我们的方法实现简单但高效，适用于任何基于自注意力的网络和基于梯度可转移性的攻击方法。我们评估了具有不同结构的黑盒模型的攻击可转移性。结果表明，我们的方法在白盒 ViT 上生成了具有更高可转移性和更高图像质量的对抗性示例。我们的研究推进了针对 ViT 的黑盒传输攻击的发展，并证明了使用白盒 ViT 攻击其他黑盒模型的可行性。 本文提出一种通过重构嵌入补丁来提高视觉Transformer（ViT）对抗样本可迁移性的方法。 Huipeng Zhou,Yu-an Tan,Yajie Wang,Haoran Lyu,Shangbo Wu,Yuanzhang Li cs.CV

title: Optimized latent-code selection for explainable conditional text-to-image GANs
title_zh: 针对可解释的条件文本到图像 GAN 的优化潜在代码选择
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.12929
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.12929
abstract: The task of text-to-image generation has achieved remarkable progress due to the advances in the conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, existing conditional text-to-image GANs approaches mostly concentrate on improving both image quality and semantic relevance but ignore the explainability of the model which plays a vital role in real-world applications. In this paper, we present a variety of techniques to take a deep look into the latent space and semantic space of the conditional text-to-image GANs model. We introduce pairwise linear interpolation of latent codes and `linguistic' linear interpolation to study what the model has learned within the latent space and `linguistic' embeddings. Subsequently, we extend linear interpolation to triangular interpolation conditioned on three corners to further analyze the model. After that, we build a Good/Bad data set containing unsuccessfully and successfully synthetic samples and corresponding latent codes for the image-quality research. Based on this data set, we propose a framework for finding good latent codes by utilizing a linear SVM. Experimental results on the recent DiverGAN generator trained on two benchmark data sets qualitatively prove the effectiveness of our presented techniques, with a better than 94\% accuracy in predicting ${Good}$/${Bad}$ classes for latent vectors. The Good/Bad data set is publicly available at https://zenodo.org/record/5850224#.YeGMwP7MKUk.
summary: The task of text-to-image generation has achieved remarkable progress due to the advances in the conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, existing conditional text-to-image GANs approaches mostly concentrate on improving both image quality and semantic relevance but ignore the explainability of the model which plays a vital role in real-world applications. In this paper, we present a variety of techniques to take a deep look into the latent space and semantic space of the conditional text-to-image GANs model. We introduce pairwise linear interpolation of latent codes and `linguistic' linear interpolation to study what the model has learned within the latent space and `linguistic' embeddings. Subsequently, we extend linear interpolation to triangular interpolation conditioned on three corners to further analyze the model. After that, we build a Good/Bad data set containing unsuccessfully and successfully synthetic samples and corresponding latent codes for the image-quality research. Based on this data set, we propose a framework for finding good latent codes by utilizing a linear SVM. Experimental results on the recent DiverGAN generator trained on two benchmark data sets qualitatively prove the effectiveness of our presented techniques, with a better than 94\% accuracy in predicting ${Good}$/${Bad}$ classes for latent vectors. The Good/Bad data set is publicly available at https://zenodo.org/record/5850224#.YeGMwP7MKUk.
abstract_zh: 由于条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的进步，文本到图像生成的任务取得了显着的进展。然而，现有的条件文本到图像 GAN 方法主要集中于提高图像质量和语义相关性，而忽略了模型的可解释性，而模型的可解释性在现实应用中起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们提出了多种技术来深入研究条件文本到图像 GAN 模型的潜在空间和语义空间。我们引入潜在代码的成对线性插值和“语言”线性插值来研究模型在潜在空间和“语言”嵌入中学到了什么。随后，我们将线性插值扩展到以三个角为条件的三角形插值，以进一步分析模型。之后，我们构建一个好/坏数据集，其中包含用于图像质量研究的不成功和成功合成样本以及相应的潜在代码。基于该数据集，我们提出了一个利用线性 SVM 寻找良好潜在代码的框架。最近在两个基准数据集上训练的 DiverGAN 生成器的实验结果定性地证明了我们提出的技术的有效性，在预测潜在向量的 ${Good}$/${Bad}$ 类方面的准确度高于 94%。 Good/Bad 数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/5850224#.YeGMwP7MKUk 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出优化潜在码选择的方法，以提升条件文本到图像生成模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型虽注重图像质量和语义相关性，但忽略了模型可解释性，而后者对实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 通过潜在空间与语义空间的线性插值分析（包括成对插值和语言学插值），扩展至三角形插值，并构建包含优质/劣质样本的Good/Bad数据集，结合线性SVM框架筛选优质潜在码。
AI.result: 在DiverGAN生成器上实验验证，潜在码分类准确率超94%，且公开了Good/Bad数据集（Zenodo链接）。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了生成模型的可解释性，并为后续研究提供了可复用的数据集与分析框架。

title: A Span-level Bidirectional Network for Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction
title_zh: 用于方面情感三元组提取的跨度级双向网络
abstract: Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) is a new fine-grained sentiment analysis task that aims to extract triplets of aspect terms, sentiments, and opinion terms from review sentences. Recently, span-level models achieve gratifying results on ASTE task by taking advantage of the predictions of all possible spans. Since all possible spans significantly increases the number of potential aspect and opinion candidates, it is crucial and challenging to efficiently extract the triplet elements among them. In this paper, we present a span-level bidirectional network which utilizes all possible spans as input and extracts triplets from spans bidirectionally. Specifically, we devise both the aspect decoder and opinion decoder to decode the span representations and extract triples from aspect-to-opinion and opinion-to-aspect directions. With these two decoders complementing with each other, the whole network can extract triplets from spans more comprehensively. Moreover, considering that mutual exclusion cannot be guaranteed between the spans, we design a similar span separation loss to facilitate the downstream task of distinguishing the correct span by expanding the KL divergence of similar spans during the training process; in the inference process, we adopt an inference strategy to remove conflicting triplets from the results base on their confidence scores. Experimental results show that our framework not only significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, but achieves better performance in predicting triplets with multi-token entities and extracting triplets in sentences contain multi-triplets.
summary: Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) is a new fine-grained sentiment analysis task that aims to extract triplets of aspect terms, sentiments, and opinion terms from review sentences. Recently, span-level models achieve gratifying results on ASTE task by taking advantage of the predictions of all possible spans. Since all possible spans significantly increases the number of potential aspect and opinion candidates, it is crucial and challenging to efficiently extract the triplet elements among them. In this paper, we present a span-level bidirectional network which utilizes all possible spans as input and extracts triplets from spans bidirectionally. Specifically, we devise both the aspect decoder and opinion decoder to decode the span representations and extract triples from aspect-to-opinion and opinion-to-aspect directions. With these two decoders complementing with each other, the whole network can extract triplets from spans more comprehensively. Moreover, considering that mutual exclusion cannot be guaranteed between the spans, we design a similar span separation loss to facilitate the downstream task of distinguishing the correct span by expanding the KL divergence of similar spans during the training process; in the inference process, we adopt an inference strategy to remove conflicting triplets from the results base on their confidence scores. Experimental results show that our framework not only significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, but achieves better performance in predicting triplets with multi-token entities and extracting triplets in sentences contain multi-triplets.
abstract_zh: 方面情感三元组提取（ASTE）是一种新的细粒度情感分析任务，旨在从评论句子中提取方面术语、情感和观点术语的三元组。最近，跨度级模型通过利用所有可能跨度的预测，在 ASTE 任务上取得了令人满意的结果。由于所有可能的跨度都会显着增加潜在方面和意见候选者的数量，因此有效提取其中的三元组元素至关重要且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一个跨度级双向网络，它利用所有可能的跨度作为输入，并从跨度中双向提取三元组。具体来说，我们设计了方面解码器和意见解码器来解码跨度表示，并从方面到意见和意见到方面方向提取三元组。通过这两个解码器的相互补充，整个网络可以更全面地从跨度中提取三元组。此外，考虑到跨度之间不能保证互斥，我们设计了一个类似的跨度分离损失，以方便下游任务在训练过程中通过扩大相似跨度的KL散度来区分正确的跨度；在推理过程中，我们采用推理策略，根据置信度分数从结果中删除冲突的三元组。实验结果表明，我们的框架不仅显着优于最先进的方法，而且在预测具有多标记实体的三元组和提取包含多个三元组的句子中的三元组方面取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向网络的span级模型，用于高效提取方面情感三元组（ASTE）。
AI.motivation: 现有span-level模型在处理多token实体和多三元组句子时存在效率与准确性不足的问题，需改进三元组提取的全面性与区分度。
AI.method: 设计双向解码器（方面解码器与观点解码器）从双向提取三元组，并引入相似span分离损失与推理冲突消除策略。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在多token实体和多三元组句子中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 双向网络结构与损失函数有效提升了ASTE任务的性能，为复杂场景下的三元组提取提供了新思路。

search_text: A Span-level Bidirectional Network for Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction 用于方面情感三元组提取的跨度级双向网络 Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) is a new fine-grained sentiment analysis task that aims to extract triplets of aspect terms, sentiments, and opinion terms from review sentences. Recently, span-level models achieve gratifying results on ASTE task by taking advantage of the predictions of all possible spans. Since all possible spans significantly increases the number of potential aspect and opinion candidates, it is crucial and challenging to efficiently extract the triplet elements among them. In this paper, we present a span-level bidirectional network which utilizes all possible spans as input and extracts triplets from spans bidirectionally. Specifically, we devise both the aspect decoder and opinion decoder to decode the span representations and extract triples from aspect-to-opinion and opinion-to-aspect directions. With these two decoders complementing with each other, the whole network can extract triplets from spans more comprehensively. Moreover, considering that mutual exclusion cannot be guaranteed between the spans, we design a similar span separation loss to facilitate the downstream task of distinguishing the correct span by expanding the KL divergence of similar spans during the training process; in the inference process, we adopt an inference strategy to remove conflicting triplets from the results base on their confidence scores. Experimental results show that our framework not only significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, but achieves better performance in predicting triplets with multi-token entities and extracting triplets in sentences contain multi-triplets. 方面情感三元组提取（ASTE）是一种新的细粒度情感分析任务，旨在从评论句子中提取方面术语、情感和观点术语的三元组。最近，跨度级模型通过利用所有可能跨度的预测，在 ASTE 任务上取得了令人满意的结果。由于所有可能的跨度都会显着增加潜在方面和意见候选者的数量，因此有效提取其中的三元组元素至关重要且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一个跨度级双向网络，它利用所有可能的跨度作为输入，并从跨度中双向提取三元组。具体来说，我们设计了方面解码器和意见解码器来解码跨度表示，并从方面到意见和意见到方面方向提取三元组。通过这两个解码器的相互补充，整个网络可以更全面地从跨度中提取三元组。此外，考虑到跨度之间不能保证互斥，我们设计了一个类似的跨度分离损失，以方便下游任务在训练过程中通过扩大相似跨度的KL散度来区分正确的跨度；在推理过程中，我们采用推理策略，根据置信度分数从结果中删除冲突的三元组。实验结果表明，我们的框架不仅显着优于最先进的方法，而且在预测具有多标记实体的三元组和提取包含多个三元组的句子中的三元组方面取得了更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于双向网络的span级模型，用于高效提取方面情感三元组（ASTE）。 Yuqi Chen,Keming Chen,Xian Sun,Zequn Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Inkyu Shin,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Bingbing Zhuang,Samuel Schulter,Buyu Liu,Sparsh Garg,In So Kweon,Kuk-Jin Yoon
title: MM-TTA: Multi-Modal Test-Time Adaptation for 3D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: MM-TTA：3D 语义分割的多模态测试时间自适应
abstract: Test-time adaptation approaches have recently emerged as a practical solution for handling domain shift without access to the source domain data. In this paper, we propose and explore a new multi-modal extension of test-time adaptation for 3D semantic segmentation. We find that directly applying existing methods usually results in performance instability at test time because multi-modal input is not considered jointly. To design a framework that can take full advantage of multi-modality, where each modality provides regularized self-supervisory signals to other modalities, we propose two complementary modules within and across the modalities. First, Intra-modal Pseudolabel Generation (Intra-PG) is introduced to obtain reliable pseudo labels within each modality by aggregating information from two models that are both pre-trained on source data but updated with target data at different paces. Second, Inter-modal Pseudo-label Refinement (Inter-PR) adaptively selects more reliable pseudo labels from different modalities based on a proposed consistency scheme. Experiments demonstrate that our regularized pseudo labels produce stable self-learning signals in numerous multi-modal test-time adaptation scenarios for 3D semantic segmentation. Visit our project website at https://www.nec-labs.com/~mas/MM-TTA.
summary: Test-time adaptation approaches have recently emerged as a practical solution for handling domain shift without access to the source domain data. In this paper, we propose and explore a new multi-modal extension of test-time adaptation for 3D semantic segmentation. We find that directly applying existing methods usually results in performance instability at test time because multi-modal input is not considered jointly. To design a framework that can take full advantage of multi-modality, where each modality provides regularized self-supervisory signals to other modalities, we propose two complementary modules within and across the modalities. First, Intra-modal Pseudolabel Generation (Intra-PG) is introduced to obtain reliable pseudo labels within each modality by aggregating information from two models that are both pre-trained on source data but updated with target data at different paces. Second, Inter-modal Pseudo-label Refinement (Inter-PR) adaptively selects more reliable pseudo labels from different modalities based on a proposed consistency scheme. Experiments demonstrate that our regularized pseudo labels produce stable self-learning signals in numerous multi-modal test-time adaptation scenarios for 3D semantic segmentation. Visit our project website at https://www.nec-labs.com/~mas/MM-TTA.
abstract_zh: 测试时适应方法最近已成为一种实用的解决方案，用于在不访问源域数据的情况下处理域转移。在本文中，我们提出并探索了一种新的 3D 语义分割测试时间适应的多模态扩展。我们发现直接应用现有方法通常会导致测试时性能不稳定，因为没有联合考虑多模态输入。为了设计一个可以充分利用多模态的框架，其中每种模态向其他模态提供正规化的自我监督信号，我们提出了模态内部和跨模态的两个互补模块。首先，引入模态内伪标签生成（Intra-PG），通过聚合来自两个模型的信息来获得每种模态内可靠的伪标签，这两个模型都在源数据上进行预训练，但以不同的速度使用目标数据进行更新。其次，模间伪标签细化（Inter-PR）根据所提出的一致性方案从不同模态中自适应地选择更可靠的伪标签。实验表明，我们的正则化伪标签在 3D 语义分割的众多多模态测试时适应场景中产生稳定的自学习信号。请访问我们的项目网站：https://www.nec-labs.com/~mas/MM-TTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-TTA方法，通过多模态测试时适应解决3D语义分割中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法在处理多模态输入时存在性能不稳定问题，未充分联合利用多模态信息。
AI.method: 设计包含模内伪标签生成(Intra-PG)和模间伪标签优化(Inter-PR)的双模块框架，通过跨模态一致性机制实现伪标签联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种多模态测试时适应场景中产生稳定的自学习信号，提升分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过模内正则化与模间一致性约束的协同作用，MM-TTA有效解决了多模态测试时适应的稳定性问题。

title: Relational Abstractions for Generalized Reinforcement Learning on Symbolic Problems
title_zh: 符号问题广义强化学习的关系抽象
abstract: Reinforcement learning in problems with symbolic state spaces is challenging due to the need for reasoning over long horizons. This paper presents a new approach that utilizes relational abstractions in conjunction with deep learning to learn a generalizable Q-function for such problems. The learned Q-function can be efficiently transferred to related problems that have different object names and object quantities, and thus, entirely different state spaces. We show that the learned generalized Q-function can be utilized for zero-shot transfer to related problems without an explicit, hand-coded curriculum. Empirical evaluations on a range of problems show that our method facilitates efficient zero-shot transfer of learned knowledge to much larger problem instances containing many objects.
summary: Reinforcement learning in problems with symbolic state spaces is challenging due to the need for reasoning over long horizons. This paper presents a new approach that utilizes relational abstractions in conjunction with deep learning to learn a generalizable Q-function for such problems. The learned Q-function can be efficiently transferred to related problems that have different object names and object quantities, and thus, entirely different state spaces. We show that the learned generalized Q-function can be utilized for zero-shot transfer to related problems without an explicit, hand-coded curriculum. Empirical evaluations on a range of problems show that our method facilitates efficient zero-shot transfer of learned knowledge to much larger problem instances containing many objects.
abstract_zh: 由于需要长期推理，符号状态空间问题的强化学习具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新方法，利用关系抽象与深度学习相结合来学习此类问题的可推广 Q 函数。学习到的 Q 函数可以有效地转移到具有不同对象名称和对象数量的相关问题，从而具有完全不同的状态空间。我们证明，学习到的广义 Q 函数可以用于零样本迁移到相关问题，而无需明确的手动编码课程。对一系列问题的实证评估表明，我们的方法有助于将学到的知识有效地零样本迁移到包含许多对象的更大的问题实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合关系抽象与深度学习的方法，解决符号问题中强化学习的长期推理挑战，并实现跨不同状态空间的零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 符号状态空间的强化学习需处理长期推理，且传统方法难以泛化至对象名称或数量不同的新问题，需手动设计课程。
AI.method: 通过关系抽象提取符号问题的通用结构，结合深度学习训练可泛化的Q函数，无需显式课程即可迁移至相关问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能高效将知识迁移到包含更多对象的更大规模问题实例，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 关系抽象与深度学习的结合有效解决了符号问题强化学习的泛化难题，实现了高效的零样本迁移能力。

authors_text: John Morrow,Joshua Campbell,Nuha Nishat,Ravi Balasubramanian,Cindy Grimm
title: Measuring a Robot Hand's Graspable Region using Power and Precision Grasps
title_zh: 使用动力和精密抓取来测量机器人手的可抓取区域
comment: Significantly changed second version of arXiv:2106.10402. Paper originally submitted to Robotics Automation Letters
comments: Significantly changed second version of arXiv:2106.10402. Paper originally submitted to Robotics Automation Letters
abstract: The variety of robotic hand designs and actuation schemes makes it difficult to measure a hand's graspable volume. For end-users, this lack of standardized measurements makes it challenging to determine a priori if a robot hand is the right size for grasping an object. We propose a practical hand measurement standard, based on precision and power grasps, that is applicable to a wide variety of robot hand designs. The resulting measurements can be used to both determine if an object will fit in the hand and characterize the size of an object with respect to the hand. Our measurement procedure uses a functional approach, based on grasping a hypothetical cylinder, that allows the measurer choose the exact hand orientation and finger configurations that are used for the measurements. This ensures that the measurements are functionally comparable while relying on the human to determine the finger configurations that best match the intended grasp. We demonstrate using our measurement standard with three commercial robot hand designs and objects from the YCB data set.
summary: The variety of robotic hand designs and actuation schemes makes it difficult to measure a hand's graspable volume. For end-users, this lack of standardized measurements makes it challenging to determine a priori if a robot hand is the right size for grasping an object. We propose a practical hand measurement standard, based on precision and power grasps, that is applicable to a wide variety of robot hand designs. The resulting measurements can be used to both determine if an object will fit in the hand and characterize the size of an object with respect to the hand. Our measurement procedure uses a functional approach, based on grasping a hypothetical cylinder, that allows the measurer choose the exact hand orientation and finger configurations that are used for the measurements. This ensures that the measurements are functionally comparable while relying on the human to determine the finger configurations that best match the intended grasp. We demonstrate using our measurement standard with three commercial robot hand designs and objects from the YCB data set.
abstract_zh: 机器人手设计和驱动方案的多样性使得测量手的可抓握体积变得困难。对于最终用户来说，缺乏标准化测量使得很难先验地确定机器人手的尺寸是否适合抓取物体。我们提出了一种基于精度和力量抓取的实用手部测量标准，适用于各种机器人手设计。所得测量结果可用于确定物体是否适合手，并表征物体相对于手的尺寸。我们的测量程序使用基于抓取假设圆柱体的功能方法，允许测量者选择用于测量的准确的手部方向和手指配置。这确保了测量结果在功能上具有可比性，同时依靠人类来确定最适合预期抓握的手指配置。我们演示了如何使用我们的测量标准与 YCB 数据集中的三种商业机器人手设计和对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于精巧抓取和力量抓取的机器人手抓取区域测量标准，以解决不同设计的机器人手缺乏统一测量方法的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人手设计多样，缺乏标准化测量方法，导致用户难以预先判断机器人手是否适合抓取特定物体。
AI.method: 通过功能化方法，以抓取假设圆柱体为基准，允许测量者选择手部朝向和手指配置，结合人类判断确定最佳抓取方式。
AI.result: 该方法在三种商用机器人手和YCB数据集物体上验证，可有效判断物体是否适合抓取并表征物体尺寸与手部的相对关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的测量标准为多种机器人手设计提供了实用的功能性评估方法，通过结合人类判断确保测量结果的功能可比性。

authors_text: Gayan K. Kulatilleke,Marius Portmann,Shekhar S. Chandra
title: SCGC : Self-Supervised Contrastive Graph Clustering
title_zh: SCGC：自监督对比图聚类
abstract: Graph clustering discovers groups or communities within networks. Deep learning methods such as autoencoders (AE) extract effective clustering and downstream representations but cannot incorporate rich structural information. While Graph Neural Networks (GNN) have shown great success in encoding graph structure, typical GNNs based on convolution or attention variants suffer from over-smoothing, noise, heterophily, are computationally expensive and typically require the complete graph being present. Instead, we propose Self-Supervised Contrastive Graph Clustering (SCGC), which imposes graph-structure via contrastive loss signals to learn discriminative node representations and iteratively refined soft cluster labels. We also propose SCGC*, with a more effective, novel, Influence Augmented Contrastive (IAC) loss to fuse richer structural information, and half the original model parameters. SCGC(*) is faster with simple linear units, completely eliminate convolutions and attention of traditional GNNs, yet efficiently incorporates structure. It is impervious to layer depth and robust to over-smoothing, incorrect edges and heterophily. It is scalable by batching, a limitation in many prior GNN models, and trivially parallelizable. We obtain significant improvements over state-of-the-art on a wide range of benchmark graph datasets, including images, sensor data, text, and citation networks efficiently. Specifically, 20% on ARI and 18% on NMI for DBLP; overall 55% reduction in training time and overall, 81% reduction on inference time. Our code is available at : https://github.com/gayanku/SCGC
summary: Graph clustering discovers groups or communities within networks. Deep learning methods such as autoencoders (AE) extract effective clustering and downstream representations but cannot incorporate rich structural information. While Graph Neural Networks (GNN) have shown great success in encoding graph structure, typical GNNs based on convolution or attention variants suffer from over-smoothing, noise, heterophily, are computationally expensive and typically require the complete graph being present. Instead, we propose Self-Supervised Contrastive Graph Clustering (SCGC), which imposes graph-structure via contrastive loss signals to learn discriminative node representations and iteratively refined soft cluster labels. We also propose SCGC*, with a more effective, novel, Influence Augmented Contrastive (IAC) loss to fuse richer structural information, and half the original model parameters. SCGC(*) is faster with simple linear units, completely eliminate convolutions and attention of traditional GNNs, yet efficiently incorporates structure. It is impervious to layer depth and robust to over-smoothing, incorrect edges and heterophily. It is scalable by batching, a limitation in many prior GNN models, and trivially parallelizable. We obtain significant improvements over state-of-the-art on a wide range of benchmark graph datasets, including images, sensor data, text, and citation networks efficiently. Specifically, 20% on ARI and 18% on NMI for DBLP; overall 55% reduction in training time and overall, 81% reduction on inference time. Our code is available at : https://github.com/gayanku/SCGC
abstract_zh: 图聚类发现网络内的群体或社区。自动编码器（AE）等深度学习方法提取有效的聚类和下游表示，但无法合并丰富的结构信息。虽然图神经网络 (GNN) 在编码图结构方面取得了巨大成功，但基于卷积或注意力变体的典型 GNN 存在过度平滑、噪声、异质性等问题，计算成本高昂，并且通常需要存在完整的图。相反，我们提出自监督对比图聚类（SCGC），它通过对比损失信号强加图结构，以学习判别性节点表示和迭代细化的软聚类标签。我们还提出了 SCGC*，它具有更有效、新颖的影响增强对比 (IAC) 损失，可以融合更丰富的结构信息，并且原始模型参数减半。 SCGC(*) 使用简单的线性单元速度更快，完全消除了传统 GNN 的卷积和注意力，但有效地合并了结构。它不受层深度影响，并且对过度平滑、不正确的边缘和异质性具有鲁棒性。它可以通过批处理进行扩展，这是许多先前的 GNN 模型的限制，并且可以简单地并行化。我们在各种基准图数据集（包括图像、传感器数据、文本和引文网络）上取得了比最先进的技术显着的改进。具体来说，对于 DBLP，ARI 为 20%，NMI 为 18%；训练时间总体减少 55%，推理时间总体减少 81%。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/gayanku/SCGC

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督对比图聚类方法SCGC，通过对比损失学习节点表示并迭代优化软聚类标签，改进后的SCGC*进一步提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图聚类方法如自编码器无法有效利用结构信息，而基于GNN的方法存在过平滑、计算成本高、依赖完整图结构等缺陷，亟需更高效鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计SCGC框架，通过对比损失注入结构信息；SCGC*引入影响增强对比损失（IAC）融合更丰富的结构信息，采用线性单元替代卷积/注意力机制，减少参数量并提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在DBLP等多类型图数据集上，SCGC*相较SOTA方法ARI提升20%、NMI提升18%，训练时间减少55%，推理时间减少81%，且具备抗过平滑、异质性鲁棒性及并行扩展能力。
AI.conclusion: SCGC系列方法通过创新对比学习机制，有效解决了传统图聚类的结构利用不足与效率瓶颈问题，为大规模图数据分析提供了高效可行的新范式。

title: Trends in Remote Learning-based Google Shopping in the United States due to COVID-19
title_zh: 由于 COVID-19，美国基于远程学习的 Google 购物趋势
comment: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
abstract: The United States of America has been the worst affected country in terms of the number of cases and deaths on account of the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) or COVID-19, a highly transmissible and pathogenic coronavirus that started spreading globally in late 2019. On account of the surge of infections, accompanied by hospitalizations and deaths due to COVID-19, and lack of a definitive cure at that point, a national emergency was declared in the United States on March 13, 2020. To prevent the rapid spread of the virus, several states declared stay at home and remote work guidelines shortly after this declaration of an emergency. Such guidelines caused schools, colleges, and universities, both private and public, in all the 50-United States to switch to remote or online forms of teaching for a significant period of time. As a result, Google, the most widely used search engine in the United States, experienced a surge in online shopping of remote learning-based software, systems, applications, and gadgets by both educators and students from all the 50-United States, due to both these groups responding to the associated needs and demands related to switching to remote teaching and learning. This paper aims to investigate, analyze, and interpret these trends of Google Shopping related to remote learning that emerged since March 13, 2020, on account of COVID-19 and the subsequent remote learning adoption in almost all schools, colleges, and universities, from all the 50-United States. The study was performed using Google Trends, which helps to track and study Google Shopping-based online activity emerging from different geolocations. The results and discussions show that the highest interest related to Remote Learning-based Google Shopping was recorded from Oregon, which was followed by Illinois, Florida, Texas, California, and the other states.
summary: The United States of America has been the worst affected country in terms of the number of cases and deaths on account of the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) or COVID-19, a highly transmissible and pathogenic coronavirus that started spreading globally in late 2019. On account of the surge of infections, accompanied by hospitalizations and deaths due to COVID-19, and lack of a definitive cure at that point, a national emergency was declared in the United States on March 13, 2020. To prevent the rapid spread of the virus, several states declared stay at home and remote work guidelines shortly after this declaration of an emergency. Such guidelines caused schools, colleges, and universities, both private and public, in all the 50-United States to switch to remote or online forms of teaching for a significant period of time. As a result, Google, the most widely used search engine in the United States, experienced a surge in online shopping of remote learning-based software, systems, applications, and gadgets by both educators and students from all the 50-United States, due to both these groups responding to the associated needs and demands related to switching to remote teaching and learning. This paper aims to investigate, analyze, and interpret these trends of Google Shopping related to remote learning that emerged since March 13, 2020, on account of COVID-19 and the subsequent remote learning adoption in almost all schools, colleges, and universities, from all the 50-United States. The study was performed using Google Trends, which helps to track and study Google Shopping-based online activity emerging from different geolocations. The results and discussions show that the highest interest related to Remote Learning-based Google Shopping was recorded from Oregon, which was followed by Illinois, Florida, Texas, California, and the other states.
abstract_zh: 就严重急性呼吸系统综合症冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 或 COVID-19 的病例和死亡人数而言，美国是受影响最严重的国家，这是一种高度传染性和致病性的冠状病毒，于 2019 年底开始在全球传播。由于感染人数激增，伴随着 COVID-19 导致的住院和死亡，而且当时缺乏明确的治疗方法，美国于 3 月 13 日宣布进入国家紧急状态， 2020年。为了防止病毒迅速传播，多个州在宣布紧急状态后不久就宣布了居家和远程工作准则。这些指导方针导致美国 50 个州的私立和公立学校、学院和大学在相当长的一段时间内转向远程或在线教学形式。结果，美国使用最广泛的搜索引擎谷歌经历了来自美国 50 个州的教育工作者和学生在线购买基于远程学习的软件、系统、应用程序和小工具的激增，因为这些群体都响应了与转向远程教学相关的相关需求和要求。本文旨在调查、分析和解释自 2020 年 3 月 13 日以来，由于 COVID-19 以及随后美国 50 个州几乎所有学校、学院和大学采用远程学习而出现的与远程学习相关的 Google 购物趋势。这项研究是使用谷歌趋势进行的，它有助于跟踪和研究不同地理位置出现的基于谷歌购物的在线活动。结果和讨论表明，俄勒冈州对基于远程学习的 Google 购物的兴趣最高，其次是伊利诺伊州、佛罗里达州、德克萨斯州、加利福尼亚州和其他州。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了美国因新冠疫情导致远程学习兴起后，基于Google购物的远程学习相关趋势变化。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情迫使美国学校转向远程教学，引发教育工作者和学生对远程学习工具的需求激增，进而影响Google购物行为。
AI.method: 通过Google Trends工具追踪和分析2020年3月13日之后美国各州与远程学习相关的Google购物活动数据。
AI.result: 俄勒冈州对远程学习相关产品的购物兴趣最高，其次为伊利诺伊州、佛罗里达州、德克萨斯州、加利福尼亚州等。
AI.conclusion: 新冠疫情显著推动了美国远程学习的普及，各州对相关教育技术产品的在线需求呈现明显地域差异。

search_text: Trends in Remote Learning-based Google Shopping in the United States due to COVID-19 由于 COVID-19，美国基于远程学习的 Google 购物趋势 The United States of America has been the worst affected country in terms of the number of cases and deaths on account of the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) or COVID-19, a highly transmissible and pathogenic coronavirus that started spreading globally in late 2019. On account of the surge of infections, accompanied by hospitalizations and deaths due to COVID-19, and lack of a definitive cure at that point, a national emergency was declared in the United States on March 13, 2020. To prevent the rapid spread of the virus, several states declared stay at home and remote work guidelines shortly after this declaration of an emergency. Such guidelines caused schools, colleges, and universities, both private and public, in all the 50-United States to switch to remote or online forms of teaching for a significant period of time. As a result, Google, the most widely used search engine in the United States, experienced a surge in online shopping of remote learning-based software, systems, applications, and gadgets by both educators and students from all the 50-United States, due to both these groups responding to the associated needs and demands related to switching to remote teaching and learning. This paper aims to investigate, analyze, and interpret these trends of Google Shopping related to remote learning that emerged since March 13, 2020, on account of COVID-19 and the subsequent remote learning adoption in almost all schools, colleges, and universities, from all the 50-United States. The study was performed using Google Trends, which helps to track and study Google Shopping-based online activity emerging from different geolocations. The results and discussions show that the highest interest related to Remote Learning-based Google Shopping was recorded from Oregon, which was followed by Illinois, Florida, Texas, California, and the other states. 就严重急性呼吸系统综合症冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 或 COVID-19 的病例和死亡人数而言，美国是受影响最严重的国家，这是一种高度传染性和致病性的冠状病毒，于 2019 年底开始在全球传播。由于感染人数激增，伴随着 COVID-19 导致的住院和死亡，而且当时缺乏明确的治疗方法，美国于 3 月 13 日宣布进入国家紧急状态， 2020年。为了防止病毒迅速传播，多个州在宣布紧急状态后不久就宣布了居家和远程工作准则。这些指导方针导致美国 50 个州的私立和公立学校、学院和大学在相当长的一段时间内转向远程或在线教学形式。结果，美国使用最广泛的搜索引擎谷歌经历了来自美国 50 个州的教育工作者和学生在线购买基于远程学习的软件、系统、应用程序和小工具的激增，因为这些群体都响应了与转向远程教学相关的相关需求和要求。本文旨在调查、分析和解释自 2020 年 3 月 13 日以来，由于 COVID-19 以及随后美国 50 个州几乎所有学校、学院和大学采用远程学习而出现的与远程学习相关的 Google 购物趋势。这项研究是使用谷歌趋势进行的，它有助于跟踪和研究不同地理位置出现的基于谷歌购物的在线活动。结果和讨论表明，俄勒冈州对基于远程学习的 Google 购物的兴趣最高，其次是伊利诺伊州、佛罗里达州、德克萨斯州、加利福尼亚州和其他州。 本文分析了美国因新冠疫情导致远程学习兴起后，基于Google购物的远程学习相关趋势变化。 Isabella Hall,Nirmalya Thakur,Chia Y. title: Investigating the Emergence of Online Learning in Different Countries using the 5 W's and 1 H Approach
title_zh: 使用 5 W 和 1 H 方法调查不同国家在线学习的出现
comment: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
abstract: The rise of the Internet of Everything lifestyle in the last decade has had a significant impact on the increased emergence and adoption of online learning in almost all countries across the world. E-learning 3.0 is expected to become the norm of learning globally in almost all sectors in the next few years. The pervasiveness of the Semantic Web powered by the Internet of Everything lifestyle is expected to play a huge role towards seamless and faster adoption of the emerging paradigms of E-learning 3.0. Therefore, this paper presents an exploratory study to analyze multimodal components of Semantic Web behavior data to investigate the emergence of online learning in different countries across the world. The work specifically involved investigating relevant web behavior data to interpret the 5 W's and 1 H - Who, What, When Where, Why, and How related to online learning. Based on studying the E-learning Index of 2021, the study was performed for all the countries that are member states of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development. The results presented and discussed help to interpret the emergence of online learning in each of these countries in terms of the associated public perceptions, queries, opinions, behaviors, and perspectives. Furthermore, to support research and development in this field, we have published the web behavior-based Big Data related to online learning that was mined for all these 38 countries, in the form of a dataset, which is avail-able at https://dx.doi.org/10.21227/xbvs-0198.

abstract_zh: 过去十年，万物互联生活方式的兴起对世界上几乎所有国家在线学习的兴起和采用产生了重大影响。预计未来几年，电子学习3.0将成为全球几乎所有行业的学习常态。由万物互联生活方式驱动的语义网的普及预计将在电子学习 3.0 新兴范式的无缝和更快采用方面发挥巨大作用。因此，本文提出了一项探索性研究，分析语义网行为数据的多模态组成部分，以调查世界各地不同国家在线学习的出现。这项工作具体涉及调查相关网络行为数据，以解释与在线学习相关的 5W 和 1H——谁、什么、何时何地、为什么以及如何。该研究基于对2021年电子学习指数的研究，针对经济合作与发展组织的所有成员国进行了研究。提出和讨论的结果有助于从相关的公众认知、疑问、意见、行为和观点来解释每个国家在线学习的出现。此外，为了支持该领域的研究和开发，我们以数据集的形式发布了与在线学习相关的基于网络行为的大数据，这些数据是为所有这 38 个国家/地区挖掘的，可在 https://dx.doi.org/10.21227/xbvs-0198 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过5W1H框架分析全球不同国家在线学习的兴起情况，基于语义网络行为数据和OECD成员国的E-learning指数进行研究。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网和语义网络技术的发展，E-learning 3.0成为全球学习新范式，需探索其在各国的兴起动因与差异。
AI.method: 采用5W1H分析法，结合网络行为数据与OECD国家的E-learning指数，挖掘公众认知、查询行为等多模态数据并构建数据集。
AI.result: 解析了38个OECD国家在线学习的兴起特征，包括公众认知、行为模式及技术驱动因素，并公开了相关大数据集。
AI.conclusion: 语义网络技术推动E-learning 3.0普及，各国发展差异显著，研究结果为未来教育技术研究提供数据支持与理论参考。

title: Study on the Fairness of Speaker Verification Systems on Underrepresented Accents in English
title_zh: 英语中代表性口音不足的说话人验证系统的公平性研究
abstract: Speaker verification (SV) systems are currently being used to make sensitive decisions like giving access to bank accounts or deciding whether the voice of a suspect coincides with that of the perpetrator of a crime. Ensuring that these systems are fair and do not disfavor any particular group is crucial. In this work, we analyze the performance of several state-of-the-art SV systems across groups defined by the accent of the speakers when speaking English. To this end, we curated a new dataset based on the VoxCeleb corpus where we carefully selected samples from speakers with accents from different countries. We use this dataset to evaluate system performance for several SV systems trained with VoxCeleb data. We show that, while discrimination performance is reasonably robust across accent groups, calibration performance degrades dramatically on some accents that are not well represented in the training data. Finally, we show that a simple data balancing approach mitigates this undesirable bias, being particularly effective when applied to our recently-proposed discriminative condition-aware backend.
summary: Speaker verification (SV) systems are currently being used to make sensitive decisions like giving access to bank accounts or deciding whether the voice of a suspect coincides with that of the perpetrator of a crime. Ensuring that these systems are fair and do not disfavor any particular group is crucial. In this work, we analyze the performance of several state-of-the-art SV systems across groups defined by the accent of the speakers when speaking English. To this end, we curated a new dataset based on the VoxCeleb corpus where we carefully selected samples from speakers with accents from different countries. We use this dataset to evaluate system performance for several SV systems trained with VoxCeleb data. We show that, while discrimination performance is reasonably robust across accent groups, calibration performance degrades dramatically on some accents that are not well represented in the training data. Finally, we show that a simple data balancing approach mitigates this undesirable bias, being particularly effective when applied to our recently-proposed discriminative condition-aware backend.
abstract_zh: 说话人验证（SV）系统目前被用来做出敏感的决定，例如允许访问银行账户或确定嫌疑人的声音是否与犯罪者的声音一致。确保这些系统公平且不偏袒任何特定群体至关重要。在这项工作中，我们分析了几种最先进的 SV 系统在不同群体中的表现，这些群体是由说话者说英语时的口音定义的。为此，我们根据 VoxCeleb 语料库策划了一个新的数据集，其中我们精心挑选了来自不同国家口音的说话者的样本。我们使用此数据集来评估使用 VoxCeleb 数据训练的多个 SV 系统的系统性能。我们表明，虽然跨口音群体的辨别性能相当稳健，但对于训练数据中未得到很好体现的某些口音，校准性能会急剧下降。最后，我们证明了一种简单的数据平衡方法可以减轻这种不良偏差，当应用于我们最近提出的歧视性条件感知后端时特别有效。

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了英语中不同口音说话者在说话人验证系统中的公平性问题，特别关注欠代表口音的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 说话人验证系统被用于敏感场景（如银行账户访问、刑事调查），确保系统对所有群体公平至关重要，但现有系统可能对欠代表口音存在偏见。
AI.method: 基于VoxCeleb数据集构建包含多国口音的新数据集，评估多个前沿说话人验证系统的性能，并通过数据平衡方法测试其对偏见的缓解效果。
AI.result: 系统在口音群体间的判别性能较稳健，但校准性能在训练数据中代表性不足的口音上显著下降；数据平衡方法有效缓解了这一偏差，尤其在作者提出的判别性条件感知后端中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据平衡可有效减少说话人验证系统对欠代表口音的偏见，为构建公平的语音生物特征系统提供可行方案。

search_text: Study on the Fairness of Speaker Verification Systems on Underrepresented Accents in English 英语中代表性口音不足的说话人验证系统的公平性研究 Speaker verification (SV) systems are currently being used to make sensitive decisions like giving access to bank accounts or deciding whether the voice of a suspect coincides with that of the perpetrator of a crime. Ensuring that these systems are fair and do not disfavor any particular group is crucial. In this work, we analyze the performance of several state-of-the-art SV systems across groups defined by the accent of the speakers when speaking English. To this end, we curated a new dataset based on the VoxCeleb corpus where we carefully selected samples from speakers with accents from different countries. We use this dataset to evaluate system performance for several SV systems trained with VoxCeleb data. We show that, while discrimination performance is reasonably robust across accent groups, calibration performance degrades dramatically on some accents that are not well represented in the training data. Finally, we show that a simple data balancing approach mitigates this undesirable bias, being particularly effective when applied to our recently-proposed discriminative condition-aware backend. 说话人验证（SV）系统目前被用来做出敏感的决定，例如允许访问银行账户或确定嫌疑人的声音是否与犯罪者的声音一致。确保这些系统公平且不偏袒任何特定群体至关重要。在这项工作中，我们分析了几种最先进的 SV 系统在不同群体中的表现，这些群体是由说话者说英语时的口音定义的。为此，我们根据 VoxCeleb 语料库策划了一个新的数据集，其中我们精心挑选了来自不同国家口音的说话者的样本。我们使用此数据集来评估使用 VoxCeleb 数据训练的多个 SV 系统的系统性能。我们表明，虽然跨口音群体的辨别性能相当稳健，但对于训练数据中未得到很好体现的某些口音，校准性能会急剧下降。最后，我们证明了一种简单的数据平衡方法可以减轻这种不良偏差，当应用于我们最近提出的歧视性条件感知后端时特别有效。 本研究分析了英语中不同口音说话者在说话人验证系统中的公平性问题，特别关注欠代表口音的性能表现。 Mariel Estevez,Luciana Ferrer eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Roshanak Zilouchian Moghaddam,Spandan Garg,Colin B. Clement,Yevhen Mohylevskyy,Neel Sundaresan
title: Generating Examples From CLI Usage: Can Transformers Help?
title_zh: 从 CLI 用法生成示例：Transformers 可以提供帮助吗？
abstract: Continuous evolution in modern software often causes documentation, tutorials, and examples to be out of sync with changing interfaces and frameworks. Relying on outdated documentation and examples can lead programs to fail or be less efficient or even less secure. In response, programmers need to regularly turn to other resources on the web such as StackOverflow for examples to guide them in writing software. We recognize that this inconvenient, error-prone, and expensive process can be improved by using machine learning applied to software usage data. In this paper, we present our practical system which uses machine learning on large-scale telemetry data and documentation corpora, generating appropriate and complex examples that can be used to improve documentation. We discuss both feature-based and transformer-based machine learning approaches and demonstrate that our system achieves 100% coverage for the used functionalities in the product, providing up-to-date examples upon every release and reduces the numbers of PRs submitted by software owners writing and editing documentation by >68%. We also share valuable lessons learnt during the 3 years that our production quality system has been deployed for Azure Cloud Command Line Interface (Azure CLI).
summary: Continuous evolution in modern software often causes documentation, tutorials, and examples to be out of sync with changing interfaces and frameworks. Relying on outdated documentation and examples can lead programs to fail or be less efficient or even less secure. In response, programmers need to regularly turn to other resources on the web such as StackOverflow for examples to guide them in writing software. We recognize that this inconvenient, error-prone, and expensive process can be improved by using machine learning applied to software usage data. In this paper, we present our practical system which uses machine learning on large-scale telemetry data and documentation corpora, generating appropriate and complex examples that can be used to improve documentation. We discuss both feature-based and transformer-based machine learning approaches and demonstrate that our system achieves 100% coverage for the used functionalities in the product, providing up-to-date examples upon every release and reduces the numbers of PRs submitted by software owners writing and editing documentation by >68%. We also share valuable lessons learnt during the 3 years that our production quality system has been deployed for Azure Cloud Command Line Interface (Azure CLI).
abstract_zh: 现代软件的持续发展常常导致文档、教程和示例与不断变化的接口和框架不同步。依赖过时的文档和示例可能会导致程序失败或效率降低甚至安全性降低。作为回应，程序员需要定期转向网络上的其他资源（例如 StackOverflow）来获取示例来指导他们编写软件。我们认识到，可以通过将机器学习应用于软件使用数据来改进这种不方便、容易出错且成本高昂的过程。在本文中，我们介绍了我们的实用系统，该系统在大规模遥测数据和文档语料库上使用机器学习，生成可用于改进文档的适当且复杂的示例。我们讨论了基于特征和基于变压器的机器学习方法，并证明我们的系统对产品中使用的功能实现了 100% 的覆盖，在每次发布时提供最新的示例，并将编写和编辑文档的软件所有者提交的 PR 数量减少了 68% 以上。我们还分享了我们为 Azure 云命令行界面 (Azure CLI) 部署生产质量系统的 3 年中获得的宝贵经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的系统，通过分析CLI使用数据和文档语料生成高质量的代码示例，以解决软件接口变化导致文档过时的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代软件持续演进导致文档、教程和示例与接口变更不同步，程序员需依赖StackOverflow等外部资源，该过程低效且易出错。
AI.method: 采用特征工程和Transformer模型两种机器学习方法，结合大规模遥测数据与文档语料库生成示例，并部署于Azure CLI生产环境进行验证。
AI.result: 系统实现100%功能覆盖，每次发布均提供最新示例，使文档维护PR提交量减少68%。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的系统有效提升了文档示例生成质量，验证了机器学习在软件文档自动化中的可行性与价值。

authors_text: Wei Zhiwei,Ding Su,Xu Wenjia,Cheng Lu,Zhang Song,Wang Yang
title: Circular cartograms via the elastic beam algorithm originated from cartographic generalization
title_zh: 通过起源于地图概括的弹性梁算法绘制圆形地图
abstract: The circular cartogram, also known as the Dorling map, is a widely used tool for visualizing statistical data. It represents regions as circles with their areas in proportion to the statistical values and requires circle displacement to avoid overlap and maintain spatial relationships. In this paper, we propose a new approach for circular cartogram production that utilizes the elastic beam displacement algorithm in cartographic generalization. First, the initial circles are generated with their areas in proportion to the statistical values. Second, an elastic beam structure is built as a proximity graph based on the spatial relations between the circles. Third, the circles violating the quality requirements are considered to have a force on the nodes of a beam. Fourth, the elastic beam algorithm is applied to assign forces for each node to determine the new positions of the circles. Steps two through four are repeated until a circular cartogram that meets the defined quality requirements is obtained. The experiments indicate that the proposed approach can successfully generate circular cartograms without overlaps while maintaining topology and relative relationships with higher quality than existing approaches.
summary: The circular cartogram, also known as the Dorling map, is a widely used tool for visualizing statistical data. It represents regions as circles with their areas in proportion to the statistical values and requires circle displacement to avoid overlap and maintain spatial relationships. In this paper, we propose a new approach for circular cartogram production that utilizes the elastic beam displacement algorithm in cartographic generalization. First, the initial circles are generated with their areas in proportion to the statistical values. Second, an elastic beam structure is built as a proximity graph based on the spatial relations between the circles. Third, the circles violating the quality requirements are considered to have a force on the nodes of a beam. Fourth, the elastic beam algorithm is applied to assign forces for each node to determine the new positions of the circles. Steps two through four are repeated until a circular cartogram that meets the defined quality requirements is obtained. The experiments indicate that the proposed approach can successfully generate circular cartograms without overlaps while maintaining topology and relative relationships with higher quality than existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 圆形地图，也称为多林地图，是一种广泛使用的统计数据可视化工具。它将区域表示为圆形，其面积与统计值成比例，并且需要圆形位移以避免重叠并保持空间关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种在地图概括中利用弹性梁位移算法来生成圆形地图的新方法。首先，生成初始圆，其面积与统计值成比例。其次，根据圆之间的空间关系将弹性梁结构构建为邻近图。第三，违反质量要求的圆被认为对梁的节点有作用力。第四，应用弹性梁算法为每个节点分配力以确定圆的新位置。重复第二步到第四步，直到获得满足定义的质量要求的圆形制图。实验表明，所提出的方法可以成功地生成没有重叠的圆形地图，同时以比现有方法更高的质量保持拓扑和相对关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弹性梁算法的圆形地图生成方法，用于在避免重叠的同时保持空间关系。
AI.motivation: 现有圆形地图生成方法在保持拓扑结构和相对关系方面存在不足，需改进算法以提高生成质量。
AI.method: 通过生成初始比例圆、构建弹性梁邻近图、施加节点力并迭代优化，直至满足质量要求。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成无重叠且拓扑关系准确的高质量圆形地图，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 弹性梁算法有效解决了圆形地图生成中的重叠问题，同时保持了空间关系的准确性。

motivation: 现有圆形地图生成方法在保持拓扑结构和相对关系方面存在不足，需改进算法以提高生成质量。
method: 通过生成初始比例圆、构建弹性梁邻近图、施加节点力并迭代优化，直至满足质量要求。
result: 实验表明该方法能生成无重叠且拓扑关系准确的高质量圆形地图，优于现有方法。
conclusion: 弹性梁算法有效解决了圆形地图生成中的重叠问题，同时保持了空间关系的准确性。
search_text: Circular cartograms via the elastic beam algorithm originated from cartographic generalization 通过起源于地图概括的弹性梁算法绘制圆形地图 The circular cartogram, also known as the Dorling map, is a widely used tool for visualizing statistical data. It represents regions as circles with their areas in proportion to the statistical values and requires circle displacement to avoid overlap and maintain spatial relationships. In this paper, we propose a new approach for circular cartogram production that utilizes the elastic beam displacement algorithm in cartographic generalization. First, the initial circles are generated with their areas in proportion to the statistical values. Second, an elastic beam structure is built as a proximity graph based on the spatial relations between the circles. Third, the circles violating the quality requirements are considered to have a force on the nodes of a beam. Fourth, the elastic beam algorithm is applied to assign forces for each node to determine the new positions of the circles. Steps two through four are repeated until a circular cartogram that meets the defined quality requirements is obtained. The experiments indicate that the proposed approach can successfully generate circular cartograms without overlaps while maintaining topology and relative relationships with higher quality than existing approaches. 圆形地图，也称为多林地图，是一种广泛使用的统计数据可视化工具。它将区域表示为圆形，其面积与统计值成比例，并且需要圆形位移以避免重叠并保持空间关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种在地图概括中利用弹性梁位移算法来生成圆形地图的新方法。首先，生成初始圆，其面积与统计值成比例。其次，根据圆之间的空间关系将弹性梁结构构建为邻近图。第三，违反质量要求的圆被认为对梁的节点有作用力。第四，应用弹性梁算法为每个节点分配力以确定圆的新位置。重复第二步到第四步，直到获得满足定义的质量要求的圆形制图。实验表明，所提出的方法可以成功地生成没有重叠的圆形地图，同时以比现有方法更高的质量保持拓扑和相对关系。 本文提出一种基于弹性梁算法的圆形地图生成方法，用于在避免重叠的同时保持空间关系。 Wei Zhiwei,Ding Su,Xu Wenjia,Cheng Lu,Zhang Song,Wang Yang cs.HC

title: Optimal Closeness Testing of Discrete Distributions Made (Complex) Simple
title_zh: 离散分布的最佳紧密度测试变得（复杂）简单
abstract: In this note, we revisit the recent work of Diakonikolas, Gouleakis, Kane, Peebles, and Price (2021), and provide an alternative proof of their main result. Our argument does not rely on any specific property of Poisson random variables (such as stability and divisibility) nor on any "clever trick," but instead on an identity relating the expectation of the absolute value of any random variable to the integral of its characteristic function: \[ \mathbb{E}[|X|] = \frac{2}π\int_0^\infty \frac{1-\Re(\mathbb{E}[e^{i tX}])}{t^2}\, dt \] Our argument, while not devoid of technical aspects, is arguably conceptually simpler and more general; and we hope this technique can find additional applications in distribution testing.
summary: In this note, we revisit the recent work of Diakonikolas, Gouleakis, Kane, Peebles, and Price (2021), and provide an alternative proof of their main result. Our argument does not rely on any specific property of Poisson random variables (such as stability and divisibility) nor on any "clever trick," but instead on an identity relating the expectation of the absolute value of any random variable to the integral of its characteristic function: \[ \mathbb{E}[|X|] = \frac{2}π\int_0^\infty \frac{1-\Re(\mathbb{E}[e^{i tX}])}{t^2}\, dt \] Our argument, while not devoid of technical aspects, is arguably conceptually simpler and more general; and we hope this technique can find additional applications in distribution testing.
abstract_zh: 在这篇文章中，我们回顾了 Diakonikolas、Gouleakis、Kane、Peebles 和 Price (2021) 最近的工作，并提供了他们主要结果的替代证明。我tX}])}{t^2}\, dt \] 我们的论点虽然不乏技术方面，但可以说在概念上更简单、更普遍；我们希望这项技术能够在分布式测试中找到更多的应用。

AI.motivation: 原论文的证明依赖泊松随机变量的特殊性质和技巧，本文旨在通过更基础的数学工具提供替代证明。
AI.method: 利用随机变量绝对值期望与特征函数积分的关系式，避免使用泊松分布的稳定性等特性。
AI.result: 成功给出原论文核心结果的替代证明，方法更具概念简洁性和普适性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术可能在分布检验领域有更广泛的应用前景。

title: Testing the Ability of Language Models to Interpret Figurative Language
title_zh: 测试语言模型解释比喻语言的能力
abstract: Figurative and metaphorical language are commonplace in discourse, and figurative expressions play an important role in communication and cognition. However, figurative language has been a relatively under-studied area in NLP, and it remains an open question to what extent modern language models can interpret nonliteral phrases. To address this question, we introduce Fig-QA, a Winograd-style nonliteral language understanding task consisting of correctly interpreting paired figurative phrases with divergent meanings. We evaluate the performance of several state-of-the-art language models on this task, and find that although language models achieve performance significantly over chance, they still fall short of human performance, particularly in zero- or few-shot settings. This suggests that further work is needed to improve the nonliteral reasoning capabilities of language models.
summary: Figurative and metaphorical language are commonplace in discourse, and figurative expressions play an important role in communication and cognition. However, figurative language has been a relatively under-studied area in NLP, and it remains an open question to what extent modern language models can interpret nonliteral phrases. To address this question, we introduce Fig-QA, a Winograd-style nonliteral language understanding task consisting of correctly interpreting paired figurative phrases with divergent meanings. We evaluate the performance of several state-of-the-art language models on this task, and find that although language models achieve performance significantly over chance, they still fall short of human performance, particularly in zero- or few-shot settings. This suggests that further work is needed to improve the nonliteral reasoning capabilities of language models.
abstract_zh: 比喻和隐喻语言在话语中很常见，比喻表达在交流和认知中发挥着重要作用。然而，比喻语言一直是自然语言处理中研究相对较少的领域，现代语言模型可以在多大程度上解释非文字短语仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 Fig-QA，这是一种 Winograd 风格的非文字语言理解任务，包括正确解释具有不同含义的配对比喻短语。我们评估了几种最先进的语言模型在这项任务上的性能，发现尽管语言模型的性能显着高于偶然，但它们仍然低于人类的性能，特别是在零或少样本设置中。这表明需要进一步的工作来提高语言模型的非文字推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍Fig-QA任务，评估语言模型解释隐喻语言的能力。
AI.motivation: 隐喻语言在交流中普遍存在但NLP研究不足，需明确语言模型的非字面理解能力。
AI.method: 设计Winograd风格的Fig-QA任务，通过配对具有不同含义的隐喻短语进行评估。
AI.result: 模型表现显著优于随机，但在零/少样本设置下仍远低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步提升语言模型的非字面推理能力以更好理解隐喻语言。

authors_text: Bruna Delazeri,Leonardo L. Veras,Alceu de S. Britto Jr.,Jean Paul Barddal,Alessandro L. Koerich
title: Evaluation of Self-taught Learning-based Representations for Facial Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于自学学习的面部情绪识别表示的评估
abstract: This work describes different strategies to generate unsupervised representations obtained through the concept of self-taught learning for facial emotion recognition (FER). The idea is to create complementary representations promoting diversity by varying the autoencoders' initialization, architecture, and training data. SVM, Bagging, Random Forest, and a dynamic ensemble selection method are evaluated as final classification methods. Experimental results on Jaffe and Cohn-Kanade datasets using a leave-one-subject-out protocol show that FER methods based on the proposed diverse representations compare favorably against state-of-the-art approaches that also explore unsupervised feature learning.
summary: This work describes different strategies to generate unsupervised representations obtained through the concept of self-taught learning for facial emotion recognition (FER). The idea is to create complementary representations promoting diversity by varying the autoencoders' initialization, architecture, and training data. SVM, Bagging, Random Forest, and a dynamic ensemble selection method are evaluated as final classification methods. Experimental results on Jaffe and Cohn-Kanade datasets using a leave-one-subject-out protocol show that FER methods based on the proposed diverse representations compare favorably against state-of-the-art approaches that also explore unsupervised feature learning.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了通过面部情绪识别（FER）自学学习概念生成无监督表示的不同策略。这个想法是通过改变自动编码器的初始化、架构和训练数据来创建互补的表示，以促进多样性。 SVM、Bagging、随机森林和动态集成选择方法作为最终分类方法进行评估。使用留一主题协议在 Jaffe 和 Cohn-Kanade 数据集上进行的实验结果表明，基于所提出的多样化表示的 FER 方法与同样探索无监督特征学习的最先进方法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 评估基于自教学习的表示在面部情绪识别中的有效性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在FER中表现不足，需通过多样化表示提升性能
AI.method: 通过调整自编码器的初始化、架构和训练数据生成多样化表示，并结合多种分类器进行评估
AI.result: 在Jaffe和Cohn-Kanade数据集上，所提方法优于现有无监督特征学习方法
AI.conclusion: 多样化表示结合集成分类方法能有效提升FER性能

title: Named Entity Recognition for Audio De-Identification
title_zh: 用于音频去识别的命名实体识别
abstract: Data anonymization is often a task carried out by humans. Automating it would reduce the cost and time required to complete this task. This paper presents a pipeline to automate the anonymization of audio data in French. We propose a pipeline, which takes audio files with their transcriptions and removes the named entities (NEs) present in the audio. Our pipeline is made up of a forced aligner, which aligns words in an audio transcript with speech and a model that performs named entity recognition (NER). Then, the audio segments that correspond to NEs are substituted with silence to anonymize audio. We compared forced aligners and NER models to find the best ones for our scenario. We evaluated our pipeline on a small hand-annotated dataset, achieving an F1 score of 0.769. This result shows that automating this task is feasible.
summary: Data anonymization is often a task carried out by humans. Automating it would reduce the cost and time required to complete this task. This paper presents a pipeline to automate the anonymization of audio data in French. We propose a pipeline, which takes audio files with their transcriptions and removes the named entities (NEs) present in the audio. Our pipeline is made up of a forced aligner, which aligns words in an audio transcript with speech and a model that performs named entity recognition (NER). Then, the audio segments that correspond to NEs are substituted with silence to anonymize audio. We compared forced aligners and NER models to find the best ones for our scenario. We evaluated our pipeline on a small hand-annotated dataset, achieving an F1 score of 0.769. This result shows that automating this task is feasible.
abstract_zh: 数据匿名化通常是由人类执行的任务。自动化将减少完成此任务所需的成本和时间。本文提出了一种自动对法语音频数据进行匿名化的管道。我们提出了一个管道，它获取音频文件及其转录并删除音频中存在的命名实体（NE）。我们的管道由强制对齐器（将音频转录中的单词与语音对齐）和执行命名实体识别 (NER) 的模型组成。然后，将与NE对应的音频片段替换为静音以使音频匿名。我们比较了强制对准器和 NER 模型，以找到最适合我们场景的模型。我们在一个小型手工注释数据集上评估了我们的流程，获得了 0.769 的 F1 分数。这个结果表明自动化这项任务是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化流程，通过识别音频中的命名实体并替换为静音，实现法语音频数据的匿名化处理。
AI.motivation: 人工完成数据匿名化任务成本高且耗时，自动化方法可提升效率并降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 结合强制对齐器与命名实体识别模型，对音频转录文本进行实体检测，并用静音替代对应音频片段。
AI.result: 在小型人工标注数据集上达到0.769的F1分数，验证了自动化匿名化方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 音频去标识任务可通过自动化方法实现，但需进一步优化模型以适应更复杂场景。

search_text: Named Entity Recognition for Audio De-Identification 用于音频去识别的命名实体识别 Data anonymization is often a task carried out by humans. Automating it would reduce the cost and time required to complete this task. This paper presents a pipeline to automate the anonymization of audio data in French. We propose a pipeline, which takes audio files with their transcriptions and removes the named entities (NEs) present in the audio. Our pipeline is made up of a forced aligner, which aligns words in an audio transcript with speech and a model that performs named entity recognition (NER). Then, the audio segments that correspond to NEs are substituted with silence to anonymize audio. We compared forced aligners and NER models to find the best ones for our scenario. We evaluated our pipeline on a small hand-annotated dataset, achieving an F1 score of 0.769. This result shows that automating this task is feasible. 数据匿名化通常是由人类执行的任务。自动化将减少完成此任务所需的成本和时间。本文提出了一种自动对法语音频数据进行匿名化的管道。我们提出了一个管道，它获取音频文件及其转录并删除音频中存在的命名实体（NE）。我们的管道由强制对齐器（将音频转录中的单词与语音对齐）和执行命名实体识别 (NER) 的模型组成。然后，将与NE对应的音频片段替换为静音以使音频匿名。我们比较了强制对准器和 NER 模型，以找到最适合我们场景的模型。我们在一个小型手工注释数据集上评估了我们的流程，获得了 0.769 的 F1 分数。这个结果表明自动化这项任务是可行的。 本文提出一种自动化流程，通过识别音频中的命名实体并替换为静音，实现法语音频数据的匿名化处理。 Guillaume Baril,Patrick Cardinal,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich cs.SD,cs.CR,eess.AS

title: MaxSAT with Absolute Value Functions: A Parameterized Perspective
title_zh: 具有绝对值函数的 MaxSAT：参数化视角
abstract: The natural generalization of the Boolean satisfiability problem to optimization problems is the task of determining the maximum number of clauses that can simultaneously be satisfied in a propositional formula in conjunctive normal form. In the weighted maximum satisfiability problem each clause has a positive weight and one seeks an assignment of maximum weight. The literature almost solely considers the case of positive weights. While the general case of the problem is only restricted slightly by this constraint, many special cases become trivial in the absence of negative weights. In this work we study the problem with negative weights and observe that the problem becomes computationally harder - which we formalize from a parameterized perspective in the sense that various variations of the problem become W[1]-hard if negative weights are present. Allowing negative weights also introduces new variants of the problem: Instead of maximizing the sum of weights of satisfied clauses, we can maximize the absolute value of that sum. This turns out to be surprisingly expressive even restricted to monotone formulas in disjunctive normal form with at most two literals per clause. In contrast to the versions without the absolute value, however, we prove that these variants are fixed-parameter tractable. As technical contribution we present a kernelization for an auxiliary problem on hypergraphs in which we seek, given an edge-weighted hypergraph, an induced subgraph that maximizes the absolute value of the sum of edge-weights.
summary: The natural generalization of the Boolean satisfiability problem to optimization problems is the task of determining the maximum number of clauses that can simultaneously be satisfied in a propositional formula in conjunctive normal form. In the weighted maximum satisfiability problem each clause has a positive weight and one seeks an assignment of maximum weight. The literature almost solely considers the case of positive weights. While the general case of the problem is only restricted slightly by this constraint, many special cases become trivial in the absence of negative weights. In this work we study the problem with negative weights and observe that the problem becomes computationally harder - which we formalize from a parameterized perspective in the sense that various variations of the problem become W[1]-hard if negative weights are present. Allowing negative weights also introduces new variants of the problem: Instead of maximizing the sum of weights of satisfied clauses, we can maximize the absolute value of that sum. This turns out to be surprisingly expressive even restricted to monotone formulas in disjunctive normal form with at most two literals per clause. In contrast to the versions without the absolute value, however, we prove that these variants are fixed-parameter tractable. As technical contribution we present a kernelization for an auxiliary problem on hypergraphs in which we seek, given an edge-weighted hypergraph, an induced subgraph that maximizes the absolute value of the sum of edge-weights.
abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性问题对优化问题的自然推广是确定在合取范式的命题公式中可以同时满足的子句的最大数量的任务。在加权最大可满足性问题中，每个子句都有一个正权重，并且寻求最大权重的分配。文献几乎只考虑正权重的情况。虽然问题的一般情况仅受到此约束的轻微限制，但在没有负权重的情况下，许多特殊情况变得微不足道。在这项工作中，我们研究负权重的问题，并观察到该问题在计算上变得更加困难——我们从参数化的角度将其形式化，因为如果存在负权重，问题的各种变体就会变得 W[1]-困难。允许负权重还引入了问题的新变体：我们可以最大化该总和的绝对值，而不是最大化满足子句的权重总和。事实证明，即使仅限于析取范式形式的单调公式（每个子句最多有两个文字），其表达能力也令人惊讶。然而，与没有绝对值的版本相比，我们证明这些变体是固定参数易于处理的。作为技术贡献，我们提出了超图辅助问题的核化，在给定边加权超图的情况下，我们寻求一个使边权重总和的绝对值最大化的导出子图。

AI.tldr: 本文从参数化复杂度角度研究带绝对值函数的加权最大可满足性问题（MaxSAT），分析负权重对问题复杂度的影响，并探讨其在单调析取范式下的可解性。
AI.motivation: 传统MaxSAT问题仅考虑正权重，但负权重引入后问题复杂度显著增加且产生新变体。作者旨在揭示负权重下问题的计算复杂性边界，并探索绝对值目标函数的表达能力与可解性。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂度理论分析问题硬度，证明负权重下多个变体属于W[1]-难问题；针对绝对值目标函数设计超图子图优化的核化方法，证明特定约束下的固定参数可解性。
AI.result: 发现负权重使问题W[1]-难，但绝对值目标函数在单调DNF公式（每子句最多两文字）下呈现固定参数可解性，并提出超图问题的核化算法。
AI.conclusion: 绝对值目标函数显著提升问题表达能力，但其可解性依赖于约束结构。参数化分析为设计高效算法提供了理论依据，尤其在特定公式类型中具有实际应用价值。
