authors_text: Dilson Lucas Pereira,Michel Wan Der Maas Soares
title: A 3-Approximation Algorithm for a Particular Case of the Hamiltonian p-Median Problem
title_zh: 哈密​​顿p中值问题特例的3-近似算法
abstract: Given a weighted graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, and a positive integer $p$, the Hamiltonian $p$-median problem consists in finding $p$ cycles of minimum total weight such that each vertex of $G$ is in exactly one cycle. We introduce an $O(n^6)$ 3-approximation algorithm for the particular case in which $p \leq \lceil \frac{n-2\lceil \frac{n}{5} \rceil}{3} \rceil$. An approximation ratio of 2 might be obtained depending on the number of components in the optimal 2-factor of $G$. We present computational experiments comparing the approximation algorithm to an exact algorithm from the literature. In practice much better ratios are obtained. For large values of $p$, the exact algorithm is outperformed by our approximation algorithm.
summary: Given a weighted graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, and a positive integer $p$, the Hamiltonian $p$-median problem consists in finding $p$ cycles of minimum total weight such that each vertex of $G$ is in exactly one cycle. We introduce an $O(n^6)$ 3-approximation algorithm for the particular case in which $p \leq \lceil \frac{n-2\lceil \frac{n}{5} \rceil}{3} \rceil$. An approximation ratio of 2 might be obtained depending on the number of components in the optimal 2-factor of $G$. We present computational experiments comparing the approximation algorithm to an exact algorithm from the literature. In practice much better ratios are obtained. For large values of $p$, the exact algorithm is outperformed by our approximation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 给定一个具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的加权图 $G$ 以及一个正整数 $p$，哈密顿量 $p$ 中值问题在于找到最小总权重的 $p$ 周期，使得 $G$ 的每个顶点恰好处于一个周期中。我们针对 $p \leq \lceil \frac{n-2\lceil \frac{n}{5} \rceil}{3} \rceil$ 的特殊情况引入 $O(n^6)$ 3 近似算法。根据 $G$ 的最佳 2 因子中的分量数量，可以获得 2 的近似比率。我们提出了计算实验，将近似算法与文献中的精确算法进行比较。在实践中可以获得更好的比率。对于较大的 $p$ 值，精确算法的性能优于我们的近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对哈密顿p-中位问题特定情况的3-近似算法，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 哈密顿p-中位问题在图论中具有重要应用，但其精确求解复杂度高。现有算法在处理大规模实例时效率不足，因此需要设计高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 设计了一个时间复杂度为O(n⁶)的3-近似算法，针对p≤⌈(n−2⌈n/5⌉)/3⌉的特定情况，并通过计算实验与文献中的精确算法进行对比。
AI.result: 算法在理论上的近似比为3，但实际测试中表现更优；对于大p值，该近似算法显著优于精确算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的近似算法在理论与实践中均表现良好，尤其适用于大规模问题，未来可进一步优化近似比或扩展适用范围。

motivation: 哈密顿p-中位问题在图论中具有重要应用，但其精确求解复杂度高。现有算法在处理大规模实例时效率不足，因此需要设计高效的近似算法。
method: 设计了一个时间复杂度为O(n⁶)的3-近似算法，针对p≤⌈(n−2⌈n/5⌉)/3⌉的特定情况，并通过计算实验与文献中的精确算法进行对比。
result: 算法在理论上的近似比为3，但实际测试中表现更优；对于大p值，该近似算法显著优于精确算法。
conclusion: 提出的近似算法在理论与实践中均表现良好，尤其适用于大规模问题，未来可进一步优化近似比或扩展适用范围。
search_text: A 3-Approximation Algorithm for a Particular Case of the Hamiltonian p-Median Problem 哈密​​顿p中值问题特例的3-近似算法 Given a weighted graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, and a positive integer $p$, the Hamiltonian $p$-median problem consists in finding $p$ cycles of minimum total weight such that each vertex of $G$ is in exactly one cycle. We introduce an $O(n^6)$ 3-approximation algorithm for the particular case in which $p \leq \lceil \frac{n-2\lceil \frac{n}{5} \rceil}{3} \rceil$. An approximation ratio of 2 might be obtained depending on the number of components in the optimal 2-factor of $G$. We present computational experiments comparing the approximation algorithm to an exact algorithm from the literature. In practice much better ratios are obtained. For large values of $p$, the exact algorithm is outperformed by our approximation algorithm. 给定一个具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的加权图 $G$ 以及一个正整数 $p$，哈密顿量 $p$ 中值问题在于找到最小总权重的 $p$ 周期，使得 $G$ 的每个顶点恰好处于一个周期中。我们针对 $p \leq \lceil \frac{n-2\lceil \frac{n}{5} \rceil}{3} \rceil$ 的特殊情况引入 $O(n^6)$ 3 近似算法。根据 $G$ 的最佳 2 因子中的分量数量，可以获得 2 的近似比率。我们提出了计算实验，将近似算法与文献中的精确算法进行比较。在实践中可以获得更好的比率。对于较大的 $p$ 值，精确算法的性能优于我们的近似算法。 本文提出了一种针对哈密顿p-中位问题特定情况的3-近似算法，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Dilson Lucas Pereira,Michel Wan Der Maas Soares cs.DS

title: Observations From an Online Security Competition and Its Implications on Crowdsourced Security
title_zh: 在线安全竞赛的观察及其对众包安全的影响
abstract: The crowd sourced security industry, particularly bug bounty programs, has grown dramatically over the past years and has become the main source of software security reviews for many companies. However, the academic literature has largely omitted security teams, particularly in crowd work contexts. As such, we know very little about how distributed security teams organize, collaborate, and what technology needs they have. We fill this gap by conducting focus groups with the top five teams (out of 18,201 participating teams) of a computer security Capture-the-Flag (CTF) competition. We find that these teams adopted a set of strategies centered on specialties, which allowed them to reduce issues relating to dispersion, double work, and lack of previous collaboration. Observing the current issues of a model centered on individual workers in security crowd work platforms, our study cases that scaling security work to teams is feasible and beneficial. Finally, we identify various areas which warrant future work, such as issues of social identity in high-skilled crowd work environments.
summary: The crowd sourced security industry, particularly bug bounty programs, has grown dramatically over the past years and has become the main source of software security reviews for many companies. However, the academic literature has largely omitted security teams, particularly in crowd work contexts. As such, we know very little about how distributed security teams organize, collaborate, and what technology needs they have. We fill this gap by conducting focus groups with the top five teams (out of 18,201 participating teams) of a computer security Capture-the-Flag (CTF) competition. We find that these teams adopted a set of strategies centered on specialties, which allowed them to reduce issues relating to dispersion, double work, and lack of previous collaboration. Observing the current issues of a model centered on individual workers in security crowd work platforms, our study cases that scaling security work to teams is feasible and beneficial. Finally, we identify various areas which warrant future work, such as issues of social identity in high-skilled crowd work environments.
abstract_zh: 众包安全行业，特别是错误赏金计划，在过去几年中急剧增长，并已成为许多公司软件安全审查的主要来源。然而，学术文献很大程度上忽略了安全团队，特别是在人群工作环境中。因此，我们对分布式安全团队如何组织、协作以及他们需要什么技术知之甚少。我们通过与计算机安全夺旗 (CTF) 竞赛的前五名团队（从 18,201 个参赛团队中选出）进行焦点小组来填补这一空白。我们发现这些团队采用了一套以专业为中心的策略，这使他们能够减少与分散、双重工作和缺乏先前协作有关的问题。观察目前安全众包工作平台中以个体工作人员为中心的模式存在的问题，我们的研究案例表明，将安全工作扩展到团队是可行且有益的。最后，我们确定了需要未来工作的各个领域，例如高技能人群工作环境中的社会认同问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析网络安全CTF竞赛中的顶级团队策略，探讨众包安全环境下团队协作模式及其技术需求。
AI.motivation: 现有学术研究忽视了众包安全领域中团队协作机制，尤其缺乏对分布式安全团队组织方式及技术需求的系统性分析。
AI.method: 对某CTF竞赛中排名前5的团队（共18201支队伍）进行焦点小组访谈，分析其协作策略与技术需求。
AI.result: 发现团队通过专长分工策略有效解决分散协作、重复劳动等问题，验证了团队化众包安全模式的可行性与优势。
AI.conclusion: 团队协作可提升众包安全效率，未来需关注高技能群体中的社会身份认同等社会技术问题。

title: Finding a Landing Site on an Urban Area: A Multi-Resolution Probabilistic Approach
title_zh: 在城市地区寻找着陆点：多分辨率概率方法
abstract: This paper considers the problem of finding a landing spot for a drone in a dense urban environment. The conflicting requirement of fast exploration and high resolution is solved using a multi-resolution approach, by which visual information is collected by the drone at decreasing altitudes so that spatial resolution of the acquired images increases monotonically. A probability distribution is used to capture the uncertainty of the decision process for each terrain patch. The distributions are updated as information from different altitudes is collected. When the confidence level for one of the patches becomes larger than a pre-specified threshold, suitability for landing is declared. One of the main building blocks of the approach is a semantic segmentation algorithm that attaches probabilities to each pixel of a single view. The decision algorithm combines these probabilities with a priori data and previous measurements to obtain the best estimates. Feasibility is illustrated by presenting a number of examples generated by a realistic closed-loop simulator.
summary: This paper considers the problem of finding a landing spot for a drone in a dense urban environment. The conflicting requirement of fast exploration and high resolution is solved using a multi-resolution approach, by which visual information is collected by the drone at decreasing altitudes so that spatial resolution of the acquired images increases monotonically. A probability distribution is used to capture the uncertainty of the decision process for each terrain patch. The distributions are updated as information from different altitudes is collected. When the confidence level for one of the patches becomes larger than a pre-specified threshold, suitability for landing is declared. One of the main building blocks of the approach is a semantic segmentation algorithm that attaches probabilities to each pixel of a single view. The decision algorithm combines these probabilities with a priori data and previous measurements to obtain the best estimates. Feasibility is illustrated by presenting a number of examples generated by a realistic closed-loop simulator.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了在密集的城市环境中为无人机寻找着陆点的问题。使用多分辨率方法解决了快速探索和高分辨率的冲突要求，通过该方法，无人机在降低的高度上收集视觉信息，从而使所获取图像的空间分辨率单调增加。概率分布用于捕获每个地形块决策过程的不确定性。随着收集不同高度的信息，分布会更新。当其中一个补丁的置信水平变得大于预先指定的阈值时，就宣布适合着陆。该方法的主要构建模块之一是语义分割算法，它将概率附加到单个视图的每个像素。决策算法将这些概率与先验数据和先前的测量结果相结合，以获得最佳估计。通过展示由实际闭环模拟器生成的许多示例来说明可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分辨率概率方法，用于在复杂城市环境中为无人机寻找安全着陆点。
AI.motivation: 城市环境地形复杂且动态变化，传统方法难以平衡快速探索与高分辨率需求，需解决着陆点选择的不确定性问题。
AI.method: 通过多分辨率图像采集（逐级降低高度提升分辨率），结合语义分割算法和概率分布模型，动态更新地形块的着陆可行性评估。
AI.result: 在闭环模拟器中验证了方法有效性，展示了多分辨率策略能在保证效率的同时准确识别可着陆区域。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率概率框架有效解决了城市区域无人机着陆点选择的实时性与精度矛盾，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Snipta Mallick,Geraldine Jeckeln,Connor J. Parde,Carlos D. Castillo,Alice J. O'Toole
title: The Influence of the Other-Race Effect on Susceptibility to Face Morphing Attacks
title_zh: 其他种族效应对面部变形攻击敏感性的影响
abstract: Facial morphs created between two identities resemble both of the faces used to create the morph. Consequently, humans and machines are prone to mistake morphs made from two identities for either of the faces used to create the morph. This vulnerability has been exploited in "morph attacks" in security scenarios. Here, we asked whether the "other-race effect" (ORE) -- the human advantage for identifying own- vs. other-race faces -- exacerbates morph attack susceptibility for humans. We also asked whether face-identification performance in a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is affected by the race of morphed faces. Caucasian (CA) and East-Asian (EA) participants performed a face-identity matching task on pairs of CA and EA face images in two conditions. In the morph condition, different-identity pairs consisted of an image of identity "A" and a 50/50 morph between images of identity "A" and "B". In the baseline condition, morphs of different identities never appeared. As expected, morphs were identified mistakenly more often than original face images. Moreover, CA participants showed an advantage for CA faces in comparison to EA faces (a partial ORE). Of primary interest, morph identification was substantially worse for cross-race faces than for own-race faces. Similar to humans, the DCNN performed more accurately for original face images than for morphed image pairs. Notably, the deep network proved substantially more accurate than humans in both cases. The results point to the possibility that DCNNs might be useful for improving face identification accuracy when morphed faces are presented. They also indicate the significance of the ORE in morph attack susceptibility in applied settings.

Consequently, humans and machines are prone to mistake morphs made from two identities for either of the faces used to create the morph. We also asked whether face-identification performance in a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is affected by the race of morphed faces. Caucasian (CA) and East-Asian (EA) participants performed a face-identity matching task on pairs of CA and EA face images in two conditions. In the morph condition, different-identity pairs consisted of an image of identity "A" and a 50/50 morph between images of identity "A" and "B". The results point to the possibility that DCNNs might be useful for improving face identification accuracy when morphed faces are presented. They also indicate the significance of the ORE in morph attack susceptibility in applied settings.
abstract_zh: 在两个身份之间创建的面部变形类似于用于创建变形的两张脸。因此，人类和机器很容易将由两个身份制成的变形误认为是用于创建变形的任何一张脸。该漏洞已被利用于安全场景中的“变形攻击”。在这里，我们询问“其他种族效应”（ORE）——人类识别自己与其他种族面孔的优势——是否会加剧人类对变形攻击的敏感性。我们还询问深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 中的人脸识别性能是否受到变形人脸竞争的影响。白种人 (CA) 和东亚人 (EA) 参与者在两种条件下对 CA 和 EA 人脸图像对执行人脸身份匹配任务。在变形条件下，不同身份对由身份“A”的图像以及身份“A”和“B”的图像之间的 50/50 变形组成。在基线条件下，不同身份的变形从未出现。正如预期的那样，变形人脸图像比原始人脸图像更容易被错误识别。此外，与 EA 面孔（部分 ORE）相比，CA 参与者表现出 CA 面孔的优势。最令人感兴趣的是，跨种族面孔的变形识别比同族面孔的变形识别要差得多。与人类类似，DCNN 对原始人脸图像的表现比对变形图像对的表现更准确。值得注意的是，在这两种情况下，深度网络都比人类准确得多。结果表明，当呈现变形的人脸时，DCNN 可能有助于提高人脸识别的准确性。它们还表明了 ORE 在应用环境中变形攻击敏感性中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 研究其他种族效应（ORE）如何影响人类和深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在面部融合攻击中的识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 探讨ORE是否加剧人类对融合攻击的易感性，并评估DCNN在识别不同种族融合面孔时的准确性。
AI.method: 通过让白人和东亚参与者进行面孔匹配任务，比较他们在融合条件和基线条件下对不同种族面孔的识别表现，并评估DCNN的识别准确率。
AI.result: 人类在跨种族融合面孔识别上错误率更高，DCNN在识别原始面孔和融合面孔时均优于人类，且对跨种族面孔的准确性显著更高。
AI.conclusion: DCNN可能提升融合面孔识别的准确性，而ORE在安全场景中对融合攻击的易感性具有重要意义。

search_text: The Influence of the Other-Race Effect on Susceptibility to Face Morphing Attacks 其他种族效应对面部变形攻击敏感性的影响 Facial morphs created between two identities resemble both of the faces used to create the morph. Consequently, humans and machines are prone to mistake morphs made from two identities for either of the faces used to create the morph. This vulnerability has been exploited in "morph attacks" in security scenarios. Here, we asked whether the "other-race effect" (ORE) -- the human advantage for identifying own- vs. other-race faces -- exacerbates morph attack susceptibility for humans. We also asked whether face-identification performance in a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is affected by the race of morphed faces. Caucasian (CA) and East-Asian (EA) participants performed a face-identity matching task on pairs of CA and EA face images in two conditions. In the morph condition, different-identity pairs consisted of an image of identity "A" and a 50/50 morph between images of identity "A" and "B". In the baseline condition, morphs of different identities never appeared. As expected, morphs were identified mistakenly more often than original face images. Moreover, CA participants showed an advantage for CA faces in comparison to EA faces (a partial ORE). Of primary interest, morph identification was substantially worse for cross-race faces than for own-race faces. Similar to humans, the DCNN performed more accurately for original face images than for morphed image pairs. Notably, the deep network proved substantially more accurate than humans in both cases. The results point to the possibility that DCNNs might be useful for improving face identification accuracy when morphed faces are presented. They also indicate the significance of the ORE in morph attack susceptibility in applied settings. 在两个身份之间创建的面部变形类似于用于创建变形的两张脸。因此，人类和机器很容易将由两个身份制成的变形误认为是用于创建变形的任何一张脸。该漏洞已被利用于安全场景中的“变形攻击”。在这里，我们询问“其他种族效应”（ORE）——人类识别自己与其他种族面孔的优势——是否会加剧人类对变形攻击的敏感性。我们还询问深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 中的人脸识别性能是否受到变形人脸竞争的影响。白种人 (CA) 和东亚人 (EA) 参与者在两种条件下对 CA 和 EA 人脸图像对执行人脸身份匹配任务。在变形条件下，不同身份对由身份“A”的图像以及身份“A”和“B”的图像之间的 50/50 变形组成。在基线条件下，不同身份的变形从未出现。正如预期的那样，变形人脸图像比原始人脸图像更容易被错误识别。此外，与 EA 面孔（部分 ORE）相比，CA 参与者表现出 CA 面孔的优势。最令人感兴趣的是，跨种族面孔的变形识别比同族面孔的变形识别要差得多。与人类类似，DCNN 对原始人脸图像的表现比对变形图像对的表现更准确。值得注意的是，在这两种情况下，深度网络都比人类准确得多。结果表明，当呈现变形的人脸时，DCNN 可能有助于提高人脸识别的准确性。它们还表明了 ORE 在应用环境中变形攻击敏感性中的重要性。 研究其他种族效应（ORE）如何影响人类和深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在面部融合攻击中的识别准确性。 Snipta Mallick,Geraldine Jeckeln,Connor J. Parde,Carlos D. Castillo,Alice J. O'Toole cs.CV

title: Self-scalable Tanh (Stan): Faster Convergence and Better Generalization in Physics-informed Neural Networks
title_zh: 自扩展 Tanh (Stan)：物理信息神经网络的更快收敛和更好泛化
abstract: Physics-informed Neural Networks (PINNs) are gaining attention in the engineering and scientific literature for solving a range of differential equations with applications in weather modeling, healthcare, manufacturing, etc. Poor scalability is one of the barriers to utilizing PINNs for many real-world problems. To address this, a Self-scalable tanh (Stan) activation function is proposed for the PINNs. The proposed Stan function is smooth, non-saturating, and has a trainable parameter. During training, it can allow easy flow of gradients to compute the required derivatives and also enable systematic scaling of the input-output mapping. It is shown theoretically that the PINNs with the proposed Stan function have no spurious stationary points when using gradient descent algorithms. The proposed Stan is tested on a number of numerical studies involving general regression problems. It is subsequently used for solving multiple forward problems, which involve second-order derivatives and multiple dimensions, and an inverse problem where the thermal diffusivity of a rod is predicted with heat conduction data. These case studies establish empirically that the Stan activation function can achieve better training and more accurate predictions than the existing activation functions in the literature.
summary: Physics-informed Neural Networks (PINNs) are gaining attention in the engineering and scientific literature for solving a range of differential equations with applications in weather modeling, healthcare, manufacturing, etc. Poor scalability is one of the barriers to utilizing PINNs for many real-world problems. To address this, a Self-scalable tanh (Stan) activation function is proposed for the PINNs. The proposed Stan function is smooth, non-saturating, and has a trainable parameter. During training, it can allow easy flow of gradients to compute the required derivatives and also enable systematic scaling of the input-output mapping. It is shown theoretically that the PINNs with the proposed Stan function have no spurious stationary points when using gradient descent algorithms. The proposed Stan is tested on a number of numerical studies involving general regression problems. It is subsequently used for solving multiple forward problems, which involve second-order derivatives and multiple dimensions, and an inverse problem where the thermal diffusivity of a rod is predicted with heat conduction data. These case studies establish empirically that the Stan activation function can achieve better training and more accurate predictions than the existing activation functions in the literature.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 因其求解一系列微分方程并应用于天气建模、医疗保健、制造等领域而受到工程和科学文献的关注。可扩展性差是利用 PINN 解决许多现实问题的障碍之一。为了解决这个问题，我们为 PINN 提出了一种自可扩展的 tanh (Stan) 激活函数。所提出的 Stan 函数是平滑的、非饱和的，并且具有可训练的参数。在训练期间，它可以允许轻松的梯度流来计算所需的导数，并且还可以系统地缩放输入输出映射。理论上表明，使用梯度下降算法时，具有所提出的 Stan 函数的 PINN 不存在虚假驻点。所提出的 Stan 在涉及一般回归问题的大量数值研究中进行了测试。随后，它用于解决涉及二阶导数和多维的多个正向问题，以及使用热传导数据预测棒的热扩散率的逆向问题。这些案例研究凭经验证明，与文献中现有的激活函数相比，Stan 激活函数可以实现更好的训练和更准确的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应可缩放的双曲正切激活函数Stan，用于改进物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的收敛速度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有PINNs存在可扩展性差的问题，限制其在复杂工程和科学问题中的应用，需改进激活函数以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计具有可训练参数的Stan激活函数，理论证明其无虚假平稳点，并通过回归问题、多维正问题及热传导反问题验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明Stan在训练效率和预测精度上优于传统激活函数，适用于含高阶导数及多维复杂问题的场景。
AI.conclusion: Stan激活函数有效解决了PINNs的可扩展性瓶颈，为复杂物理问题求解提供了更优的神经网络架构选择。

title: hate-alert@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022: Ensembling Multi-Modalities for Tamil TrollMeme Classification
title_zh: hat-alert@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022：泰米尔 TrollMeme 分类的多模态集成
abstract: Social media platforms often act as breeding grounds for various forms of trolling or malicious content targeting users or communities. One way of trolling users is by creating memes, which in most cases unites an image with a short piece of text embedded on top of it. The situation is more complex for multilingual(e.g., Tamil) memes due to the lack of benchmark datasets and models. We explore several models to detect Troll memes in Tamil based on the shared task, "Troll Meme Classification in DravidianLangTech2022" at ACL-2022. We observe while the text-based model MURIL performs better for Non-troll meme classification, the image-based model VGG16 performs better for Troll-meme classification. Further fusing these two modalities help us achieve stable outcomes in both classes. Our fusion model achieved a 0.561 weighted average F1 score and ranked second in this task.
summary: Social media platforms often act as breeding grounds for various forms of trolling or malicious content targeting users or communities. One way of trolling users is by creating memes, which in most cases unites an image with a short piece of text embedded on top of it. The situation is more complex for multilingual(e.g., Tamil) memes due to the lack of benchmark datasets and models. We explore several models to detect Troll memes in Tamil based on the shared task, "Troll Meme Classification in DravidianLangTech2022" at ACL-2022. We observe while the text-based model MURIL performs better for Non-troll meme classification, the image-based model VGG16 performs better for Troll-meme classification. Further fusing these two modalities help us achieve stable outcomes in both classes. Our fusion model achieved a 0.561 weighted average F1 score and ranked second in this task.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台经常成为针对用户或社区的各种形式的恶意攻击或恶意内容的滋生地。欺骗用户的一种方法是创建模因，在大多数情况下，模因将图像与嵌入在图像顶部的一小段文本结合起来。由于缺乏基准数据集和模型，多语言（例如泰米尔语）模因的情况更加复杂。我们基于 ACL-2022 上的共享任务“DravidianLangTech2022 中的 Troll Meme 分类”探索了几种检测泰米尔语 Troll Meme 的模型。我们观察到，基于文本的模型 MURIL 在非巨魔模因分类方面表现更好，而基于图像的模型 VGG16 在巨魔模因分类方面表现更好。进一步融合这两种模式有助于我们在两个类别中取得稳定的结果。我们的融合模型取得了 0.561 的加权平均 F1 分数，在该任务中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过融合多模态模型（文本和图像）来检测泰米尔语中的网络恶搞（Troll）表情包，以解决多语言环境下数据集和模型匮乏的问题。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的恶搞内容（如结合图像与文本的恶搞表情包）对用户和社区构成威胁，而泰米尔语等多语言环境缺乏基准数据集和有效模型，亟需探索多模态方法提升检测能力。
AI.method: 基于ACL-2022任务，采用文本模型MURIL和图像模型VGG16分别处理文本与图像模态，并通过融合两者输出实现多模态分类。
AI.result: 融合模型在加权平均F1分数上达到0.561，位列该任务第二名，且在两类（恶搞与非恶搞）中均表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合方法有效提升了泰米尔语恶搞表情包分类性能，证明了结合文本与图像信息的必要性，为资源匮乏的多语言场景提供了可行方案。

search_text: hate-alert@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022: Ensembling Multi-Modalities for Tamil TrollMeme Classification hat-alert@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022：泰米尔 TrollMeme 分类的多模态集成 Social media platforms often act as breeding grounds for various forms of trolling or malicious content targeting users or communities. One way of trolling users is by creating memes, which in most cases unites an image with a short piece of text embedded on top of it. The situation is more complex for multilingual(e.g., Tamil) memes due to the lack of benchmark datasets and models. We explore several models to detect Troll memes in Tamil based on the shared task, "Troll Meme Classification in DravidianLangTech2022" at ACL-2022. We observe while the text-based model MURIL performs better for Non-troll meme classification, the image-based model VGG16 performs better for Troll-meme classification. Further fusing these two modalities help us achieve stable outcomes in both classes. Our fusion model achieved a 0.561 weighted average F1 score and ranked second in this task. 社交媒体平台经常成为针对用户或社区的各种形式的恶意攻击或恶意内容的滋生地。欺骗用户的一种方法是创建模因，在大多数情况下，模因将图像与嵌入在图像顶部的一小段文本结合起来。由于缺乏基准数据集和模型，多语言（例如泰米尔语）模因的情况更加复杂。我们基于 ACL-2022 上的共享任务“DravidianLangTech2022 中的 Troll Meme 分类”探索了几种检测泰米尔语 Troll Meme 的模型。我们观察到，基于文本的模型 MURIL 在非巨魔模因分类方面表现更好，而基于图像的模型 VGG16 在巨魔模因分类方面表现更好。进一步融合这两种模式有助于我们在两个类别中取得稳定的结果。我们的融合模型取得了 0.561 的加权平均 F1 分数，在该任务中排名第二。 本文旨在通过融合多模态模型（文本和图像）来检测泰米尔语中的网络恶搞（Troll）表情包，以解决多语言环境下数据集和模型匮乏的问题。 Mithun Das,Somnath Banerjee,Animesh Mukherjee cs.MM,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Liezl Stander,Matthew Woolway,Terence L. Van Zyl
title: Surrogate Assisted Evolutionary Multi-objective Optimisation applied to a Pressure Swing Adsorption system
title_zh: 替代辅助进化多目标优化应用于变压吸附系统
abstract: Chemical plant design and optimisation have proven challenging due to the complexity of these real-world systems. The resulting complexity translates into high computational costs for these systems' mathematical formulations and simulation models. Research has illustrated the benefits of using machine learning surrogate models as substitutes for computationally expensive models during optimisation. This paper extends recent research into optimising chemical plant design and operation. The study further explores Surrogate Assisted Genetic Algorithms (SA-GA) in more complex variants of the original plant design and optimisation problems, such as the inclusion of parallel and feedback components. The novel extension to the original algorithm proposed in this study, Surrogate Assisted NSGA-\Romannum{2} (SA-NSGA), was tested on a popular literature case, the Pressure Swing Adsorption (PSA) system. We further provide extensive experimentation, comparing various meta-heuristic optimisation techniques and numerous machine learning models as surrogates. The results for both sets of systems illustrate the benefits of using Genetic Algorithms as an optimisation framework for complex chemical plant system design and optimisation for both single and multi-objective scenarios. We confirm that Random Forest surrogate assisted Evolutionary Algorithms can be scaled to increasingly complex chemical systems with parallel and feedback components. We further find that combining a Genetic Algorithm framework with Machine Learning Surrogate models as a substitute for long-running simulation models yields significant computational efficiency improvements, 1.7 - 1.84 times speedup for the increased complexity examples and a 2.7 times speedup for the Pressure Swing Adsorption system.

The resulting complexity translates into high computational costs for these systems' mathematical formulations and simulation models. Research has illustrated the benefits of using machine learning surrogate models as substitutes for computationally expensive models during optimisation. This paper extends recent research into optimising chemical plant design and operation. The study further explores Surrogate Assisted Genetic Algorithms (SA-GA) in more complex variants of the original plant design and optimisation problems, such as the inclusion of parallel and feedback components. The novel extension to the original algorithm proposed in this study, Surrogate Assisted NSGA-\Romannum{2} (SA-NSGA), was tested on a popular literature case, the Pressure Swing Adsorption (PSA) system. We further provide extensive experimentation, comparing various meta-heuristic optimisation techniques and numerous machine learning models as surrogates. The results for both sets of systems illustrate the benefits of using Genetic Algorithms as an optimisation framework for complex chemical plant system design and optimisation for both single and multi-objective scenarios. We confirm that Random Forest surrogate assisted Evolutionary Algorithms can be scaled to increasingly complex chemical systems with parallel and feedback components. We further find that combining a Genetic Algorithm framework with Machine Learning Surrogate models as a substitute for long-running simulation models yields significant computational efficiency improvements, 1.7 - 1.84 times speedup for the increased complexity examples and a 2.7 times speedup for the Pressure Swing Adsorption system.
abstract_zh: 由于这些现实系统的复杂性，化工厂的设计和优化已被证明具有挑战性。由此产生的复杂性转化为这些系统的数学公式和模拟模型的高计算成本。研究表明，在优化过程中使用机器学习代理模型来替代计算成本较高的模型的好处。本文将最新研究扩展到优化化工厂设计和运营。该研究进一步探索了替代辅助遗传算法（SA-GA）在原始工厂设计和优化问题的更复杂变体中的应用，例如包含并行和反馈组件。本研究中提出的原始算法的新颖扩展，代理辅助 NSGA-\Romannum{2} (SA-NSGA)，在流行的文献案例——变压吸附 (PSA) 系统上进行了测试。我们进一步提供广泛的实验，比较各种元启发式优化技术和众多机器学习模型作为替代。两组系统的结果说明了使用遗传算法作为复杂化工厂系统设计和单目标和多目标场景优化的优化框架的好处。我们确认随机森林代理辅助进化算法可以扩展到具有并行和反馈组件的日益复杂的化学系统。我们进一步发现，将遗传算法框架与机器学习代理模型相结合作为长期运行模拟模型的替代品可以显着提高计算效率，复杂性示例的加速提高 1.7 - 1.84 倍，变压吸附系统的加速提高 2.7 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文将代理辅助的进化多目标优化方法应用于压力摆动吸附系统，以解决化工厂设计与优化中的复杂性和高计算成本问题。
AI.motivation: 化工系统设计因复杂性导致数学模型计算成本高昂，传统优化方法效率低下，需探索更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出代理辅助NSGA-II算法（SA-NSGA），结合随机森林等机器学习模型替代耗时仿真，优化包含并行和反馈组件的复杂系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，代理辅助进化算法在复杂系统中实现1.7-1.84倍加速，在PSA系统中达到2.7倍加速，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将遗传算法与机器学习代理模型结合，能显著提升复杂化工系统优化的计算效率，适用于多目标优化场景。

authors_text: Elvis Nava,John Z. Zhang,Mike Y. Michelis,Tao Du,Pingchuan Ma,Benjamin F. Grewe,Wojciech Matusik,Robert K. Katzschmann
title: Fast Aquatic Swimmer Optimization with Differentiable Projective Dynamics and Neural Network Hydrodynamic Models
title_zh: 利用可微分投影动力学和神经网络水动力模型进行快速水上游泳者优化
abstract: Aquatic locomotion is a classic fluid-structure interaction (FSI) problem of interest to biologists and engineers. Solving the fully coupled FSI equations for incompressible Navier-Stokes and finite elasticity is computationally expensive. Optimizing robotic swimmer design within such a system generally involves cumbersome, gradient-free procedures on top of the already costly simulation. To address this challenge we present a novel, fully differentiable hybrid approach to FSI that combines a 2D direct numerical simulation for the deformable solid structure of the swimmer and a physics-constrained neural network surrogate to capture hydrodynamic effects of the fluid. For the deformable solid simulation of the swimmer's body, we use state-of-the-art techniques from the field of computer graphics to speed up the finite-element method (FEM). For the fluid simulation, we use a U-Net architecture trained with a physics-based loss function to predict the flow field at each time step. The pressure and velocity field outputs from the neural network are sampled around the boundary of our swimmer using an immersed boundary method (IBM) to compute its swimming motion accurately and efficiently. We demonstrate the computational efficiency and differentiability of our hybrid simulator on a 2D carangiform swimmer. Due to differentiability, the simulator can be used for computational design of controls for soft bodies immersed in fluids via direct gradient-based optimization.
summary: Aquatic locomotion is a classic fluid-structure interaction (FSI) problem of interest to biologists and engineers. Solving the fully coupled FSI equations for incompressible Navier-Stokes and finite elasticity is computationally expensive. Optimizing robotic swimmer design within such a system generally involves cumbersome, gradient-free procedures on top of the already costly simulation. To address this challenge we present a novel, fully differentiable hybrid approach to FSI that combines a 2D direct numerical simulation for the deformable solid structure of the swimmer and a physics-constrained neural network surrogate to capture hydrodynamic effects of the fluid. For the deformable solid simulation of the swimmer's body, we use state-of-the-art techniques from the field of computer graphics to speed up the finite-element method (FEM). For the fluid simulation, we use a U-Net architecture trained with a physics-based loss function to predict the flow field at each time step. The pressure and velocity field outputs from the neural network are sampled around the boundary of our swimmer using an immersed boundary method (IBM) to compute its swimming motion accurately and efficiently. We demonstrate the computational efficiency and differentiability of our hybrid simulator on a 2D carangiform swimmer. Due to differentiability, the simulator can be used for computational design of controls for soft bodies immersed in fluids via direct gradient-based optimization.
abstract_zh: 水下运动是生物学家和工程师感兴趣的经典流固耦合 (FSI) 问题。求解不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯和有限弹性的全耦合 FSI 方程的计算成本很高。在这样的系统中优化机器人游泳者的设计通常除了成本高昂的模拟之外还涉及繁琐的无梯度程序。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的、完全可微的 FSI 混合方法，该方法结合了游泳者可变形固体结构的 2D 直接数值模拟和物理约束的神经网络代理来捕获流体的流体动力学效应。对于游泳者身体的可变形固体模拟，我们使用计算机图形学领域最先进的技术来加速有限元方法 (FEM)。对于流体模拟，我们使用经过基于物理的损失函数训练的 U-Net 架构来预测每个时间步的流场。使用浸没边界法 (IBM) 在游泳者的边界周围对神经网络的压力和速度场输出进行采样，以准确有效地计算其游泳运动。我们在 2D carangiform 游泳者上展示了混合模拟器的计算效率和可微性。由于可微分性，模拟器可用于通过直接基于梯度的优化对浸入流体中的软体进行控制的计算设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可微分投影动力学与神经网络流体力学模型的混合方法，用于加速水下游泳器的优化设计。
AI.motivation: 传统流固耦合仿真计算成本高且优化过程依赖低效的无梯度方法，难以实现复杂水下运动的快速设计优化。
AI.method: 采用计算机图形学加速的有限元法模拟游泳器变形结构，并通过物理约束的U-Net神经网络预测流场，结合浸入边界法实现高效流固耦合计算。
AI.result: 在二维Carangiform游泳器案例中验证了混合模拟器的计算效率与可微性，成功实现了基于梯度的软体水下机器人控制优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可微分混合仿真框架显著提升了水下运动优化效率，为软体机器人设计提供了新的计算工具。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可微分投影动力学与神经网络流体力学模型的混合方法，用于加速水下游泳器的优化设计。
ai_content.motivation: 传统流固耦合仿真计算成本高且优化过程依赖低效的无梯度方法，难以实现复杂水下运动的快速设计优化。
ai_content.method: 采用计算机图形学加速的有限元法模拟游泳器变形结构，并通过物理约束的U-Net神经网络预测流场，结合浸入边界法实现高效流固耦合计算。
ai_content.result: 在二维Carangiform游泳器案例中验证了混合模拟器的计算效率与可微性，成功实现了基于梯度的软体水下机器人控制优化。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过可微分混合仿真框架显著提升了水下运动优化效率，为软体机器人设计提供了新的计算工具。

search_text: Fast Aquatic Swimmer Optimization with Differentiable Projective Dynamics and Neural Network Hydrodynamic Models 利用可微分投影动力学和神经网络水动力模型进行快速水上游泳者优化 Aquatic locomotion is a classic fluid-structure interaction (FSI) problem of interest to biologists and engineers. Solving the fully coupled FSI equations for incompressible Navier-Stokes and finite elasticity is computationally expensive. Optimizing robotic swimmer design within such a system generally involves cumbersome, gradient-free procedures on top of the already costly simulation. To address this challenge we present a novel, fully differentiable hybrid approach to FSI that combines a 2D direct numerical simulation for the deformable solid structure of the swimmer and a physics-constrained neural network surrogate to capture hydrodynamic effects of the fluid. For the deformable solid simulation of the swimmer's body, we use state-of-the-art techniques from the field of computer graphics to speed up the finite-element method (FEM). For the fluid simulation, we use a U-Net architecture trained with a physics-based loss function to predict the flow field at each time step. The pressure and velocity field outputs from the neural network are sampled around the boundary of our swimmer using an immersed boundary method (IBM) to compute its swimming motion accurately and efficiently. We demonstrate the computational efficiency and differentiability of our hybrid simulator on a 2D carangiform swimmer. Due to differentiability, the simulator can be used for computational design of controls for soft bodies immersed in fluids via direct gradient-based optimization. 水下运动是生物学家和工程师感兴趣的经典流固耦合 (FSI) 问题。求解不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯和有限弹性的全耦合 FSI 方程的计算成本很高。在这样的系统中优化机器人游泳者的设计通常除了成本高昂的模拟之外还涉及繁琐的无梯度程序。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的、完全可微的 FSI 混合方法，该方法结合了游泳者可变形固体结构的 2D 直接数值模拟和物理约束的神经网络代理来捕获流体的流体动力学效应。对于游泳者身体的可变形固体模拟，我们使用计算机图形学领域最先进的技术来加速有限元方法 (FEM)。对于流体模拟，我们使用经过基于物理的损失函数训练的 U-Net 架构来预测每个时间步的流场。使用浸没边界法 (IBM) 在游泳者的边界周围对神经网络的压力和速度场输出进行采样，以准确有效地计算其游泳运动。我们在 2D carangiform 游泳者上展示了混合模拟器的计算效率和可微性。由于可微分性，模拟器可用于通过直接基于梯度的优化对浸入流体中的软体进行控制的计算设计。 本文提出一种结合可微分投影动力学与神经网络流体力学模型的混合方法，用于加速水下游泳器的优化设计。 Elvis Nava,John Z. Zhang,Mike Y. Michelis,Tao Du,Pingchuan Ma,Benjamin F. Grewe,Wojciech Matusik,Robert K. Katzschmann cs.RO,cs.LG,physics.flu-dyn

title: RAMBO-RL: Robust Adversarial Model-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: RAMBO-RL：基于鲁棒对抗模型的离线强化学习
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to find performant policies from logged data without further environment interaction. Model-based algorithms, which learn a model of the environment from the dataset and perform conservative policy optimisation within that model, have emerged as a promising approach to this problem. In this work, we present Robust Adversarial Model-Based Offline RL (RAMBO), a novel approach to model-based offline RL. We formulate the problem as a two-player zero sum game against an adversarial environment model. The model is trained to minimise the value function while still accurately predicting the transitions in the dataset, forcing the policy to act conservatively in areas not covered by the dataset. To approximately solve the two-player game, we alternate between optimising the policy and adversarially optimising the model. The problem formulation that we address is theoretically grounded, resulting in a probably approximately correct (PAC) performance guarantee and a pessimistic value function which lower bounds the value function in the true environment. We evaluate our approach on widely studied offline RL benchmarks, and demonstrate that it outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to find performant policies from logged data without further environment interaction. Model-based algorithms, which learn a model of the environment from the dataset and perform conservative policy optimisation within that model, have emerged as a promising approach to this problem. In this work, we present Robust Adversarial Model-Based Offline RL (RAMBO), a novel approach to model-based offline RL. We formulate the problem as a two-player zero sum game against an adversarial environment model. The model is trained to minimise the value function while still accurately predicting the transitions in the dataset, forcing the policy to act conservatively in areas not covered by the dataset. To approximately solve the two-player game, we alternate between optimising the policy and adversarially optimising the model. The problem formulation that we address is theoretically grounded, resulting in a probably approximately correct (PAC) performance guarantee and a pessimistic value function which lower bounds the value function in the true environment. We evaluate our approach on widely studied offline RL benchmarks, and demonstrate that it outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）旨在从记录的数据中找到性能策略，而无需进一步的环境交互。基于模型的算法从数据集中学习环境模型并在该模型中执行保守的策略优化，已成为解决此问题的一种有前景的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于鲁棒对抗模型的离线强化学习（RAMBO），这是一种基于模型的离线强化学习的新方法。我们将问题表述为针对对抗性环境模型的两人零和博弈。该模型经过训练，可以最小化价值函数，同时仍然准确预测数据集中的转换，迫使策略在数据集未覆盖的区域采取保守的行动。为了近似解决两人博弈，我们交替优化策略和对抗性优化模型。我们解决的问题表述是有理论根据的，导致可能近似正确的（PAC）性能保证和悲观价值函数，它降低了真实环境中价值函数的界限。我们在广泛研究的离线 RL 基准上评估我们的方法，并证明它优于现有的最先进的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAMBO-RL，一种基于对抗模型的离线强化学习方法，通过构建对抗性环境模型来提升策略的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习面临数据分布外动作的挑战，传统模型基方法在保守策略优化上存在不足，需通过对抗机制增强模型对数据分布的保守性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为对抗性零和博弈，交替优化策略与对抗模型：策略最大化价值函数，对抗模型在准确预测转移的同时最小化价值函数，形成悲观价值下界。
AI.result: 在多个离线RL基准测试中，RAMBO-RL优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RAMBO-RL通过理论支撑的对抗框架实现了PAC性能保证，为离线强化学习提供了新的鲁棒解决方案。

title: Toward Policy Explanations for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多智能体强化学习的策略解释
abstract: Advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) enable sequential decision making for a range of exciting multi-agent applications such as cooperative AI and autonomous driving. Explaining agent decisions is crucial for improving system transparency, increasing user satisfaction, and facilitating human-agent collaboration. However, existing works on explainable reinforcement learning mostly focus on the single-agent setting and are not suitable for addressing challenges posed by multi-agent environments. We present novel methods to generate two types of policy explanations for MARL: (i) policy summarization about the agent cooperation and task sequence, and (ii) language explanations to answer queries about agent behavior. Experimental results on three MARL domains demonstrate the scalability of our methods. A user study shows that the generated explanations significantly improve user performance and increase subjective ratings on metrics such as user satisfaction.
summary: Advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) enable sequential decision making for a range of exciting multi-agent applications such as cooperative AI and autonomous driving. Explaining agent decisions is crucial for improving system transparency, increasing user satisfaction, and facilitating human-agent collaboration. However, existing works on explainable reinforcement learning mostly focus on the single-agent setting and are not suitable for addressing challenges posed by multi-agent environments. We present novel methods to generate two types of policy explanations for MARL: (i) policy summarization about the agent cooperation and task sequence, and (ii) language explanations to answer queries about agent behavior. Experimental results on three MARL domains demonstrate the scalability of our methods. A user study shows that the generated explanations significantly improve user performance and increase subjective ratings on metrics such as user satisfaction.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 的进步使得能够为一系列令人兴奋的多智能体应用（例如协作人工智能和自动驾驶）做出顺序决策。解释代理决策对于提高系统透明度、提高用户满意度和促进人工代理协作至关重要。然而，现有的可解释强化学习工作大多集中在单智能体环境上，不适合解决多智能体环境带来的挑战。我们提出了为 MARL 生成两种类型的策略解释的新颖方法：（i）有关代理合作和任务序列的策略摘要，以及（ii）用于回答有关代理行为的查询的语言解释。三个 MARL 领域的实验结果证明了我们方法的可扩展性。用户研究表明，生成的解释可以显着提高用户性能并提高对用户满意度等指标的主观评分。

AI.tldr: 本文致力于为多智能体强化学习（MARL）生成策略解释，解决现有单智能体解释方法在多智能体环境中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释强化学习研究主要针对单智能体，难以应对多智能体环境中的协作复杂性和任务序列问题，需开发适配MARL的解释方法。
AI.method: 提出两种MARL策略解释方法：(i) 基于智能体协作与任务序列的策略总结，(ii) 回答智能体行为查询的语言解释。
AI.result: 实验验证方法在三个MARL领域的可扩展性，用户研究显示解释显著提升用户表现并提高满意度等主观评分。
AI.conclusion: 生成的策略解释有效增强MARL系统透明度，促进人机协作，未来可进一步优化解释的实时性与动态适应性。

We present novel methods to generate two types of policy explanations for MARL: (i) policy summarization about the agent cooperation and task sequence, and (ii) language explanations to answer queries about agent behavior. A user study shows that the generated explanations significantly improve user performance and increase subjective ratings on metrics such as user satisfaction. 多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 的进步使得能够为一系列令人兴奋的多智能体应用（例如协作人工智能和自动驾驶）做出顺序决策。解释代理决策对于提高系统透明度、提高用户满意度和促进人工代理协作至关重要。然而，现有的可解释强化学习工作大多集中在单智能体环境上，不适合解决多智能体环境带来的挑战。我们提出了为 MARL 生成两种类型的策略解释的新颖方法：（i）有关代理合作和任务序列的策略摘要，以及（ii）用于回答有关代理行为的查询的语言解释。三个 MARL 领域的实验结果证明了我们方法的可扩展性。用户研究表明，生成的解释可以显着提高用户性能并提高对用户满意度等指标的主观评分。 本文致力于为多智能体强化学习（MARL）生成策略解释，解决现有单智能体解释方法在多智能体环境中的不足。 Kayla Boggess,Sarit Kraus,Lu Feng cs.AI,cs.LG

title: On the Verification of Belief Programs
title_zh: 论信念程序的验证
abstract: In a recent paper, Belle and Levesque proposed a framework for a type of program called belief programs, a probabilistic extension of GOLOG programs where every action and sensing result could be noisy and every test condition refers to the agent's subjective beliefs. Inherited from GOLOG programs, the action-centered feature makes belief programs fairly suitable for high-level robot control under uncertainty. An important step before deploying such a program is to verify whether it satisfies properties as desired. At least two problems exist in doing verification: how to formally specify properties of a program and what is the complexity of verification. In this paper, we propose a formalism for belief programs based on a modal logic of actions and beliefs. Among other things, this allows us to express PCTL-like temporal properties smoothly. Besides, we investigate the decidability and undecidability for the verification problem of belief programs.
summary: In a recent paper, Belle and Levesque proposed a framework for a type of program called belief programs, a probabilistic extension of GOLOG programs where every action and sensing result could be noisy and every test condition refers to the agent's subjective beliefs. Inherited from GOLOG programs, the action-centered feature makes belief programs fairly suitable for high-level robot control under uncertainty. An important step before deploying such a program is to verify whether it satisfies properties as desired. At least two problems exist in doing verification: how to formally specify properties of a program and what is the complexity of verification. In this paper, we propose a formalism for belief programs based on a modal logic of actions and beliefs. Among other things, this allows us to express PCTL-like temporal properties smoothly. Besides, we investigate the decidability and undecidability for the verification problem of belief programs.
abstract_zh: 在最近的一篇论文中，Belle 和 Levesque 提出了一种称为信念程序的程序框架，这是 GOLOG 程序的概率扩展，其中每个动作和感知结果都可能是有噪声的，每个测试条件都涉及代理的主观信念。继承自GOLOG程序，以动作为中心的特征使得置信程序非常适合不确定性下的高级机器人控制。部署此类程序之前的一个重要步骤是验证它是否满足所需的属性。进行验证至少存在两个问题：如何形式化地指定程序的属性以及验证的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于行为和信念的模态逻辑的信念程序的形式主义。除此之外，这使我们能够顺利地表达类似 PCTL 的时间属性。此外，我们还研究了信念程序验证问题的可判定性和不可判定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模态逻辑的形式化方法，用于验证信念程序的属性，并研究了其验证问题的可判定性。
AI.motivation: 信念程序作为GOLOG的概率扩展，适用于高阶机器人控制，但其验证面临属性形式化和复杂度分析的挑战。
AI.method: 基于动作与信念的模态逻辑，提出形式化框架以表达类似PCTL的时态属性，并分析验证问题的可判定性与不可判定性。
AI.result: 建立了信念程序的形式化验证方法，明确了其验证问题的理论边界（可判定与不可判定情况）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为信念程序的验证提供了理论基础，但验证复杂度问题仍需进一步探索。

title: Learning Eco-Driving Strategies at Signalized Intersections
title_zh: 在信号交叉口学习环保驾驶策略
abstract: Signalized intersections in arterial roads result in persistent vehicle idling and excess accelerations, contributing to fuel consumption and CO2 emissions. There has thus been a line of work studying eco-driving control strategies to reduce fuel consumption and emission levels at intersections. However, methods to devise effective control strategies across a variety of traffic settings remain elusive. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to learn effective eco-driving control strategies. We analyze the potential impact of a learned strategy on fuel consumption, CO2 emission, and travel time and compare with naturalistic driving and model-based baselines. We further demonstrate the generalizability of the learned policies under mixed traffic scenarios. Simulation results indicate that scenarios with 100% penetration of connected autonomous vehicles (CAV) may yield as high as 18% reduction in fuel consumption and 25% reduction in CO2 emission levels while even improving travel speed by 20%. Furthermore, results indicate that even 25% CAV penetration can bring at least 50% of the total fuel and emission reduction benefits.
summary: Signalized intersections in arterial roads result in persistent vehicle idling and excess accelerations, contributing to fuel consumption and CO2 emissions. There has thus been a line of work studying eco-driving control strategies to reduce fuel consumption and emission levels at intersections. However, methods to devise effective control strategies across a variety of traffic settings remain elusive. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to learn effective eco-driving control strategies. We analyze the potential impact of a learned strategy on fuel consumption, CO2 emission, and travel time and compare with naturalistic driving and model-based baselines. We further demonstrate the generalizability of the learned policies under mixed traffic scenarios. Simulation results indicate that scenarios with 100% penetration of connected autonomous vehicles (CAV) may yield as high as 18% reduction in fuel consumption and 25% reduction in CO2 emission levels while even improving travel speed by 20%. Furthermore, results indicate that even 25% CAV penetration can bring at least 50% of the total fuel and emission reduction benefits.
abstract_zh: 主干道上的信号交叉口会导致车辆持续空转和过度加速，从而增加燃料消耗和二氧化碳排放。因此，人们开展了一系列研究生态驾驶控制策略的工作，以减少交叉口的燃油消耗和排放水平。然而，在各种交通环境中设计有效控制策略的方法仍然难以捉摸。在本文中，我们提出了一种强化学习（RL）方法来学习有效的生态驾驶控制策略。我们分析了学习策略对燃油消耗、二氧化碳排放和出行时间的潜在影响，并与自然驾驶和基于模型的基线进行比较。我们进一步证明了混合流量场景下学习策略的通用性。模拟结果表明，联网自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 普及率达到 100% 的情况下，燃油消耗可减少高达 18%，二氧化碳排放水平可减少 25%，同时行驶速度甚至可提高 20%。此外，结果表明，即使 CAV 渗透率为 25%，也能带来至少 50% 的总燃油和减排效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的生态驾驶策略，旨在减少信号交叉口车辆的燃油消耗和CO2排放。
AI.motivation: 信号交叉口的车辆怠速和频繁加速导致高燃油消耗和排放，现有方法难以适应多样化的交通场景。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法学习生态驾驶控制策略，并通过仿真对比自然驾驶和模型基线方法。
AI.result: 100%联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）渗透率可降低18%燃油消耗和25%CO2排放，同时提升20%行驶速度；25%渗透率即可实现50%的减排效益。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习策略在混合交通场景中具有良好泛化性，CAV渗透率越高，生态效益越显著。

title: Process Knowledge-infused Learning for Suicidality Assessment on Social Media
title_zh: 在社交媒体上进行自杀评估的知识注入学习
abstract: Improving the performance and natural language explanations of deep learning algorithms is a priority for adoption by humans in the real world. In several domains, such as healthcare, such technology has significant potential to reduce the burden on humans by providing quality assistance at scale. However, current methods rely on the traditional pipeline of predicting labels from data, thus completely ignoring the process and guidelines used to obtain the labels. Furthermore, post hoc explanations on the data to label prediction using explainable AI (XAI) models, while satisfactory to computer scientists, leave much to be desired to the end-users due to lacking explanations of the process in terms of human-understandable concepts. We \textit{introduce}, \textit{formalize}, and \textit{develop} a novel Artificial Intelligence (A) paradigm -- Process Knowledge-infused Learning (PK-iL). PK-iL utilizes a structured process knowledge that explicitly explains the underlying prediction process that makes sense to end-users. The qualitative human evaluation confirms through a annotator agreement of 0.72, that humans are understand explanations for the predictions. PK-iL also performs competitively with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines.
summary: Improving the performance and natural language explanations of deep learning algorithms is a priority for adoption by humans in the real world. In several domains, such as healthcare, such technology has significant potential to reduce the burden on humans by providing quality assistance at scale. However, current methods rely on the traditional pipeline of predicting labels from data, thus completely ignoring the process and guidelines used to obtain the labels. Furthermore, post hoc explanations on the data to label prediction using explainable AI (XAI) models, while satisfactory to computer scientists, leave much to be desired to the end-users due to lacking explanations of the process in terms of human-understandable concepts. We \textit{introduce}, \textit{formalize}, and \textit{develop} a novel Artificial Intelligence (A) paradigm -- Process Knowledge-infused Learning (PK-iL). PK-iL utilizes a structured process knowledge that explicitly explains the underlying prediction process that makes sense to end-users. The qualitative human evaluation confirms through a annotator agreement of 0.72, that humans are understand explanations for the predictions. PK-iL also performs competitively with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines.
abstract_zh: 提高深度学习算法的性能和自然语言解释是人类在现实世界中采用的首要任务。在医疗保健等多个领域，此类技术具有通过大规模提供优质援助来减轻人类负担的巨大潜力。然而，当前的方法依赖于从数据预测标签的传统流程，从而完全忽略了用于获取标签的过程和指南。此外，使用可解释的人工智能（XAI）模型对数据进行事后解释以标记预测，虽然令计算机科学家满意，但由于缺乏对人类可理解概念的过程的解释，最终用户还有很多不足之处。我们\textit{引入}、\textit{形式化}和\textit{开发}一种新颖的人工智能（A）范式——过程知识注入学习（PK-iL）。 PK-iL 利用结构化过程知识，明确解释对最终用户有意义的底层预测过程。人类定性评估通过 0.72 的注释器一致性证实，人类能够理解对预测的解释。 PK-iL 的性能也与最先进的 (SOTA) 基线相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合过程知识的深度学习方法（PK-iL），用于社交媒体上的自杀倾向评估，旨在提升模型预测的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在预测标签时忽略标签生成的过程和指南，导致解释对终端用户不够友好，难以满足医疗等关键领域的实际需求。
AI.method: 开发了Process Knowledge-infused Learning（PK-iL）框架，通过整合结构化过程知识，使模型预测过程对终端用户具有可解释性。
AI.result: 人类评估显示标注者一致性达0.72，证明解释有效性；模型性能与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: PK-iL通过融合过程知识提升了模型可解释性，为医疗等领域的实际应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合过程知识的深度学习方法（PK-iL），用于社交媒体上的自杀倾向评估，旨在提升模型预测的可解释性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在预测标签时忽略标签生成的过程和指南，导致解释对终端用户不够友好，难以满足医疗等关键领域的实际需求。

search_text: Process Knowledge-infused Learning for Suicidality Assessment on Social Media 在社交媒体上进行自杀评估的知识注入学习 Improving the performance and natural language explanations of deep learning algorithms is a priority for adoption by humans in the real world. In several domains, such as healthcare, such technology has significant potential to reduce the burden on humans by providing quality assistance at scale. However, current methods rely on the traditional pipeline of predicting labels from data, thus completely ignoring the process and guidelines used to obtain the labels. Furthermore, post hoc explanations on the data to label prediction using explainable AI (XAI) models, while satisfactory to computer scientists, leave much to be desired to the end-users due to lacking explanations of the process in terms of human-understandable concepts. We \textit{introduce}, \textit{formalize}, and \textit{develop} a novel Artificial Intelligence (A) paradigm -- Process Knowledge-infused Learning (PK-iL). PK-iL utilizes a structured process knowledge that explicitly explains the underlying prediction process that makes sense to end-users. The qualitative human evaluation confirms through a annotator agreement of 0.72, that humans are understand explanations for the predictions. PK-iL also performs competitively with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines. 提高深度学习算法的性能和自然语言解释是人类在现实世界中采用的首要任务。在医疗保健等多个领域，此类技术具有通过大规模提供优质援助来减轻人类负担的巨大潜力。然而，当前的方法依赖于从数据预测标签的传统流程，从而完全忽略了用于获取标签的过程和指南。此外，使用可解释的人工智能（XAI）模型对数据进行事后解释以标记预测，虽然令计算机科学家满意，但由于缺乏对人类可理解概念的过程的解释，最终用户还有很多不足之处。我们\textit{引入}、\textit{形式化}和\textit{开发}一种新颖的人工智能（A）范式——过程知识注入学习（PK-iL）。 PK-iL 利用结构化过程知识，明确解释对最终用户有意义的底层预测过程。人类定性评估通过 0.72 的注释器一致性证实，人类能够理解对预测的解释。 PK-iL 的性能也与最先进的 (SOTA) 基线相比具有竞争力。 本文提出了一种结合过程知识的深度学习方法（PK-iL），用于社交媒体上的自杀倾向评估，旨在提升模型预测的可解释性。 Kaushik Roy,Manas Gaur,Qi Zhang,Amit Sheth cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Parkinson's disease diagnostics using AI and natural language knowledge transfer
title_zh: 使用人工智能和自然语言知识转移进行帕金森病诊断
abstract: In this work, the issue of Parkinson's disease (PD) diagnostics using non-invasive antemortem techniques was tackled. A deep learning approach for classification of raw speech recordings in patients with diagnosed PD was proposed. The core of proposed method is an audio classifier using knowledge transfer from a pretrained natural language model, namely \textit{wav2vec 2.0}. Method was tested on a group of 38 PD patients and 10 healthy persons above the age of 50. A dataset of speech recordings acquired using a smartphone recorder was constructed and the recordings were label as PD/non-PD with severity of the disease additionally rated using Hoehn-Yahr scale. The audio recordings were cut into 2141 samples that include sentences, syllables, vowels and sustained phonation. The classifier scores up to 97.92\% of cross-validated accuracy. Additionally, paper presents results of a human-level performance assessment questionnaire, which was consulted with the neurology professionals
summary: In this work, the issue of Parkinson's disease (PD) diagnostics using non-invasive antemortem techniques was tackled. A deep learning approach for classification of raw speech recordings in patients with diagnosed PD was proposed. The core of proposed method is an audio classifier using knowledge transfer from a pretrained natural language model, namely \textit{wav2vec 2.0}. Method was tested on a group of 38 PD patients and 10 healthy persons above the age of 50. A dataset of speech recordings acquired using a smartphone recorder was constructed and the recordings were label as PD/non-PD with severity of the disease additionally rated using Hoehn-Yahr scale. The audio recordings were cut into 2141 samples that include sentences, syllables, vowels and sustained phonation. The classifier scores up to 97.92\% of cross-validated accuracy. Additionally, paper presents results of a human-level performance assessment questionnaire, which was consulted with the neurology professionals
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，解决了使用非侵入性生前技术诊断帕金森病 (PD) 的问题。提出了一种对诊断为帕金森病的患者的原始语音记录进行分类的深度学习方法。所提出方法的核心是使用来自预训练自然语言模型的知识迁移的音频分类器，即\textit{wav2vec 2.0}。该方法在 38 名 PD 患者和 10 名 50 岁以上健康人身上进行了测试。构建了使用智能手机录音机获取的语音录音数据集，并将录音标记为 PD/非 PD，并使用 Hoehn-Yahr 量表另外评估了疾病的严重程度。录音被切割成 2141 个样本，包括句子、音节、元音和持续发声。分类器的交叉验证准确率高达 97.92%。此外，论文还提供了人类水平绩效评估调查问卷的结果，该调查问卷咨询了神经病学专业人士

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI和自然语言知识迁移的帕金森病诊断方法，通过分析患者语音数据实现非侵入性诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统帕金森病诊断依赖侵入性检查或专业医生评估，存在成本高、主观性强等问题，需开发更高效准确的非侵入性诊断技术。
AI.method: 采用预训练自然语言模型wav2vec 2.0进行知识迁移，构建音频分类器。使用智能手机采集的语音数据切割为2141个样本（含句子、音节等），通过深度学习实现PD/非PD分类及疾病严重程度评估。
AI.result: 交叉验证准确率达97.92%，并通过神经科专家问卷验证了方法的临床可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了基于语音特征和AI模型在帕金森病诊断中的有效性，为临床提供了一种高精度的辅助诊断方案。

title: Generative 3D Animation Pipelines: Automating Facial Retargeting Workflows
title_zh: 生成 3D 动画管道：自动化面部重定向工作流程
abstract: Design tools in the 3D industry, while powerful, are still tedious and labor-intensive when it comes to bringing a creative idea for a visual effect to life. In this position paper, we discussed how an infamous generative synthetic media, deepfakes, could be of use and embedded into common sophisticated 3D workflows to reduce user workloads in areas such as 3D model editing, material design, and character animation. As a case discussion, we also prototyped a tool to address the retargeting problem in character animation. Although deepfakes themselves have received a negative public image, the results of our interviews with field experts are unexpectedly positive in regard to our tool that utilizes deepfake algorithms. Lastly, we also discussed our experience and observed design practices to put deepfakes to good use, including how we could avoid potential misuses directly by design, how this design changes user interactions, and subsequent open issues.
summary: Design tools in the 3D industry, while powerful, are still tedious and labor-intensive when it comes to bringing a creative idea for a visual effect to life. In this position paper, we discussed how an infamous generative synthetic media, deepfakes, could be of use and embedded into common sophisticated 3D workflows to reduce user workloads in areas such as 3D model editing, material design, and character animation. As a case discussion, we also prototyped a tool to address the retargeting problem in character animation. Although deepfakes themselves have received a negative public image, the results of our interviews with field experts are unexpectedly positive in regard to our tool that utilizes deepfake algorithms. Lastly, we also discussed our experience and observed design practices to put deepfakes to good use, including how we could avoid potential misuses directly by design, how this design changes user interactions, and subsequent open issues.
abstract_zh: 3D 行业的设计工具虽然功能强大，但在将视觉效果的创意变为现实时仍然是乏味且劳动密集型的。在这篇立场文件中，我们讨论了如何使用臭名昭著的生成合成媒体 Deepfakes 并将其嵌入到常见的复杂 3D 工作流程中，以减少 3D 模型编辑、材质设计和角色动画等领域的用户工作量。作为案例讨论，我们还原型设计了一个工具来解决角色动画中的重定向问题。尽管 Deepfake 本身已经获得了负面的公众形象，但我们对领域专家的采访结果却出乎意料地对我们使用 Deepfake 算法的工具产生了积极的影响。最后，我们还讨论了我们的经验和观察到的设计实践，以充分利用深度伪造品，包括我们如何通过设计直接避免潜在的误用，这种设计如何改变用户交互，以及随后的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将深度伪造技术整合到3D动画流程中，以自动化面部重定向工作流，减少人工劳动。
AI.motivation: 当前3D设计工具在实现创意视觉效果时仍需大量人工操作，需寻找自动化方案降低工作量。
AI.method: 通过开发基于深度伪造算法的原型工具，并结合领域专家访谈，验证技术可行性与设计实践。
AI.result: 专家对工具效果持积极态度，确认了深度伪造技术在3D动画中的潜在价值，同时提出规避滥用的设计策略。
AI.conclusion: 深度伪造技术可为3D动画带来效率提升，但需通过设计规范规避伦理风险并优化用户交互流程。

title: Design, Implementation, and Evaluation of Blockchain-Based Trusted Achievement Record System for Students in Higher Education
title_zh: 基于区块链的高等教育学生可信成绩记录系统的设计、实现与评估
abstract: With a growing number of institutions involved in the global education market, it has become increasingly challenging to verify the authenticity of academic achievements such as CVs and diplomas. Blockchain is an enabling technology that can play a key role in solving this problem. This study introduces a blockchain-based achievement record system that produces a verifiable record of achievements. The proposed system aims to facilitate the process of authentication and validation of certificates reliably, easily, and quickly, leveraging the unique capabilities offered through Blockchain technology (public Ethereum Blockchain) and smart contracts. We present the design and implementation of the system and its components and tools. We then evaluate the system through a number of studies to measure the system's usability, effectiveness, performance, and cost. A System Usability Scale (SUS) test gave a scale of 77.1. Through a literature survey, we demonstrate that this system is a significant improvement on legacy systems, being both more user-friendly and more efficient. We also conduct a detailed cost analysis and discuss the positives and limitations of alternative blockchain solutions.
summary: With a growing number of institutions involved in the global education market, it has become increasingly challenging to verify the authenticity of academic achievements such as CVs and diplomas. Blockchain is an enabling technology that can play a key role in solving this problem. This study introduces a blockchain-based achievement record system that produces a verifiable record of achievements. The proposed system aims to facilitate the process of authentication and validation of certificates reliably, easily, and quickly, leveraging the unique capabilities offered through Blockchain technology (public Ethereum Blockchain) and smart contracts. We present the design and implementation of the system and its components and tools. We then evaluate the system through a number of studies to measure the system's usability, effectiveness, performance, and cost. A System Usability Scale (SUS) test gave a scale of 77.1. Through a literature survey, we demonstrate that this system is a significant improvement on legacy systems, being both more user-friendly and more efficient. We also conduct a detailed cost analysis and discuss the positives and limitations of alternative blockchain solutions.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的机构涉足全球教育市场，验证简历和文凭等学术成果的真实性变得越来越具有挑战性。区块链是一种使能技术，可以在解决这一问题中发挥关键作用。本研究介绍了一种基于区块链的成就记录系统，该系统可生成可验证的成就记录。所提出的系统旨在利用区块链技术（公共以太坊区块链）和智能合约提供的独特功能，促进可靠、轻松、快速的证书身份验证和验证过程。我们介绍系统及其组件和工具的设计和实现。然后我们通过大量研究来评估系统，以衡量系统的可用性、有效性、性能和成本。系统可用性量表 (SUS) 测试的评分为 77.1。通过文献调查，我们证明该系统是对遗留系统的重大改进，更加用户友好且更加高效。我们还进行了详细的成本分析，并讨论了替代区块链解决方案的优点和局限性。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估基于区块链的学生学术成就记录系统，以解决全球教育市场中学历验证的难题。
AI.motivation: 随着全球教育机构数量增加，验证学生简历和文凭的真实性变得困难，传统系统存在效率低、易伪造等问题。
AI.method: 基于公共以太坊区块链和智能合约构建系统，通过设计实现系统组件并进行可用性测试（SUS）、文献对比及成本分析验证效果。
AI.result: 系统可用性评分为77.1，优于传统系统；文献表明其效率和用户体验显著提升，同时完成不同区块链方案的成本对比分析。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过区块链技术有效解决了学术成就验证问题，兼具高效性与用户友好性，但需权衡不同区块链方案的优缺点。

authors_text: Chaitanya Dwivedi,Shima Nofallah,Maryam Pouryahya,Janani Iyer,Kenneth Leidal,Chuhan Chung,Timothy Watkins,Andrew Billin,Robert Myers,John Abel,Ali Behrooz
title: Multi stain graph fusion for multimodal integration in pathology
title_zh: 用于病理学多模态集成的多染色图融合
abstract: In pathology, tissue samples are assessed using multiple staining techniques to enhance contrast in unique histologic features. In this paper, we introduce a multimodal CNN-GNN based graph fusion approach that leverages complementary information from multiple non-registered histopathology images to predict pathologic scores. We demonstrate this approach in nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) by predicting CRN fibrosis stage and NAFLD Activity Score (NAS). Primary assessment of NASH typically requires liver biopsy evaluation on two histological stains: Trichrome (TC) and hematoxylin and eosin (H&E). Our multimodal approach learns to extract complementary information from TC and H&E graphs corresponding to each stain while simultaneously learning an optimal policy to combine this information. We report up to 20% improvement in predicting fibrosis stage and NAS component grades over single-stain modeling approaches, measured by computing linearly weighted Cohen's kappa between machine-derived vs. pathologist consensus scores. Broadly, this paper demonstrates the value of leveraging diverse pathology images for improved ML-powered histologic assessment.
summary: In pathology, tissue samples are assessed using multiple staining techniques to enhance contrast in unique histologic features. In this paper, we introduce a multimodal CNN-GNN based graph fusion approach that leverages complementary information from multiple non-registered histopathology images to predict pathologic scores. We demonstrate this approach in nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) by predicting CRN fibrosis stage and NAFLD Activity Score (NAS). Primary assessment of NASH typically requires liver biopsy evaluation on two histological stains: Trichrome (TC) and hematoxylin and eosin (H&E). Our multimodal approach learns to extract complementary information from TC and H&E graphs corresponding to each stain while simultaneously learning an optimal policy to combine this information. We report up to 20% improvement in predicting fibrosis stage and NAS component grades over single-stain modeling approaches, measured by computing linearly weighted Cohen's kappa between machine-derived vs. pathologist consensus scores. Broadly, this paper demonstrates the value of leveraging diverse pathology images for improved ML-powered histologic assessment.
abstract_zh: 在病理学中，使用多种染色技术评估组织样本，以增强独特组织学特征的对比度。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于多模态 CNN-GNN 的图融合方法，该方法利用来自多个未配准的组织病理学图像的补充信息来预测病理评分。我们通过预测 CRN 纤维化阶段和 NAFLD 活动评分 (NAS) 证明了这种治疗非酒精性脂肪性肝炎 (NASH) 的方法。 NASH 的初步评估通常需要对两种组织学染色进行肝活检评估：三色 (TC) 和苏木精和伊红 (H&E)。我们的多模态方法学习从对应于每个染色的 TC 和 H&E 图中提取补充信息，同时学习结合这些信息的最佳策略。我们报告称，与单染色建模方法相比，预测纤维化阶段和 NAS 成分等级的效果提高了 20%，这是通过计算机器得出的评分与病理学家共识评分之间的线性加权 Cohen's kappa 来测量的。从广义上讲，本文展示了利用不同病理图像来改进机器学习驱动的组织学评估的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多染色图像图融合的多模态深度学习方法，用于提升病理学评估的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统病理学评估依赖单一染色图像，难以全面捕捉组织特征，需整合多染色信息以提高诊断可靠性。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与图神经网络（GNN），通过融合非配准的Trichrome（TC）和H&E染色图像的图结构，学习互补特征并优化信息整合策略。
AI.result: 在预测非酒精性脂肪性肝炎（NASH）的纤维化阶段和NAS评分时，相较单染色模型，方法在Cohen's kappa指标上提升最高达20%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态图像融合显著增强机器学习在病理学评估中的性能，为复杂疾病诊断提供新思路。

authors_text: Kai Huang,Prajnan Das,Adenike M. Olanrewaju,Carlos Cardenas,David Fuentes,Lifei Zhang,Donald Hancock,Hannah Simonds,Dong Joo Rhee,Sam Beddar,Tina Marie Briere,Laurence Court
title: Automation of Radiation Treatment Planning for Rectal Cancer
title_zh: 直肠癌放射治疗计划的自动化
comment: ef:Journal of Applied Clinical Medical Physics 2022
comments: ef:Journal of Applied Clinical Medical Physics 2022
abstract: To develop an automated workflow for rectal cancer three-dimensional conformal radiotherapy treatment planning that combines deep-learning(DL) aperture predictions and forward-planning algorithms. We designed an algorithm to automate the clinical workflow for planning with field-in-field. DL models were trained, validated, and tested on 555 patients to automatically generate aperture shapes for primary and boost fields. Network inputs were digitally reconstructed radiography, gross tumor volume(GTV), and nodal GTV. A physician scored each aperture for 20 patients on a 5-point scale(>3 acceptable). A planning algorithm was then developed to create a homogeneous dose using a combination of wedges and subfields. The algorithm iteratively identifies a hotspot volume, creates a subfield, and optimizes beam weight all without user intervention. The algorithm was tested on 20 patients using clinical apertures with different settings, and the resulting plans(4 plans/patient) were scored by a physician. The end-to-end workflow was tested and scored by a physician on 39 patients using DL-generated apertures and planning algorithms. The predicted apertures had Dice scores of 0.95, 0.94, and 0.90 for posterior-anterior, laterals, and boost fields, respectively. 100%, 95%, and 87.5% of the posterior-anterior, laterals, and boost apertures were scored as clinically acceptable, respectively. Wedged and non-wedged plans were clinically acceptable for 85% and 50% of patients, respectively. The final plans hotspot dose percentage was reduced from 121%($\pm$ 14%) to 109%($\pm$ 5%) of prescription dose. The integrated end-to-end workflow of automatically generated apertures and optimized field-in-field planning gave clinically acceptable plans for 38/39(97%) of patients. We have successfully automated the clinical workflow for generating radiotherapy plans for rectal cancer for our institution.

The integrated end-to-end workflow of automatically generated apertures and optimized field-in-field planning gave clinically acceptable plans for 38/39(97%) of patients. We have successfully automated the clinical workflow for generating radiotherapy plans for rectal cancer for our institution.
abstract_zh: 开发结合深度学习 (DL) 孔径预测和前瞻性规划算法的直肠癌三维适形放疗治疗计划的自动化工作流程。我们设计了一种算法来自动化临床工作流程，以进行现场规划。深度学习模型在 555 名患者身上进行了训练、验证和测试，可自动生成主场和增强场的孔径形状。网络输入是数字重建放射线摄影、肿瘤大体体积（GTV）和淋巴结 GTV。一名医生对 20 名患者的每个孔径进行 5 分制评分（>3 可接受）。然后开发了一种规划算法，使用楔形和子场的组合来创建均匀剂量。该算法迭代地识别热点体积、创建子场并优化波束权重，所有这些都无需用户干预。该算法使用不同设置的临床孔径在 20 名患者身上进行了测试，并由医生对生成的计划（4 个计划/患者）进行评分。医生使用 DL 生成的孔径和规划算法对 39 名患者对端到端工作流程进行了测试和评分。预测孔径的后前、侧向和增强视野的 Dice 分数分别为 0.95、0.94 和 0.90。后前孔、侧孔和升压孔的评分分别为 100%、95% 和 87.5% 为临床可接受的。楔形和非楔形计划在临床上分别为 85% 和 50% 的患者所接受。最终计划热点剂量百分比从处方剂量的 121%($\pm$ 14%) 减少到 109%($\pm$ 5%)。自动生成孔径和优化的现场规划的集成端到端工作流程为 38/39 (97%) 的患者提供了临床上可接受的计划。我们成功地实现了临床工作流程的自动化，为我们的机构生成直肠癌放射治疗计划。

AI.tldr: 开发结合深度学习和前向规划算法的自动化放射治疗计划工作流程，用于直肠癌三维适形放疗。
AI.motivation: 通过自动化临床工作流程提高直肠癌放疗计划的效率和一致性，减少人工干预以降低错误率并优化治疗效果。
AI.method: 训练深度学习模型生成照射野形状，结合前向规划算法迭代优化子野和楔形板参数，无需用户干预完成计划生成。
AI.result: 生成的照射野Dice评分达0.95-0.90，97%患者计划被临床接受，热点剂量从121%降至109%处方剂量。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端自动化工作流程可高效生成符合临床标准的直肠癌放疗计划，显著提升治疗规划效率。

search_text: Automation of Radiation Treatment Planning for Rectal Cancer 直肠癌放射治疗计划的自动化 To develop an automated workflow for rectal cancer three-dimensional conformal radiotherapy treatment planning that combines deep-learning(DL) aperture predictions and forward-planning algorithms. We designed an algorithm to automate the clinical workflow for planning with field-in-field. DL models were trained, validated, and tested on 555 patients to automatically generate aperture shapes for primary and boost fields. Network inputs were digitally reconstructed radiography, gross tumor volume(GTV), and nodal GTV. A physician scored each aperture for 20 patients on a 5-point scale(>3 acceptable). A planning algorithm was then developed to create a homogeneous dose using a combination of wedges and subfields. The algorithm iteratively identifies a hotspot volume, creates a subfield, and optimizes beam weight all without user intervention. The algorithm was tested on 20 patients using clinical apertures with different settings, and the resulting plans(4 plans/patient) were scored by a physician. The end-to-end workflow was tested and scored by a physician on 39 patients using DL-generated apertures and planning algorithms. The predicted apertures had Dice scores of 0.95, 0.94, and 0.90 for posterior-anterior, laterals, and boost fields, respectively. 100%, 95%, and 87.5% of the posterior-anterior, laterals, and boost apertures were scored as clinically acceptable, respectively. Wedged and non-wedged plans were clinically acceptable for 85% and 50% of patients, respectively. The final plans hotspot dose percentage was reduced from 121%($\pm$ 14%) to 109%($\pm$ 5%) of prescription dose. The integrated end-to-end workflow of automatically generated apertures and optimized field-in-field planning gave clinically acceptable plans for 38/39(97%) of patients. We have successfully automated the clinical workflow for generating radiotherapy plans for rectal cancer for our institution. 开发结合深度学习 (DL) 孔径预测和前瞻性规划算法的直肠癌三维适形放疗治疗计划的自动化工作流程。我们设计了一种算法来自动化临床工作流程，以进行现场规划。深度学习模型在 555 名患者身上进行了训练、验证和测试，可自动生成主场和增强场的孔径形状。网络输入是数字重建放射线摄影、肿瘤大体体积（GTV）和淋巴结 GTV。一名医生对 20 名患者的每个孔径进行 5 分制评分（>3 可接受）。然后开发了一种规划算法，使用楔形和子场的组合来创建均匀剂量。该算法迭代地识别热点体积、创建子场并优化波束权重，所有这些都无需用户干预。该算法使用不同设置的临床孔径在 20 名患者身上进行了测试，并由医生对生成的计划（4 个计划/患者）进行评分。医生使用 DL 生成的孔径和规划算法对 39 名患者对端到端工作流程进行了测试和评分。预测孔径的后前、侧向和增强视野的 Dice 分数分别为 0.95、0.94 和 0.90。后前孔、侧孔和升压孔的评分分别为 100%、95% 和 87.5% 为临床可接受的。楔形和非楔形计划在临床上分别为 85% 和 50% 的患者所接受。最终计划热点剂量百分比从处方剂量的 121%($\pm$ 14%) 减少到 109%($\pm$ 5%)。自动生成孔径和优化的现场规划的集成端到端工作流程为 38/39 (97%) 的患者提供了临床上可接受的计划。我们成功地实现了临床工作流程的自动化，为我们的机构生成直肠癌放射治疗计划。 开发结合深度学习和前向规划算法的自动化放射治疗计划工作流程，用于直肠癌三维适形放疗。 Kai Huang,Prajnan Das,Adenike M. title: Building Change Detection using Multi-Temporal Airborne LiDAR Data
title_zh: 使用多时空机载 LiDAR 数据进行建筑物变化检测
abstract: Building change detection is essential for monitoring urbanization, disaster assessment, urban planning and frequently updating the maps. 3D structure information from airborne light detection and ranging (LiDAR) is very effective for detecting urban changes. But the 3D point cloud from airborne LiDAR(ALS) holds an enormous amount of unordered and irregularly sparse information. Handling such data is tricky and consumes large memory for processing. Most of this information is not necessary when we are looking for a particular type of urban change. In this study, we propose an automatic method that reduces the 3D point clouds into a much smaller representation without losing the necessary information required for detecting Building changes. The method utilizes the Deep Learning(DL) model U-Net for segmenting the buildings from the background. Produced segmentation maps are then processed further for detecting changes and the results are refined using morphological methods. For the change detection task, we used multi-temporal airborne LiDAR data. The data is acquired over Stockholm in the years 2017 and 2019. The changes in buildings are classified into four types: 'newly built', 'demolished', 'taller' and 'shorter'. The detected changes are visualized in one map for better interpretation.
summary: Building change detection is essential for monitoring urbanization, disaster assessment, urban planning and frequently updating the maps. 3D structure information from airborne light detection and ranging (LiDAR) is very effective for detecting urban changes. But the 3D point cloud from airborne LiDAR(ALS) holds an enormous amount of unordered and irregularly sparse information. Handling such data is tricky and consumes large memory for processing. Most of this information is not necessary when we are looking for a particular type of urban change. In this study, we propose an automatic method that reduces the 3D point clouds into a much smaller representation without losing the necessary information required for detecting Building changes. The method utilizes the Deep Learning(DL) model U-Net for segmenting the buildings from the background. Produced segmentation maps are then processed further for detecting changes and the results are refined using morphological methods. For the change detection task, we used multi-temporal airborne LiDAR data. The data is acquired over Stockholm in the years 2017 and 2019. The changes in buildings are classified into four types: 'newly built', 'demolished', 'taller' and 'shorter'. The detected changes are visualized in one map for better interpretation.
abstract_zh: 建筑变化检测对于监测城市化、灾害评估、城市规划和频繁更新地图至关重要。来自机载光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 的 3D 结构信息对于检测城市变化非常有效。但机载 LiDAR (ALS) 的 3D 点云包含大量无序且不规则的稀疏信息。处理此类数据非常棘手，并且会消耗大量内存进行处理。当我们寻找特定类型的城市变化时，大部分信息都是不必要的。在本研究中，我们提出了一种自动方法，可将 3D 点云缩小为更小的表示形式，而不会丢失检测建筑物变化所需的必要信息。该方法利用深度学习（DL）模型 U-Net 从背景中分割建筑物。然后进一步处理生成的分割图以检测变化，并使用形态学方法对结果进行细化。对于变化检测任务，我们使用了多时相机载 LiDAR 数据。该数据是在2017年和2019年在斯德​​哥尔摩上空获取的。建筑物的变化分为四种类型：“新建”、“拆除”、“更高”和“更低”。检测到的变化在一张地图中可视化，以便更好地解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多时相机载LiDAR数据的建筑物变化检测方法，通过深度学习和形态学处理实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 机载LiDAR点云数据具有无序、稀疏且内存消耗大的特点，传统方法难以高效提取关键变化信息，需开发自动化的数据压缩与变化检测技术。
AI.method: 采用U-Net深度学习模型对建筑物进行分割，生成分割图后通过形态学方法优化结果，并利用2017-2019年斯德哥尔摩多时相LiDAR数据检测四类建筑变化（新建、拆除、增高、降低）。
AI.result: 成功实现建筑物变化检测并分类，生成可视化变化地图，验证了方法在减少数据冗余的同时保持检测精度的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习与形态学结合，有效处理LiDAR数据的高维特性，为城市化监测和地图更新提供了可行的技术方案。

authors_text: Kuntai Du,Qizheng Zhang,Anton Arapin,Haodong Wang,Zhengxu Xia,Junchen Jiang
title: AccMPEG: Optimizing Video Encoding for Video Analytics
title_zh: AccMPEG：优化视频编码以进行视频分析
abstract: With more videos being recorded by edge sensors (cameras) and analyzed by computer-vision deep neural nets (DNNs), a new breed of video streaming systems has emerged, with the goal to compress and stream videos to remote servers in real time while preserving enough information to allow highly accurate inference by the server-side DNNs. An ideal design of the video streaming system should simultaneously meet three key requirements: (1) low latency of encoding and streaming, (2) high accuracy of server-side DNNs, and (3) low compute overheads on the camera. Unfortunately, despite many recent efforts, such video streaming system has hitherto been elusive, especially when serving advanced vision tasks such as object detection or semantic segmentation. This paper presents AccMPEG, a new video encoding and streaming system that meets all the three requirements. The key is to learn how much the encoding quality at each (16x16) macroblock can influence the server-side DNN accuracy, which we call accuracy gradient. Our insight is that these macroblock-level accuracy gradient can be inferred with sufficient precision by feeding the video frames through a cheap model. AccMPEG provides a suite of techniques that, given a new server-side DNN, can quickly create a cheap model to infer the accuracy gradient on any new frame in near realtime. Our extensive evaluation of AccMPEG on two types of edge devices (one Intel Xeon Silver 4100 CPU or NVIDIA Jetson Nano) and three vision tasks (six recent pre-trained DNNs) shows that AccMPEG (with the same camera-side compute resources) can reduce the end-to-end inference delay by 10-43% without hurting accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art baselines

AccMPEG provides a suite of techniques that, given a new server-side DNN, can quickly create a cheap model to infer the accuracy gradient on any new frame in near realtime. Our extensive evaluation of AccMPEG on two types of edge devices (one Intel Xeon Silver 4100 CPU or NVIDIA Jetson Nano) and three vision tasks (six recent pre-trained DNNs) shows that AccMPEG (with the same camera-side compute resources) can reduce the end-to-end inference delay by 10-43% without hurting accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art baselines
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的视频被边缘传感器（摄像头）记录并由计算机视觉深度神经网络（DNN）分析，新型视频流系统已经出现，其目标是将视频实时压缩并流式传输到远程服务器，同时保留足够的信息，以便服务器端 DNN 进行高度准确的推理。视频流系统的理想设计应同时满足三个关键要求：(1) 编码和流媒体的低延迟，(2) 服务器端 DNN 的高精度，以及 (3) 摄像机的低计算开销。不幸的是，尽管最近做出了许多努力，但此类视频流系统迄今为止仍难以实现，尤其是在服务对象检测或语义分割等高级视觉任务时。本文介绍了 AccMPEG，这是一种满足所有三个要求的新型视频编码和流媒体系统。关键是要了解每个 (16x16) 宏块的编码质量对服务器端 DNN 精度的影响有多大，我们称之为精度梯度。我们的见解是，通过廉价模型馈送视频帧，可以以足够的精度推断出这些宏块级精度梯度。 AccMPEG 提供了一套技术，在给定新的服务器端 DNN 的情况下，可以快速创建一个廉价的模型，以近乎实时地推断任何新帧的精度梯度。我们对两种类型的边缘设备（一种 Intel Xeon Silver 4100 CPU 或 NVIDIA Jetson Nano）和三种视觉任务（六种最近预训练的 DNN）上的 AccMPEG 进行了广泛的评估，结果表明，与最先进的基准相比，AccMPEG（具有相同的相机端计算资源）可以将端到端推理延迟减少 10-43%，而不会影响准确性

AI.tldr: 本文提出AccMPEG视频编码系统，在保证服务器端深度神经网络（DNN）分析精度的前提下，优化视频编码与传输的实时性与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频流系统难以同时满足低延迟、高DNN精度和低摄像头计算开销的需求，尤其在处理复杂视觉任务（如目标检测）时表现不足。
AI.method: 通过构建轻量级模型预测每个宏块（16x16）的编码质量对DNN精度的影响（即精度梯度），动态分配编码资源，实现近实时的精度感知编码优化。
AI.result: 在两种边缘设备和三种视觉任务的测试中，AccMPEG在相同计算资源下将端到端推理延迟降低10-43%，且不损失精度。
AI.conclusion: AccMPEG通过精度梯度驱动的编码优化，有效平衡了实时性、分析精度与计算开销，为实时视频分析系统提供了可行解决方案。
