search_text: AccMPEG: Optimizing Video Encoding for Video Analytics AccMPEG：优化视频编码以进行视频分析 With more videos being recorded by edge sensors (cameras) and analyzed by computer-vision deep neural nets (DNNs), a new breed of video streaming systems has emerged, with the goal to compress and stream videos to remote servers in real time while preserving enough information to allow highly accurate inference by the server-side DNNs. An ideal design of the video streaming system should simultaneously meet three key requirements: (1) low latency of encoding and streaming, (2) high accuracy of server-side DNNs, and (3) low compute overheads on the camera. Unfortunately, despite many recent efforts, such video streaming system has hitherto been elusive, especially when serving advanced vision tasks such as object detection or semantic segmentation. This paper presents AccMPEG, a new video encoding and streaming system that meets all the three requirements. The key is to learn how much the encoding quality at each (16x16) macroblock can influence the server-side DNN accuracy, which we call accuracy gradient. Our insight is that these macroblock-level accuracy gradient can be inferred with sufficient precision by feeding the video frames through a cheap model. AccMPEG provides a suite of techniques that, given a new server-side DNN, can quickly create a cheap model to infer the accuracy gradient on any new frame in near realtime. Our extensive evaluation of AccMPEG on two types of edge devices (one Intel Xeon Silver 4100 CPU or NVIDIA Jetson Nano) and three vision tasks (six recent pre-trained DNNs) shows that AccMPEG (with the same camera-side compute resources) can reduce the end-to-end inference delay by 10-43% without hurting accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art baselines 随着越来越多的视频被边缘传感器（摄像头）记录并由计算机视觉深度神经网络（DNN）分析，新型视频流系统已经出现，其目标是将视频实时压缩并流式传输到远程服务器，同时保留足够的信息，以便服务器端 DNN 进行高度准确的推理。视频流系统的理想设计应同时满足三个关键要求：(1) 编码和流媒体的低延迟，(2) 服务器端 DNN 的高精度，以及 (3) 摄像机的低计算开销。不幸的是，尽管最近做出了许多努力，但此类视频流系统迄今为止仍难以实现，尤其是在服务对象检测或语义分割等高级视觉任务时。本文介绍了 AccMPEG，这是一种满足所有三个要求的新型视频编码和流媒体系统。关键是要了解每个 (16x16) 宏块的编码质量对服务器端 DNN 精度的影响有多大，我们称之为精度梯度。我们的见解是，通过廉价模型馈送视频帧，可以以足够的精度推断出这些宏块级精度梯度。 AccMPEG 提供了一套技术，在给定新的服务器端 DNN 的情况下，可以快速创建一个廉价的模型，以近乎实时地推断任何新帧的精度梯度。我们对两种类型的边缘设备（一种 Intel Xeon Silver 4100 CPU 或 NVIDIA Jetson Nano）和三种视觉任务（六种最近预训练的 DNN）上的 AccMPEG 进行了广泛的评估，结果表明，与最先进的基准相比，AccMPEG（具有相同的相机端计算资源）可以将端到端推理延迟减少 10-43%，而不会影响准确性 本文提出AccMPEG视频编码系统，在保证服务器端深度神经网络（DNN）分析精度的前提下，优化视频编码与传输的实时性与计算效率。 Kuntai Du,Qizheng Zhang,Anton Arapin,Haodong Wang,Zhengxu Xia,Junchen Jiang cs.NI,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Edward L. Zhu,Finn Lukas Busch,Jake Johnson,Francesco Borrelli
title: A Gaussian Process Model for Opponent Prediction in Autonomous Racing
title_zh: 自动赛车中对手预测的高斯过程模型
abstract: In head-to-head racing, an accurate model of interactive behavior of the opposing target vehicle (TV) is required to perform tightly constrained, but highly rewarding maneuvers such as overtaking. However, such information is not typically made available in competitive scenarios, we therefore propose to construct a prediction and uncertainty model given data of the TV from previous races. In particular, a one-step Gaussian process (GP) model is trained on closed-loop interaction data to learn the behavior of a TV driven by an unknown policy. Predictions of the nominal trajectory and associated uncertainty are rolled out via a sampling-based approach and are used in a model predictive control (MPC) policy for the ego vehicle in order to intelligently trade-off between safety and performance when attempting overtaking maneuvers against a TV. We demonstrate the GP-based predictor in closed loop with the MPC policy in simulation races and compare its performance against several predictors from literature. In a Monte Carlo study, we observe that the GP-based predictor achieves similar win rates while maintaining safety in up to 3x more races. We finally demonstrate the prediction and control framework in real-time in a experimental study on a 1/10th scale racecar platform operating at speeds of around 2.8 m/s, and show a significant level of improvement when using the GP-based predictor over a baseline MPC predictor. Videos of the hardware experiments can be found at https://youtu.be/KMSs4ofDfIs.
summary: In head-to-head racing, an accurate model of interactive behavior of the opposing target vehicle (TV) is required to perform tightly constrained, but highly rewarding maneuvers such as overtaking. However, such information is not typically made available in competitive scenarios, we therefore propose to construct a prediction and uncertainty model given data of the TV from previous races. In particular, a one-step Gaussian process (GP) model is trained on closed-loop interaction data to learn the behavior of a TV driven by an unknown policy. Predictions of the nominal trajectory and associated uncertainty are rolled out via a sampling-based approach and are used in a model predictive control (MPC) policy for the ego vehicle in order to intelligently trade-off between safety and performance when attempting overtaking maneuvers against a TV. We demonstrate the GP-based predictor in closed loop with the MPC policy in simulation races and compare its performance against several predictors from literature. In a Monte Carlo study, we observe that the GP-based predictor achieves similar win rates while maintaining safety in up to 3x more races. We finally demonstrate the prediction and control framework in real-time in a experimental study on a 1/10th scale racecar platform operating at speeds of around 2.8 m/s, and show a significant level of improvement when using the GP-based predictor over a baseline MPC predictor. Videos of the hardware experiments can be found at https://youtu.be/KMSs4ofDfIs.
abstract_zh: 在面对面的赛车中，需要对对方目标车辆 (TV) 的交互行为进行准确的模型来执行严格约束但回报丰厚的操作，例如超车。然而，此类信息通常不会在竞争场景中提供，因此我们建议根据之前比赛的电视数据构建预测和不确定性模型。特别是，一步高斯过程（GP）模型在闭环交互数据上进行训练，以学习由未知策略驱动的电视的行为。标称轨迹和相关不确定性的预测通过基于采样的方法推出，并用于自我车辆的模型预测控制（MPC）策略中，以便在尝试对电视进行超车操作时在安全性和性能之间进行智能权衡。我们在模拟比赛中展示了基于 GP 的预测器与 MPC 策略的闭环，并将其性能与文献中的几个预测器进行了比较。在蒙特卡洛研究中，我们观察到基于 GP 的预测器在最多 3 倍的比赛中实现了相似的获胜率，同时保持了安全性。我们最终在以 2.8 m/s 左右的速度运行的 1/10 比例赛车平台上进行的实验研究中实时演示了预测和控制框架，并且在使用基于 GP 的预测器时相对于基线 MPC 预测器显示出显着的改进。硬件实验的视频可以在 https://youtu.be/KMSs4ofDfIs 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程（GP）的模型，用于自主赛车中预测对手车辆行为，以实现安全且高效的超车策略。
AI.motivation: 在竞速场景中，准确预测对手车辆的行为对于执行高风险高回报的超车动作至关重要，但对手策略通常不可知，需依赖历史数据建模。
AI.method: 通过闭环交互数据训练单步高斯过程模型，学习未知对手策略的行为模式，并结合采样方法生成轨迹预测与不确定性估计，最终整合至模型预测控制（MPC）框架中实现安全与性能的平衡。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明，该方法在保持安全性的前提下，胜率与基线方法相当，且在3倍以上比赛中表现更优；1/10比例赛车实测显示其显著优于传统MPC预测器。
AI.conclusion: 基于高斯过程的预测模型有效提升了自主赛车在动态对抗环境中的决策能力，兼顾安全性和竞赛表现。

authors_text: Yin Yu,Ghasedi Kamran,Wu HsiangTao,Yang Jiaolong,Tong Xi,Fu Yun
title: Expanding the Latent Space of StyleGAN for Real Face Editing
title_zh: 扩展 StyleGAN 用于真实面部编辑的潜在空间
abstract: Recently, a surge of face editing techniques have been proposed to employ the pretrained StyleGAN for semantic manipulation. To successfully edit a real image, one must first convert the input image into StyleGAN's latent variables. However, it is still challenging to find latent variables, which have the capacity for preserving the appearance of the input subject (e.g., identity, lighting, hairstyles) as well as enabling meaningful manipulations. In this paper, we present a method to expand the latent space of StyleGAN with additional content features to break down the trade-off between low-distortion and high-editability. Specifically, we proposed a two-branch model, where the style branch first tackles the entanglement issue by the sparse manipulation of latent codes, and the content branch then mitigates the distortion issue by leveraging the content and appearance details from the input image. We confirm the effectiveness of our method using extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on real face editing and reconstruction tasks.
summary: Recently, a surge of face editing techniques have been proposed to employ the pretrained StyleGAN for semantic manipulation. To successfully edit a real image, one must first convert the input image into StyleGAN's latent variables. However, it is still challenging to find latent variables, which have the capacity for preserving the appearance of the input subject (e.g., identity, lighting, hairstyles) as well as enabling meaningful manipulations. In this paper, we present a method to expand the latent space of StyleGAN with additional content features to break down the trade-off between low-distortion and high-editability. Specifically, we proposed a two-branch model, where the style branch first tackles the entanglement issue by the sparse manipulation of latent codes, and the content branch then mitigates the distortion issue by leveraging the content and appearance details from the input image. We confirm the effectiveness of our method using extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on real face editing and reconstruction tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了大量的面部编辑技术来利用预训练的 StyleGAN 进行语义操作。要成功编辑真实图像，必须首先将输入图像转换为 StyleGAN 的潜在变量。然而，找到潜在变量仍然具有挑战性，这些变量能够保留输入主体的外观（例如身份、灯光、发型）并进行有意义的操作。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过附加内容特征来扩展 StyleGAN 潜在空间的方法，以打破低失真和高可编辑性之间的权衡。具体来说，我们提出了一个双分支模型，其中样式分支首先通过潜在代码的稀疏操作来解决纠缠问题，然后内容分支通过利用输入图像的内容和外观细节来减轻失真问题。我们通过对真实面部编辑和重建任务进行广泛的定性和定量实验来确认我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩展StyleGAN潜在空间的方法，以解决真实人脸编辑中低失真与高可编辑性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在将真实图像转换为StyleGAN潜在变量时，难以同时保持输入图像的外观特征（如身份、发型）并实现有效编辑。
AI.method: 设计双分支模型：风格分支通过稀疏潜在代码操作解决纠缠问题，内容分支利用输入图像的细节信息减少失真。
AI.result: 在真实人脸编辑和重建任务中，通过大量定性和定量实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功突破了潜在空间编辑的局限性，在保持身份特征的同时实现了更灵活的面部编辑。

title: Leveraging Unlabeled Data for Sketch-based Understanding
title_zh: 利用未标记的数据进行基于草图的理解
abstract: Sketch-based understanding is a critical component of human cognitive learning and is a primitive communication means between humans. This topic has recently attracted the interest of the computer vision community as sketching represents a powerful tool to express static objects and dynamic scenes. Unfortunately, despite its broad application domains, the current sketch-based models strongly rely on labels for supervised training, ignoring knowledge from unlabeled data, thus limiting the underlying generalization and the applicability. Therefore, we present a study about the use of unlabeled data to improve a sketch-based model. To this end, we evaluate variations of VAE and semi-supervised VAE, and present an extension of BYOL to deal with sketches. Our results show the superiority of sketch-BYOL, which outperforms other self-supervised approaches increasing the retrieval performance for known and unknown categories. Furthermore, we show how other tasks can benefit from our proposal.
summary: Sketch-based understanding is a critical component of human cognitive learning and is a primitive communication means between humans. This topic has recently attracted the interest of the computer vision community as sketching represents a powerful tool to express static objects and dynamic scenes. Unfortunately, despite its broad application domains, the current sketch-based models strongly rely on labels for supervised training, ignoring knowledge from unlabeled data, thus limiting the underlying generalization and the applicability. Therefore, we present a study about the use of unlabeled data to improve a sketch-based model. To this end, we evaluate variations of VAE and semi-supervised VAE, and present an extension of BYOL to deal with sketches. Our results show the superiority of sketch-BYOL, which outperforms other self-supervised approaches increasing the retrieval performance for known and unknown categories. Furthermore, we show how other tasks can benefit from our proposal.
abstract_zh: 基于草图的理解是人类认知学习的重要组成部分，是人类之间的原始交流手段。这个主题最近引起了计算机视觉界的兴趣，因为草图是表达静态对象和动态场景的强大工具。不幸的是，尽管其应用领域广泛，但当前基于草图的模型强烈依赖标签进行监督训练，忽略来自未标记数据的知识，从而限制了底层的泛化和适用性。因此，我们提出了一项关于使用未标记数据来改进基于草图的模型的研究。为此，我们评估了 VAE 和半监督 VAE 的变体，并提出了 BYOL 的扩展来处理草图。我们的结果显示了 sketch-BYOL 的优越性，它优于其他自监督方法，提高了已知和未知类别的检索性能。此外，我们还展示了其他任务如何从我们的建议中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用未标记数据提升草图理解模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前草图理解模型过度依赖标记数据，忽视未标记数据中的潜在知识，导致泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 评估VAE及半监督VAE的变体，并扩展BYOL方法以适应草图数据。
AI.result: 提出的草图BYOL方法在已知和未知类别检索任务中均优于其他自监督方法，且可迁移至其他任务。
AI.conclusion: 未标记数据的有效利用能显著提升草图理解模型的性能与适用性，为相关研究提供新方向。

title: Coupled Iterative Refinement for 6D Multi-Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 6D 多目标姿态估计的耦合迭代细化
abstract: We address the task of 6D multi-object pose: given a set of known 3D objects and an RGB or RGB-D input image, we detect and estimate the 6D pose of each object. We propose a new approach to 6D object pose estimation which consists of an end-to-end differentiable architecture that makes use of geometric knowledge. Our approach iteratively refines both pose and correspondence in a tightly coupled manner, allowing us to dynamically remove outliers to improve accuracy. We use a novel differentiable layer to perform pose refinement by solving an optimization problem we refer to as Bidirectional Depth-Augmented Perspective-N-Point (BD-PnP). Our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on standard 6D Object Pose benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/Coupled-Iterative-Refinement.
summary: We address the task of 6D multi-object pose: given a set of known 3D objects and an RGB or RGB-D input image, we detect and estimate the 6D pose of each object. We propose a new approach to 6D object pose estimation which consists of an end-to-end differentiable architecture that makes use of geometric knowledge. Our approach iteratively refines both pose and correspondence in a tightly coupled manner, allowing us to dynamically remove outliers to improve accuracy. We use a novel differentiable layer to perform pose refinement by solving an optimization problem we refer to as Bidirectional Depth-Augmented Perspective-N-Point (BD-PnP). Our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on standard 6D Object Pose benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/Coupled-Iterative-Refinement.
abstract_zh: 我们解决 6D 多对象姿势的任务：给定一组已知的 3D 对象和 RGB 或 RGB-D 输入图像，我们检测并估计每个对象的 6D 姿势。我们提出了一种新的 6D 物体姿态估计方法，该方法由利用几何知识的端到端可微架构组成。我们的方法以紧密耦合的方式迭代地完善姿势和对应关系，使我们能够动态删除异常值以提高准确性。我们使用新颖的可微层通过解决称为双向深度增强透视 N 点（BD-PnP）的优化问题来执行姿势细化。我们的方法在标准 6D 对象姿势基准上实现了最先进的精度。代码可在 https://github.com/princeton-vl/Coupled-Iterative-Refinement 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于6D多物体姿态估计的新方法，通过迭代优化姿态和对应关系以提高准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多物体和复杂场景时存在挑战，需提高姿态估计精度并有效去除异常值。
AI.method: 提出端到端可微架构，结合几何知识，通过迭代优化姿态和对应关系，动态去除异常值，并引入BD-PnP优化层进行姿态精炼。
AI.result: 在标准6D物体姿态基准测试中达到最先进精度，并提供开源代码。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过耦合迭代优化有效提升姿态估计精度，适用于复杂多物体场景。

authors_text: Zhaoqi Leng,Mingxing Tan,Chenxi Liu,Ekin Dogus Cubuk,Xiaojie Shi,Shuyang Cheng,Dragomir Anguelov
title: PolyLoss: A Polynomial Expansion Perspective of Classification Loss Functions
title_zh: PolyLoss：分类损失函数的多项式展开视角
comment: Add ablation studies on COCO detection using RetinaNet (Section 8)
comments: Add ablation studies on COCO detection using RetinaNet (Section 8)
abstract: Cross-entropy loss and focal loss are the most common choices when training deep neural networks for classification problems. Generally speaking, however, a good loss function can take on much more flexible forms, and should be tailored for different tasks and datasets. Motivated by how functions can be approximated via Taylor expansion, we propose a simple framework, named PolyLoss, to view and design loss functions as a linear combination of polynomial functions. Our PolyLoss allows the importance of different polynomial bases to be easily adjusted depending on the targeting tasks and datasets, while naturally subsuming the aforementioned cross-entropy loss and focal loss as special cases. Extensive experimental results show that the optimal choice within the PolyLoss is indeed dependent on the task and dataset. Simply by introducing one extra hyperparameter and adding one line of code, our Poly-1 formulation outperforms the cross-entropy loss and focal loss on 2D image classification, instance segmentation, object detection, and 3D object detection tasks, sometimes by a large margin.
summary: Cross-entropy loss and focal loss are the most common choices when training deep neural networks for classification problems. Generally speaking, however, a good loss function can take on much more flexible forms, and should be tailored for different tasks and datasets. Motivated by how functions can be approximated via Taylor expansion, we propose a simple framework, named PolyLoss, to view and design loss functions as a linear combination of polynomial functions. Our PolyLoss allows the importance of different polynomial bases to be easily adjusted depending on the targeting tasks and datasets, while naturally subsuming the aforementioned cross-entropy loss and focal loss as special cases. Extensive experimental results show that the optimal choice within the PolyLoss is indeed dependent on the task and dataset. Simply by introducing one extra hyperparameter and adding one line of code, our Poly-1 formulation outperforms the cross-entropy loss and focal loss on 2D image classification, instance segmentation, object detection, and 3D object detection tasks, sometimes by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 交叉熵损失和焦点损失是训练分类问题的深度神经网络时最常见的选择。然而，一般来说，一个好的损失函数可以采取更灵活的形式，并且应该针对不同的任务和数据集进行定制。受如何通过泰勒展开式逼近函数的启发，我们提出了一个名为 PolyLoss 的简单框架，用于将损失函数视为多项式函数的线性组合并将其设计。我们的 PolyLoss 允许根据目标任务和数据集轻松调整不同多项式基的重要性，同时自然地将上述交叉熵损失和焦点损失纳入特殊情况。大量的实验结果表明，PolyLoss 中的最优选择确实取决于任务和数据集。只需引入一个额外的超参数并添加一行代码，我们的 Poly-1 公式在 2D 图像分类、实例分割、对象检测和 3D 对象检测任务上的性能就优于交叉熵损失和焦点损失，有时甚至远远领先。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PolyLoss的分类损失函数框架，通过多项式展开视角设计灵活的损失函数。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失和焦点损失在不同任务和数据集上表现有限，需更灵活的损失函数形式。
AI.method: 基于泰勒展开思想，将损失函数表示为多项式基函数的线性组合，并通过调整多项式基的权重实现个性化设计。
AI.result: Poly-1在图像分类、实例分割、目标检测等任务中均优于交叉熵损失和焦点损失，部分场景提升显著。
AI.conclusion: PolyLoss提供了一种通用且高效的损失函数设计方法，其性能优势源于对多项式基权重的灵活调整。

title: Refining Control Barrier Functions through Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability
title_zh: 通过 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性细化控制屏障函数
comment: To appear at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: To appear at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Safety filters based on Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) have emerged as a practical tool for the safety-critical control of autonomous systems. These approaches encode safety through a value function and enforce safety by imposing a constraint on the time derivative of this value function. However, synthesizing a valid CBF that is not overly conservative in the presence of input constraints is a notorious challenge. In this work, we propose refining a candidate CBF using formal verification methods to obtain a valid CBF. In particular, we update an expert-synthesized or backup CBF using dynamic programming (DP) based reachability analysis. Our framework, refineCBF, guarantees that with every DP iteration the obtained CBF is provably at least as safe as the prior iteration and converges to a valid CBF. Therefore, refineCBF can be used in-the-loop for robotic systems. We demonstrate the practicality of our method to enhance safety and/or reduce conservativeness on a range of nonlinear control-affine systems using various CBF synthesis techniques in simulation.
summary: Safety filters based on Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) have emerged as a practical tool for the safety-critical control of autonomous systems. These approaches encode safety through a value function and enforce safety by imposing a constraint on the time derivative of this value function. However, synthesizing a valid CBF that is not overly conservative in the presence of input constraints is a notorious challenge. In this work, we propose refining a candidate CBF using formal verification methods to obtain a valid CBF. In particular, we update an expert-synthesized or backup CBF using dynamic programming (DP) based reachability analysis. Our framework, refineCBF, guarantees that with every DP iteration the obtained CBF is provably at least as safe as the prior iteration and converges to a valid CBF. Therefore, refineCBF can be used in-the-loop for robotic systems. We demonstrate the practicality of our method to enhance safety and/or reduce conservativeness on a range of nonlinear control-affine systems using various CBF synthesis techniques in simulation.
abstract_zh: 基于控制屏障函数 (CBF) 的安全滤波器已成为自主系统安全关键控制的实用工具。这些方法通过值函数对安全性进行编码，并通过对该值函数的时间导数施加约束来增强安全性。然而，在存在输入约束的情况下合成一个不过分保守的有效 CBF 是一项众所周知的挑战。在这项工作中，我们建议使用形式验证方法细化候选 CBF 以获得有效的 CBF。特别是，我们使用基于动态规划 (DP) 的可达性分析来更新专家合成的或备份的 CBF。我们的框架，refineCBF，保证每次 DP 迭代所获得的 CBF 至少与之前的迭代一样安全，并收敛到有效的 CBF。因此，refineCBF 可用于机器人系统的循环中。我们在仿真中使用各种 CBF 合成技术证明了我们的方法的实用性，可以增强一系列非线性控制仿射系统的安全性和/或降低保守性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过哈密顿-雅可比可达性分析优化控制屏障函数（CBF），以解决其在输入约束下的保守性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CBF合成方法在存在输入约束时易产生过度保守的结果，影响系统性能与安全性。
AI.method: 设计refineCBF框架，利用动态规划的可达性分析迭代更新专家合成的CBF，确保每次迭代安全性非递减并收敛至有效CBF。
AI.result: 在多种非线性控制仿射系统中验证了方法有效性，显著提升安全性和减少保守性。
AI.conclusion: refineCBF为安全关键控制提供了可实时应用的CBF优化方案，推动了自主系统的安全性提升。

authors_text: Shiye Wang,Changsheng Li,Yanming Li,Ye Yuan,Guoren Wang
title: Self-Supervised Information Bottleneck for Deep Multi-View Subspace Clustering
title_zh: 深度多视图子空间聚类的自监督信息瓶颈
abstract: In this paper, we explore the problem of deep multi-view subspace clustering framework from an information-theoretic point of view. We extend the traditional information bottleneck principle to learn common information among different views in a self-supervised manner, and accordingly establish a new framework called Self-supervised Information Bottleneck based Multi-view Subspace Clustering (SIB-MSC). Inheriting the advantages from information bottleneck, SIB-MSC can learn a latent space for each view to capture common information among the latent representations of different views by removing superfluous information from the view itself while retaining sufficient information for the latent representations of other views. Actually, the latent representation of each view provides a kind of self-supervised signal for training the latent representations of other views. Moreover, SIB-MSC attempts to learn the other latent space for each view to capture the view-specific information by introducing mutual information based regularization terms, so as to further improve the performance of multi-view subspace clustering. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore information bottleneck for multi-view subspace clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world multi-view data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over the related state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In this paper, we explore the problem of deep multi-view subspace clustering framework from an information-theoretic point of view. We extend the traditional information bottleneck principle to learn common information among different views in a self-supervised manner, and accordingly establish a new framework called Self-supervised Information Bottleneck based Multi-view Subspace Clustering (SIB-MSC). Inheriting the advantages from information bottleneck, SIB-MSC can learn a latent space for each view to capture common information among the latent representations of different views by removing superfluous information from the view itself while retaining sufficient information for the latent representations of other views. Actually, the latent representation of each view provides a kind of self-supervised signal for training the latent representations of other views. Moreover, SIB-MSC attempts to learn the other latent space for each view to capture the view-specific information by introducing mutual information based regularization terms, so as to further improve the performance of multi-view subspace clustering. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore information bottleneck for multi-view subspace clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world multi-view data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over the related state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从信息论的角度探讨了深度多视图子空间聚类框架的问题。我们扩展了传统的信息瓶颈原理，以自监督的方式学习不同视图之间的公共信息，并相应地建立了一种新的框架，称为基于自监督信息瓶颈的多视图子空间聚类（SIB-MSC）。继承信息瓶颈的优点，SIB-MSC可以学习每个视图的潜在空间，通过从视图本身去除多余的信息，同时为其他视图的潜在表示保留足够的信息，捕获不同视图的潜在表示之间的公共信息。实际上，每个视图的潜在表示提供了一种自监督信号，用于训练其他视图的潜在表示。此外，SIB-MSC尝试通过引入基于互信息的正则化项来学习每个视图的其他潜在空间以捕获特定于视图的信息，从而进一步提高多视图子空间聚类的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个探索多视图子空间聚类信息瓶颈的工作。对现实世界多视图数据的大量实验表明，我们的方法比相关的最先进方法具有更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督信息瓶颈的深度多视图子空间聚类框架（SIB-MSC），通过信息论方法学习多视图数据的公共信息和视图特有信息。
AI.motivation: 传统多视图聚类方法难以有效平衡不同视图间的冗余信息与共享信息，且缺乏自监督信号。本文旨在通过信息瓶颈理论，构建能同时捕捉视图间公共信息和特有信息的子空间表示。
AI.method: 提出SIB-MSC框架，利用信息瓶颈原则为每个视图学习潜在空间：1）通过去除冗余信息保留跨视图共享信息；2）引入互信息正则化项学习视图特有信息；3）利用潜在表示作为自监督信号进行多视图协同训练。
AI.result: 在多个真实多视图数据集上实验表明，SIB-MSC在聚类性能上优于现有最先进的多视图子空间聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将信息瓶颈理论应用于多视图子空间聚类，提出的SIB-MSC框架通过自监督学习机制有效融合多视图信息，为多视图聚类任务提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 提出SIB-MSC框架，利用信息瓶颈原则为每个视图学习潜在空间：1）通过去除冗余信息保留跨视图共享信息；2）引入互信息正则化项学习视图特有信息；3）利用潜在表示作为自监督信号进行多视图协同训练。
ai_content_json.result: 在多个真实多视图数据集上实验表明，SIB-MSC在聚类性能上优于现有最先进的多视图子空间聚类方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文首次将信息瓶颈理论应用于多视图子空间聚类，提出的SIB-MSC框架通过自监督学习机制有效融合多视图信息，为多视图聚类任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Self-Supervised Information Bottleneck for Deep Multi-View Subspace Clustering 深度多视图子空间聚类的自监督信息瓶颈 In this paper, we explore the problem of deep multi-view subspace clustering framework from an information-theoretic point of view. We extend the traditional information bottleneck principle to learn common information among different views in a self-supervised manner, and accordingly establish a new framework called Self-supervised Information Bottleneck based Multi-view Subspace Clustering (SIB-MSC). Inheriting the advantages from information bottleneck, SIB-MSC can learn a latent space for each view to capture common information among the latent representations of different views by removing superfluous information from the view itself while retaining sufficient information for the latent representations of other views. Actually, the latent representation of each view provides a kind of self-supervised signal for training the latent representations of other views. Moreover, SIB-MSC attempts to learn the other latent space for each view to capture the view-specific information by introducing mutual information based regularization terms, so as to further improve the performance of multi-view subspace clustering. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore information bottleneck for multi-view subspace clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world multi-view data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over the related state-of-the-art methods. 在本文中，我们从信息论的角度探讨了深度多视图子空间聚类框架的问题。我们扩展了传统的信息瓶颈原理，以自监督的方式学习不同视图之间的公共信息，并相应地建立了一种新的框架，称为基于自监督信息瓶颈的多视图子空间聚类（SIB-MSC）。继承信息瓶颈的优点，SIB-MSC可以学习每个视图的潜在空间，通过从视图本身去除多余的信息，同时为其他视图的潜在表示保留足够的信息，捕获不同视图的潜在表示之间的公共信息。实际上，每个视图的潜在表示提供了一种自监督信号，用于训练其他视图的潜在表示。此外，SIB-MSC尝试通过引入基于互信息的正则化项来学习每个视图的其他潜在空间以捕获特定于视图的信息，从而进一步提高多视图子空间聚类的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个探索多视图子空间聚类信息瓶颈的工作。对现实世界多视图数据的大量实验表明，我们的方法比相关的最先进方法具有更优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于自监督信息瓶颈的深度多视图子空间聚类框架（SIB-MSC），通过信息论方法学习多视图数据的公共信息和视图特有信息。 Shiye Wang,Changsheng Li,Yanming Li,Ye Yuan,Guoren Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shaltiel Eloul,Fran Silavong,Sanket Kamthe,Antonios Georgiadis,Sean J. Moran
title: Enhancing Privacy against Inversion Attacks in Federated Learning by using Mixing Gradients Strategies
title_zh: 通过使用混合梯度策略增强联邦学习中针对逆向攻击的隐私
comment: Supporting information is available. Code will be shared soon
comments: Supporting information is available. Code will be shared soon
abstract: Federated learning reduces the risk of information leakage, but remains vulnerable to attacks. We investigate how several neural network design decisions can defend against gradients inversion attacks. We show that overlapping gradients provides numerical resistance to gradient inversion on the highly vulnerable dense layer. Specifically, we propose to leverage batching to maximise mixing of gradients by choosing an appropriate loss function and drawing identical labels. We show that otherwise it is possible to directly recover all vectors in a mini-batch without any numerical optimisation due to the de-mixing nature of the cross entropy loss. To accurately assess data recovery, we introduce an absolute variation distance (AVD) metric for information leakage in images, derived from total variation. In contrast to standard metrics, e.g. Mean Squared Error or Structural Similarity Index, AVD offers a continuous metric for extracting information in noisy images. Finally, our empirical results on information recovery from various inversion attacks and training performance supports our defense strategies. These strategies are also shown to be useful for deep convolutional neural networks such as LeNET for image recognition. We hope that this study will help guide the development of further strategies that achieve a trustful federation policy.
summary: Federated learning reduces the risk of information leakage, but remains vulnerable to attacks. We investigate how several neural network design decisions can defend against gradients inversion attacks. We show that overlapping gradients provides numerical resistance to gradient inversion on the highly vulnerable dense layer. Specifically, we propose to leverage batching to maximise mixing of gradients by choosing an appropriate loss function and drawing identical labels. We show that otherwise it is possible to directly recover all vectors in a mini-batch without any numerical optimisation due to the de-mixing nature of the cross entropy loss. To accurately assess data recovery, we introduce an absolute variation distance (AVD) metric for information leakage in images, derived from total variation. In contrast to standard metrics, e.g. Mean Squared Error or Structural Similarity Index, AVD offers a continuous metric for extracting information in noisy images. Finally, our empirical results on information recovery from various inversion attacks and training performance supports our defense strategies. These strategies are also shown to be useful for deep convolutional neural networks such as LeNET for image recognition. We hope that this study will help guide the development of further strategies that achieve a trustful federation policy.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习降低了信息泄露的风险，但仍然容易受到攻击。我们研究了几种神经网络设计决策如何防御梯度反转攻击。我们表明，重叠梯度为高度脆弱的致密层上的梯度反转提供了数值阻力。具体来说，我们建议通过选择适当的损失函数并绘制相同的标签，利用批处理来最大化梯度混合。我们证明，由于交叉熵损失的去混合性质，否则可以直接恢复小批量中的所有向量，而无需任何数值优化。为了准确评估数据恢复，我们引入了从总变化导出的图像信息泄漏的绝对变化距离（AVD）度量。与标准指标相反，例如均方误差或结构相似性指数，AVD 提供了一种用于在噪声图像中提取信息的连续度量。最后，我们从各种反转攻击和训练性能中恢复信息的实证结果支持了我们的防御策略。这些策略也被证明对于深度卷积神经网络（例如用于图像识别的 LeNET）很有用。我们希望这项研究将有助于指导进一步制定战略，以实现可信的联邦政策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过混合梯度策略增强联邦学习中的隐私保护，以抵御梯度反转攻击。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习虽降低信息泄露风险，但仍易受梯度反转攻击。现有防御手段不足，需探索神经网络设计决策以提升安全性。
AI.method: 利用批处理最大化梯度混合，结合适当损失函数与相同标签；提出绝对变异距离（AVD）指标评估图像信息泄露，替代传统MSE等指标。
AI.result: 实验表明混合梯度策略有效降低信息恢复能力，且适用于LeNET等深度卷积网络，同时保持训练性能。
AI.conclusion: 混合梯度策略可作为联邦学习隐私保护的有效方案，为构建可信联邦政策提供指导。

title: AI-Assisted Authentication: State of the Art, Taxonomy and Future Roadmap
title_zh: 人工智能辅助身份验证：最先进的技术、分类法和未来路线图
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has found its applications in a variety of environments ranging from data science to cybersecurity. AI helps break through the limitations of traditional algorithms and provides more efficient and flexible methods for solving problems. In this paper, we focus on the applications of artificial intelligence in authentication, which is used in a wide range of scenarios including facial recognition to access buildings, keystroke dynamics to unlock smartphones. With the emerging AI-assisted authentication schemes, our comprehensive survey provides an overall understanding on a high level, which paves the way for future research in this area. In contrast to other relevant surveys, our research is the first of its kind to focus on the roles of AI in authentication.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has found its applications in a variety of environments ranging from data science to cybersecurity. AI helps break through the limitations of traditional algorithms and provides more efficient and flexible methods for solving problems. In this paper, we focus on the applications of artificial intelligence in authentication, which is used in a wide range of scenarios including facial recognition to access buildings, keystroke dynamics to unlock smartphones. With the emerging AI-assisted authentication schemes, our comprehensive survey provides an overall understanding on a high level, which paves the way for future research in this area. In contrast to other relevant surveys, our research is the first of its kind to focus on the roles of AI in authentication.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 已在从数据科学到网络安全等各种环境中找到了应用。人工智能有助于突破传统算法的局限性，为解决问题提供更高效、更灵活的方法。在本文中，我们重点关注人工智能在身份验证中的应用，其广泛应用于包括面部识别进入建筑物、击键动态解锁智能手机等场景。通过新兴的人工智能辅助认证方案，我们的全面调查提供了高水平的整体了解，为该领域的未来研究铺平了道路。与其他相关调查相比，我们的研究是同类研究中第一个关注人工智能在身份验证中的作用的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在身份验证领域的最新进展、分类及未来研究方向，首次系统探讨了AI在该领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统验证算法存在效率与灵活性局限，而AI技术能突破这些限制，需系统梳理其在身份验证中的应用现状与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与分类分析，总结AI辅助验证的典型场景（如人脸识别、键盘动态分析），并构建技术框架与未来研究路线图。
AI.result: 提出AI在身份验证中的分类体系，分析现有技术优劣势，并为后续研究提供方向，如多模态融合与对抗攻击防御。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助验证是提升安全性的关键方向，需进一步解决隐私保护、算法鲁棒性等问题以推动实际应用落地。

In this paper, we focus on the applications of artificial intelligence in authentication, which is used in a wide range of scenarios including facial recognition to access buildings, keystroke dynamics to unlock smartphones. With the emerging AI-assisted authentication schemes, our comprehensive survey provides an overall understanding on a high level, which paves the way for future research in this area. In contrast to other relevant surveys, our research is the first of its kind to focus on the roles of AI in authentication. 人工智能 (AI) 已在从数据科学到网络安全等各种环境中找到了应用。人工智能有助于突破传统算法的局限性，为解决问题提供更高效、更灵活的方法。在本文中，我们重点关注人工智能在身份验证中的应用，其广泛应用于包括面部识别进入建筑物、击键动态解锁智能手机等场景。通过新兴的人工智能辅助认证方案，我们的全面调查提供了高水平的整体了解，为该领域的未来研究铺平了道路。与其他相关调查相比，我们的研究是同类研究中第一个关注人工智能在身份验证中的作用的研究。 本文综述了人工智能在身份验证领域的最新进展、分类及未来研究方向，首次系统探讨了AI在该领域的应用。 Guangyi Zhu,Yasir Al-Qaraghuli cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: From One Hand to Multiple Hands: Imitation Learning for Dexterous Manipulation from Single-Camera Teleoperation
title_zh: 从一只手到多只手：单摄像头遥操作灵巧操作的模仿学习
abstract: We propose to perform imitation learning for dexterous manipulation with multi-finger robot hand from human demonstrations, and transfer the policy to the real robot hand. We introduce a novel single-camera teleoperation system to collect the 3D demonstrations efficiently with only an iPad and a computer. One key contribution of our system is that we construct a customized robot hand for each user in the physical simulator, which is a manipulator resembling the same kinematics structure and shape of the operator's hand. This provides an intuitive interface and avoid unstable human-robot hand retargeting for data collection, leading to large-scale and high quality data. Once the data is collected, the customized robot hand trajectories can be converted to different specified robot hands (models that are manufactured) to generate training demonstrations. With imitation learning using our data, we show large improvement over baselines with multiple complex manipulation tasks. Importantly, we show our learned policy is significantly more robust when transferring to the real robot. More videos can be found in the https://yzqin.github.io/dex-teleop-imitation .
summary: We propose to perform imitation learning for dexterous manipulation with multi-finger robot hand from human demonstrations, and transfer the policy to the real robot hand. We introduce a novel single-camera teleoperation system to collect the 3D demonstrations efficiently with only an iPad and a computer. One key contribution of our system is that we construct a customized robot hand for each user in the physical simulator, which is a manipulator resembling the same kinematics structure and shape of the operator's hand. This provides an intuitive interface and avoid unstable human-robot hand retargeting for data collection, leading to large-scale and high quality data. Once the data is collected, the customized robot hand trajectories can be converted to different specified robot hands (models that are manufactured) to generate training demonstrations. With imitation learning using our data, we show large improvement over baselines with multiple complex manipulation tasks. Importantly, we show our learned policy is significantly more robust when transferring to the real robot. More videos can be found in the https://yzqin.github.io/dex-teleop-imitation .
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过人类演示对多指机器人手进行灵巧操作的模仿学习，并将该策略转移到真实的机器人手上。我们引入了一种新颖的单摄像头远程操作系统，只需一台 iPad 和一台计算机即可高效地收集 3D 演示。我们系统的一个关键贡献是，我们在物理模拟器中为每个用户构建了一个定制的机器人手，这是一个与操作者的手具有相同运动结构和形状的机械手。这提供了直观的界面，并避免了不稳定的人机手重新定位数据收集，从而获得大规模和高质量的数据。收集数据后，定制的机器人手轨迹可以转换为不同的指定机器人手（已制造的模型）以生成训练演示。通过使用我们的数据进行模仿学习，我们在多个复杂操作任务的基础上显示出巨大的改进。重要的是，我们表明，当转移到真实机器人时，我们学习的策略明显更加稳健。更多视频可以在 https://yzqin.github.io/dex-teleop-imitation 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过单摄像头遥操作系统收集人类演示数据，利用模仿学习训练多手指机械手实现灵巧操作，并成功迁移至真实机器人。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在数据收集和人机手重定位时存在不稳定性和低效问题，难以生成高质量且可迁移的灵巧操作数据。
AI.method: 构建用户定制化物理模拟机械手，通过单摄像头遥操作采集3D演示数据，再将轨迹转换至不同机械手模型进行模仿学习训练。
AI.result: 在多个复杂操作任务中显著优于基线方法，且迁移至真实机器人后表现出更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过定制化模拟和高效数据采集解决了灵巧操作迁移难题，为机器人学习提供了有效方案。

title: Sound Localization by Self-Supervised Time Delay Estimation
title_zh: 通过自监督时延估计进行声音定位
abstract: Sounds reach one microphone in a stereo pair sooner than the other, resulting in an interaural time delay that conveys their directions. Estimating a sound's time delay requires finding correspondences between the signals recorded by each microphone. We propose to learn these correspondences through self-supervision, drawing on recent techniques from visual tracking. We adapt the contrastive random walk of Jabri et al. to learn a cycle-consistent representation from unlabeled stereo sounds, resulting in a model that performs on par with supervised methods on "in the wild" internet recordings. We also propose a multimodal contrastive learning model that solves a visually-guided localization task: estimating the time delay for a particular person in a multi-speaker mixture, given a visual representation of their face. Project site: https://ificl.github.io/stereocrw/
summary: Sounds reach one microphone in a stereo pair sooner than the other, resulting in an interaural time delay that conveys their directions. Estimating a sound's time delay requires finding correspondences between the signals recorded by each microphone. We propose to learn these correspondences through self-supervision, drawing on recent techniques from visual tracking. We adapt the contrastive random walk of Jabri et al. to learn a cycle-consistent representation from unlabeled stereo sounds, resulting in a model that performs on par with supervised methods on "in the wild" internet recordings. We also propose a multimodal contrastive learning model that solves a visually-guided localization task: estimating the time delay for a particular person in a multi-speaker mixture, given a visual representation of their face. Project site: https://ificl.github.io/stereocrw/
abstract_zh: 声音到达立体声对中的一个麦克风比另一个麦克风早，从而导致传达其方向的耳间时间延迟。估计声音的时间延迟需要找到每个麦克风记录的信号之间的对应关系。我们建议利用视觉跟踪的最新技术，通过自我监督来学习这些对应关系。我们采用 Jabri 等人的对比随机游走。从未标记的立体声中学习周期一致的表示，从而产生一个与“野外”互联网录音上的监督方法表现相同的模型。我们还提出了一种多模态对比学习模型，可以解决视觉引导的定位任务：在给定面部视觉表示的情况下，估计多说话者混合中特定人的时间延迟。项目站点：https://ificl.github.io/stereocrw/

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自监督学习估计立体声麦克风的时间延迟，实现声音定位，并结合视觉信息提升多说话者场景下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统时间延迟估计依赖监督数据，而获取标注数据成本高。自监督学习可利用未标记数据，提升模型泛化能力，尤其在复杂环境录音中表现更优。
AI.method: 基于视觉跟踪的对比随机游走方法，学习循环一致的立体声表示；并设计多模态对比学习模型，结合人脸视觉特征与音频信号估计特定说话者的时间延迟。
AI.result: 模型在未标记的互联网录音数据上表现与监督方法相当，且多模态方法有效解决了多说话者混合场景下的定位问题。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效替代传统监督方法，结合视觉信息可进一步提升复杂场景下的声音定位性能，为实际应用提供新思路。

title: Distances Release with Differential Privacy in Tree and Grid Graph
title_zh: 树形和网格图中具有差异隐私的距离发布
abstract: Data about individuals may contain private and sensitive information. The differential privacy (DP) was proposed to address the problem of protecting the privacy of each individual while keeping useful information about a population. Sealfon (2016) introduced a private graph model in which the graph topology is assumed to be public while the weight information is assumed to be private. That model can express hidden congestion patterns in a known transportation system. In this paper, we revisit the problem of privately releasing approximate distances between all pairs of vertices in (Sealfon 2016). Our goal is to minimize the additive error, namely the difference between the released distance and actual distance under private setting. We propose improved solutions to that problem for several cases. For the problem of privately releasing all-pairs distances, we show that for tree with depth $h$, we can release all-pairs distances with additive error $O(\log^{1.5} h \cdot \log^{1.5} V)$ for fixed privacy parameter where $V$ the number of vertices in the tree, which improves the previous error bound $O(\log^{2.5} V)$, since the size of $h$ can be as small as $O(\log V)$. Our result implies that a $\log V$ factor is saved, and the additive error in tree can be smaller than the error on array/path. Additionally, for the grid graph with arbitrary edge weights, we also propose a method to release all-pairs distances with additive error $\tilde O(V^{3/4}) $ for fixed privacy parameters. On the application side, many cities like Manhattan are composed of horizontal streets and vertical avenues, which can be modeled as a grid graph.

Additionally, for the grid graph with arbitrary edge weights, we also propose a method to release all-pairs distances with additive error $\tilde O(V^{3/4}) $ for fixed privacy parameters. On the application side, many cities like Manhattan are composed of horizontal streets and vertical avenues, which can be modeled as a grid graph.
abstract_zh: 有关个人的数据可能包含私人和敏感信息。差分隐私（DP）的提出是为了解决保护每个个体的隐私同时保留有关群体的有用信息的问题。 Sealfon（2016）引入了一种私有图模型，其中图拓扑被假设为公共的，而权重信息被假设为私有的。该模型可以表达已知交通系统中隐藏的拥堵模式。在本文中，我们重新审视了（Sealfon 2016）中私下发布所有顶点对之间的近似距离的问题。我们的目标是最小化附加误差，即发布距离与私人设置下的实际距离之间的差异。我们针对几种情况提出了该问题的改进解决方案。对于私有释放所有对距离的问题，我们表明，对于深度为 $h$ 的树，我们可以释放具有附加误差 $O(\log^{1.5} h \cdot \log^{1.5} V)$ 的所有对距离，用于固定隐私参数，其中 $V$ 是树中的顶点数，这改善了之前的误差界限 $O(\log^{2.5} V)$，因为 $h$ 的大小可以小到$O(\log V)$。我们的结果意味着保存了 $\log V$ 因子，并且树中的附加误差可以小于数组/路径上的误差。此外，对于具有任意边权重的网格图，我们还提出了一种针对固定隐私参数释放具有加性误差 $\tilde O(V^{3/4}) $ 的所有对距离的方法。在应用方面，像曼哈顿这样的许多城市都是由水平的街道和垂直的大道组成，可以将其建模为网格图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在树状图和网格图中，如何在差分隐私框架下发布所有顶点对之间的近似距离，以最小化加性误差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在发布图距离时存在较高的加性误差，而树状图和网格图在现实场景（如交通网络）中广泛应用，需更精确的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 针对树状图和网格图提出改进算法：对树结构利用深度分层特性优化误差上界，对网格图设计适应任意边权重的发布方法。
AI.result: 在树状图中将加性误差从$O(\\log^{2.5} V)$降至$O(\\log^{1.5} h \\cdot \\log^{1.5} V)$，在网格图中实现$\	ilde{O}(V^{3/4})$误差，优于现有结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法显著降低了树状图和网格图的距离发布误差，为差分隐私下的图数据分析提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Distances Release with Differential Privacy in Tree and Grid Graph 树形和网格图中具有差异隐私的距离发布 Data about individuals may contain private and sensitive information. The differential privacy (DP) was proposed to address the problem of protecting the privacy of each individual while keeping useful information about a population. Sealfon (2016) introduced a private graph model in which the graph topology is assumed to be public while the weight information is assumed to be private. That model can express hidden congestion patterns in a known transportation system. In this paper, we revisit the problem of privately releasing approximate distances between all pairs of vertices in (Sealfon 2016). Our goal is to minimize the additive error, namely the difference between the released distance and actual distance under private setting. We propose improved solutions to that problem for several cases. For the problem of privately releasing all-pairs distances, we show that for tree with depth $h$, we can release all-pairs distances with additive error $O(\log^{1.5} h \cdot \log^{1.5} V)$ for fixed privacy parameter where $V$ the number of vertices in the tree, which improves the previous error bound $O(\log^{2.5} V)$, since the size of $h$ can be as small as $O(\log V)$. Our result implies that a $\log V$ factor is saved, and the additive error in tree can be smaller than the error on array/path. Additionally, for the grid graph with arbitrary edge weights, we also propose a method to release all-pairs distances with additive error $\tilde O(V^{3/4}) $ for fixed privacy parameters. On the application side, many cities like Manhattan are composed of horizontal streets and vertical avenues, which can be modeled as a grid graph. 有关个人的数据可能包含私人和敏感信息。差分隐私（DP）的提出是为了解决保护每个个体的隐私同时保留有关群体的有用信息的问题。 Sealfon（2016）引入了一种私有图模型，其中图拓扑被假设为公共的，而权重信息被假设为私有的。该模型可以表达已知交通系统中隐藏的拥堵模式。在本文中，我们重新审视了（Sealfon 2016）中私下发布所有顶点对之间的近似距离的问题。我们的目标是最小化附加误差，即发布距离与私人设置下的实际距离之间的差异。我们针对几种情况提出了该问题的改进解决方案。对于私有释放所有对距离的问题，我们表明，对于深度为 $h$ 的树，我们可以释放具有附加误差 $O(\log^{1.5} h \cdot \log^{1.5} V)$ 的所有对距离，用于固定隐私参数，其中 $V$ 是树中的顶点数，这改善了之前的误差界限 $O(\log^{2.5} V)$，因为 $h$ 的大小可以小到$O(\log V)$。我们的结果意味着保存了 $\log V$ 因子，并且树中的附加误差可以小于数组/路径上的误差。此外，对于具有任意边权重的网格图，我们还提出了一种针对固定隐私参数释放具有加性误差 $\tilde O(V^{3/4}) $ 的所有对距离的方法。在应用方面，像曼哈顿这样的许多城市都是由水平的街道和垂直的大道组成，可以将其建模为网格图。 本文研究在树状图和网格图中，如何在差分隐私框架下发布所有顶点对之间的近似距离，以最小化加性误差。 Chenglin Fan,Ping Li cs.DS

title: Measurement uncertainty and unicity of single number quantities describing the spatial decay of speech level in open-plan offices
title_zh: 描述开放式办公室中语音水平空间衰减的单个数值的测量不确定性和单一性
abstract: The ISO 3382-3 standard (2012) defines single number quantities (SNQs) which evaluate the acoustic quality of open-plan offices, but does not address the issue of measurement uncertainties. This study focusses on the SNQs present in this standard related to spatial decay of speech, i.e. D 2S , L pAS4m and r c. The aim is to provide additional information to the limited literature on the measurement uncertainties of these SNQs by use of both analytical developments and a stochastic approach based on simulations. The accuracy of the analytical developments was studied thanks to simulations of the sound propagation within a series of offices (1 layout, 16 acoustic configurations with different screen heights and different acoustic qualities of screens and ceiling). The SNQs obtained in the simulations cover a wide range: D 2S between 3.4 and 7.5 dB(A), L pAS4m between 40.6 and 51.9 dB(A) and r c between 2.5 and 14.7 m. Therefore, the simulations are representative of a broad set of acoustic qualities. Estimated uncertainties have a magnitude of 0.4 dB(A) for D 2S and vary between 0.4 and 0.7 dB(A) for L pAS4m and between 0.2 and 1.5 m for r c over a measurement path comprising 7 measurement positions. The simulations also raise the question of describing the acoustic quality of an office using a single value for the indicators. The results of the simulations show that in some cases, D 2S values significantly depend on the measurement path, leading to a strong increase of its measurement uncertainty if a unique value is to be considered.
summary: The ISO 3382-3 standard (2012) defines single number quantities (SNQs) which evaluate the acoustic quality of open-plan offices, but does not address the issue of measurement uncertainties. This study focusses on the SNQs present in this standard related to spatial decay of speech, i.e. D 2S , L pAS4m and r c. The aim is to provide additional information to the limited literature on the measurement uncertainties of these SNQs by use of both analytical developments and a stochastic approach based on simulations. The accuracy of the analytical developments was studied thanks to simulations of the sound propagation within a series of offices (1 layout, 16 acoustic configurations with different screen heights and different acoustic qualities of screens and ceiling). The SNQs obtained in the simulations cover a wide range: D 2S between 3.4 and 7.5 dB(A), L pAS4m between 40.6 and 51.9 dB(A) and r c between 2.5 and 14.7 m. Therefore, the simulations are representative of a broad set of acoustic qualities. Estimated uncertainties have a magnitude of 0.4 dB(A) for D 2S and vary between 0.4 and 0.7 dB(A) for L pAS4m and between 0.2 and 1.5 m for r c over a measurement path comprising 7 measurement positions. The simulations also raise the question of describing the acoustic quality of an office using a single value for the indicators. The results of the simulations show that in some cases, D 2S values significantly depend on the measurement path, leading to a strong increase of its measurement uncertainty if a unique value is to be considered.
abstract_zh: ISO 3382-3 标准 (2012) 定义了评估开放式办公室声学质量的单数值 (SNQ)，但没有解决测量不确定性问题。本研究重点关注该标准中与语音空间衰减相关的 SNQ，即 D 2S 、L pAS4m 和 r c。目的是通过使用分析发展和基于模拟的随机方法，为有关这些 SNQ 测量不确定性的有限文献提供更多信息。通过模拟一系列办公室内的声音传播（1 种布局、16 种具有不同屏幕高度以及不同屏幕和天花板声学质量的声学配置），研究了分析进展的准确性。模拟中获得的 SNQ 覆盖范围很广：D 2S 在 3.4 到 7.5 dB(A) 之间，L pAS4m 在 40.6 到 51.9 dB(A) 之间，rc 在 2.5 到 14.7 m 之间。因此，模拟代表了广泛的声学质量。在包含 7 个测量位置的测量路径上，D 2S 的估计不确定性幅度为 0.4 dB(A)，L pAS4m 的估计不确定性在 0.4 到 0.7 dB(A) 之间变化，而 rc 的估计不确定性在 0.2 到 1.5 m 之间变化。模拟还提出了使用单一指标值来描述办公室声学质量的问题。模拟结果表明，在某些情况下，D 2S 值显着依赖于测量路径，如果考虑唯一值，则会导致其测量不确定度大幅增加。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开放办公环境中语音水平空间衰减相关单数值量的测量不确定性及唯一性问题。
AI.motivation: ISO 3382-3标准虽定义了评估开放办公声学质量的单数值量（SNQs），但未涉及测量不确定性，且现有文献对此研究不足。
AI.method: 通过分析推导与基于模拟的随机方法，结合多种办公室布局和声学配置的仿真数据，评估SNQs的测量不确定性。
AI.result: D2S的不确定性为0.4 dB(A)，LpAS4m为0.4-0.7 dB(A)，rc为0.2-1.5 m；部分情况下D2S值对测量路径敏感，导致不确定性显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 单数值量可能无法全面描述声学质量，需考虑测量路径影响，建议采用更全面的评估方法。

title: ViTPose: Simple Vision Transformer Baselines for Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: ViTPose：用于人体姿势估计的简单视觉变压器基线
comment: Neurips 2022. 81.1 mAP on MS COCO Keypoint Detection test-dev set. V2: Update Multi-task training results: 92.8 AP on OCHuman, 78.3 AP on CrowdPose, 94.3 PCKh on MPII, and 43.2 AP on AI Challenger
comments: Neurips 2022. 81.1 mAP on MS COCO Keypoint Detection test-dev set. V2: Update Multi-task training results: 92.8 AP on OCHuman, 78.3 AP on CrowdPose, 94.3 PCKh on MPII, and 43.2 AP on AI Challenger
abstract: Although no specific domain knowledge is considered in the design, plain vision transformers have shown excellent performance in visual recognition tasks. However, little effort has been made to reveal the potential of such simple structures for pose estimation tasks. In this paper, we show the surprisingly good capabilities of plain vision transformers for pose estimation from various aspects, namely simplicity in model structure, scalability in model size, flexibility in training paradigm, and transferability of knowledge between models, through a simple baseline model called ViTPose. Specifically, ViTPose employs plain and non-hierarchical vision transformers as backbones to extract features for a given person instance and a lightweight decoder for pose estimation. It can be scaled up from 100M to 1B parameters by taking the advantages of the scalable model capacity and high parallelism of transformers, setting a new Pareto front between throughput and performance. Besides, ViTPose is very flexible regarding the attention type, input resolution, pre-training and finetuning strategy, as well as dealing with multiple pose tasks. We also empirically demonstrate that the knowledge of large ViTPose models can be easily transferred to small ones via a simple knowledge token. Experimental results show that our basic ViTPose model outperforms representative methods on the challenging MS COCO Keypoint Detection benchmark, while the largest model sets a new state-of-the-art. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose.

Besides, ViTPose is very flexible regarding the attention type, input resolution, pre-training and finetuning strategy, as well as dealing with multiple pose tasks. We also empirically demonstrate that the knowledge of large ViTPose models can be easily transferred to small ones via a simple knowledge token. Experimental results show that our basic ViTPose model outperforms representative methods on the challenging MS COCO Keypoint Detection benchmark, while the largest model sets a new state-of-the-art. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose.
abstract_zh: 尽管设计中没有考虑特定的领域知识，但普通视觉变压器在视觉识别任务中表现出了出色的性能。然而，很少有人努力揭示这种简单结构在姿态估计任务中的潜力。在本文中，我们通过一个名为 ViTPose 的简单基线模型，从各个方面展示了普通视觉 Transformer 在姿态估计方面令人惊讶的良好能力，即模型结构的简单性、模型大小的可扩展性、训练范式的灵活性以及模型之间知识的可转移性。具体来说，ViTPose 采用简单且非分层的视觉转换器作为骨干来提取给定人物实例的特征，并使用轻量级解码器进行姿势估计。利用可扩展的模型容量和Transformer的高并行性的优势，可以将参数从100M扩展到1B，在吞吐量和性能之间建立了新的Pareto前沿。此外，ViTPose 在注意力类型、输入分辨率、预训练和微调策略以及处理多个姿势任务方面非常灵活。我们还凭经验证明，大型 ViTPose 模型的知识可以通过简单的知识令牌轻松转移到小型模型。实验结果表明，我们的基本 ViTPose 模型在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 关键点检测基准上优于代表性方法，而最大的模型设定了新的最先进技术。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViTPose，一种基于简单视觉Transformer的人体姿态估计基线模型，展示了其在模型结构、可扩展性、灵活性和知识迁移方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在图像识别中表现优异，但其在姿态估计任务中的潜力尚未被充分探索，现有研究缺乏对简单结构有效性的系统验证。
AI.method: ViTPose采用非分层视觉Transformer作为主干网络提取特征，并结合轻量级解码器。模型支持参数规模从100M到1B的扩展，具备注意力类型、输入分辨率、预训练策略等多维度灵活性，通过知识token实现大模型到小模型的知识迁移。
AI.result: 基础ViTPose模型在MS COCO关键点检测基准上超越代表性方法，最大模型在多个指标上达到新SOTA，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: ViTPose验证了简单视觉Transformer在姿态估计中的有效性，为后续研究提供了高效且可扩展的基线框架，并证明了知识迁移在模型压缩中的实用价值。

search_text: ViTPose: Simple Vision Transformer Baselines for Human Pose Estimation ViTPose：用于人体姿势估计的简单视觉变压器基线 Although no specific domain knowledge is considered in the design, plain vision transformers have shown excellent performance in visual recognition tasks. However, little effort has been made to reveal the potential of such simple structures for pose estimation tasks. In this paper, we show the surprisingly good capabilities of plain vision transformers for pose estimation from various aspects, namely simplicity in model structure, scalability in model size, flexibility in training paradigm, and transferability of knowledge between models, through a simple baseline model called ViTPose. Specifically, ViTPose employs plain and non-hierarchical vision transformers as backbones to extract features for a given person instance and a lightweight decoder for pose estimation. It can be scaled up from 100M to 1B parameters by taking the advantages of the scalable model capacity and high parallelism of transformers, setting a new Pareto front between throughput and performance. Besides, ViTPose is very flexible regarding the attention type, input resolution, pre-training and finetuning strategy, as well as dealing with multiple pose tasks. We also empirically demonstrate that the knowledge of large ViTPose models can be easily transferred to small ones via a simple knowledge token. Experimental results show that our basic ViTPose model outperforms representative methods on the challenging MS COCO Keypoint Detection benchmark, while the largest model sets a new state-of-the-art. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose. 尽管设计中没有考虑特定的领域知识，但普通视觉变压器在视觉识别任务中表现出了出色的性能。然而，很少有人努力揭示这种简单结构在姿态估计任务中的潜力。在本文中，我们通过一个名为 ViTPose 的简单基线模型，从各个方面展示了普通视觉 Transformer 在姿态估计方面令人惊讶的良好能力，即模型结构的简单性、模型大小的可扩展性、训练范式的灵活性以及模型之间知识的可转移性。具体来说，ViTPose 采用简单且非分层的视觉转换器作为骨干来提取给定人物实例的特征，并使用轻量级解码器进行姿势估计。利用可扩展的模型容量和Transformer的高并行性的优势，可以将参数从100M扩展到1B，在吞吐量和性能之间建立了新的Pareto前沿。此外，ViTPose 在注意力类型、输入分辨率、预训练和微调策略以及处理多个姿势任务方面非常灵活。我们还凭经验证明，大型 ViTPose 模型的知识可以通过简单的知识令牌轻松转移到小型模型。实验结果表明，我们的基本 ViTPose 模型在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 关键点检测基准上优于代表性方法，而最大的模型设定了新的最先进技术。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose 获取。 本文提出ViTPose，一种基于简单视觉Transformer的人体姿态估计基线模型，展示了其在模型结构、可扩展性、灵活性和知识迁移方面的优势。 Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Qiming Zhang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

title: Digital Twins for Dynamic Management of Blockchain Systems
title_zh: 用于区块链系统动态管理的数字孪生
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, submitted to Winter Simulation Conference 2022
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, submitted to Winter Simulation Conference 2022
abstract: Blockchain systems are challenged by the so-called Trilemma tradeoff: decentralization, scalability and security. Infrastructure and node configuration, choice of the Consensus Protocol and complexity of the application transactions are cited amongst the factors that affect the tradeoffs balance. Given that Blockchains are complex, dynamic dynamic systems, a dynamic approach to their management and reconfiguration at runtime is deemed necessary to reflect the changes in the state of the infrastructure and application. This paper introduces the utilisation of Digital Twins for this purpose. The novel contribution of the paper is design of a framework and conceptual architecture of a Digital Twin that can assist in maintaining the Trilemma tradeoffs of time critical systems. The proposed Digital Twin is illustrated via an innovative approach to dynamic selection of Consensus Protocols. Simulations results show that the proposed framework can effectively support the dynamic adaptation and management of the Blockchain

This paper introduces the utilisation of Digital Twins for this purpose. The novel contribution of the paper is design of a framework and conceptual architecture of a Digital Twin that can assist in maintaining the Trilemma tradeoffs of time critical systems. The proposed Digital Twin is illustrated via an innovative approach to dynamic selection of Consensus Protocols. Simulations results show that the proposed framework can effectively support the dynamic adaptation and management of the Blockchain
abstract_zh: 区块链系统面临着所谓的三难困境的挑战：去中心化、可扩展性和安全性。影响权衡平衡的因素包括基础设施和节点配置、共识协议的选择以及应用程序交易的复杂性。鉴于区块链是复杂的、动态的动态系统，因此有必要在运行时对其进行管理和重新配置的动态方法，以反映基础设施和应用程序状态的变化。本文介绍了数字孪生为此目的的利用。该论文的新颖贡献是数字孪生的框架和概念架构的设计，可以帮助维持时间关键系统的三难困境权衡。拟议的数字孪生通过动态选择共识协议的创新方法进行了说明。仿真结果表明，所提出的框架能够有效支持区块链的动态适配和管理

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用数字孪生技术实现区块链系统的动态管理与再配置，以解决区块链面临的去中心化、可扩展性和安全性的三难困境。
AI.motivation: 区块链系统具有复杂性和动态性，传统静态管理方法难以应对实时变化的基础设施和应用需求，需动态调整以平衡三难困境。
AI.method: 设计基于数字孪生的框架与概念架构，通过动态选择共识协议实现区块链系统的运行时适应性管理。
AI.result: 模拟结果验证了该框架能有效支持区块链系统的动态适应与管理，维持三难困境的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生为区块链系统的动态管理提供了新思路，有助于在复杂环境下优化三难困境的权衡。

title: Coarse-to-fine Q-attention with Tree Expansion
title_zh: 通过树扩展从粗到细的 Q-attention
abstract: Coarse-to-fine Q-attention enables sample-efficient robot manipulation by discretizing the translation space in a coarse-to-fine manner, where the resolution gradually increases at each layer in the hierarchy. Although effective, Q-attention suffers from "coarse ambiguity" - when voxelization is significantly coarse, it is not feasible to distinguish similar-looking objects without first inspecting at a finer resolution. To combat this, we propose to envision Q-attention as a tree that can be expanded and used to accumulate value estimates across the top-k voxels at each Q-attention depth. When our extension, Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE), replaces standard Q-attention in the Attention-driven Robot Manipulation (ARM) system, we are able to accomplish a larger set of tasks; especially on those that suffer from "coarse ambiguity". In addition to evaluating our approach across 12 RLBench tasks, we also show that the improved performance is visible in a real-world task involving small objects.
summary: Coarse-to-fine Q-attention enables sample-efficient robot manipulation by discretizing the translation space in a coarse-to-fine manner, where the resolution gradually increases at each layer in the hierarchy. Although effective, Q-attention suffers from "coarse ambiguity" - when voxelization is significantly coarse, it is not feasible to distinguish similar-looking objects without first inspecting at a finer resolution. To combat this, we propose to envision Q-attention as a tree that can be expanded and used to accumulate value estimates across the top-k voxels at each Q-attention depth. When our extension, Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE), replaces standard Q-attention in the Attention-driven Robot Manipulation (ARM) system, we are able to accomplish a larger set of tasks; especially on those that suffer from "coarse ambiguity". In addition to evaluating our approach across 12 RLBench tasks, we also show that the improved performance is visible in a real-world task involving small objects.
abstract_zh: 从粗到细的 Q-attention 通过以从粗到细的方式离散化平移空间，实现样本高效的机器人操作，其中分辨率在层次结构中的每一层逐渐增加。尽管有效，但 Q-attention 受到“粗略模糊性”的影响——当体素化明显粗糙时，如果不首先以更精细的分辨率进行检查，就无法区分外观相似的物体。为了解决这个问题，我们建议将 Q-attention 设想为一棵树，它可以扩展并用于累积每个 Q-attention 深度的前 k 个体素的值估计。当我们的扩展 Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE) 取代了注意力驱动机器人操作 (ARM) 系统中的标准 Q-attention 时，我们能够完成更多的任务；尤其是那些遭受“粗略模糊”的人。除了在 12 个 RLBench 任务中评估我们的方法之外，我们还表明在涉及小物体的现实任务中可以看到性能的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE)的方法，通过树结构扩展Q-attention机制，解决机器人操作中的'粗粒度模糊'问题，提升复杂任务的完成效率。
AI.motivation: 传统Q-attention在粗粒度空间划分时难以区分相似物体，导致'粗粒度模糊'问题，限制了机器人操作任务的性能，尤其在处理小物体或复杂场景时表现不足。
AI.method: 将Q-attention层级结构扩展为可动态扩展的树形结构，在每个层级中对top-k体素进行价值估计累积，通过渐进式细化空间分辨率解决模糊问题。
AI.result: 在12个RLBench基准任务和实际小物体操作任务中，QTE相较标准Q-attention显著提升了任务成功率，尤其在存在'粗粒度模糊'的场景中效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 树扩展机制有效缓解了Q-attention的粗粒度模糊问题，证明了该方法在复杂机器人操作任务中的优越性，为分层注意力机制提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE)的方法，通过树结构扩展Q-attention机制，解决机器人操作中的'粗粒度模糊'问题，提升复杂任务的完成效率。

search_text: Coarse-to-fine Q-attention with Tree Expansion 通过树扩展从粗到细的 Q-attention Coarse-to-fine Q-attention enables sample-efficient robot manipulation by discretizing the translation space in a coarse-to-fine manner, where the resolution gradually increases at each layer in the hierarchy. Although effective, Q-attention suffers from "coarse ambiguity" - when voxelization is significantly coarse, it is not feasible to distinguish similar-looking objects without first inspecting at a finer resolution. To combat this, we propose to envision Q-attention as a tree that can be expanded and used to accumulate value estimates across the top-k voxels at each Q-attention depth. When our extension, Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE), replaces standard Q-attention in the Attention-driven Robot Manipulation (ARM) system, we are able to accomplish a larger set of tasks; especially on those that suffer from "coarse ambiguity". In addition to evaluating our approach across 12 RLBench tasks, we also show that the improved performance is visible in a real-world task involving small objects. 从粗到细的 Q-attention 通过以从粗到细的方式离散化平移空间，实现样本高效的机器人操作，其中分辨率在层次结构中的每一层逐渐增加。尽管有效，但 Q-attention 受到“粗略模糊性”的影响——当体素化明显粗糙时，如果不首先以更精细的分辨率进行检查，就无法区分外观相似的物体。为了解决这个问题，我们建议将 Q-attention 设想为一棵树，它可以扩展并用于累积每个 Q-attention 深度的前 k 个体素的值估计。当我们的扩展 Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE) 取代了注意力驱动机器人操作 (ARM) 系统中的标准 Q-attention 时，我们能够完成更多的任务；尤其是那些遭受“粗略模糊”的人。除了在 12 个 RLBench 任务中评估我们的方法之外，我们还表明在涉及小物体的现实任务中可以看到性能的提高。 本文提出了一种名为Q-attention with Tree Expansion (QTE)的方法，通过树结构扩展Q-attention机制，解决机器人操作中的'粗粒度模糊'问题，提升复杂任务的完成效率。 Stephen James,Pieter Abbeel cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Luiz F. A. Brito,Bruno A. N. Travençolo,Marcelo K. Albertini
title: A Review of In-Memory Space-Efficient Data Structures for Temporal Graphs
title_zh: 时态图内存中空间高效数据结构回顾
abstract: Temporal graphs model relationships among entities over time. Recent studies applied temporal graphs to abstract complex systems such as continuous communication among participants of social networks. Often, the amount of data is larger than main memory, therefore, we need specialized structures that balance space usage and query efficiency. In this paper, we review space-efficient data structures that bring large temporal graphs from external memory to primary memory and speed up specialized queries. We found a great variety of studies using data compression techniques and self-indexed compressed data structures. We point further research directions to improve the current state-of-the-art.
summary: Temporal graphs model relationships among entities over time. Recent studies applied temporal graphs to abstract complex systems such as continuous communication among participants of social networks. Often, the amount of data is larger than main memory, therefore, we need specialized structures that balance space usage and query efficiency. In this paper, we review space-efficient data structures that bring large temporal graphs from external memory to primary memory and speed up specialized queries. We found a great variety of studies using data compression techniques and self-indexed compressed data structures. We point further research directions to improve the current state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 时间图对实体之间随时间变化的关系进行建模。最近的研究应用时间图来抽象复杂的系统，例如社交网络参与者之间的持续通信。通常，数据量大于主内存，因此，我们需要专门的结构来平衡空间使用和查询效率。在本文中，我们回顾了节省空间的数据结构，它将大型时间图从外部存储器带到主存储器并加速专门查询。我们发现了大量使用数据压缩技术和自索引压缩数据结构的研究。我们指出进一步的研究方向以提高当前的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了用于时间图的内存高效数据结构，旨在提升查询效率。
AI.motivation: 时间图用于建模随时间变化的实体关系，但数据量大时难以在主内存中处理，因此需要高效的数据结构。
AI.method: 本文通过回顾现有研究，分析了数据压缩和自索引压缩数据结构的应用。
AI.result: 发现多种研究采用数据压缩技术，并指出现有方法的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来的研究应进一步提升时间图数据结构的空间效率和查询性能。

title: Meta-free few-shot learning via representation learning with weight averaging
title_zh: 通过权重平均的表示学习进行无元的小样本学习
abstract: Recent studies on few-shot classification using transfer learning pose challenges to the effectiveness and efficiency of episodic meta-learning algorithms. Transfer learning approaches are a natural alternative, but they are restricted to few-shot classification. Moreover, little attention has been on the development of probabilistic models with well-calibrated uncertainty from few-shot samples, except for some Bayesian episodic learning algorithms. To tackle the aforementioned issues, we propose a new transfer learning method to obtain accurate and reliable models for few-shot regression and classification. The resulting method does not require episodic meta-learning and is called meta-free representation learning (MFRL). MFRL first finds low-rank representation generalizing well on meta-test tasks. Given the learned representation, probabilistic linear models are fine-tuned with few-shot samples to obtain models with well-calibrated uncertainty. The proposed method not only achieves the highest accuracy on a wide range of few-shot learning benchmark datasets but also correctly quantifies the prediction uncertainty. In addition, weight averaging and temperature scaling are effective in improving the accuracy and reliability of few-shot learning in existing meta-learning algorithms with a wide range of learning paradigms and model architectures.
summary: Recent studies on few-shot classification using transfer learning pose challenges to the effectiveness and efficiency of episodic meta-learning algorithms. Transfer learning approaches are a natural alternative, but they are restricted to few-shot classification. Moreover, little attention has been on the development of probabilistic models with well-calibrated uncertainty from few-shot samples, except for some Bayesian episodic learning algorithms. To tackle the aforementioned issues, we propose a new transfer learning method to obtain accurate and reliable models for few-shot regression and classification. The resulting method does not require episodic meta-learning and is called meta-free representation learning (MFRL). MFRL first finds low-rank representation generalizing well on meta-test tasks. Given the learned representation, probabilistic linear models are fine-tuned with few-shot samples to obtain models with well-calibrated uncertainty. The proposed method not only achieves the highest accuracy on a wide range of few-shot learning benchmark datasets but also correctly quantifies the prediction uncertainty. In addition, weight averaging and temperature scaling are effective in improving the accuracy and reliability of few-shot learning in existing meta-learning algorithms with a wide range of learning paradigms and model architectures.
abstract_zh: 最近使用迁移学习进行小样本分类的研究对情景元学习算法的有效性和效率提出了挑战。迁移学习方法是一种自然的选择，但它们仅限于小样本分类。此外，除了一些贝叶斯情景学习算法之外，很少有人关注通过少量样本来开发具有良好校准不确定性的概率模型。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的迁移学习方法，以获得用于少样本回归和分类的准确可靠的模型。由此产生的方法不需要情景元学习，称为无元表示学习（MFRL）。 MFRL 首先发现低秩表示能够很好地概括元测试任务。给定学习到的表示，概率线性模型可以使用少量样本进行微调，以获得具有良好校准不确定性的模型。所提出的方法不仅在各种小样本学习基准数据集上实现了最高精度，而且还正确量化了预测不确定性。此外，权重平均和温度缩放可以有效提高现有元学习算法中小样本学习的准确性和可靠性，这些算法具有广泛的学习范式和模型架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需元学习的少样本学习方法（MFRL），通过表示学习和权重平均实现高精度和不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习算法在少样本任务中存在效率与效果问题，而迁移学习方法局限于分类且缺乏不确定性校准的模型。
AI.method: MFRL首先学习低秩表示以提升元测试任务泛化能力，再通过少量样本微调概率线性模型，并结合权重平均与温度缩放优化模型可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个少样本基准数据集上取得最高准确率，且能正确量化预测不确定性，同时提升现有元学习算法的性能。
AI.conclusion: MFRL为少样本学习提供了高效可靠的替代方案，兼顾精度与不确定性校准，适用于多种学习范式和模型架构。

authors_text: Yukang Chen,Yanwei Li,Xiangyu Zhang,Jian Sun,Jiaya Jia
title: Focal Sparse Convolutional Networks for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于 3D 物体检测的焦点稀疏卷积网络
abstract: Non-uniformed 3D sparse data, e.g., point clouds or voxels in different spatial positions, make contribution to the task of 3D object detection in different ways. Existing basic components in sparse convolutional networks (Sparse CNNs) process all sparse data, regardless of regular or submanifold sparse convolution. In this paper, we introduce two new modules to enhance the capability of Sparse CNNs, both are based on making feature sparsity learnable with position-wise importance prediction. They are focal sparse convolution (Focals Conv) and its multi-modal variant of focal sparse convolution with fusion, or Focals Conv-F for short. The new modules can readily substitute their plain counterparts in existing Sparse CNNs and be jointly trained in an end-to-end fashion. For the first time, we show that spatially learnable sparsity in sparse convolution is essential for sophisticated 3D object detection. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our approach. Without bells and whistles, our results outperform all existing single-model entries on the nuScenes test benchmark at the paper submission time. Code and models are at https://github.com/dvlab-research/FocalsConv.
summary: Non-uniformed 3D sparse data, e.g., point clouds or voxels in different spatial positions, make contribution to the task of 3D object detection in different ways. Existing basic components in sparse convolutional networks (Sparse CNNs) process all sparse data, regardless of regular or submanifold sparse convolution. In this paper, we introduce two new modules to enhance the capability of Sparse CNNs, both are based on making feature sparsity learnable with position-wise importance prediction. They are focal sparse convolution (Focals Conv) and its multi-modal variant of focal sparse convolution with fusion, or Focals Conv-F for short. The new modules can readily substitute their plain counterparts in existing Sparse CNNs and be jointly trained in an end-to-end fashion. For the first time, we show that spatially learnable sparsity in sparse convolution is essential for sophisticated 3D object detection. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our approach. Without bells and whistles, our results outperform all existing single-model entries on the nuScenes test benchmark at the paper submission time. Code and models are at https://github.com/dvlab-research/FocalsConv.
abstract_zh: 非均匀 3D 稀疏数据，例如不同空间位置的点云或体素，以不同的方式对 3D 对象检测任务做出贡献。稀疏卷积网络（稀疏 CNN）中现有的基本组件处理所有稀疏数据，无论是常规稀疏卷积还是子流形稀疏卷积。在本文中，我们引入了两个新模块来增强稀疏 CNN 的能力，这两个模块都基于通过位置重要性预测使特征稀疏性可学习。它们是焦点稀疏卷积（Focals Conv）及其融合焦点稀疏卷积的多模态变体，简称Focals Conv-F。新模块可以轻松替代现有稀疏 CNN 中的普通模块，并以端到端的方式进行联合训练。我们首次证明稀疏卷积中空间可学习的稀疏性对于复杂的 3D 对象检测至关重要。对 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 基准的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的结果在论文提交时优于 nuScenes 测试基准上的所有现有单模型条目。代码和模型位于 https://github.com/dvlab-research/FocalsConv。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的稀疏卷积网络模块，用于改进3D目标检测中的稀疏数据处理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏卷积网络（Sparse CNNs）对所有稀疏数据进行统一处理，未能考虑不同空间位置数据的重要性差异，限制了3D目标检测的性能。
AI.method: 引入两种可学习特征稀疏性的模块：基于位置重要性预测的焦点稀疏卷积（Focals Conv）及其多模态变体Focals Conv-F，可替代传统稀疏卷积模块并端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Waymo基准测试中验证了方法有效性，在提交时的nuScenes测试基准上超越所有现有单模型方法。
AI.conclusion: 空间可学习稀疏性对复杂3D目标检测至关重要，所提方法通过模块化设计显著提升了检测性能。

search_text: Focal Sparse Convolutional Networks for 3D Object Detection 用于 3D 物体检测的焦点稀疏卷积网络 Non-uniformed 3D sparse data, e.g., point clouds or voxels in different spatial positions, make contribution to the task of 3D object detection in different ways. Existing basic components in sparse convolutional networks (Sparse CNNs) process all sparse data, regardless of regular or submanifold sparse convolution. In this paper, we introduce two new modules to enhance the capability of Sparse CNNs, both are based on making feature sparsity learnable with position-wise importance prediction. They are focal sparse convolution (Focals Conv) and its multi-modal variant of focal sparse convolution with fusion, or Focals Conv-F for short. The new modules can readily substitute their plain counterparts in existing Sparse CNNs and be jointly trained in an end-to-end fashion. For the first time, we show that spatially learnable sparsity in sparse convolution is essential for sophisticated 3D object detection. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our approach. Without bells and whistles, our results outperform all existing single-model entries on the nuScenes test benchmark at the paper submission time. Code and models are at https://github.com/dvlab-research/FocalsConv. 非均匀 3D 稀疏数据，例如不同空间位置的点云或体素，以不同的方式对 3D 对象检测任务做出贡献。稀疏卷积网络（稀疏 CNN）中现有的基本组件处理所有稀疏数据，无论是常规稀疏卷积还是子流形稀疏卷积。在本文中，我们引入了两个新模块来增强稀疏 CNN 的能力，这两个模块都基于通过位置重要性预测使特征稀疏性可学习。它们是焦点稀疏卷积（Focals Conv）及其融合焦点稀疏卷积的多模态变体，简称Focals Conv-F。新模块可以轻松替代现有稀疏 CNN 中的普通模块，并以端到端的方式进行联合训练。我们首次证明稀疏卷积中空间可学习的稀疏性对于复杂的 3D 对象检测至关重要。对 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 基准的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的结果在论文提交时优于 nuScenes 测试基准上的所有现有单模型条目。代码和模型位于 https://github.com/dvlab-research/FocalsConv。 本文提出了一种新的稀疏卷积网络模块，用于改进3D目标检测中的稀疏数据处理能力。 Yukang Chen,Yanwei Li,Xiangyu Zhang,Jian Sun,Jiaya Jia cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Learning Value Functions from Undirected State-only Experience
title_zh: 从无向状态经验中学习价值函数
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of learning value functions from undirected state-only experience (state transitions without action labels i.e. (s,s',r) tuples). We first theoretically characterize the applicability of Q-learning in this setting. We show that tabular Q-learning in discrete Markov decision processes (MDPs) learns the same value function under any arbitrary refinement of the action space. This theoretical result motivates the design of Latent Action Q-learning or LAQ, an offline RL method that can learn effective value functions from state-only experience. Latent Action Q-learning (LAQ) learns value functions using Q-learning on discrete latent actions obtained through a latent-variable future prediction model. We show that LAQ can recover value functions that have high correlation with value functions learned using ground truth actions. Value functions learned using LAQ lead to sample efficient acquisition of goal-directed behavior, can be used with domain-specific low-level controllers, and facilitate transfer across embodiments. Our experiments in 5 environments ranging from 2D grid world to 3D visual navigation in realistic environments demonstrate the benefits of LAQ over simpler alternatives, imitation learning oracles, and competing methods.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of learning value functions from undirected state-only experience (state transitions without action labels i.e. (s,s',r) tuples). We first theoretically characterize the applicability of Q-learning in this setting. We show that tabular Q-learning in discrete Markov decision processes (MDPs) learns the same value function under any arbitrary refinement of the action space. This theoretical result motivates the design of Latent Action Q-learning or LAQ, an offline RL method that can learn effective value functions from state-only experience. Latent Action Q-learning (LAQ) learns value functions using Q-learning on discrete latent actions obtained through a latent-variable future prediction model. We show that LAQ can recover value functions that have high correlation with value functions learned using ground truth actions. Value functions learned using LAQ lead to sample efficient acquisition of goal-directed behavior, can be used with domain-specific low-level controllers, and facilitate transfer across embodiments. Our experiments in 5 environments ranging from 2D grid world to 3D visual navigation in realistic environments demonstrate the benefits of LAQ over simpler alternatives, imitation learning oracles, and competing methods.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了从无向状态经验（没有动作标签的状态转换，即（s，s'，r）元组）学习价值函数的问题。我们首先从理论上描述 Q 学习在这种情况下的适用性。我们表明，离散马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 中的表格 Q 学习在任意细化动作空间的情况下都可以学习相同的价值函数。这一理论结果激发了潜在行动 Q 学习或 LAQ 的设计，这是一种离线 RL 方法，可以从纯状态经验中学习有效的价值函数。潜在动作 Q 学习 (LAQ) 使用 Q 学习对通过潜在变量未来预测模型获得的离散潜在动作进行学习值函数。我们证明，LAQ 可以恢复与使用真实操作学习到的价值函数具有高度相关性的价值函数。使用 LAQ 学习的价值函数可以实现目标导向行为的样本有效获取，可以与特定领域的低级控制器一起使用，并促进跨实施例的传输。我们在 5 个环境中进行的实验（从 2D 网格世界到现实环境中的 3D 视觉导航）证明了 LAQ 相对于更简单的替代方案、模仿学习预言机和竞争方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从无方向性的仅状态经验（即无动作标签的状态转移）中学习价值函数，并提出了一种名为LAQ的离线强化学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统Q学习依赖带动作标签的经验，而实际场景中常面临仅能获取状态转移数据的问题。本文旨在解决无动作标签情况下价值函数学习的可行性与有效性问题。
AI.method: 通过构建潜在变量未来预测模型生成离散潜在动作，基于这些潜在动作应用Q学习框架，设计出名为LAQ的算法以学习有效价值函数。
AI.result: 实验表明LAQ在2D网格世界到3D视觉导航等5种环境中均优于简单替代方法、模仿学习基准和竞争算法，且具备样本效率高、可与低级控制器结合及跨形态迁移的优势。
AI.conclusion: LAQ方法证明了在无动作标签的离线强化学习场景中，通过潜在动作建模可有效学习价值函数，为现实复杂环境中的智能体训练提供了新思路。
