authors_text: Kevin Thandiackal,Boqi Chen,Pushpak Pati,Guillaume Jaume,Drew F. K. Williamson,Maria Gabrani,Orcun Goksel
title: Differentiable Zooming for Multiple Instance Learning on Whole-Slide Images
title_zh: 全幻灯片图像上多实例学习的可微缩放
comment: Typos corrected; Changed dataset name from INSEC to CRC upon dataset creators' request; Update affiliation and fix typos;
comments: Typos corrected; Changed dataset name from INSEC to CRC upon dataset creators' request; Update affiliation and fix typos;
abstract: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) methods have become increasingly popular for classifying giga-pixel sized Whole-Slide Images (WSIs) in digital pathology. Most MIL methods operate at a single WSI magnification, by processing all the tissue patches. Such a formulation induces high computational requirements, and constrains the contextualization of the WSI-level representation to a single scale. A few MIL methods extend to multiple scales, but are computationally more demanding. In this paper, inspired by the pathological diagnostic process, we propose ZoomMIL, a method that learns to perform multi-level zooming in an end-to-end manner. ZoomMIL builds WSI representations by aggregating tissue-context information from multiple magnifications. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art MIL methods in WSI classification on two large datasets, while significantly reducing the computational demands with regard to Floating-Point Operations (FLOPs) and processing time by up to 40x.
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) methods have become increasingly popular for classifying giga-pixel sized Whole-Slide Images (WSIs) in digital pathology. Most MIL methods operate at a single WSI magnification, by processing all the tissue patches. Such a formulation induces high computational requirements, and constrains the contextualization of the WSI-level representation to a single scale. A few MIL methods extend to multiple scales, but are computationally more demanding. In this paper, inspired by the pathological diagnostic process, we propose ZoomMIL, a method that learns to perform multi-level zooming in an end-to-end manner. ZoomMIL builds WSI representations by aggregating tissue-context information from multiple magnifications. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art MIL methods in WSI classification on two large datasets, while significantly reducing the computational demands with regard to Floating-Point Operations (FLOPs) and processing time by up to 40x.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 方法在数字病理学中对千兆像素大小的全切片图像 (WSI) 进行分类方面变得越来越流行。大多数 MIL 方法通过处理所有组织斑块以单一 WSI 放大倍数进行操作。这样的公式会产生很高的计算要求，并将 WSI 级表示的上下文限制为单一尺度。一些 MIL 方法可以扩展到多种尺度，但计算要求更高。在本文中，受病理诊断过程的启发，我们提出了 ZoomMIL，一种学习以端到端方式执行多级缩放的方法。 ZoomMIL 通过聚合多个放大倍数的组织背景信息来构建 WSI 表示。所提出的方法在两个大型数据集上的 WSI 分类中优于最先进的 MIL 方法，同时显着减少了浮点运算 (FLOP) 方面的计算需求，并将处理时间减少了高达 40 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微缩放的多实例学习方法ZoomMIL，用于全切片病理图像分类，通过多尺度特征聚合提升分类性能并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法受限于单尺度处理导致计算量大且上下文信息不足，多尺度方法虽更优但计算复杂度高，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 受病理诊断流程启发，设计端到端多级缩放机制，通过聚合不同放大倍数的组织上下文信息构建全切片表示。
AI.result: 在两个大型病理数据集上分类准确率超越现有方法，计算量（FLOPs）和处理时间减少达40倍。
AI.conclusion: ZoomMIL通过多尺度特征学习有效提升WSI分类性能，同时显著降低计算需求，为病理分析提供高效可行的新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微缩放的多实例学习方法ZoomMIL，用于全切片病理图像分类，通过多尺度特征聚合提升分类性能并降低计算成本。

search_text: Differentiable Zooming for Multiple Instance Learning on Whole-Slide Images 全幻灯片图像上多实例学习的可微缩放 Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) methods have become increasingly popular for classifying giga-pixel sized Whole-Slide Images (WSIs) in digital pathology. Most MIL methods operate at a single WSI magnification, by processing all the tissue patches. Such a formulation induces high computational requirements, and constrains the contextualization of the WSI-level representation to a single scale. A few MIL methods extend to multiple scales, but are computationally more demanding. In this paper, inspired by the pathological diagnostic process, we propose ZoomMIL, a method that learns to perform multi-level zooming in an end-to-end manner. ZoomMIL builds WSI representations by aggregating tissue-context information from multiple magnifications. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art MIL methods in WSI classification on two large datasets, while significantly reducing the computational demands with regard to Floating-Point Operations (FLOPs) and processing time by up to 40x. 多实例学习 (MIL) 方法在数字病理学中对千兆像素大小的全切片图像 (WSI) 进行分类方面变得越来越流行。大多数 MIL 方法通过处理所有组织斑块以单一 WSI 放大倍数进行操作。这样的公式会产生很高的计算要求，并将 WSI 级表示的上下文限制为单一尺度。一些 MIL 方法可以扩展到多种尺度，但计算要求更高。在本文中，受病理诊断过程的启发，我们提出了 ZoomMIL，一种学习以端到端方式执行多级缩放的方法。 ZoomMIL 通过聚合多个放大倍数的组织背景信息来构建 WSI 表示。所提出的方法在两个大型数据集上的 WSI 分类中优于最先进的 MIL 方法，同时显着减少了浮点运算 (FLOP) 方面的计算需求，并将处理时间减少了高达 40 倍。 本文提出一种基于可微缩放的多实例学习方法ZoomMIL，用于全切片病理图像分类，通过多尺度特征聚合提升分类性能并降低计算成本。 Kevin Thandiackal,Boqi Chen,Pushpak Pati,Guillaume Jaume,Drew F. K. Williamson,Maria Gabrani,Orcun Goksel cs.CV

authors_text: Daquan Zhou,Zhiding Yu,Enze Xie,Chaowei Xiao,Anima Anandkumar,Jiashi Feng,Jose M. Alvarez
title: Understanding The Robustness in Vision Transformers
title_zh: 了解视觉转换器的稳健性
abstract: Recent studies show that Vision Transformers(ViTs) exhibit strong robustness against various corruptions. Although this property is partly attributed to the self-attention mechanism, there is still a lack of systematic understanding. In this paper, we examine the role of self-attention in learning robust representations. Our study is motivated by the intriguing properties of the emerging visual grouping in Vision Transformers, which indicates that self-attention may promote robustness through improved mid-level representations. We further propose a family of fully attentional networks (FANs) that strengthen this capability by incorporating an attentional channel processing design. We validate the design comprehensively on various hierarchical backbones. Our model achieves a state-of-the-art 87.1% accuracy and 35.8% mCE on ImageNet-1k and ImageNet-C with 76.8M parameters. We also demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy and robustness in two downstream tasks: semantic segmentation and object detection. Code is available at: https://github.com/NVlabs/FAN.
summary: Recent studies show that Vision Transformers(ViTs) exhibit strong robustness against various corruptions. Although this property is partly attributed to the self-attention mechanism, there is still a lack of systematic understanding. In this paper, we examine the role of self-attention in learning robust representations. Our study is motivated by the intriguing properties of the emerging visual grouping in Vision Transformers, which indicates that self-attention may promote robustness through improved mid-level representations. We further propose a family of fully attentional networks (FANs) that strengthen this capability by incorporating an attentional channel processing design. We validate the design comprehensively on various hierarchical backbones. Our model achieves a state-of-the-art 87.1% accuracy and 35.8% mCE on ImageNet-1k and ImageNet-C with 76.8M parameters. We also demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy and robustness in two downstream tasks: semantic segmentation and object detection. Code is available at: https://github.com/NVlabs/FAN.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，Vision Transformers（ViTs）对各种损坏表现出很强的鲁棒性。尽管这一特性部分归因于自注意力机制，但目前仍缺乏系统的理解。在本文中，我们研究了自注意力在学习鲁棒表示中的作用。我们的研究是受到视觉变形金刚中新兴视觉分组的有趣特性的启发，这表明自我注意力可以通过改进中级表示来提高鲁棒性。我们进一步提出了一系列完全注意力网络（FAN），通过结合注意力通道处理设计来增强这种能力。我们在各种分层主干上全面验证设计。我们的模型在具有 7680 万个参数的 ImageNet-1k 和 ImageNet-C 上实现了最先进的 87.1% 准确率和 35.8% mCE。我们还在两个下游任务中展示了最先进的准确性和鲁棒性：语义分割和对象检测。代码位于：https://github.com/NVlabs/FAN。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉Transformer（ViTs）的鲁棒性，探讨自注意力机制在提升模型抗干扰能力中的作用，并提出一种全注意力网络（FANs）以增强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViTs表现出对各种干扰的强鲁棒性，但其背后的机制缺乏系统性理解，特别是自注意力如何通过改进中层表示促进鲁棒性尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出全注意力网络（FANs），通过引入注意力通道处理设计，强化自注意力机制在学习鲁棒表示中的作用，并在多种层次化主干网络上验证该设计。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k和ImageNet-C上分别达到87.1%准确率和35.8% mCE，参数量76.8M；在语义分割和目标检测任务中也取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: FANs通过优化注意力机制显著提升了ViTs的鲁棒性，在多个任务中验证了其有效性，为理解自注意力促进鲁棒性的机制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Boyuan Zhang,Haozhen Li,Xin Liang,Xinyu Gu,Lin Zhang
title: Multi-task Deep Neural Networks for Massive MIMO CSI Feedback
title_zh: 用于大规模 MIMO CSI 反馈的多任务深度神经网络
abstract: Deep learning has been widely applied for the channel state information (CSI) feedback in frequency division duplexing (FDD) massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) system. For the typical supervised training of the feedback model, the requirements of large amounts of task-specific labeled data can hardly be satisfied, and the huge training costs and storage usage of the model in multiple scenarios are hindrance for model application. In this letter, a multi-task learning-based approach is proposed to improve the feasibility of the feedback network. An encoder-shared feedback architecture and the corresponding training scheme are further proposed to facilitate the implementation of the multi-task learning approach. The experimental results indicate that the proposed multi-task learning approach can achieve comprehensive feedback performance with considerable reduction of training cost and storage usage of the feedback model.
summary: Deep learning has been widely applied for the channel state information (CSI) feedback in frequency division duplexing (FDD) massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) system. For the typical supervised training of the feedback model, the requirements of large amounts of task-specific labeled data can hardly be satisfied, and the huge training costs and storage usage of the model in multiple scenarios are hindrance for model application. In this letter, a multi-task learning-based approach is proposed to improve the feasibility of the feedback network. An encoder-shared feedback architecture and the corresponding training scheme are further proposed to facilitate the implementation of the multi-task learning approach. The experimental results indicate that the proposed multi-task learning approach can achieve comprehensive feedback performance with considerable reduction of training cost and storage usage of the feedback model.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已广泛应用于频分双工（FDD）大规模多输入多输出（MIMO）系统中的信道状态信息（CSI）反馈。对于典型的反馈模型的监督训练来说，难以满足大量特定任务标记数据的需求，且模型在多种场景下的巨大训练成本和存储占用阻碍了模型的应用。在这封信中，提出了一种基于多任务学习的方法来提高反馈网络的可行性。进一步提出了编码器共享反馈架构和相应的训练方案，以促进多任务学习方法的实现。实验结果表明，所提出的多任务学习方法可以实现全面的反馈性能，同时显着降低反馈模型的训练成本和存储使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多任务学习的深度神经网络架构，以降低大规模MIMO系统中CSI反馈的训练成本和存储需求。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法需要大量标注数据且模型存储成本高，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 设计共享编码器的多任务学习框架，通过联合训练多个相关任务实现参数共享与优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持反馈性能的同时，显著减少了训练成本和模型存储开销。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习架构有效解决了CSI反馈中的数据需求与资源消耗矛盾，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Frederic Fol Leymarie,William Latham,Guido Salimbeni,Suhail A. Islam,Christopher Reynolds,Charlie Cook,Luis Armas Suarez,Richard Leinfellner,Michael J. E. Sternberg
title: Bioblox 2.5D -- Developing an Educational Game Based on Protein Docking
title_zh: Bioblox 2.5D——开发基于蛋白质对接的教育游戏
abstract: We present the development process of Bioblox2-5D, an educational biology game aimed at teenagers. The game content refers to protein docking and aims to improve learning about molecular shape complexity, the roles of charges in molecular docking and the scoring function to calculate binding affinity. We developed the game as part of a collaboration between the Computing Department at Goldsmiths, University of London, and the Structural Bioinformatics group at Imperial College London. The team at Imperial provided the content requirements and validated the technical solution adopted in the game. The team at Goldsmiths designed and implemented the content requirements into a fun and stimulating educational puzzle game that supports teaching and motivates students to engage with biology. We illustrate the game design choices, the compromises and solutions that we applied to accomplish the desired learning outcomes. This paper aims to illustrate useful insights and inspirations in the context of educational game development for biology students.
summary: We present the development process of Bioblox2-5D, an educational biology game aimed at teenagers. The game content refers to protein docking and aims to improve learning about molecular shape complexity, the roles of charges in molecular docking and the scoring function to calculate binding affinity. We developed the game as part of a collaboration between the Computing Department at Goldsmiths, University of London, and the Structural Bioinformatics group at Imperial College London. The team at Imperial provided the content requirements and validated the technical solution adopted in the game. The team at Goldsmiths designed and implemented the content requirements into a fun and stimulating educational puzzle game that supports teaching and motivates students to engage with biology. We illustrate the game design choices, the compromises and solutions that we applied to accomplish the desired learning outcomes. This paper aims to illustrate useful insights and inspirations in the context of educational game development for biology students.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 Bioblox2-5D（一款针对青少年的教育生物游戏）的开发过程。游戏内容涉及蛋白质对接，旨在提高对分子形状复杂性、分子对接中电荷的作用以及计算结合亲和力的评分函数的了解。我们开发了这款游戏，作为伦敦大学金史密斯学院计算系和伦敦帝国理工学院结构生物信息学小组合作的一部分。帝国理工团队提供了内容要求并验证了游戏中采用的技术解决方案。金史密斯学院的团队将内容要求设计并实施为一款有趣且刺激的教育益智游戏，该游戏支持教学并激励学生参与生物学。我们展示了我们为实现预期学习成果而采用的游戏设计选择、妥协和解决方案。本文旨在阐述在生物学生教育游戏开发背景下的有用见解和灵感。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Bioblox 2.5D教育游戏的开发过程，该游戏以蛋白质对接为基础，旨在帮助青少年学习分子形状复杂性、电荷作用及结合能计算等生物学概念。
AI.motivation: 通过游戏化方式提升青少年对分子生物学的兴趣，解决传统教学中抽象概念难以理解的问题，并促进跨学科合作（计算机与结构生物信息学）。
AI.method: 由伦敦金史密斯大学计算系与帝国理工学院结构生物信息学团队合作开发，前者负责游戏设计与实现，后者提供内容验证与技术方案指导，通过迭代设计平衡教育性与趣味性。
AI.result: 成功开发出支持教学的益智游戏，验证了游戏化学习在生物学教育中的可行性，并总结了教育游戏开发的关键设计思路与妥协方案。
AI.conclusion: Bioblox 2.5D展示了游戏化教学在复杂科学概念传播中的潜力，为教育游戏开发提供了跨学科协作的范例，未来可进一步优化学习效果评估体系。

authors_text: Matteo Tortora,Ermanno Cordelli,Rosa Sicilia,Lorenzo Nibid,Edy Ippolito,Giuseppe Perrone,Sara Ramella,Paolo Soda
title: RadioPathomics: Multimodal Learning in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer for Adaptive Radiotherapy
title_zh: 放射病理学：非小细胞肺癌适应性放射治疗的多模式学习
abstract: The current cancer treatment practice collects multimodal data, such as radiology images, histopathology slides, genomics and clinical data. The importance of these data sources taken individually has fostered the recent raise of radiomics and pathomics, i.e. the extraction of quantitative features from radiology and histopathology images routinely collected to predict clinical outcomes or to guide clinical decisions using artificial intelligence algorithms. Nevertheless, how to combine them into a single multimodal framework is still an open issue. In this work we therefore develop a multimodal late fusion approach that combines hand-crafted features computed from radiomics, pathomics and clinical data to predict radiation therapy treatment outcomes for non-small-cell lung cancer patients. Within this context, we investigate eight different late fusion rules (i.e. product, maximum, minimum, mean, decision template, Dempster-Shafer, majority voting, and confidence rule) and two patient-wise aggregation rules leveraging the richness of information given by computer tomography images and whole-slide scans. The experiments in leave-one-patient-out cross-validation on an in-house cohort of 33 patients show that the proposed multimodal paradigm with an AUC equal to $90.9\%$ outperforms each unimodal approach, suggesting that data integration can advance precision medicine. As a further contribution, we also compare the hand-crafted representations with features automatically computed by deep networks, and the late fusion paradigm with early fusion, another popular multimodal approach. In both cases, the experiments show that the proposed multimodal approach provides the best results.
summary: The current cancer treatment practice collects multimodal data, such as radiology images, histopathology slides, genomics and clinical data. The importance of these data sources taken individually has fostered the recent raise of radiomics and pathomics, i.e. the extraction of quantitative features from radiology and histopathology images routinely collected to predict clinical outcomes or to guide clinical decisions using artificial intelligence algorithms. Nevertheless, how to combine them into a single multimodal framework is still an open issue. In this work we therefore develop a multimodal late fusion approach that combines hand-crafted features computed from radiomics, pathomics and clinical data to predict radiation therapy treatment outcomes for non-small-cell lung cancer patients. Within this context, we investigate eight different late fusion rules (i.e. product, maximum, minimum, mean, decision template, Dempster-Shafer, majority voting, and confidence rule) and two patient-wise aggregation rules leveraging the richness of information given by computer tomography images and whole-slide scans. The experiments in leave-one-patient-out cross-validation on an in-house cohort of 33 patients show that the proposed multimodal paradigm with an AUC equal to $90.9\%$ outperforms each unimodal approach, suggesting that data integration can advance precision medicine. As a further contribution, we also compare the hand-crafted representations with features automatically computed by deep networks, and the late fusion paradigm with early fusion, another popular multimodal approach. In both cases, the experiments show that the proposed multimodal approach provides the best results.
abstract_zh: 当前的癌症治疗实践收集多模式数据，例如放射学图像、组织病理学幻灯片、基因组学和临床数据。这些单独数据源的重要性促进了放射组学和病理组学的最近兴起，即从常规收集的放射学和组织病理学图像中提取定量特征，以预测临床结果或使用人工智能算法指导临床决策。然而，如何将它们组合成一个单一的多模式框架仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。因此，在这项工作中，我们开发了一种多模式后期融合方法，该方法结合了根据放射组学、病理组学和临床数据计算的手工特征，以预测非小细胞肺癌患者的放射治疗结果。在此背景下，我们研究了八种不同的后期融合规则（即乘积、最大值、最小值、平均值、决策模板、Dempster-Shafer、多数投票和置信规则）和两个患者明智的聚合规则，利用计算机断层扫描图像和全幻灯片扫描提供的丰富信息。对 33 名患者的内部队列进行留一患者交叉验证的实验表明，所提出的 AUC 等于 90.9\%$ 的多模式范例优于每种单模式方法，这表明数据集成可以推进精准医疗。作为进一步的贡献，我们还将手工制作的表示与深度网络自动计算的特征进行比较，以及后期融合范例与早期融合（另一种流行的多模态方法）。在这两种情况下，实验表明所提出的多模态方法提供了最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态融合方法，结合放射组学、病理组学和临床数据预测非小细胞肺癌患者的放疗效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管单源数据（如放射组学和病理组学）在预测临床结果中具有重要价值，但如何有效整合多模态数据仍是一个开放性问题，需探索更优的融合框架以提升精准医疗效果。
AI.method: 开发了一种基于手工特征的多模态晚期融合方法，结合CT影像、全切片扫描和临床数据，采用八种融合规则（如乘积、最大值、多数投票等）及两种患者级聚合规则，并与深度学习特征及早期融合方法进行对比。
AI.result: 在33例患者的交叉验证中，多模态方法AUC达90.9%，显著优于单模态方法；且晚期融合策略在准确率上优于早期融合及深度学习特征。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据整合能有效提升放疗效果预测精度，晚期融合策略在临床决策支持中具有潜力，为精准医疗提供新方向。

authors_text: Yuying Ge,Yixiao Ge,Xihui Liu,Alex Jinpeng Wang,Jianping Wu,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie,Ping Luo
title: MILES: Visual BERT Pre-training with Injected Language Semantics for Video-text Retrieval
title_zh: MILES：使用注入语言语义进行视频文本检索的视觉 BERT 预训练
abstract: Dominant pre-training work for video-text retrieval mainly adopt the "dual-encoder" architectures to enable efficient retrieval, where two separate encoders are used to contrast global video and text representations, but ignore detailed local semantics. The recent success of image BERT pre-training with masked visual modeling that promotes the learning of local visual context, motivates a possible solution to address the above limitation. In this work, we for the first time investigate masked visual modeling in video-text pre-training with the "dual-encoder" architecture. We perform Masked visual modeling with Injected LanguagE Semantics (MILES) by employing an extra snapshot video encoder as an evolving "tokenizer" to produce reconstruction targets for masked video patch prediction. Given the corrupted video, the video encoder is trained to recover text-aligned features of the masked patches via reasoning with the visible regions along the spatial and temporal dimensions, which enhances the discriminativeness of local visual features and the fine-grained cross-modality alignment. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods for text-to-video retrieval on four datasets with both zero-shot and fine-tune evaluation protocols. Our approach also surpasses the baseline models significantly on zero-shot action recognition, which can be cast as video-to-text retrieval.
summary: Dominant pre-training work for video-text retrieval mainly adopt the "dual-encoder" architectures to enable efficient retrieval, where two separate encoders are used to contrast global video and text representations, but ignore detailed local semantics. The recent success of image BERT pre-training with masked visual modeling that promotes the learning of local visual context, motivates a possible solution to address the above limitation. In this work, we for the first time investigate masked visual modeling in video-text pre-training with the "dual-encoder" architecture. We perform Masked visual modeling with Injected LanguagE Semantics (MILES) by employing an extra snapshot video encoder as an evolving "tokenizer" to produce reconstruction targets for masked video patch prediction. Given the corrupted video, the video encoder is trained to recover text-aligned features of the masked patches via reasoning with the visible regions along the spatial and temporal dimensions, which enhances the discriminativeness of local visual features and the fine-grained cross-modality alignment. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods for text-to-video retrieval on four datasets with both zero-shot and fine-tune evaluation protocols. Our approach also surpasses the baseline models significantly on zero-shot action recognition, which can be cast as video-to-text retrieval.
abstract_zh: 视频文本检索的主要预训练工作主要采用“双编码器”架构来实现高效检索，其中两个单独的编码器用于对比全局视频和文本表示，但忽略详细的局部语义。最近，图像 BERT 预训练与掩模视觉模型的成功促进了局部视觉上下文的学习，激发了解决上述限制的可能解决方案。在这项工作中，我们首次研究使用“双编码器”架构的视频文本预训练中的蒙版视觉建模。我们通过使用额外的快照视频编码器作为不断发展的“标记器”，使用注入语言语义（MILES）执行蒙版视觉建模，以生成蒙版视频补丁预测的重建目标。给定损坏的视频，视频编码器经过训练，通过沿空间和时间维度对可见区域进行推理来恢复屏蔽补丁的文本对齐特征，这增强了局部视觉特征的辨别力和细粒度的跨模态对齐。我们的方法在具有零样本和微调评估协议的四个数据集上优于最先进的文本到视频检索方法。我们的方法在零镜头动作识别方面也显着超越了基线模型，可以将其视为视频到文本检索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MILES方法，通过注入语言语义的视觉BERT预训练改进视频-文本检索，解决传统双编码器架构忽略局部语义的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本检索的双编码器架构虽高效，但忽视局部语义细节；图像BERT的遮罩视觉建模成功启发了局部视觉语境学习，需将其应用于视频-文本预训练。
AI.method: 设计MILES框架，在双编码器架构中引入额外快照视频编码器作为动态分词器，通过遮罩视频块预测生成文本对齐的重建目标，增强局部视觉特征与跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上零样本和微调评估中均优于现有方法，在零样本动作识别任务中也显著超越基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MILES通过注入语言语义的遮罩建模有效提升了局部视觉特征判别性与细粒度跨模态对齐能力，为视频-文本检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tiago Gonçalves,Isabel Rio-Torto,Luís F. Teixeira,Jaime S. Cardoso
title: A survey on attention mechanisms for medical applications: are we moving towards better algorithms?
title_zh: 关于医疗应用注意机制的调查：我们正在走向更好的算法吗？
comment: Pre-print submitted to Nature Scientific Reports
comments: Pre-print submitted to Nature Scientific Reports
abstract: The increasing popularity of attention mechanisms in deep learning algorithms for computer vision and natural language processing made these models attractive to other research domains. In healthcare, there is a strong need for tools that may improve the routines of the clinicians and the patients. Naturally, the use of attention-based algorithms for medical applications occurred smoothly. However, being healthcare a domain that depends on high-stake decisions, the scientific community must ponder if these high-performing algorithms fit the needs of medical applications. With this motto, this paper extensively reviews the use of attention mechanisms in machine learning (including Transformers) for several medical applications. This work distinguishes itself from its predecessors by proposing a critical analysis of the claims and potentialities of attention mechanisms presented in the literature through an experimental case study on medical image classification with three different use cases. These experiments focus on the integrating process of attention mechanisms into established deep learning architectures, the analysis of their predictive power, and a visual assessment of their saliency maps generated by post-hoc explanation methods. This paper concludes with a critical analysis of the claims and potentialities presented in the literature about attention mechanisms and proposes future research lines in medical applications that may benefit from these frameworks.
summary: The increasing popularity of attention mechanisms in deep learning algorithms for computer vision and natural language processing made these models attractive to other research domains. In healthcare, there is a strong need for tools that may improve the routines of the clinicians and the patients. Naturally, the use of attention-based algorithms for medical applications occurred smoothly. However, being healthcare a domain that depends on high-stake decisions, the scientific community must ponder if these high-performing algorithms fit the needs of medical applications. With this motto, this paper extensively reviews the use of attention mechanisms in machine learning (including Transformers) for several medical applications. This work distinguishes itself from its predecessors by proposing a critical analysis of the claims and potentialities of attention mechanisms presented in the literature through an experimental case study on medical image classification with three different use cases. These experiments focus on the integrating process of attention mechanisms into established deep learning architectures, the analysis of their predictive power, and a visual assessment of their saliency maps generated by post-hoc explanation methods. This paper concludes with a critical analysis of the claims and potentialities presented in the literature about attention mechanisms and proposes future research lines in medical applications that may benefit from these frameworks.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉和自然语言处理的深度学习算法中注意力机制的日益普及使得这些模型对其他研究领域具有吸引力。在医疗保健领域，迫切需要可以改善临床医生和患者日常工作的工具。自然而然，基于注意力的算法在医疗应用中的使用就顺利进行了。然而，由于医疗保健是一个依赖于高风险决策的领域，科学界必须思考这些高性能算法是否适合医疗应用的需求。带着这个座右铭，本文广泛回顾了机器学习（包括 Transformer）中注意机制在多种医疗应用中的使用。这项工作与前人的不同之处在于，通过对三个不同用例的医学图像分类的实验案例研究，对文献中提出的注意机制的主张和潜力进行了批判性分析。这些实验侧重于将注意力机制整合到已建立的深度学习架构中的过程、对其预测能力的分析以及对事后解释方法生成的显着性图的视觉评估。本文最后对有关注意力机制的文献中提出的主张和潜力进行了批判性分析，并提出了可能受益于这些框架的医学应用的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 综述注意力机制在医疗应用中的使用，并通过实验评估其效果
AI.motivation: 医疗领域需要可靠工具，但现有算法是否适合高风险决策需验证
AI.method: 通过三个医疗图像分类案例，分析注意力机制集成过程、预测能力及可视化评估
AI.result: 实验分析了注意力机制在医疗图像分类中的效果和局限性
AI.conclusion: 指出注意力机制在医疗应用中的潜力及未来研究方向

title: Understanding the Impact of Edge Cases from Occluded Pedestrians for ML Systems
title_zh: 了解被遮挡行人的边缘情况对 ML 系统的影响
abstract: Machine learning (ML)-enabled approaches are considered a substantial support technique of detection and classification of obstacles of traffic participants in self-driving vehicles. Major breakthroughs have been demonstrated the past few years, even covering complete end-to-end data processing chain from sensory inputs through perception and planning to vehicle control of acceleration, breaking and steering. YOLO (you-only-look-once) is a state-of-the-art perception neural network (NN) architecture providing object detection and classification through bounding box estimations on camera images. As the NN is trained on well annotated images, in this paper we study the variations of confidence levels from the NN when tested on hand-crafted occlusion added to a test set. We compare regular pedestrian detection to upper and lower body detection. Our findings show that the two NN using only partial information perform similarly well like the NN for the full body when the full body NN's performance is 0.75 or better. Furthermore and as expected, the network, which is only trained on the lower half body is least prone to disturbances from occlusions of the upper half and vice versa.
summary: Machine learning (ML)-enabled approaches are considered a substantial support technique of detection and classification of obstacles of traffic participants in self-driving vehicles. Major breakthroughs have been demonstrated the past few years, even covering complete end-to-end data processing chain from sensory inputs through perception and planning to vehicle control of acceleration, breaking and steering. YOLO (you-only-look-once) is a state-of-the-art perception neural network (NN) architecture providing object detection and classification through bounding box estimations on camera images. As the NN is trained on well annotated images, in this paper we study the variations of confidence levels from the NN when tested on hand-crafted occlusion added to a test set. We compare regular pedestrian detection to upper and lower body detection. Our findings show that the two NN using only partial information perform similarly well like the NN for the full body when the full body NN's performance is 0.75 or better. Furthermore and as expected, the network, which is only trained on the lower half body is least prone to disturbances from occlusions of the upper half and vice versa.
abstract_zh: 支持机器学习（ML）的方法被认为是对自动驾驶车辆中交通参与者的障碍物进行检测和分类的重要支持技术。过去几年已经取得了重大突破，甚至涵盖了从感官输入到感知和规划，再到车辆加速、制动和转向控制的完整端到端数据处理链。 YOLO（you-only-look-once）是一种最先进的感知神经网络 (NN) 架构，通过相机图像上的边界框估计提供对象检测和分类。由于神经网络是在注释良好的图像上进行训练的，因此在本文中，我们研究了在添加到测试集中的手工遮挡进行测试时神经网络置信水平的变化。我们将常规行人检测与上半身和下半身检测进行比较。我们的研究结果表明，当全身神经网络的性能为 0.75 或更好时，仅使用部分信息的两个神经网络与全身神经网络的性能相似。此外，正如预期的那样，仅在下半身进行训练的网络最不容易受到上半身遮挡的干扰，反之亦然。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了遮挡行人对机器学习系统的影响，比较了YOLO神经网络在完整身体检测与上下半身部分检测下的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆依赖机器学习检测障碍物，但现实场景中行人常被遮挡，需评估部分信息检测的可靠性及鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用YOLO神经网络，在添加人工遮挡的测试集上对比完整身体检测与上下半身检测的置信度变化，分析不同模型对遮挡的敏感性。
AI.result: 当完整身体模型性能≥0.75时，部分检测模型表现相近；仅训练下半身的模型对上半身遮挡更鲁棒，反之亦然。
AI.conclusion: 部分身体信息检测在特定条件下可替代完整检测，针对性训练可提升遮挡场景下的模型鲁棒性。

search_text: Understanding the Impact of Edge Cases from Occluded Pedestrians for ML Systems 了解被遮挡行人的边缘情况对 ML 系统的影响 Machine learning (ML)-enabled approaches are considered a substantial support technique of detection and classification of obstacles of traffic participants in self-driving vehicles. Major breakthroughs have been demonstrated the past few years, even covering complete end-to-end data processing chain from sensory inputs through perception and planning to vehicle control of acceleration, breaking and steering. YOLO (you-only-look-once) is a state-of-the-art perception neural network (NN) architecture providing object detection and classification through bounding box estimations on camera images. As the NN is trained on well annotated images, in this paper we study the variations of confidence levels from the NN when tested on hand-crafted occlusion added to a test set. We compare regular pedestrian detection to upper and lower body detection. Our findings show that the two NN using only partial information perform similarly well like the NN for the full body when the full body NN's performance is 0.75 or better. Furthermore and as expected, the network, which is only trained on the lower half body is least prone to disturbances from occlusions of the upper half and vice versa. 支持机器学习（ML）的方法被认为是对自动驾驶车辆中交通参与者的障碍物进行检测和分类的重要支持技术。过去几年已经取得了重大突破，甚至涵盖了从感官输入到感知和规划，再到车辆加速、制动和转向控制的完整端到端数据处理链。 YOLO（you-only-look-once）是一种最先进的感知神经网络 (NN) 架构，通过相机图像上的边界框估计提供对象检测和分类。由于神经网络是在注释良好的图像上进行训练的，因此在本文中，我们研究了在添加到测试集中的手工遮挡进行测试时神经网络置信水平的变化。我们将常规行人检测与上半身和下半身检测进行比较。我们的研究结果表明，当全身神经网络的性能为 0.75 或更好时，仅使用部分信息的两个神经网络与全身神经网络的性能相似。此外，正如预期的那样，仅在下半身进行训练的网络最不容易受到上半身遮挡的干扰，反之亦然。 本论文研究了遮挡行人对机器学习系统的影响，比较了YOLO神经网络在完整身体检测与上下半身部分检测下的性能差异。 Jens Henriksson,Christian Berger,Stig Ursing cs.CV

authors_text: Ilias Diakonikolas,Daniel M. Kane,Ankit Pensia,Thanasis Pittas
title: Streaming Algorithms for High-Dimensional Robust Statistics
title_zh: 高维鲁棒统计的流式算法
abstract: We study high-dimensional robust statistics tasks in the streaming model. A recent line of work obtained computationally efficient algorithms for a range of high-dimensional robust estimation tasks. Unfortunately, all previous algorithms require storing the entire dataset, incurring memory at least quadratic in the dimension. In this work, we develop the first efficient streaming algorithms for high-dimensional robust statistics with near-optimal memory requirements (up to logarithmic factors). Our main result is for the task of high-dimensional robust mean estimation in (a strengthening of) Huber's contamination model. We give an efficient single-pass streaming algorithm for this task with near-optimal error guarantees and space complexity nearly-linear in the dimension. As a corollary, we obtain streaming algorithms with near-optimal space complexity for several more complex tasks, including robust covariance estimation, robust regression, and more generally robust stochastic optimization.
summary: We study high-dimensional robust statistics tasks in the streaming model. A recent line of work obtained computationally efficient algorithms for a range of high-dimensional robust estimation tasks. Unfortunately, all previous algorithms require storing the entire dataset, incurring memory at least quadratic in the dimension. In this work, we develop the first efficient streaming algorithms for high-dimensional robust statistics with near-optimal memory requirements (up to logarithmic factors). Our main result is for the task of high-dimensional robust mean estimation in (a strengthening of) Huber's contamination model. We give an efficient single-pass streaming algorithm for this task with near-optimal error guarantees and space complexity nearly-linear in the dimension. As a corollary, we obtain streaming algorithms with near-optimal space complexity for several more complex tasks, including robust covariance estimation, robust regression, and more generally robust stochastic optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们研究流模型中的高维鲁棒统计任务。最近的一系列工作为一系列高维鲁棒估计任务获得了计算高效的算法。不幸的是，以前的所有算法都需要存储整个数据集，从而在维度上占用至少二次的内存。在这项工作中，我们开发了第一个高效的流算法，用于具有接近最佳内存要求（高达对数因子）的高维稳健统计。我们的主要成果是针对 Huber 污染模型（强化）中的高维鲁棒均值估计任务。我们为该任务提供了一种高效的单通道流算法，具有接近最优的误差保证和维度上接近线性的空间复杂度。作为推论，我们获得了针对几个更复杂的任务具有接近最优空间复杂度的流算法，包括鲁棒协方差估计、鲁棒回归和更普遍的鲁棒随机优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效的流算法解决高维鲁棒统计问题，实现近似最优内存需求的高维鲁棒均值估计及扩展任务。
AI.motivation: 现有高维鲁棒统计算法需存储全数据导致内存开销大，无法处理大规模数据流，需开发低内存流算法。
AI.method: 设计单次遍历流算法，基于强化版Huber污染模型，结合近似误差控制与线性内存结构实现高效计算。
AI.result: 获得近似最优误差保证的线性内存流算法，可扩展至协方差估计、回归等任务，空间复杂度接近理论下限。
AI.conclusion: 突破高维鲁棒统计内存瓶颈，为流数据场景提供基础算法框架，未来可探索更优误差界与应用扩展。

title: Tolerant Bipartiteness Testing in Dense Graphs
title_zh: 密集图中的容忍二分性测试
comment: Accepted at ICALP'22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.04574
comments: Accepted at ICALP'22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.04574
abstract: Bipartite testing has been a central problem in the area of property testing since its inception in the seminal work of Goldreich, Goldwasser and Ron [FOCS'96 and JACM'98]. Though the non-tolerant version of bipartite testing has been extensively studied in the literature, the tolerant variant is not well understood. In this paper, we consider the following version of tolerant bipartite testing: Given a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ and access to the adjacency matrix of a graph $G$, we can decide whether $G$ is $\varepsilon$-close to being bipartite or $G$ is at least $(2+Ω(1))\varepsilon$-far from being bipartite, by performing $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^3}\right)$ queries and in $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon)}$ time. This improves upon the state-of-the-art query and time complexities of this problem of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^6}\right)$ and $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon^2)}$, respectively, from the work of Alon, Fernandez de la Vega, Kannan and Karpinski (STOC'02 and JCSS'03), where $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ hides a factor polynomial in $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$.
summary: Bipartite testing has been a central problem in the area of property testing since its inception in the seminal work of Goldreich, Goldwasser and Ron [FOCS'96 and JACM'98]. Though the non-tolerant version of bipartite testing has been extensively studied in the literature, the tolerant variant is not well understood. In this paper, we consider the following version of tolerant bipartite testing: Given a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ and access to the adjacency matrix of a graph $G$, we can decide whether $G$ is $\varepsilon$-close to being bipartite or $G$ is at least $(2+Ω(1))\varepsilon$-far from being bipartite, by performing $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^3}\right)$ queries and in $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon)}$ time. This improves upon the state-of-the-art query and time complexities of this problem of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^6}\right)$ and $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon^2)}$, respectively, from the work of Alon, Fernandez de la Vega, Kannan and Karpinski (STOC'02 and JCSS'03), where $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ hides a factor polynomial in $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$.
abstract_zh: 自从 Goldreich、Goldwasser 和 Ron [FOCS'96 和 JACM'98] 的开创性工作中提出以来，双向测试一直是属性测试领域的核心问题。尽管双向测试的非容忍版本已在文献中得到广泛研究，但容忍版本还没有得到很好的理解。在本文中，我们考虑以下版本的容忍二分测试：给定参数 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ 并访问图 $G$ 的邻接矩阵，我们可以通过执行$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^3}\right)$ 查询并花费 $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon)}$ 时间。这改进了 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^6}\right)$ 和 $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon^2)}$ 问题的最先进查询和时间复杂度，分别来自 Alon、Fernandez de la Vega、Kannan 和 Karpinski (STOC'02)和 JCSS'03)，其中 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ 隐藏 $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$ 中的因子多项式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稠密图的容忍性二分图测试问题，提出了一种通过邻接矩阵访问图的算法，能够以更少的查询次数和时间复杂度判断图是否接近二分图或远离二分图。
AI.motivation: 二分图测试是属性测试领域的核心问题，但容忍性版本（即判断图是否接近或远离二分图）的复杂度尚未被充分研究，现有算法在查询次数和时间复杂度上存在改进空间。
AI.method: 通过设计基于邻接矩阵的查询策略，结合参数ε的调整，优化了测试算法的查询次数和运行时间，利用更高效的数学分析方法降低了复杂度。
AI.result: 将查询复杂度从之前的Õ(1/ε⁶)改进为Õ(1/ε³)，时间复杂度从2^{Õ(1/ε²)}改进为2^{Õ(1/ε)}，显著提升了算法效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法在容忍性二分图测试中实现了更优的查询和时间复杂度，为相关问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

conclusion: 本文提出的算法在容忍性二分图测试中实现了更优的查询和时间复杂度，为相关问题提供了更高效的解决方案。
search_text: Tolerant Bipartiteness Testing in Dense Graphs 密集图中的容忍二分性测试 Bipartite testing has been a central problem in the area of property testing since its inception in the seminal work of Goldreich, Goldwasser and Ron [FOCS'96 and JACM'98]. Though the non-tolerant version of bipartite testing has been extensively studied in the literature, the tolerant variant is not well understood. In this paper, we consider the following version of tolerant bipartite testing: Given a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ and access to the adjacency matrix of a graph $G$, we can decide whether $G$ is $\varepsilon$-close to being bipartite or $G$ is at least $(2+Ω(1))\varepsilon$-far from being bipartite, by performing $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^3}\right)$ queries and in $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon)}$ time. This improves upon the state-of-the-art query and time complexities of this problem of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^6}\right)$ and $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon^2)}$, respectively, from the work of Alon, Fernandez de la Vega, Kannan and Karpinski (STOC'02 and JCSS'03), where $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ hides a factor polynomial in $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$. 自从 Goldreich、Goldwasser 和 Ron [FOCS'96 和 JACM'98] 的开创性工作中提出以来，双向测试一直是属性测试领域的核心问题。尽管双向测试的非容忍版本已在文献中得到广泛研究，但容忍版本还没有得到很好的理解。在本文中，我们考虑以下版本的容忍二分测试：给定参数 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ 并访问图 $G$ 的邻接矩阵，我们可以通过执行$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^3}\right)$ 查询并花费 $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon)}$ 时间。这改进了 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon ^6}\right)$ 和 $2^{\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\varepsilon^2)}$ 问题的最先进查询和时间复杂度，分别来自 Alon、Fernandez de la Vega、Kannan 和 Karpinski (STOC'02)和 JCSS'03)，其中 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ 隐藏 $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$ 中的因子多项式。 本文研究了稠密图的容忍性二分图测试问题，提出了一种通过邻接矩阵访问图的算法，能够以更少的查询次数和时间复杂度判断图是否接近二分图或远离二分图。 Arijit Ghosh,Gopinath Mishra,Rahul Raychaudhury,Sayantan Sen cs.DS

title: On Fragile Features and Batch Normalization in Adversarial Training
title_zh: 对抗训练中的脆弱特征和批量归一化
abstract: Modern deep learning architecture utilize batch normalization (BN) to stabilize training and improve accuracy. It has been shown that the BN layers alone are surprisingly expressive. In the context of robustness against adversarial examples, however, BN is argued to increase vulnerability. That is, BN helps to learn fragile features. Nevertheless, BN is still used in adversarial training, which is the de-facto standard to learn robust features. In order to shed light on the role of BN in adversarial training, we investigate to what extent the expressiveness of BN can be used to robustify fragile features in comparison to random features. On CIFAR10, we find that adversarially fine-tuning just the BN layers can result in non-trivial adversarial robustness. Adversarially training only the BN layers from scratch, in contrast, is not able to convey meaningful adversarial robustness. Our results indicate that fragile features can be used to learn models with moderate adversarial robustness, while random features cannot
summary: Modern deep learning architecture utilize batch normalization (BN) to stabilize training and improve accuracy. It has been shown that the BN layers alone are surprisingly expressive. In the context of robustness against adversarial examples, however, BN is argued to increase vulnerability. That is, BN helps to learn fragile features. Nevertheless, BN is still used in adversarial training, which is the de-facto standard to learn robust features. In order to shed light on the role of BN in adversarial training, we investigate to what extent the expressiveness of BN can be used to robustify fragile features in comparison to random features. On CIFAR10, we find that adversarially fine-tuning just the BN layers can result in non-trivial adversarial robustness. Adversarially training only the BN layers from scratch, in contrast, is not able to convey meaningful adversarial robustness. Our results indicate that fragile features can be used to learn models with moderate adversarial robustness, while random features cannot
abstract_zh: 现代深度学习架构利用批量归一化（BN）来稳定训练并提高准确性。事实证明，BN 层本身就具有令人惊讶的表现力。然而，在对抗性例子的鲁棒性背景下，BN 被认为会增加脆弱性。也就是说，BN 有助于学习脆弱的特征。尽管如此，BN 仍然用于对抗性训练，这是学习鲁棒特征的事实上的标准。为了阐明 BN 在对抗训练中的作用，我们研究了与随机特征相比，BN 的表达能力在多大程度上可以用来增强脆弱特征。在 CIFAR10 上，我们发现仅对 BN 层进行对抗性微调就可以产生不平凡的对抗性鲁棒性。相比之下，仅从头开始对抗性地训练 BN 层并不能传达有意义的对抗性鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，脆弱特征可用于学习具有中等对抗鲁棒性的模型，而随机特征则不能

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了批量归一化（BN）在对抗训练中对脆弱特征的影响，并比较了其与随机特征在提升模型鲁棒性方面的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管批量归一化（BN）能提升模型性能，但其在对抗训练中可能加剧脆弱特征的学习，导致模型易受攻击。研究旨在明确BN在对抗训练中的作用及其对鲁棒性的贡献。
AI.method: 在CIFAR10数据集上，通过对抗微调BN层或从头训练BN层，对比分析其生成的脆弱特征与随机特征在对抗鲁棒性上的表现差异。
AI.result: 对抗微调BN层可使模型获得中等对抗鲁棒性，而从头训练BN层则无法实现有意义的鲁棒性提升。脆弱特征经BN微调后优于随机特征。
AI.conclusion: BN层的表达能力可用于增强脆弱特征的鲁棒性，但随机特征无法达到类似效果，表明BN在对抗训练中具有特定的优化潜力。

title: Learning Meta Word Embeddings by Unsupervised Weighted Concatenation of Source Embeddings
title_zh: 通过源嵌入的无监督加权串联来学习元词嵌入
comment: Proceedings of the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-2022)
abstract: Given multiple source word embeddings learnt using diverse algorithms and lexical resources, meta word embedding learning methods attempt to learn more accurate and wide-coverage word embeddings. Prior work on meta-embedding has repeatedly discovered that simple vector concatenation of the source embeddings to be a competitive baseline. However, it remains unclear as to why and when simple vector concatenation can produce accurate meta-embeddings. We show that weighted concatenation can be seen as a spectrum matching operation between each source embedding and the meta-embedding, minimising the pairwise inner-product loss. Following this theoretical analysis, we propose two \emph{unsupervised} methods to learn the optimal concatenation weights for creating meta-embeddings from a given set of source embeddings. Experimental results on multiple benchmark datasets show that the proposed weighted concatenated meta-embedding methods outperform previously proposed meta-embedding learning methods.
summary: Given multiple source word embeddings learnt using diverse algorithms and lexical resources, meta word embedding learning methods attempt to learn more accurate and wide-coverage word embeddings. Prior work on meta-embedding has repeatedly discovered that simple vector concatenation of the source embeddings to be a competitive baseline. However, it remains unclear as to why and when simple vector concatenation can produce accurate meta-embeddings. We show that weighted concatenation can be seen as a spectrum matching operation between each source embedding and the meta-embedding, minimising the pairwise inner-product loss. Following this theoretical analysis, we propose two \emph{unsupervised} methods to learn the optimal concatenation weights for creating meta-embeddings from a given set of source embeddings. Experimental results on multiple benchmark datasets show that the proposed weighted concatenated meta-embedding methods outperform previously proposed meta-embedding learning methods.
abstract_zh: 考虑到使用不同算法和词汇资源学习的多个源词嵌入，元词嵌入学习方法试图学习更准确和更广泛覆盖的词嵌入。先前关于元嵌入的工作反复发现源嵌入的简单向量串联是有竞争力的基线。然而，目前尚不清楚为什么以及何时简单的向量串联可以产生准确的元嵌入。我们表明，加权串联可以看作每个源嵌入和元嵌入之间的频谱匹配操作，从而最小化成对内积损失。根据这一理论分析，我们提出了两种 \emph{无监督} 方法来学习从给定的一组源嵌入创建元嵌入的最佳串联权重。多个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的加权级联元嵌入方法优于之前提出的元嵌入学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过无监督加权拼接多个源词嵌入来生成更准确的元词嵌入方法。
AI.motivation: 现有元嵌入方法中简单向量拼接效果良好但缺乏理论解释，且权重选择依赖人工经验。
AI.method: 基于谱匹配理论分析，通过最小化成对内积损失，提出两种无监督方法学习最优拼接权重。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，所提加权拼接方法优于现有元嵌入学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与实验验证表明，无监督加权拼接能有效提升元嵌入质量，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Betty Lala,Hamada Rizk,Srikant Manas Kala,Aya Hagishima
title: Multi-task Learning for Concurrent Prediction of Thermal Comfort, Sensation, and Preference
title_zh: 用于同时预测热舒适度、感觉和偏好的多任务学习
abstract: Indoor thermal comfort immensely impacts the health and performance of occupants. Therefore, researchers and engineers have proposed numerous computational models to estimate thermal comfort (TC). Given the impetus toward energy efficiency, the current focus is on data-driven TC prediction solutions that leverage state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, an indoor occupant's perception of indoor thermal comfort (TC) is subjective and multi-dimensional. Different aspects of TC are represented by various standard metrics/scales viz., thermal sensation (TSV), thermal comfort (TCV), and thermal preference (TPV). The current ML-based TC prediction solutions adopt the Single-task Learning approach, i.e., one prediction model per metric. Consequently, solutions often focus on only one TC metric. Moreover, when several metrics are considered, multiple TC models for a single indoor space lead to conflicting predictions, making real-world deployment infeasible. This work addresses these problems. With the vision toward energy conservation and real-world application, naturally ventilated primary school classrooms are considered. First, month-long field experiments are conducted in 5 schools and 14 classrooms, including 512 unique student participants. Further, "DeepComfort," a Multi-task Learning inspired deep-learning model is proposed. DeepComfort predicts multiple TC output metrics viz., TSV, TPV, and TCV, simultaneously, through a single model. It demonstrates high F1-scores, Accuracy (>90%), and generalization capability when validated on the ASHRAE-II database and the dataset created in this study. DeepComfort is also shown to outperform 6 popular metric-specific single-task machine learning algorithms. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first application of Multi-task Learning to thermal comfort prediction in classrooms.

Given the impetus toward energy efficiency, the current focus is on data-driven TC prediction solutions that leverage state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, an indoor occupant's perception of indoor thermal comfort (TC) is subjective and multi-dimensional. Different aspects of TC are represented by various standard metrics/scales viz., thermal sensation (TSV), thermal comfort (TCV), and thermal preference (TPV). The current ML-based TC prediction solutions adopt the Single-task Learning approach, i.e., one prediction model per metric. Consequently, solutions often focus on only one TC metric. Moreover, when several metrics are considered, multiple TC models for a single indoor space lead to conflicting predictions, making real-world deployment infeasible. This work addresses these problems. With the vision toward energy conservation and real-world application, naturally ventilated primary school classrooms are considered. First, month-long field experiments are conducted in 5 schools and 14 classrooms, including 512 unique student participants. Further, "DeepComfort," a Multi-task Learning inspired deep-learning model is proposed. DeepComfort predicts multiple TC output metrics viz., TSV, TPV, and TCV, simultaneously, through a single model. It demonstrates high F1-scores, Accuracy (>90%), and generalization capability when validated on the ASHRAE-II database and the dataset created in this study. DeepComfort is also shown to outperform 6 popular metric-specific single-task machine learning algorithms. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first application of Multi-task Learning to thermal comfort prediction in classrooms.
abstract_zh: 室内热舒适度极大地影响居住者的健康和表现。因此，研究人员和工程师提出了许多计算模型来估计热舒适度（TC）。鉴于能源效率的推动力，当前的重点是利用最先进的机器学习 (ML) 算法的数据驱动的 TC 预测解决方案。然而，室内居住者对室内热舒适度（TC）的感知是主观的、多维的。 TC 的不同方面由各种标准指标/尺度表示，即热感觉 (TSV)、热舒适度 (TCV) 和热偏好 (TPV)。当前基于机器学习的TC预测解决方案采用单任务学习方法，即每个指标一个预测模型。因此，解决方案通常只关注一种 TC 指标。此外，当考虑多个指标时，单个室内空间的多个 TC 模型会导致预测相互矛盾，从而导致实际部署不可行。这项工作解决了这些问题。出于节能和实际应用的愿景，自然通风的小学教室被考虑。首先，在 5 所学校和 14 个教室进行了为期一个月的现场实验，其中包括 512 名不同的学生参与者。此外，还提出了“DeepComfort”，一种受多任务学习启发的深度学习模型。 DeepComfort 通过单个模型同时预测多个 TC 输出指标，即 TSV、TPV 和 TCV。在 ASHRAE-II 数据库和本研究中创建的数据集上进行验证时，它表现出较高的 F1 分数、准确性 (>90%) 和泛化能力。 DeepComfort 的性能还优于 6 种流行的特定指标的单任务机器学习算法。据我们所知，这项工作是多任务学习首次应用于课堂热舒适度预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务学习的深度学习模型DeepComfort，用于同时预测教室环境中的热舒适感、热感觉和热偏好三个指标。
AI.motivation: 现有单任务学习方法在预测多个热舒适指标时存在模型冲突和实际应用困难，且缺乏针对教室场景的多指标联合预测方案。
AI.method: 通过5所学校的14间教室进行月度实地实验采集512名学生数据，构建多任务深度学习框架DeepComfort，实现TSV/TPV/TCV三指标联合预测。
AI.result: 模型在ASHRAE-II数据集和自建数据集上均达到>90%准确率，F1分数显著优于6种单任务机器学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将多任务学习应用于教室热舒适预测，为实现节能与舒适性平衡提供了新的数据驱动解决方案。

search_text: Multi-task Learning for Concurrent Prediction of Thermal Comfort, Sensation, and Preference 用于同时预测热舒适度、感觉和偏好的多任务学习 Indoor thermal comfort immensely impacts the health and performance of occupants. Therefore, researchers and engineers have proposed numerous computational models to estimate thermal comfort (TC). Given the impetus toward energy efficiency, the current focus is on data-driven TC prediction solutions that leverage state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, an indoor occupant's perception of indoor thermal comfort (TC) is subjective and multi-dimensional. Different aspects of TC are represented by various standard metrics/scales viz., thermal sensation (TSV), thermal comfort (TCV), and thermal preference (TPV). The current ML-based TC prediction solutions adopt the Single-task Learning approach, i.e., one prediction model per metric. Consequently, solutions often focus on only one TC metric. Moreover, when several metrics are considered, multiple TC models for a single indoor space lead to conflicting predictions, making real-world deployment infeasible. This work addresses these problems. With the vision toward energy conservation and real-world application, naturally ventilated primary school classrooms are considered. First, month-long field experiments are conducted in 5 schools and 14 classrooms, including 512 unique student participants. Further, "DeepComfort," a Multi-task Learning inspired deep-learning model is proposed. DeepComfort predicts multiple TC output metrics viz., TSV, TPV, and TCV, simultaneously, through a single model. It demonstrates high F1-scores, Accuracy (>90%), and generalization capability when validated on the ASHRAE-II database and the dataset created in this study. DeepComfort is also shown to outperform 6 popular metric-specific single-task machine learning algorithms. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first application of Multi-task Learning to thermal comfort prediction in classrooms. 室内热舒适度极大地影响居住者的健康和表现。因此，研究人员和工程师提出了许多计算模型来估计热舒适度（TC）。鉴于能源效率的推动力，当前的重点是利用最先进的机器学习 (ML) 算法的数据驱动的 TC 预测解决方案。然而，室内居住者对室内热舒适度（TC）的感知是主观的、多维的。 TC 的不同方面由各种标准指标/尺度表示，即热感觉 (TSV)、热舒适度 (TCV) 和热偏好 (TPV)。当前基于机器学习的TC预测解决方案采用单任务学习方法，即每个指标一个预测模型。因此，解决方案通常只关注一种 TC 指标。此外，当考虑多个指标时，单个室内空间的多个 TC 模型会导致预测相互矛盾，从而导致实际部署不可行。这项工作解决了这些问题。出于节能和实际应用的愿景，自然通风的小学教室被考虑。首先，在 5 所学校和 14 个教室进行了为期一个月的现场实验，其中包括 512 名不同的学生参与者。此外，还提出了“DeepComfort”，一种受多任务学习启发的深度学习模型。 DeepComfort 通过单个模型同时预测多个 TC 输出指标，即 TSV、TPV 和 TCV。在 ASHRAE-II 数据库和本研究中创建的数据集上进行验证时，它表现出较高的 F1 分数、准确性 (>90%) 和泛化能力。 DeepComfort 的性能还优于 6 种流行的特定指标的单任务机器学习算法。据我们所知，这项工作是多任务学习首次应用于课堂热舒适度预测。 本文提出一种基于多任务学习的深度学习模型DeepComfort，用于同时预测教室环境中的热舒适感、热感觉和热偏好三个指标。 Betty Lala,Hamada Rizk,Srikant Manas Kala,Aya Hagishima cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Jens Henriksson,Christian Berger,Markus Borg,Lars Tornberg,Sankar Raman Sathyamoorthy,Cristofer Englund
title: Performance Analysis of Out-of-Distribution Detection on Trained Neural Networks
title_zh: 训练神经网络的分布外检测性能分析
comment: preprint. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.15580
comments: preprint. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.15580
abstract: Several areas have been improved with Deep Learning during the past years. Implementing Deep Neural Networks (DNN) for non-safety related applications have shown remarkable achievements over the past years; however, for using DNNs in safety critical applications, we are missing approaches for verifying the robustness of such models. A common challenge for DNNs occurs when exposed to out-of-distribution samples that are outside of the scope of a DNN, but which result in high confidence outputs despite no prior knowledge of such input. In this paper, we analyze three methods that separate between in- and out-of-distribution data, called supervisors, on four well-known DNN architectures. We find that the outlier detection performance improves with the quality of the model. We also analyse the performance of the particular supervisors during the training procedure by applying the supervisor at a predefined interval to investigate its performance as the training proceeds. We observe that understanding the relationship between training results and supervisor performance is crucial to improve the model's robustness and to indicate, what input samples require further measures to improve the robustness of a DNN. In addition, our work paves the road towards an instrument for safety argumentation for safety critical applications. This paper is an extended version of our previous work presented at 2019 SEAA (cf. [1]); here, we elaborate on the used metrics, add an additional supervisor and test them on two additional datasets.
summary: Several areas have been improved with Deep Learning during the past years. Implementing Deep Neural Networks (DNN) for non-safety related applications have shown remarkable achievements over the past years; however, for using DNNs in safety critical applications, we are missing approaches for verifying the robustness of such models. A common challenge for DNNs occurs when exposed to out-of-distribution samples that are outside of the scope of a DNN, but which result in high confidence outputs despite no prior knowledge of such input. In this paper, we analyze three methods that separate between in- and out-of-distribution data, called supervisors, on four well-known DNN architectures. We find that the outlier detection performance improves with the quality of the model. We also analyse the performance of the particular supervisors during the training procedure by applying the supervisor at a predefined interval to investigate its performance as the training proceeds. We observe that understanding the relationship between training results and supervisor performance is crucial to improve the model's robustness and to indicate, what input samples require further measures to improve the robustness of a DNN. In addition, our work paves the road towards an instrument for safety argumentation for safety critical applications. This paper is an extended version of our previous work presented at 2019 SEAA (cf. [1]); here, we elaborate on the used metrics, add an additional supervisor and test them on two additional datasets.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，深度学习在多个领域得到了改进。在过去几年中，将深度神经网络（DNN）应用于非安全相关应用已经取得了显着的成就；然而，对于在安全关键应用中使用 DNN，我们缺少验证此类模型稳健性的方法。当暴露于 DNN 范围之外的分布外样本时，DNN 会遇到一个常见的挑战，但尽管事先不知道此类输入，但仍会产生高置信度的输出。在本文中，我们分析了四种著名的 DNN 架构上区分分布内和分布外数据的三种方法（称为监督器）。我们发现异常值检测性能随着模型质量的提高而提高。我们还通过在预定义的时间间隔内应用主管来调查其在培训过程中的表现，从而分析培训过程中特定主管的表现。我们观察到，理解训练结果和监督者表现之间的关系对于提高模型的鲁棒性以及表明哪些输入样本需要进一步的措施来提高 DNN 的鲁棒性至关重要。此外，我们的工作为安全关键应用的安全论证工具铺平了道路。本文是我们之前在 2019 SEAA 上发表的工作的扩展版本（参见 [1]）；在这里，我们详细说明了所使用的指标，添加了一个额外的主管并在两个额外的数据集上测试它们。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了三种用于区分分布内与分布外数据的监督方法在四种知名深度神经网络架构上的性能，以提升安全关键应用中模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在非安全相关领域取得显著进展，但在安全关键应用中缺乏验证模型鲁棒性的方法，尤其当模型对分布外样本产生高置信度输出时存在风险。
AI.method: 在四种经典DNN架构上测试三种监督方法，通过训练过程中预定义间隔的应用分析其性能变化，并扩展了指标、新增监督方法和数据集。
AI.result: 模型质量提升可增强异常检测性能；训练过程与监督方法性能的关系对改进模型鲁棒性至关重要，且该工作为安全论证提供了工具基础。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了模型鲁棒性提升的关键因素，扩展验证了监督方法的有效性，为安全关键场景的深度学习应用提供了理论支持。

title: Social learning spontaneously emerges by searching optimal heuristics with deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习搜索最佳启发式，社会学习自发出现
comment: Main manuscript : 11 pages, 6 figures. Supplementary information : 7 pages, 7 figures
comments: Main manuscript : 11 pages, 6 figures. Supplementary information : 7 pages, 7 figures
abstract: How have individuals of social animals in nature evolved to learn from each other, and what would be the optimal strategy for such learning in a specific environment? Here, we address both problems by employing a deep reinforcement learning model to optimize the social learning strategies (SLSs) of agents in a cooperative game in a multi-dimensional landscape. Throughout the training for maximizing the overall payoff, we find that the agent spontaneously learns various concepts of social learning, such as copying, focusing on frequent and well-performing neighbors, self-comparison, and the importance of balancing between individual and social learning, without any explicit guidance or prior knowledge about the system. The SLS from a fully trained agent outperforms all of the traditional, baseline SLSs in terms of mean payoff. We demonstrate the superior performance of the reinforcement learning agent in various environments, including temporally changing environments and real social networks, which also verifies the adaptability of our framework to different social settings.
summary: How have individuals of social animals in nature evolved to learn from each other, and what would be the optimal strategy for such learning in a specific environment? Here, we address both problems by employing a deep reinforcement learning model to optimize the social learning strategies (SLSs) of agents in a cooperative game in a multi-dimensional landscape. Throughout the training for maximizing the overall payoff, we find that the agent spontaneously learns various concepts of social learning, such as copying, focusing on frequent and well-performing neighbors, self-comparison, and the importance of balancing between individual and social learning, without any explicit guidance or prior knowledge about the system. The SLS from a fully trained agent outperforms all of the traditional, baseline SLSs in terms of mean payoff. We demonstrate the superior performance of the reinforcement learning agent in various environments, including temporally changing environments and real social networks, which also verifies the adaptability of our framework to different social settings.
abstract_zh: 自然界中的群居动物个体是如何进化到互相学习的，在特定环境中这种学习的最佳策略是什么？在这里，我们通过采用深度强化学习模型来优化多维景观中合作游戏中代理的社会学习策略（SLS）来解决这两个问题。在最大化整体回报的整个训练过程中，我们发现智能体自发地学习了社会学习的各种概念，例如复制、关注频繁且表现良好的邻居、自我比较以及平衡个人和社会学习之间的重要性，而没有任何明确的指导或有关系统的先验知识。就平均收益而言，训练有素的智能体的 SLS 优于所有传统的基线 SLS。我们展示了强化学习代理在各种环境中的优越性能，包括临时变化的环境和真实的社交网络，这也验证了我们的框架对不同社交环境的适应性。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过深度强化学习模型优化多维环境中的社会学习策略，探索个体如何自发学习社会学习机制。
AI.motivation: 研究自然界的社交动物如何进化出相互学习的能力，并确定特定环境下的最优学习策略。
AI.method: 在多维景观的协作游戏中，利用深度强化学习模型训练智能体，通过最大化整体收益优化社会学习策略（SLS）。
AI.result: 训练后的智能体自发学习复制、关注高效邻居、自我比较等社会学习概念，其策略在收益均值上优于传统基线方法，并适应动态环境和真实社交网络。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习框架能有效模拟社会学习的适应性，为理解社交学习机制和设计优化策略提供新思路。

search_text: Social learning spontaneously emerges by searching optimal heuristics with deep reinforcement learning 通过深度强化学习搜索最佳启发式，社会学习自发出现 How have individuals of social animals in nature evolved to learn from each other, and what would be the optimal strategy for such learning in a specific environment? Here, we address both problems by employing a deep reinforcement learning model to optimize the social learning strategies (SLSs) of agents in a cooperative game in a multi-dimensional landscape. Throughout the training for maximizing the overall payoff, we find that the agent spontaneously learns various concepts of social learning, such as copying, focusing on frequent and well-performing neighbors, self-comparison, and the importance of balancing between individual and social learning, without any explicit guidance or prior knowledge about the system. The SLS from a fully trained agent outperforms all of the traditional, baseline SLSs in terms of mean payoff. We demonstrate the superior performance of the reinforcement learning agent in various environments, including temporally changing environments and real social networks, which also verifies the adaptability of our framework to different social settings. 自然界中的群居动物个体是如何进化到互相学习的，在特定环境中这种学习的最佳策略是什么？在这里，我们通过采用深度强化学习模型来优化多维景观中合作游戏中代理的社会学习策略（SLS）来解决这两个问题。在最大化整体回报的整个训练过程中，我们发现智能体自发地学习了社会学习的各种概念，例如复制、关注频繁且表现良好的邻居、自我比较以及平衡个人和社会学习之间的重要性，而没有任何明确的指导或有关系统的先验知识。就平均收益而言，训练有素的智能体的 SLS 优于所有传统的基线 SLS。我们展示了强化学习代理在各种环境中的优越性能，包括临时变化的环境和真实的社交网络，这也验证了我们的框架对不同社交环境的适应性。 该论文通过深度强化学习模型优化多维环境中的社会学习策略，探索个体如何自发学习社会学习机制。 Seungwoong Ha,Hawoong Jeong cs.LG,cs.NE,cs.SI

authors_text: Zhenjie Yu,Kai Chen,Shuang Li,Bingfeng Han,Chi Harold Liu,Shuigen Wang
title: ROMA: Cross-Domain Region Similarity Matching for Unpaired Nighttime Infrared to Daytime Visible Video Translation
title_zh: ROMA：不配对夜间红外到白天可见视频翻译的跨域区域相似性匹配
abstract: Infrared cameras are often utilized to enhance the night vision since the visible light cameras exhibit inferior efficacy without sufficient illumination. However, infrared data possesses inadequate color contrast and representation ability attributed to its intrinsic heat-related imaging principle. This makes it arduous to capture and analyze information for human beings, meanwhile hindering its application. Although, the domain gaps between unpaired nighttime infrared and daytime visible videos are even huger than paired ones that captured at the same time, establishing an effective translation mapping will greatly contribute to various fields. In this case, the structural knowledge within nighttime infrared videos and semantic information contained in the translated daytime visible pairs could be utilized simultaneously. To this end, we propose a tailored framework ROMA that couples with our introduced cRoss-domain regiOn siMilarity mAtching technique for bridging the huge gaps. To be specific, ROMA could efficiently translate the unpaired nighttime infrared videos into fine-grained daytime visible ones, meanwhile maintain the spatiotemporal consistency via matching the cross-domain region similarity. Furthermore, we design a multiscale region-wise discriminator to distinguish the details from synthesized visible results and real references. Extensive experiments and evaluations for specific applications indicate ROMA outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, we provide a new and challenging dataset encouraging further research for unpaired nighttime infrared and daytime visible video translation, named InfraredCity. In particular, it consists of 9 long video clips including City, Highway and Monitor scenarios. All clips could be split into 603,142 frames in total, which are 20 times larger than the recently released daytime infrared-to-visible dataset IRVI.
summary: Infrared cameras are often utilized to enhance the night vision since the visible light cameras exhibit inferior efficacy without sufficient illumination. However, infrared data possesses inadequate color contrast and representation ability attributed to its intrinsic heat-related imaging principle. This makes it arduous to capture and analyze information for human beings, meanwhile hindering its application. Although, the domain gaps between unpaired nighttime infrared and daytime visible videos are even huger than paired ones that captured at the same time, establishing an effective translation mapping will greatly contribute to various fields. In this case, the structural knowledge within nighttime infrared videos and semantic information contained in the translated daytime visible pairs could be utilized simultaneously. To this end, we propose a tailored framework ROMA that couples with our introduced cRoss-domain regiOn siMilarity mAtching technique for bridging the huge gaps. To be specific, ROMA could efficiently translate the unpaired nighttime infrared videos into fine-grained daytime visible ones, meanwhile maintain the spatiotemporal consistency via matching the cross-domain region similarity. Furthermore, we design a multiscale region-wise discriminator to distinguish the details from synthesized visible results and real references. Extensive experiments and evaluations for specific applications indicate ROMA outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, we provide a new and challenging dataset encouraging further research for unpaired nighttime infrared and daytime visible video translation, named InfraredCity. In particular, it consists of 9 long video clips including City, Highway and Monitor scenarios. All clips could be split into 603,142 frames in total, which are 20 times larger than the recently released daytime infrared-to-visible dataset IRVI.
abstract_zh: 红外摄像机通常用于增强夜视能力，因为可见光摄像机在没有足够照明的情况下表现出较差的效果。然而，由于其固有的热相关成像原理，红外数据的色彩对比度和表示能力不足。这使得人类获取和分析信息变得困难，同时也阻碍了其应用。尽管未配对的夜间红外和白天可见视频之间的域差距甚至比同时捕获的配对视频更大，但建立有效的平移映射将对各个领域做出巨大贡献。在这种情况下，可以同时利用夜间红外视频中的结构知识和翻译后的白天可见光对中包含的语义信息。为此，我们提出了一个定制的框架 ROMA，与我们引入的跨域区域相似性匹配技术相结合，以弥补巨大的差距。具体来说，ROMA可以有效地将不配对的夜间红外视频转换为细粒度的白天可见视频，同时通过匹配跨域区域相似性来保持时空一致性。此外，我们设计了一个多尺度区域鉴别器，以将细节与合成的可见结果和真实参考区分开来。针对特定应用的大量实验和评估表明 ROMA 优于最先进的方法。此外，我们提供了一个新的、具有挑战性的数据集，名为 InfraredCity，鼓励对不配对的夜间红外和白天可见视频翻译进行进一步研究。具体来说，它由9个长视频片段组成，包括城市、高速公路和监控场景。所有剪辑总共可以分为 603,142 帧，比最近发布的白天红外到可见光数据集 IRVI 大 20 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMA框架，解决无配对夜间红外视频到日间可见光视频的跨域翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 红外摄像机在夜间视觉增强中应用广泛，但其图像缺乏色彩对比度和细节表达，且无配对的红外与可见光视频间存在巨大领域差异，限制了应用效果。
AI.method: 设计ROMA框架，结合跨领域区域相似性匹配技术，通过结构知识与语义信息联合优化，并引入多尺度区域判别器提升细节真实性。
AI.result: ROMA在多个应用任务中优于现有方法，同时发布包含60万帧的InfraredCity数据集，规模为现有数据集的20倍。
AI.conclusion: ROMA有效弥合了无配对红外与可见光视频的领域鸿沟，新数据集为后续研究提供了重要支持。

authors_text: Chengzhi Mao,Kevin Xia,James Wang,Hao Wang,Junfeng Yang,Elias Bareinboim,Carl Vondrick
title: Causal Transportability for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 视觉识别的因果可迁移性
abstract: Visual representations underlie object recognition tasks, but they often contain both robust and non-robust features. Our main observation is that image classifiers may perform poorly on out-of-distribution samples because spurious correlations between non-robust features and labels can be changed in a new environment. By analyzing procedures for out-of-distribution generalization with a causal graph, we show that standard classifiers fail because the association between images and labels is not transportable across settings. However, we then show that the causal effect, which severs all sources of confounding, remains invariant across domains. This motivates us to develop an algorithm to estimate the causal effect for image classification, which is transportable (i.e., invariant) across source and target environments. Without observing additional variables, we show that we can derive an estimand for the causal effect under empirical assumptions using representations in deep models as proxies. Theoretical analysis, empirical results, and visualizations show that our approach captures causal invariances and improves overall generalization.
summary: Visual representations underlie object recognition tasks, but they often contain both robust and non-robust features. Our main observation is that image classifiers may perform poorly on out-of-distribution samples because spurious correlations between non-robust features and labels can be changed in a new environment. By analyzing procedures for out-of-distribution generalization with a causal graph, we show that standard classifiers fail because the association between images and labels is not transportable across settings. However, we then show that the causal effect, which severs all sources of confounding, remains invariant across domains. This motivates us to develop an algorithm to estimate the causal effect for image classification, which is transportable (i.e., invariant) across source and target environments. Without observing additional variables, we show that we can derive an estimand for the causal effect under empirical assumptions using representations in deep models as proxies. Theoretical analysis, empirical results, and visualizations show that our approach captures causal invariances and improves overall generalization.
abstract_zh: 视觉表示是对象识别任务的基础，但它们通常包含鲁棒和非鲁棒特征。我们的主要观察结果是，图像分类器在分布外样本上可能表现不佳，因为非鲁棒特征和标签之间的虚假相关性可能会在新环境中发生变化。通过使用因果图分析分布外泛化的过程，我们发现标准分类器会失败，因为图像和标签之间的关联不可跨设置传输。然而，我们随后表明，切断所有混杂来源的因果效应在各个领域中保持不变。这促使我们开发一种算法来估计图像分类的因果效应，该算法可以跨源环境和目标环境传输（即不变）。在不观察其他变量的情况下，我们表明，我们可以使用深度模型中的表示作为代理，在经验假设下得出因果效应的估计值。理论分析、实证结果和可视化表明，我们的方法捕获了因果不变性并提高了整体泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过因果可迁移性提升视觉识别模型在不同分布数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器因依赖非鲁棒特征与标签的虚假相关性，在分布外样本上表现不佳，需通过因果不变性解决领域迁移问题。
AI.method: 基于因果图分析，提出估计图像分类因果效应的算法，利用深度模型表征作为代理变量，在无需额外观测变量的情况下实现跨领域不变性估计。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证表明，该方法能有效捕捉因果不变性，提升模型整体泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果效应估计实现领域不变性，为视觉识别的分布外泛化提供了新思路与有效方法。

search_text: Causal Transportability for Visual Recognition 视觉识别的因果可迁移性 Visual representations underlie object recognition tasks, but they often contain both robust and non-robust features. Our main observation is that image classifiers may perform poorly on out-of-distribution samples because spurious correlations between non-robust features and labels can be changed in a new environment. By analyzing procedures for out-of-distribution generalization with a causal graph, we show that standard classifiers fail because the association between images and labels is not transportable across settings. However, we then show that the causal effect, which severs all sources of confounding, remains invariant across domains. This motivates us to develop an algorithm to estimate the causal effect for image classification, which is transportable (i.e., invariant) across source and target environments. Without observing additional variables, we show that we can derive an estimand for the causal effect under empirical assumptions using representations in deep models as proxies. Theoretical analysis, empirical results, and visualizations show that our approach captures causal invariances and improves overall generalization. 视觉表示是对象识别任务的基础，但它们通常包含鲁棒和非鲁棒特征。我们的主要观察结果是，图像分类器在分布外样本上可能表现不佳，因为非鲁棒特征和标签之间的虚假相关性可能会在新环境中发生变化。通过使用因果图分析分布外泛化的过程，我们发现标准分类器会失败，因为图像和标签之间的关联不可跨设置传输。然而，我们随后表明，切断所有混杂来源的因果效应在各个领域中保持不变。这促使我们开发一种算法来估计图像分类的因果效应，该算法可以跨源环境和目标环境传输（即不变）。在不观察其他变量的情况下，我们表明，我们可以使用深度模型中的表示作为代理，在经验假设下得出因果效应的估计值。理论分析、实证结果和可视化表明，我们的方法捕获了因果不变性并提高了整体泛化能力。 本文旨在通过因果可迁移性提升视觉识别模型在不同分布数据上的泛化能力。 Chengzhi Mao,Kevin Xia,James Wang,Hao Wang,Junfeng Yang,Elias Bareinboim,Carl Vondrick cs.CV

title: Polylogarithmic Sketches for Clustering
title_zh: 聚类的多对数草图
abstract: Given $n$ points in $\ell_p^d$, we consider the problem of partitioning points into $k$ clusters with associated centers. The cost of a clustering is the sum of $p^{\text{th}}$ powers of distances of points to their cluster centers. For $p \in [1,2]$, we design sketches of size poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$ such that the cost of the optimal clustering can be estimated to within factor $1+ε$, despite the fact that the compressed representation does not contain enough information to recover the cluster centers or the partition into clusters. This leads to a streaming algorithm for estimating the clustering cost with space poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$. We also obtain a distributed memory algorithm, where the $n$ points are arbitrarily partitioned amongst $m$ machines, each of which sends information to a central party who then computes an approximation of the clustering cost. Prior to this work, no such streaming or distributed-memory algorithm was known with sublinear dependence on $d$ for $p \in [1,2)$.
summary: Given $n$ points in $\ell_p^d$, we consider the problem of partitioning points into $k$ clusters with associated centers. The cost of a clustering is the sum of $p^{\text{th}}$ powers of distances of points to their cluster centers. For $p \in [1,2]$, we design sketches of size poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$ such that the cost of the optimal clustering can be estimated to within factor $1+ε$, despite the fact that the compressed representation does not contain enough information to recover the cluster centers or the partition into clusters. This leads to a streaming algorithm for estimating the clustering cost with space poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$. We also obtain a distributed memory algorithm, where the $n$ points are arbitrarily partitioned amongst $m$ machines, each of which sends information to a central party who then computes an approximation of the clustering cost. Prior to this work, no such streaming or distributed-memory algorithm was known with sublinear dependence on $d$ for $p \in [1,2)$.
abstract_zh: 给定 $\ell_p^d$ 中的 $n$ 个点，我们考虑将点划分为具有相关中心的 $k$ 个簇的问题。聚类的成本是点到聚类中心的距离的 $p^{\text{th}}$ 次方之和。对于$p \in [1,2]$，我们设计大小为poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$的草图，以便可以将最佳聚类的成本估计在因子$1+ε$内，尽管压缩表示不包含足够的信息来恢复聚类中心或分区到聚类中。这导致了一种用于估计空间 poly$(\log(nd),k,1/ε)$ 的聚类成本的流式算法。我们还获得了一种分布式内存算法，其中 $n$ 个点在 $m$ 台机器之间任意划分，每台机器将信息发送到中央方，然后由中央方计算聚类成本的近似值。在这项工作之前，还没有已知这样的流式或分布式内存算法对 $p \in [1,2)$ 具有对 $d$ 的次线性依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在高维空间中使用多项式对数大小的草图来估计聚类成本的问题，提出了适用于流数据和分布式环境的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法在处理高维数据时面临存储和计算效率的挑战，尤其在流数据和分布式场景下难以直接应用。
AI.method: 设计了多项式对数大小的草图结构，通过压缩数据保留聚类成本的关键信息，无需恢复具体聚类中心或划分即可估计成本。
AI.result: 提出了首个空间复杂度为poly(log(nd),k,1/ε)的流算法和分布式算法，支持对p∈[1,2]的ℓ_p空间聚类成本的(1+ε)近似估计。
AI.conclusion: 该工作突破了传统方法对维度d的线性依赖限制，为大规模高维数据的聚类分析提供了理论基础和实用算法框架。

authors_text: Nick Willemstein,Herman van der Kooij,Ali Sadeghi
title: Direct 3D Printing of Soft Fluidic Actuators with Graded Porosity
title_zh: 具有分级孔隙率的软流体执行器的直接 3D 打印
abstract: New additive manufacturing methods are needed to realize more complex soft robots. One example is soft fluidic robotics, which exploits fluidic power and stiffness gradients. Porous structures are an interesting type for this approach, as they are flexible and allow for fluid transport. Within this work, the Infill-Foam (InFoam) is proposed to print structures with graded porosity by liquid rope coiling (LRC). By exploiting LRC, the InFoam method could exploit the repeatable coiling patterns to print structures. To this end, only the characterization of the relation between nozzle height and coil radius and the extruded length were necessary (at a fixed temperature). Then by adjusting the nozzle height and/or extrusion speed the porosity of the printed structure could be set. The InFoam method was demonstrated by printing porous structures using styrene-ethylene-butylene-styrene (SEBS) with porosities ranging from 46\% to 89\%. In compression tests, the cubes showed large changes in modulus (more than 200 times), density (-89\% compared to bulk), and energy dissipation. The InFoam method combined coiling and normal plotting to realize a large range of porosity gradients. This grading was exploited to realize rectangular structures with varying deformation patterns, which included twisting, contraction, and bending. Furthermore, the InFoam method was shown to be capable of programming the behavior of bending actuators by varying the porosity. Both the output force and stroke showed correlations similar to those of the cubes. Thus, the InFoam method can fabricate and program the mechanical behavior of a soft fluidic (porous) actuator by grading porosity.
summary: New additive manufacturing methods are needed to realize more complex soft robots. One example is soft fluidic robotics, which exploits fluidic power and stiffness gradients. Porous structures are an interesting type for this approach, as they are flexible and allow for fluid transport. Within this work, the Infill-Foam (InFoam) is proposed to print structures with graded porosity by liquid rope coiling (LRC). By exploiting LRC, the InFoam method could exploit the repeatable coiling patterns to print structures. To this end, only the characterization of the relation between nozzle height and coil radius and the extruded length were necessary (at a fixed temperature). Then by adjusting the nozzle height and/or extrusion speed the porosity of the printed structure could be set. The InFoam method was demonstrated by printing porous structures using styrene-ethylene-butylene-styrene (SEBS) with porosities ranging from 46\% to 89\%. In compression tests, the cubes showed large changes in modulus (more than 200 times), density (-89\% compared to bulk), and energy dissipation. The InFoam method combined coiling and normal plotting to realize a large range of porosity gradients. This grading was exploited to realize rectangular structures with varying deformation patterns, which included twisting, contraction, and bending. Furthermore, the InFoam method was shown to be capable of programming the behavior of bending actuators by varying the porosity. Both the output force and stroke showed correlations similar to those of the cubes. Thus, the InFoam method can fabricate and program the mechanical behavior of a soft fluidic (porous) actuator by grading porosity.
abstract_zh: 需要新的增材制造方法来实现更复杂的软机器人。一个例子是软流体机器人，它利用流体功率和刚度梯度。多孔结构是这种方法的一个有趣的类型，因为它们很灵活并且允许流体传输。在这项工作中，建议使用填充泡沫（InFoam）通过液体绳卷绕（LRC）打印具有分级孔隙率的结构。通过利用 LRC，InFoam 方法可以利用可重复的卷绕图案来打印结构。为此，仅需要表征喷嘴高度和线圈半径以及挤出长度之间的关系（在固定温度下）。然后，通过调节喷嘴高度和/或挤出速度，可以设置打印结构的孔隙率。 InFoam 方法通过使用苯乙烯-乙烯-丁烯-苯乙烯 (SEBS) 打印多孔结构进行了演示，孔隙率范围为 46% 至 89%。在压缩测试中，立方体在模量（超过 200 倍）、密度（与体积相比 -89%）和能量耗散方面表现出巨大的变化。 InFoam方法结合了卷绕和法向绘图，实现了大范围的孔隙率梯度。利用这种分级来实现具有不同变形模式的矩形结构，其中包括扭曲、收缩和弯曲。此外，InFoam 方法被证明能够通过改变孔隙率来对弯曲执行器的行为进行编程。输出力和行程都显示出与立方体相似的相关性。因此，InFoam 方法可以通过分级孔隙率来制造软流体（多孔）执行器的机械行为并对其进行编程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为InFoam的3D打印方法，用于直接制造具有渐变孔隙率的软体流体执行器。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人制造技术难以实现复杂结构，需开发新型增材制造方法以控制流体动力与刚度梯度，从而提升功能多样性。
AI.method: 通过液态绳状卷曲（LRC）技术，结合喷嘴高度与挤出速度调控，实现SEBS材料的渐变孔隙率结构打印，并通过压缩测试验证机械性能。
AI.result: 成功打印出孔隙率46%-89%的结构，压缩模量变化超200倍，密度降低89%，并实现弯曲、扭转等可控变形模式。
AI.conclusion: InFoam方法可通过孔隙率梯度编程软体执行器的机械行为，为复杂软体机器人提供新制造方案。
