To this end, only the characterization of the relation between nozzle height and coil radius and the extruded length were necessary (at a fixed temperature). Then by adjusting the nozzle height and/or extrusion speed the porosity of the printed structure could be set. The InFoam method was demonstrated by printing porous structures using styrene-ethylene-butylene-styrene (SEBS) with porosities ranging from 46\% to 89\%. In compression tests, the cubes showed large changes in modulus (more than 200 times), density (-89\% compared to bulk), and energy dissipation. The InFoam method combined coiling and normal plotting to realize a large range of porosity gradients. This grading was exploited to realize rectangular structures with varying deformation patterns, which included twisting, contraction, and bending. Furthermore, the InFoam method was shown to be capable of programming the behavior of bending actuators by varying the porosity. Both the output force and stroke showed correlations similar to those of the cubes. Thus, the InFoam method can fabricate and program the mechanical behavior of a soft fluidic (porous) actuator by grading porosity. 需要新的增材制造方法来实现更复杂的软机器人。一个例子是软流体机器人，它利用流体功率和刚度梯度。多孔结构是这种方法的一个有趣的类型，因为它们很灵活并且允许流体传输。在这项工作中，建议使用填充泡沫（InFoam）通过液体绳卷绕（LRC）打印具有分级孔隙率的结构。通过利用 LRC，InFoam 方法可以利用可重复的卷绕图案来打印结构。为此，仅需要表征喷嘴高度和线圈半径以及挤出长度之间的关系（在固定温度下）。然后，通过调节喷嘴高度和/或挤出速度，可以设置打印结构的孔隙率。 InFoam 方法通过使用苯乙烯-乙烯-丁烯-苯乙烯 (SEBS) 打印多孔结构进行了演示，孔隙率范围为 46% 至 89%。在压缩测试中，立方体在模量（超过 200 倍）、密度（与体积相比 -89%）和能量耗散方面表现出巨大的变化。 InFoam方法结合了卷绕和法向绘图，实现了大范围的孔隙率梯度。利用这种分级来实现具有不同变形模式的矩形结构，其中包括扭曲、收缩和弯曲。此外，InFoam 方法被证明能够通过改变孔隙率来对弯曲执行器的行为进行编程。输出力和行程都显示出与立方体相似的相关性。因此，InFoam 方法可以通过分级孔隙率来制造软流体（多孔）执行器的机械行为并对其进行编程。 本文提出了一种名为InFoam的3D打印方法，用于直接制造具有渐变孔隙率的软体流体执行器。 Nick Willemstein,Herman van der Kooij,Ali Sadeghi cs.RO

title: Reinforcement Learning Generation of 4-Qubits Entangled States
title_zh: 4 量子位纠缠态的强化学习生成
abstract: We have devised an artificial intelligence algorithm with machine reinforcement learning (Q-learning) to construct remarkable entangled states with 4 qubits. This way, the algorithm is able to generate representative states for some of the 49 true SLOCC classes of the four-qubit entanglement states. In particular, it is possible to reach at least one true SLOCC class for each of the nine entanglement families. The quantum circuits synthesized by the algorithm may be useful for the experimental realization of these important classes of entangled states and to draw conclusions about the intrinsic properties of our universe. We introduce a graphical tool called the state-link graph (SLG) to represent the construction of the Quality matrix (Q-matrix) used by the algorithm to build a given objective state belonging to the corresponding entanglement class. This allows us to discover the necessary connections between specific entanglement features and the role of certain quantum gates that the algorithm needs to include in the quantum gate set of actions. The quantum circuits found are optimal by construction with respect to the quantum gate-set chosen. These SLGs make the algorithm simple, intuitive and a useful resource for the automated construction of entangled states with a low number of qubits.
summary: We have devised an artificial intelligence algorithm with machine reinforcement learning (Q-learning) to construct remarkable entangled states with 4 qubits. This way, the algorithm is able to generate representative states for some of the 49 true SLOCC classes of the four-qubit entanglement states. In particular, it is possible to reach at least one true SLOCC class for each of the nine entanglement families. The quantum circuits synthesized by the algorithm may be useful for the experimental realization of these important classes of entangled states and to draw conclusions about the intrinsic properties of our universe. We introduce a graphical tool called the state-link graph (SLG) to represent the construction of the Quality matrix (Q-matrix) used by the algorithm to build a given objective state belonging to the corresponding entanglement class. This allows us to discover the necessary connections between specific entanglement features and the role of certain quantum gates that the algorithm needs to include in the quantum gate set of actions. The quantum circuits found are optimal by construction with respect to the quantum gate-set chosen. These SLGs make the algorithm simple, intuitive and a useful resource for the automated construction of entangled states with a low number of qubits.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种具有机器强化学习（Q-learning）的人工智能算法，可以用 4 个量子位构建显着的纠缠态。这样，该算法就能够为四量子位纠缠态的 49 个真正的 SLOCC 类中的一些生成代表性状态。特别是，九个纠缠族中的每一个都可以达到至少一个真正的 SLOCC 类别。该算法合成的量子电路可能有助于实验实现这些重要类别的纠缠态，并得出有关宇宙本质属性的结论。我们引入了一种称为状态链接图（SLG）的图形工具来表示算法使用的质量矩阵（Q矩阵）的构造，以构建属于相应纠缠类的给定目标状态。这使我们能够发现特定纠缠特征与算法需要包含在量子门动作集中的某些量子门的作用之间的必要联系。所发现的量子电路在构造上对于所选的量子门组来说是最佳的。这些 SLG 使算法变得简单、直观，并且是使用少量量子位自动构建纠缠态的有用资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（Q-learning）的算法，用于生成四量子比特的纠缠态。
AI.motivation: 四量子比特的纠缠态在量子信息科学中具有重要意义，但其生成和分类较为复杂，因此需要一种高效的方法来构造这些态。
AI.method: 作者利用强化学习算法，结合一种称为状态链接图（SLG）的工具，构建了用于生成目标纠缠态的量子电路。
AI.result: 该算法能够生成至少每个九个纠缠家族中的一种真实SLOCC类态，并且生成的量子电路在所选量子门集中是优化的。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构造少量量子比特的纠缠态提供了一种简单直观的自动化工具，有助于实验实现和探索量子态的内在性质。

title: Restricted Black-box Adversarial Attack Against DeepFake Face Swapping
title_zh: 针对 DeepFake 换脸的受限黑盒对抗攻击
abstract: DeepFake face swapping presents a significant threat to online security and social media, which can replace the source face in an arbitrary photo/video with the target face of an entirely different person. In order to prevent this fraud, some researchers have begun to study the adversarial methods against DeepFake or face manipulation. However, existing works focus on the white-box setting or the black-box setting driven by abundant queries, which severely limits the practical application of these methods. To tackle this problem, we introduce a practical adversarial attack that does not require any queries to the facial image forgery model. Our method is built on a substitute model persuing for face reconstruction and then transfers adversarial examples from the substitute model directly to inaccessible black-box DeepFake models. Specially, we propose the Transferable Cycle Adversary Generative Adversarial Network (TCA-GAN) to construct the adversarial perturbation for disrupting unknown DeepFake systems. We also present a novel post-regularization module for enhancing the transferability of generated adversarial examples. To comprehensively measure the effectiveness of our approaches, we construct a challenging benchmark of DeepFake adversarial attacks for future development. Extensive experiments impressively show that the proposed adversarial attack method makes the visual quality of DeepFake face images plummet so that they are easier to be detected by humans and algorithms. Moreover, we demonstrate that the proposed algorithm can be generalized to offer face image protection against various face translation methods.
summary: DeepFake face swapping presents a significant threat to online security and social media, which can replace the source face in an arbitrary photo/video with the target face of an entirely different person. In order to prevent this fraud, some researchers have begun to study the adversarial methods against DeepFake or face manipulation. However, existing works focus on the white-box setting or the black-box setting driven by abundant queries, which severely limits the practical application of these methods. To tackle this problem, we introduce a practical adversarial attack that does not require any queries to the facial image forgery model. Our method is built on a substitute model persuing for face reconstruction and then transfers adversarial examples from the substitute model directly to inaccessible black-box DeepFake models. Specially, we propose the Transferable Cycle Adversary Generative Adversarial Network (TCA-GAN) to construct the adversarial perturbation for disrupting unknown DeepFake systems. We also present a novel post-regularization module for enhancing the transferability of generated adversarial examples. To comprehensively measure the effectiveness of our approaches, we construct a challenging benchmark of DeepFake adversarial attacks for future development. Extensive experiments impressively show that the proposed adversarial attack method makes the visual quality of DeepFake face images plummet so that they are easier to be detected by humans and algorithms. Moreover, we demonstrate that the proposed algorithm can be generalized to offer face image protection against various face translation methods.
abstract_zh: DeepFake 脸部交换对在线安全和社交媒体构成了重大威胁，它可以用完全不同的人的目标脸部替换任意照片/视频中的源脸部。为了防止这种欺诈行为，一些研究人员已经开始研究针对 DeepFake 或人脸操纵的对抗方法。然而，现有的工作集中于白盒设置或由大量查询驱动的黑盒设置，这严重限制了这些方法的实际应用。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种实用的对抗性攻击，不需要对面部图像伪造模型进行任何查询。我们的方法建立在追求面部重建的替代模型上，然后将对抗性示例从替代模型直接转移到无法访问的黑盒 DeepFake 模型。特别地，我们提出了可转移循环对抗生成对抗网络（TCA-GAN）来构建对抗性扰动来破坏未知的 DeepFake 系统。我们还提出了一种新颖的后正则化模块，用于增强生成的对抗性示例的可转移性。为了全面衡量我们方法的有效性，我们为未来的发展构建了一个具有挑战性的 DeepFake 对抗攻击基准。大量实验令人印象深刻地表明，所提出的对抗性攻击方法使 DeepFake 人脸图像的视觉质量直线下降，从而更容易被人类和算法检测到。此外，我们证明所提出的算法可以推广到提供针对各种面部转换方法的面部图像保护。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需查询目标模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法，用于破坏深度伪造换脸系统。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗深度伪造的方法依赖白盒设置或大量查询的黑盒设置，实际应用受限。
AI.method: 构建替代模型进行人脸重建，提出可转移循环对抗生成网络（TCA-GAN）及后正则化模块生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著降低深度伪造图像视觉质量，提升人类与算法检测能力，并适用于多种换脸技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无查询黑盒攻击方法为深度伪造防御提供了有效且通用的解决方案。

title: Lattices Without a Big Constant and With Noise
title_zh: 没有大常数且有噪声的格子
abstract: We show how Frieze's analysis of subset sum solving using lattices can be done with out any large constants and without flipping. We apply the variant without the large constant to inputs with noise.
summary: We show how Frieze's analysis of subset sum solving using lattices can be done with out any large constants and without flipping. We apply the variant without the large constant to inputs with noise.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了弗里兹如何使用格子对子集和求解进行分析，而无需任何大常数且无需翻转。我们将没有大常数的变体应用于有噪声的输入。

AI.tldr: 改进Frieze的子集和求解方法，去除大常数和翻转步骤，并应用于有噪声的输入。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大常数或翻转步骤，影响效率；处理噪声输入对实际应用（如密码学）至关重要。
AI.method: 修改Frieze的格基约减方法，去除大常数和翻转步骤，适应噪声输入。
AI.result: 成功将改进后的算法应用于有噪声输入，提升了解决子集和问题的效率和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无大常数和翻转的情况下有效处理噪声，为实际应用提供了更优的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 改进Frieze的子集和求解方法，去除大常数和翻转步骤，并应用于有噪声的输入。

search_text: Lattices Without a Big Constant and With Noise 没有大常数且有噪声的格子 We show how Frieze's analysis of subset sum solving using lattices can be done with out any large constants and without flipping. We apply the variant without the large constant to inputs with noise. 我们展示了弗里兹如何使用格子对子集和求解进行分析，而无需任何大常数且无需翻转。我们将没有大常数的变体应用于有噪声的输入。 改进Frieze的子集和求解方法，去除大常数和翻转步骤，并应用于有噪声的输入。 Steven J. Gortler,Louis Theran cs.DS

authors_text: Yin Yu,Hutchcroft Will,Khosravan Naji,Boyadzhiev Ivaylo,Fu Yun,Kang Sing Bing
title: Generating Topological Structure of Floorplans from Room Attributes
title_zh: 从房间属性生成平面图的拓扑结构
abstract: Analysis of indoor spaces requires topological information. In this paper, we propose to extract topological information from room attributes using what we call Iterative and adaptive graph Topology Learning (ITL). ITL progressively predicts multiple relations between rooms; at each iteration, it improves node embeddings, which in turn facilitates generation of a better topological graph structure. This notion of iterative improvement of node embeddings and topological graph structure is in the same spirit as \cite{chen2020iterative}. However, while \cite{chen2020iterative} computes the adjacency matrix based on node similarity, we learn the graph metric using a relational decoder to extract room correlations. Experiments using a new challenging indoor dataset validate our proposed method. Qualitative and quantitative evaluation for layout topology prediction and floorplan generation applications also demonstrate the effectiveness of ITL.
summary: Analysis of indoor spaces requires topological information. In this paper, we propose to extract topological information from room attributes using what we call Iterative and adaptive graph Topology Learning (ITL). ITL progressively predicts multiple relations between rooms; at each iteration, it improves node embeddings, which in turn facilitates generation of a better topological graph structure. This notion of iterative improvement of node embeddings and topological graph structure is in the same spirit as \cite{chen2020iterative}. However, while \cite{chen2020iterative} computes the adjacency matrix based on node similarity, we learn the graph metric using a relational decoder to extract room correlations. Experiments using a new challenging indoor dataset validate our proposed method. Qualitative and quantitative evaluation for layout topology prediction and floorplan generation applications also demonstrate the effectiveness of ITL.
abstract_zh: 室内空间分析需要拓扑信息。在本文中，我们建议使用迭代和自适应图拓扑学习（ITL）从房间属性中提取拓扑信息。 ITL 逐步预测房间之间的多重关系；在每次迭代中，它都会改进节点嵌入，从而有助于生成更好的拓扑图结构。这种节点嵌入和拓扑图结构的迭代改进的概念与\cite{chen2020iterative}的精神相同。然而，虽然 \cite{chen2020iterative} 根据节点相似性计算邻接矩阵，但我们使用关系解码器来提取房间相关性来学习图度量。使用新的具有挑战性的室内数据集的实验验证了我们提出的方法。布局拓扑预测和布局规划生成应用的定性和定量评估也证明了 ITL 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从房间属性生成楼层平面图拓扑结构的方法，称为迭代自适应图拓扑学习（ITL）。
AI.motivation: 室内空间分析需要拓扑信息，但传统方法难以有效提取房间间的复杂关系，需改进图结构生成方式。
AI.method: 通过迭代优化节点嵌入和拓扑结构，使用关系解码器学习图度量，而非基于节点相似性计算邻接矩阵。
AI.result: 在新室内数据集上验证了ITL的有效性，定性和定量评估显示其在布局拓扑预测和楼层生成中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: ITL方法通过迭代优化和关系解码器有效生成拓扑结构，为室内空间分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Florian Thamm,Markus Jürgens,Oliver Taubmann,Aleksandra Thamm,Leonhard Rist,Hendrik Ditt,Andreas Maier
title: An Algorithm for the Labeling and Interactive Visualization of the Cerebrovascular System of Ischemic Strokes
title_zh: 缺血性中风脑血管系统的标记和交互式可视化算法
abstract: During the diagnosis of ischemic strokes, the Circle of Willis and its surrounding vessels are the arteries of interest. Their visualization in case of an acute stroke is often enabled by Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA). Still, the identification and analysis of the cerebral arteries remain time consuming in such scans due to a large number of peripheral vessels which may disturb the visual impression. In previous work we proposed VirtualDSA++, an algorithm designed to segment and label the cerebrovascular tree on CTA scans. Especially with stroke patients, labeling is a delicate procedure, as in the worst case whole hemispheres may not be present due to impeded perfusion. Hence, we extended the labeling mechanism for the cerebral arteries to identify occluded vessels. In the work at hand, we place the algorithm in a clinical context by evaluating the labeling and occlusion detection on stroke patients, where we have achieved labeling sensitivities comparable to other works between 92\,\% and 95\,\%. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first work to address labeling and occlusion detection at once, whereby a sensitivity of 67\,\% and a specificity of 81\,\% were obtained for the latter. VirtualDSA++ also automatically segments and models the intracranial system, which we further used in a deep learning driven follow up work. We present the generic concept of iterative systematic search for pathways on all nodes of said model, which enables new interactive features. Exemplary, we derive in detail, firstly, the interactive planning of vascular interventions like the mechanical thrombectomy and secondly, the interactive suppression of vessel structures that are not of interest in diagnosing strokes (like veins). We discuss both features as well as further possibilities emerging from the proposed concept.
summary: During the diagnosis of ischemic strokes, the Circle of Willis and its surrounding vessels are the arteries of interest. Their visualization in case of an acute stroke is often enabled by Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA). Still, the identification and analysis of the cerebral arteries remain time consuming in such scans due to a large number of peripheral vessels which may disturb the visual impression. In previous work we proposed VirtualDSA++, an algorithm designed to segment and label the cerebrovascular tree on CTA scans. Especially with stroke patients, labeling is a delicate procedure, as in the worst case whole hemispheres may not be present due to impeded perfusion. Hence, we extended the labeling mechanism for the cerebral arteries to identify occluded vessels. In the work at hand, we place the algorithm in a clinical context by evaluating the labeling and occlusion detection on stroke patients, where we have achieved labeling sensitivities comparable to other works between 92\,\% and 95\,\%. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first work to address labeling and occlusion detection at once, whereby a sensitivity of 67\,\% and a specificity of 81\,\% were obtained for the latter. VirtualDSA++ also automatically segments and models the intracranial system, which we further used in a deep learning driven follow up work. We present the generic concept of iterative systematic search for pathways on all nodes of said model, which enables new interactive features. Exemplary, we derive in detail, firstly, the interactive planning of vascular interventions like the mechanical thrombectomy and secondly, the interactive suppression of vessel structures that are not of interest in diagnosing strokes (like veins). We discuss both features as well as further possibilities emerging from the proposed concept.
abstract_zh: 在诊断缺血性中风期间，威利斯环及其周围血管是感兴趣的动脉。急性中风情况下的可视化通常通过计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 实现。尽管如此，由于大量的外周血管可能会干扰视觉印象，因此在此类扫描中对脑动脉的识别和分析仍然非常耗时。在之前的工作中，我们提出了 VirtualDSA++，一种旨在在 CTA 扫描上分割和标记脑血管树的算法。特别是对于中风患者，标记是一个微妙的过程，因为在最坏的情况下，由于灌注受阻，整个半球可能不存在。因此，我们扩展了脑动脉的标记机制以识别闭塞的血管。在手头的工作中，我们通过评估中风患者的标记和遮挡检测，将该算法置于临床环境中，我们已经实现了与其他工作相当的标记灵敏度，在 92\,\% 和 95\,\% 之间。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个同时解决标记和遮挡检测的工作，后者的灵敏度为 67%，特异性为 81%。 VirtualDSA++ 还自动对颅内系统进行分段和建模，我们进一步将其用于深度学习驱动的后续工作。我们提出了在所述模型的所有节点上迭代系统搜索路径的通用概念，这使得新的交互功能成为可能。举例来说，我们首先详细推导出血管干预措施（如机械血栓切除术）的交互式规划，其次是对诊断中风（如静脉）不感兴趣的血管结构的交互式抑制。我们讨论了这两个特征以及所提出的概念中出现的进一步可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VirtualDSA++的算法，用于缺血性中风患者脑血管系统的自动标注、阻塞检测及交互式可视化，提升诊断效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CTA扫描中，脑动脉识别因周围血管干扰耗时且复杂，尤其在中风患者中需处理可能的血管阻塞情况，亟需高效标注与可视化工具。
AI.method: 扩展VirtualDSA++算法以检测阻塞血管，结合CTA数据进行标注，并构建颅内血管模型，开发交互式功能如介入手术规划及非目标血管抑制。
AI.result: 标注灵敏度达92%-95%，阻塞检测灵敏度67%、特异度81%，首次实现标注与阻塞检测一体化，支持临床交互功能验证。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为中风诊断提供高灵敏度的自动标注与阻塞检测方案，并通过交互功能提升临床实用性，为后续深度学习应用奠定基础。

We discuss both features as well as further possibilities emerging from the proposed concept. 在诊断缺血性中风期间，威利斯环及其周围血管是感兴趣的动脉。急性中风情况下的可视化通常通过计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 实现。尽管如此，由于大量的外周血管可能会干扰视觉印象，因此在此类扫描中对脑动脉的识别和分析仍然非常耗时。在之前的工作中，我们提出了 VirtualDSA++，一种旨在在 CTA 扫描上分割和标记脑血管树的算法。特别是对于中风患者，标记是一个微妙的过程，因为在最坏的情况下，由于灌注受阻，整个半球可能不存在。因此，我们扩展了脑动脉的标记机制以识别闭塞的血管。在手头的工作中，我们通过评估中风患者的标记和遮挡检测，将该算法置于临床环境中，我们已经实现了与其他工作相当的标记灵敏度，在 92\,\% 和 95\,\% 之间。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个同时解决标记和遮挡检测的工作，后者的灵敏度为 67%，特异性为 81%。 VirtualDSA++ 还自动对颅内系统进行分段和建模，我们进一步将其用于深度学习驱动的后续工作。我们提出了在所述模型的所有节点上迭代系统搜索路径的通用概念，这使得新的交互功能成为可能。举例来说，我们首先详细推导出血管干预措施（如机械血栓切除术）的交互式规划，其次是对诊断中风（如静脉）不感兴趣的血管结构的交互式抑制。我们讨论了这两个特征以及所提出的概念中出现的进一步可能性。 本文提出一种名为VirtualDSA++的算法，用于缺血性中风患者脑血管系统的自动标注、阻塞检测及交互式可视化，提升诊断效率。 Florian Thamm,Markus Jürgens,Oliver Taubmann,Aleksandra Thamm,Leonhard Rist,Hendrik Ditt,Andreas Maier eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.HC,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Hongyi Yao,Pu Li,Jian Cao,Xiangcheng Liu,Chenying Xie,Bingzhang Wang
title: RAPQ: Rescuing Accuracy for Power-of-Two Low-bit Post-training Quantization
title_zh: RAPQ：挽救二次幂低位训练后量化的准确性
comment: This paper was accepted by IJCAI 2022. Pytorch implementation of RAPQ: https://github.com/BillAmihom/RAPQ
comments: This paper was accepted by IJCAI 2022. Pytorch implementation of RAPQ: https://github.com/BillAmihom/RAPQ
abstract: We introduce a Power-of-Two low-bit post-training quantization(PTQ) method for deep neural network that meets hardware requirements and does not call for long-time retraining. Power-of-Two quantization can convert the multiplication introduced by quantization and dequantization to bit-shift that is adopted by many efficient accelerators. However, the Power-of-Two scale factors have fewer candidate values, which leads to more rounding or clipping errors. We propose a novel Power-of-Two PTQ framework, dubbed RAPQ, which dynamically adjusts the Power-of-Two scales of the whole network instead of statically determining them layer by layer. It can theoretically trade off the rounding error and clipping error of the whole network. Meanwhile, the reconstruction method in RAPQ is based on the BN information of every unit. Extensive experiments on ImageNet prove the excellent performance of our proposed method. Without bells and whistles, RAPQ can reach accuracy of 65% and 48% on ResNet-18 and MobileNetV2 respectively with weight INT2 activation INT4. We are the first to propose the more constrained but hardware-friendly Power-of-Two quantization scheme for low-bit PTQ specially and prove that it can achieve nearly the same accuracy as SOTA PTQ method. The code was released.
summary: We introduce a Power-of-Two low-bit post-training quantization(PTQ) method for deep neural network that meets hardware requirements and does not call for long-time retraining. Power-of-Two quantization can convert the multiplication introduced by quantization and dequantization to bit-shift that is adopted by many efficient accelerators. However, the Power-of-Two scale factors have fewer candidate values, which leads to more rounding or clipping errors. We propose a novel Power-of-Two PTQ framework, dubbed RAPQ, which dynamically adjusts the Power-of-Two scales of the whole network instead of statically determining them layer by layer. It can theoretically trade off the rounding error and clipping error of the whole network. Meanwhile, the reconstruction method in RAPQ is based on the BN information of every unit. Extensive experiments on ImageNet prove the excellent performance of our proposed method. Without bells and whistles, RAPQ can reach accuracy of 65% and 48% on ResNet-18 and MobileNetV2 respectively with weight INT2 activation INT4. We are the first to propose the more constrained but hardware-friendly Power-of-Two quantization scheme for low-bit PTQ specially and prove that it can achieve nearly the same accuracy as SOTA PTQ method. The code was released.
abstract_zh: 我们为深度神经网络引入了一种二的幂低位训练后量化（PTQ）方法，该方法满足硬件要求并且不需要长时间的重新训练。二次方量化可以将量化和反量化引入的乘法转换为许多高效加速器所采用的位移位。然而，二次方比例因子的候选值较少，这会导致更多的舍入或裁剪错误。我们提出了一种新颖的二次幂 PTQ 框架，称为 RAPQ，它动态调整整个网络的二次幂尺度，而不是逐层静态确定它们。理论上可以权衡整个网络的舍入误差和裁剪误差。同时，RAPQ中的重构方法是基于每个单元的BN信息的。 ImageNet 上的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的出色性能。没有花里胡哨的东西，在权重 INT2 激活 INT4 的情况下，RAPQ 在 ResNet-18 和 MobileNetV2 上分别可以达到 65% 和 48% 的准确率。我们是第一个专门针对低比特 PTQ 提出更受约束但硬件友好的二次幂量化方案，并证明它可以达到与 SOTA PTQ 方法几乎相同的精度。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RAPQ的Power-of-Two低比特后训练量化方法，旨在满足硬件需求并无需长时间再训练。
AI.motivation: Power-of-Two量化方法虽然能将乘法转换为位移操作以提升硬件效率，但由于可选的缩放因子较少，容易引入舍入或裁剪误差。
AI.method: RAPQ方法通过动态调整整个网络的Power-of-Two缩放因子，而非逐层静态确定，从而在理论上平衡舍入误差和裁剪误差。同时，该方法基于每个单元的BN信息进行重构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上的实验表明，RAPQ在ResNet-18和MobileNetV2上分别达到65%和48%的准确率，使用权重INT2和激活INT4量化。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出了一种更为受限但硬件友好的Power-of-Two量化方案，并证明其在低比特后训练量化中可以达到与当前最优方法相近的精度。

Power-of-Two quantization can convert the multiplication introduced by quantization and dequantization to bit-shift that is adopted by many efficient accelerators. However, the Power-of-Two scale factors have fewer candidate values, which leads to more rounding or clipping errors. We propose a novel Power-of-Two PTQ framework, dubbed RAPQ, which dynamically adjusts the Power-of-Two scales of the whole network instead of statically determining them layer by layer. It can theoretically trade off the rounding error and clipping error of the whole network. Meanwhile, the reconstruction method in RAPQ is based on the BN information of every unit. Extensive experiments on ImageNet prove the excellent performance of our proposed method. Without bells and whistles, RAPQ can reach accuracy of 65% and 48% on ResNet-18 and MobileNetV2 respectively with weight INT2 activation INT4. We are the first to propose the more constrained but hardware-friendly Power-of-Two quantization scheme for low-bit PTQ specially and prove that it can achieve nearly the same accuracy as SOTA PTQ method. title: Evaluating the Quality of a Synthesized Motion with the Fréchet Motion Distance
title_zh: 使用 Fréchet 运动距离评估合成运动的质量
abstract: Evaluating the Quality of a Synthesized Motion with the Fréchet Motion Distance
summary: Evaluating the Quality of a Synthesized Motion with the Fréchet Motion Distance
abstract_zh: 使用 Fréchet 运动距离评估合成运动的质量

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fréchet Motion Distance（FMD）的新指标，用于评估合成运动的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有运动合成质量评估方法存在局限性，缺乏能够全面反映运动特征分布差异的客观指标。
AI.method: 基于Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）框架，通过提取运动特征的高维分布并计算真实运动与合成运动间的分布距离来评估质量。
AI.result: 实验表明FMD在多个运动数据集上能有效区分高质量与低质量合成运动，且与人类主观评价具有较高相关性。
AI.conclusion: Fréchet Motion Distance为运动合成领域的质量评估提供了新的客观量化标准。

title: Supervised Attention in Sequence-to-Sequence Models for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 语音识别序列到序列模型中的监督注意力
abstract: Attention mechanism in sequence-to-sequence models is designed to model the alignments between acoustic features and output tokens in speech recognition. However, attention weights produced by models trained end to end do not always correspond well with actual alignments, and several studies have further argued that attention weights might not even correspond well with the relevance attribution of frames. Regardless, visual similarity between attention weights and alignments is widely used during training as an indicator of the models quality. In this paper, we treat the correspondence between attention weights and alignments as a learning problem by imposing a supervised attention loss. Experiments have shown significant improved performance, suggesting that learning the alignments well during training critically determines the performance of sequence-to-sequence models.
summary: Attention mechanism in sequence-to-sequence models is designed to model the alignments between acoustic features and output tokens in speech recognition. However, attention weights produced by models trained end to end do not always correspond well with actual alignments, and several studies have further argued that attention weights might not even correspond well with the relevance attribution of frames. Regardless, visual similarity between attention weights and alignments is widely used during training as an indicator of the models quality. In this paper, we treat the correspondence between attention weights and alignments as a learning problem by imposing a supervised attention loss. Experiments have shown significant improved performance, suggesting that learning the alignments well during training critically determines the performance of sequence-to-sequence models.
abstract_zh: 序列到序列模型中的注意力机制旨在对语音识别中的声学特征和输出标记之间的对齐进行建模。然而，端到端训练的模型产生的注意力权重并不总是与实际对齐很好地对应，并且一些研究进一步认为，注意力权重甚至可能与帧的相关性属性不太对应。无论如何，注意力权重和对齐之间的视觉相似性在训练过程中被广泛用作模型质量的指标。在本文中，我们通过施加监督注意力损失，将注意力权重和对齐之间的对应关系视为学习问题。实验表明性能显着提高，这表明在训练期间良好地学习比对至关重要地决定了序列到序列模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在序列到序列语音识别模型中引入监督注意力机制，通过学习对齐关系提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端模型生成的注意力权重与实际语音帧对齐关系不一致，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 将注意力权重与对齐关系的对应关系建模为学习问题，引入监督注意力损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明模型性能显著提升，验证了准确学习对齐关系对序列到序列模型的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 在训练过程中精确建模注意力权重与对齐关系，是提升语音识别模型性能的关键因素。

Regardless, visual similarity between attention weights and alignments is widely used during training as an indicator of the models quality. In this paper, we treat the correspondence between attention weights and alignments as a learning problem by imposing a supervised attention loss. Experiments have shown significant improved performance, suggesting that learning the alignments well during training critically determines the performance of sequence-to-sequence models. 序列到序列模型中的注意力机制旨在对语音识别中的声学特征和输出标记之间的对齐进行建模。然而，端到端训练的模型产生的注意力权重并不总是与实际对齐很好地对应，并且一些研究进一步认为，注意力权重甚至可能与帧的相关性属性不太对应。无论如何，注意力权重和对齐之间的视觉相似性在训练过程中被广泛用作模型质量的指标。在本文中，我们通过施加监督注意力损失，将注意力权重和对齐之间的对应关系视为学习问题。实验表明性能显着提高，这表明在训练期间良好地学习比对至关重要地决定了序列到序列模型的性能。 本文提出在序列到序列语音识别模型中引入监督注意力机制，通过学习对齐关系提升模型性能。 Gene-Ping Yang,Hao Tang eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: Designing Perceptual Puzzles by Differentiating Probabilistic Programs
title_zh: 通过区分概率程序来设计感知谜题
abstract: We design new visual illusions by finding "adversarial examples" for principled models of human perception -- specifically, for probabilistic models, which treat vision as Bayesian inference. To perform this search efficiently, we design a differentiable probabilistic programming language, whose API exposes MCMC inference as a first-class differentiable function. We demonstrate our method by automatically creating illusions for three features of human vision: color constancy, size constancy, and face perception.
summary: We design new visual illusions by finding "adversarial examples" for principled models of human perception -- specifically, for probabilistic models, which treat vision as Bayesian inference. To perform this search efficiently, we design a differentiable probabilistic programming language, whose API exposes MCMC inference as a first-class differentiable function. We demonstrate our method by automatically creating illusions for three features of human vision: color constancy, size constancy, and face perception.
abstract_zh: 我们通过为人类感知的原则模型寻找“对抗性例子”来设计新的视觉错觉——特别是概率模型，它将视觉视为贝叶斯推理。为了有效地执行这种搜索，我们设计了一种可微的概率编程语言，其 API 将 MCMC 推理公开为一流的可微函数。我们通过自动为人类视觉的三个特征创建幻觉来演示我们的方法：颜色恒定性、尺寸恒定性和面部感知。

AI.tldr: 通过可微概率编程语言设计视觉错觉
AI.motivation: 探索人类感知机制并生成对抗样例以测试概率模型
AI.method: 开发可微概率编程语言，将MCMC推理作为可微函数集成
AI.result: 成功生成颜色恒常性、尺寸恒常性和面部感知的视觉错觉
AI.conclusion: 方法有效，展示了概率模型在感知研究中的潜力

title: Unified GCNs: Towards Connecting GCNs with CNNs
title_zh: 统一 GCN：连接 GCN 与 CNN
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have been widely demonstrated their powerful ability in graph data representation and learning. Existing graph convolution layers are mainly designed based on graph signal processing and transform aspect which usually suffer from some limitations, such as over-smoothing, over-squashing and non-robustness, etc. As we all know that Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) have received great success in many computer vision and machine learning. One main aspect is that CNNs leverage many learnable convolution filters (kernels) to obtain rich feature descriptors and thus can have high capacity to encode complex patterns in visual data analysis. Also, CNNs are flexible in designing their network architecture, such as MobileNet, ResNet, Xception, etc. Therefore, it is natural to arise a question: can we design graph convolutional layer as flexibly as that in CNNs? Innovatively, in this paper, we consider connecting GCNs with CNNs deeply from a general perspective of depthwise separable convolution operation. Specifically, we show that GCN and GAT indeed perform some specific depthwise separable convolution operations. This novel interpretation enables us to better understand the connections between GCNs (GCN, GAT) and CNNs and further inspires us to design more Unified GCNs (UGCNs). As two showcases, we implement two UGCNs, i.e., Separable UGCN (S-UGCN) and General UGCN (G-UGCN) for graph data representation and learning. Promising experiments on several graph representation benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed UGCNs.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have been widely demonstrated their powerful ability in graph data representation and learning. Existing graph convolution layers are mainly designed based on graph signal processing and transform aspect which usually suffer from some limitations, such as over-smoothing, over-squashing and non-robustness, etc. As we all know that Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) have received great success in many computer vision and machine learning. One main aspect is that CNNs leverage many learnable convolution filters (kernels) to obtain rich feature descriptors and thus can have high capacity to encode complex patterns in visual data analysis. Also, CNNs are flexible in designing their network architecture, such as MobileNet, ResNet, Xception, etc. Therefore, it is natural to arise a question: can we design graph convolutional layer as flexibly as that in CNNs? Innovatively, in this paper, we consider connecting GCNs with CNNs deeply from a general perspective of depthwise separable convolution operation. Specifically, we show that GCN and GAT indeed perform some specific depthwise separable convolution operations. This novel interpretation enables us to better understand the connections between GCNs (GCN, GAT) and CNNs and further inspires us to design more Unified GCNs (UGCNs). As two showcases, we implement two UGCNs, i.e., Separable UGCN (S-UGCN) and General UGCN (G-UGCN) for graph data representation and learning. Promising experiments on several graph representation benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed UGCNs.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）已被广泛展示其在图数据表示和学习方面的强大能力。现有的图卷积层主要基于图信号处理和变换方面进行设计，通常存在一些局限性，例如过度平滑、过度挤压和非鲁棒性等。众所周知，卷积神经网络（CNN）在许多计算机视觉和机器学习领域取得了巨大成功。一个主要方面是 CNN 利用许多可学习的卷积滤波器（内核）来获取丰富的特征描述符，因此可以在视觉数据分析中具有对复杂模式进行编码的高能力。此外，CNN在设计网络架构方面也很灵活，例如MobileNet、ResNet、Xception等。因此，很自然地出现一个问题：我们可以像CNN一样灵活地设计图卷积层吗？创新的是，在本文中，我们从深度可分离卷积运算的一般角度考虑将 GCN 与 CNN 深度连接。具体来说，我们表明 GCN 和 GAT 确实执行了一些特定的深度可分离卷积操作。这种新颖的解释使我们能够更好地理解 GCN（GCN、GAT）和 CNN 之间的联系，并进一步启发我们设计更多的统一 GCN（UGCN）。作为两个展示，我们实现了两个 UGCN，即用于图数据表示和学习的可分离 UGCN (S-UGCN) 和通用 UGCN (G-UGCN)。在几个图表示基准上进行的有希望的实验证明了所提出的 UGCN 的有效性和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一图卷积网络（UGCNs），通过深度可分离卷积操作将图卷积网络（GCNs）与卷积神经网络（CNNs）连接，以提升图数据表示和学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GCNs存在过度平滑、过度压缩和鲁棒性不足等局限，而CNNs凭借可学习卷积核和灵活架构在视觉任务中表现优异，因此需探索将CNNs灵活性引入GCNs的设计方法。
AI.method: 从深度可分离卷积角度重新诠释GCN和GAT，将其视为特定深度可分离卷积操作，进而设计出分离式UGCN（S-UGCN）和通用式UGCN（G-UGCN）架构。
AI.result: 在多个图表示基准数据集上实验表明，UGCNs在保持图结构信息的同时提升了特征表达能力，验证了方法的有效性和优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过深度可分离卷积视角建立GCNs与CNNs的联系，为设计灵活高效的图卷积层提供了新思路，并展示了UGCNs在图数据学习中的潜力。

title: Linear TDOA-based Measurements for Distributed Estimation and Localized Tracking
title_zh: 基于线性 TDOA 的分布式估计和局部跟踪测量
abstract: We propose a linear time-difference-of-arrival (TDOA) measurement model to improve \textit{distributed} estimation performance for localized target tracking. We design distributed filters over sparse (possibly large-scale) communication networks using consensus-based data-fusion techniques. The proposed distributed and localized tracking protocols considerably reduce the sensor network's required connectivity and communication rate. We, further, consider $κ$-redundant observability and fault-tolerant design in case of losing communication links or sensor nodes. We present the minimal conditions on the remaining sensor network (after link/node removal) such that the distributed observability is still preserved and, thus, the sensor network can track the (single) maneuvering target. The motivation is to reduce the communication load versus the processing load, as the computational units are, in general, less costly than the communication devices. We evaluate the tracking performance via simulations in MATLAB.
summary: We propose a linear time-difference-of-arrival (TDOA) measurement model to improve \textit{distributed} estimation performance for localized target tracking. We design distributed filters over sparse (possibly large-scale) communication networks using consensus-based data-fusion techniques. The proposed distributed and localized tracking protocols considerably reduce the sensor network's required connectivity and communication rate. We, further, consider $κ$-redundant observability and fault-tolerant design in case of losing communication links or sensor nodes. We present the minimal conditions on the remaining sensor network (after link/node removal) such that the distributed observability is still preserved and, thus, the sensor network can track the (single) maneuvering target. The motivation is to reduce the communication load versus the processing load, as the computational units are, in general, less costly than the communication devices. We evaluate the tracking performance via simulations in MATLAB.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种线性到达时间差（TDOA）测量模型来提高局部目标跟踪的分布式估计性能。我们使用基于共识的数据融合技术在稀疏（可能是大规模）通信网络上设计分布式滤波器。所提出的分布式和本地化跟踪协议大大降低了传感器网络所需的连接性和通信速率。我们进一步考虑在丢失通信链路或传感器节点的情况下的冗余可观测性和容错设计。我们提出了剩余传感器网络（链路/节点移除后）的最小条件，使得分布式可观测性仍然保留，因此传感器网络可以跟踪（单个）机动目标。动机是减少通信负载与处理负载的关系，因为计算单元通常比通信设备成本更低。我们通过 MATLAB 中的模拟来评估跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性到达时间差（TDOA）的测量模型，用于改进分布式估计性能，实现局部化目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 为降低通信负载与计算负载的不平衡，因通信设备通常比计算单元更昂贵，需优化传感器网络的连接性和冗余性。
AI.method: 设计基于共识的数据融合技术的分布式滤波器，结合κ-冗余可观测性与容错机制，确保网络节点/链路失效后仍可保持可观测性。
AI.result: 通过MATLAB仿真验证，所提方法在降低通信速率和网络连接需求的同时，仍能有效跟踪单个机动目标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少通信开销的同时保持跟踪精度，适用于大规模稀疏通信网络的分布式目标跟踪场景。

ai_content_json.result: 通过MATLAB仿真验证，所提方法在降低通信速率和网络连接需求的同时，仍能有效跟踪单个机动目标。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法在减少通信开销的同时保持跟踪精度，适用于大规模稀疏通信网络的分布式目标跟踪场景。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性到达时间差（TDOA）的测量模型，用于改进分布式估计性能，实现局部化目标跟踪。
motivation: 为降低通信负载与计算负载的不平衡，因通信设备通常比计算单元更昂贵，需优化传感器网络的连接性和冗余性。
method: 设计基于共识的数据融合技术的分布式滤波器，结合κ-冗余可观测性与容错机制，确保网络节点/链路失效后仍可保持可观测性。
result: 通过MATLAB仿真验证，所提方法在降低通信速率和网络连接需求的同时，仍能有效跟踪单个机动目标。
conclusion: 该方法在减少通信开销的同时保持跟踪精度，适用于大规模稀疏通信网络的分布式目标跟踪场景。
search_text: Linear TDOA-based Measurements for Distributed Estimation and Localized Tracking 基于线性 TDOA 的分布式估计和局部跟踪测量 We propose a linear time-difference-of-arrival (TDOA) measurement model to improve \textit{distributed} estimation performance for localized target tracking. We design distributed filters over sparse (possibly large-scale) communication networks using consensus-based data-fusion techniques. The proposed distributed and localized tracking protocols considerably reduce the sensor network's required connectivity and communication rate. We, further, consider $κ$-redundant observability and fault-tolerant design in case of losing communication links or sensor nodes. We present the minimal conditions on the remaining sensor network (after link/node removal) such that the distributed observability is still preserved and, thus, the sensor network can track the (single) maneuvering target. The motivation is to reduce the communication load versus the processing load, as the computational units are, in general, less costly than the communication devices. We evaluate the tracking performance via simulations in MATLAB. 我们提出了一种线性到达时间差（TDOA）测量模型来提高局部目标跟踪的分布式估计性能。我们使用基于共识的数据融合技术在稀疏（可能是大规模）通信网络上设计分布式滤波器。所提出的分布式和本地化跟踪协议大大降低了传感器网络所需的连接性和通信速率。我们进一步考虑在丢失通信链路或传感器节点的情况下的冗余可观测性和容错设计。我们提出了剩余传感器网络（链路/节点移除后）的最小条件，使得分布式可观测性仍然保留，因此传感器网络可以跟踪（单个）机动目标。动机是减少通信负载与处理负载的关系，因为计算单元通常比通信设备成本更低。我们通过 MATLAB 中的模拟来评估跟踪性能。 本文提出一种基于线性到达时间差（TDOA）的测量模型，用于改进分布式估计性能，实现局部化目标跟踪。 Mohammadreza Doostmohammadian,Themistoklis Charalambous eess.SY,cs.MA,cs.RO,eess.SP,math.DS

authors_text: Amin Abdollahi Dehkordi,Mina Hashemi,Mehdi Neshat,Seyedali Mirjalili,Ali Safaa Sadiq
title: Brain Tumor Detection and Classification Using a New Evolutionary Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用新的进化卷积神经网络进行脑肿瘤检测和分类
abstract: A definitive diagnosis of a brain tumour is essential for enhancing treatment success and patient survival. However, it is difficult to manually evaluate multiple magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images generated in a clinic. Therefore, more precise computer-based tumour detection methods are required. In recent years, many efforts have investigated classical machine learning methods to automate this process. Deep learning techniques have recently sparked interest as a means of diagnosing brain tumours more accurately and robustly. The goal of this study, therefore, is to employ brain MRI images to distinguish between healthy and unhealthy patients (including tumour tissues). As a result, an enhanced convolutional neural network is developed in this paper for accurate brain image classification. The enhanced convolutional neural network structure is composed of components for feature extraction and optimal classification. Nonlinear Lévy Chaotic Moth Flame Optimizer (NLCMFO) optimizes hyperparameters for training convolutional neural network layers. Using the BRATS 2015 data set and brain image datasets from Harvard Medical School, the proposed model is assessed and compared with various optimization techniques. The optimized CNN model outperforms other models from the literature by providing 97.4% accuracy, 96.0% sensitivity, 98.6% specificity, 98.4% precision, and 96.6% F1-score, (the mean of the weighted harmonic value of CNN precision and recall).
summary: A definitive diagnosis of a brain tumour is essential for enhancing treatment success and patient survival. However, it is difficult to manually evaluate multiple magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images generated in a clinic. Therefore, more precise computer-based tumour detection methods are required. In recent years, many efforts have investigated classical machine learning methods to automate this process. Deep learning techniques have recently sparked interest as a means of diagnosing brain tumours more accurately and robustly. The goal of this study, therefore, is to employ brain MRI images to distinguish between healthy and unhealthy patients (including tumour tissues). As a result, an enhanced convolutional neural network is developed in this paper for accurate brain image classification. The enhanced convolutional neural network structure is composed of components for feature extraction and optimal classification. Nonlinear Lévy Chaotic Moth Flame Optimizer (NLCMFO) optimizes hyperparameters for training convolutional neural network layers. Using the BRATS 2015 data set and brain image datasets from Harvard Medical School, the proposed model is assessed and compared with various optimization techniques. The optimized CNN model outperforms other models from the literature by providing 97.4% accuracy, 96.0% sensitivity, 98.6% specificity, 98.4% precision, and 96.6% F1-score, (the mean of the weighted harmonic value of CNN precision and recall).
abstract_zh: 脑肿瘤的明确诊断对于提高治疗成功率和患者生存率至关重要。然而，手动评估临床中生成的多幅磁共振成像（MRI）图像很困难。因此，需要更精确的基于计算机的肿瘤检测方法。近年来，许多人研究了经典的机器学习方法来自动化这一过程。深度学习技术作为一种更准确、更可靠地诊断脑肿瘤的方法，最近引起了人们的兴趣。因此，这项研究的目标是利用脑部 MRI 图像来区分健康和不健康的患者（包括肿瘤组织）。因此，本文开发了一种增强的卷积神经网络，用于准确的大脑图像分类。增强型卷积神经网络结构由特征提取和最优分类组件组成。非线性 Lévy Chaotic Moth Flame Optimizer (NLCMFO) 优化用于训练卷积神经网络层的超参数。使用 BRATS 2015 数据集和哈佛医学院的大脑图像数据集，对所提出的模型进行评估并与各种优化技术进行比较。优化后的 CNN 模型优于文献中的其他模型，准确度为 97.4%，灵敏度为 96.0%，特异性为 98.6%，精确度为 98.4%，F1 分数为 96.6%（CNN 精确度和召回率的加权调和值的平均值）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的卷积神经网络（CNN）用于脑肿瘤检测与分类，通过优化算法提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 手动评估临床磁共振成像（MRI）图像难度大，需更精确的计算机方法辅助诊断，以提高治疗成功率和患者生存率。
AI.method: 构建包含特征提取和分类组件的增强CNN，结合非线性Lévy混沌蛾群优化器（NLCMFO）优化超参数，并在BRATS 2015和哈佛医学院数据集上验证模型。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到97.4%准确率、96.0%灵敏度、98.6%特异性、98.4%精确率和96.6% F1分数，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过优化算法显著提升了脑肿瘤分类性能，验证了改进CNN结构与优化技术的有效性。

authors_text: Mirko Paolo Barbato,Paolo Napoletano,Flavio Piccoli,Raimondo Schettini
title: Unsupervised Segmentation of Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Images with Superpixels
title_zh: 高光谱遥感图像超像素无监督分割
abstract: In this paper, we propose an unsupervised method for hyperspectral remote sensing image segmentation. The method exploits the mean-shift clustering algorithm that takes as input a preliminary hyperspectral superpixels segmentation together with the spectral pixel information. The proposed method does not require the number of segmentation classes as input parameter, and it does not exploit any a-priori knowledge about the type of land-cover or land-use to be segmented (e.g. water, vegetation, building etc.). Experiments on Salinas, SalinasA, Pavia Center and Pavia University datasets are carried out. Performance are measured in terms of normalized mutual information, adjusted Rand index and F1-score. Results demonstrate the validity of the proposed method in comparison with the state of the art.
summary: In this paper, we propose an unsupervised method for hyperspectral remote sensing image segmentation. The method exploits the mean-shift clustering algorithm that takes as input a preliminary hyperspectral superpixels segmentation together with the spectral pixel information. The proposed method does not require the number of segmentation classes as input parameter, and it does not exploit any a-priori knowledge about the type of land-cover or land-use to be segmented (e.g. water, vegetation, building etc.). Experiments on Salinas, SalinasA, Pavia Center and Pavia University datasets are carried out. Performance are measured in terms of normalized mutual information, adjusted Rand index and F1-score. Results demonstrate the validity of the proposed method in comparison with the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱遥感图像分割的无监督方法。该方法利用均值漂移聚类算法，该算法将初步的高光谱超像素分割以及光谱像素信息作为输入。所提出的方法不需要分割类别的数量作为输入参数，并且它不利用任何关于要分割的土地覆盖或土地利用类型的先验知识（例如水、植被、建筑物等）。在 Salinas、SalinasA、Pavia Center 和 Pavia University 数据集上进行了实验。性能通过标准化互信息、调整兰德指数和 F1 分数来衡量。结果证明了所提出方法与现有技术相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验知识和类别数输入的高光谱遥感图像无监督分割方法，结合超像素与光谱信息进行均值漂移聚类。
AI.motivation: 传统高光谱图像分割方法依赖先验知识或类别数量参数，限制了实际应用的灵活性。
AI.method: 采用均值漂移聚类算法，以超像素分割结果和光谱像素信息为输入，无需指定分割类别数及土地覆盖类型先验知识。
AI.result: 在Salinas、Pavia等数据集上通过归一化互信息、调整兰德指数和F1-score验证，分割效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无监督场景下实现了高光谱图像的有效分割，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mengmeng Xu,Erhan Gundogdu,Maksim Lapin,Bernard Ghanem,Michael Donoser,Loris Bazzani
title: Contrastive Language-Action Pre-training for Temporal Localization
title_zh: 时间定位的对比语言动作预训练
abstract: Long-form video understanding requires designing approaches that are able to temporally localize activities or language. End-to-end training for such tasks is limited by the compute device memory constraints and lack of temporal annotations at large-scale. These limitations can be addressed by pre-training on large datasets of temporally trimmed videos supervised by class annotations. Once the video encoder is pre-trained, it is common practice to freeze it during fine-tuning. Therefore, the video encoder does not learn temporal boundaries and unseen classes, causing a domain gap with respect to the downstream tasks. Moreover, using temporally trimmed videos prevents to capture the relations between different action categories and the background context in a video clip which results in limited generalization capacity. To address these limitations, we propose a novel post-pre-training approach without freezing the video encoder which leverages language. We introduce a masked contrastive learning loss to capture visio-linguistic relations between activities, background video clips and language in the form of captions. Our experiments show that the proposed approach improves the state-of-the-art on temporal action localization, few-shot temporal action localization, and video language grounding tasks.
summary: Long-form video understanding requires designing approaches that are able to temporally localize activities or language. End-to-end training for such tasks is limited by the compute device memory constraints and lack of temporal annotations at large-scale. These limitations can be addressed by pre-training on large datasets of temporally trimmed videos supervised by class annotations. Once the video encoder is pre-trained, it is common practice to freeze it during fine-tuning. Therefore, the video encoder does not learn temporal boundaries and unseen classes, causing a domain gap with respect to the downstream tasks. Moreover, using temporally trimmed videos prevents to capture the relations between different action categories and the background context in a video clip which results in limited generalization capacity. To address these limitations, we propose a novel post-pre-training approach without freezing the video encoder which leverages language. We introduce a masked contrastive learning loss to capture visio-linguistic relations between activities, background video clips and language in the form of captions. Our experiments show that the proposed approach improves the state-of-the-art on temporal action localization, few-shot temporal action localization, and video language grounding tasks.
abstract_zh: 长视频理解需要设计能够暂时本地化活动或语言的方法。此类任务的端到端训练受到计算设备内存限制和缺乏大规模时间注释的限制。这些限制可以通过对由类注释监督的时间修剪视频的大型数据集进行预训练来解决。一旦视频编码器经过预训练，通常的做法是在微调期间冻结它。因此，视频编码器不会学习时间边界和看不见的类，从而导致与下游任务的域差距。此外，使用时间修剪的视频无法捕获视频剪辑中不同动作类别和背景上下文之间的关系，这导致泛化能力有限。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的后预训练方法，无需冻结利用语言的视频编码器。我们引入了一种掩蔽对比学习损失来捕捉活动、背景视频剪辑和字幕形式的语言之间的视觉语言关系。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法提高了时间动作定位、少镜头时间动作定位和视频语言基础任务的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比语言-动作预训练的时序定位方法，通过结合语言信息优化视频编码器的时序边界学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解方法因冻结预训练编码器导致时序边界学习不足，且使用裁剪视频无法捕捉动作间关系与背景上下文，造成领域差异和泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 设计不冻结视频编码器的后预训练框架，引入掩码对比学习损失函数，建立动作、背景视频片段与语言字幕的视觉-语言关联。
AI.result: 在时序动作定位、少样本定位及视频语言定位任务中均超越现有最优方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言引导的动态编码器训练有效弥合领域差异，提升了视频理解模型的时序定位精度与泛化能力。

search_text: Contrastive Language-Action Pre-training for Temporal Localization 时间定位的对比语言动作预训练 Long-form video understanding requires designing approaches that are able to temporally localize activities or language. End-to-end training for such tasks is limited by the compute device memory constraints and lack of temporal annotations at large-scale. These limitations can be addressed by pre-training on large datasets of temporally trimmed videos supervised by class annotations. Once the video encoder is pre-trained, it is common practice to freeze it during fine-tuning. Therefore, the video encoder does not learn temporal boundaries and unseen classes, causing a domain gap with respect to the downstream tasks. Moreover, using temporally trimmed videos prevents to capture the relations between different action categories and the background context in a video clip which results in limited generalization capacity. To address these limitations, we propose a novel post-pre-training approach without freezing the video encoder which leverages language. We introduce a masked contrastive learning loss to capture visio-linguistic relations between activities, background video clips and language in the form of captions. Our experiments show that the proposed approach improves the state-of-the-art on temporal action localization, few-shot temporal action localization, and video language grounding tasks. 长视频理解需要设计能够暂时本地化活动或语言的方法。此类任务的端到端训练受到计算设备内存限制和缺乏大规模时间注释的限制。这些限制可以通过对由类注释监督的时间修剪视频的大型数据集进行预训练来解决。一旦视频编码器经过预训练，通常的做法是在微调期间冻结它。因此，视频编码器不会学习时间边界和看不见的类，从而导致与下游任务的域差距。此外，使用时间修剪的视频无法捕获视频剪辑中不同动作类别和背景上下文之间的关系，这导致泛化能力有限。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的后预训练方法，无需冻结利用语言的视频编码器。我们引入了一种掩蔽对比学习损失来捕捉活动、背景视频剪辑和字幕形式的语言之间的视觉语言关系。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法提高了时间动作定位、少镜头时间动作定位和视频语言基础任务的最新技术。 本文提出一种基于对比语言-动作预训练的时序定位方法，通过结合语言信息优化视频编码器的时序边界学习能力。 Mengmeng Xu,Erhan Gundogdu,Maksim Lapin,Bernard Ghanem,Michael Donoser,Loris Bazzani cs.CV

authors_text: Barbara Cunha,Abdel-Malek Zine,Mohamed Ichchou,Christophe Droz,Stéphane Foulard
title: On Machine Learning-Driven Surrogates for Sound Transmission Loss Simulations
title_zh: 关于机器学习驱动的声音传输损失模拟替代品
abstract: Surrogate models are data-based approximations of computationally expensive simulations that enable efficient exploration of the model's design space and informed decision-making in many physical domains. The usage of surrogate models in the vibroacoustic domain, however, is challenging due to the non-smooth, complex behavior of wave phenomena. This paper investigates four Machine Learning (ML) approaches in the modelling of surrogates of Sound Transmission Loss (STL). Feature importance and feature engineering are used to improve the models' accuracy while increasing their interpretability and physical consistency. The transfer of the proposed techniques to other problems in the vibroacoustic domain and possible limitations of the models are discussed.
summary: Surrogate models are data-based approximations of computationally expensive simulations that enable efficient exploration of the model's design space and informed decision-making in many physical domains. The usage of surrogate models in the vibroacoustic domain, however, is challenging due to the non-smooth, complex behavior of wave phenomena. This paper investigates four Machine Learning (ML) approaches in the modelling of surrogates of Sound Transmission Loss (STL). Feature importance and feature engineering are used to improve the models' accuracy while increasing their interpretability and physical consistency. The transfer of the proposed techniques to other problems in the vibroacoustic domain and possible limitations of the models are discussed.
abstract_zh: 替代模型是计算成本高昂的模拟的基于数据的近似，可以有效地探索模型的设计空间并在许多物理领域做出明智的决策。然而，由于波现象的非平滑、复杂行为，在振动声学领域使用替代模型具有挑战性。本文研究了声音传输损失 (STL) 替代项建模中的四种机器学习 (ML) 方法。特征重要性和特征工程用于提高模型的准确性，同时提高模型的可解释性和物理一致性。讨论了所提出的技术向振动声学领域其他问题的转移以及模型可能的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用机器学习方法构建声学传输损失（STL）模拟的代理模型，以提高计算效率和模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统声学仿真计算成本高且难以处理波动现象的复杂性，而现有代理模型在声学领域的应用受限于非光滑行为和物理一致性不足。
AI.method: 采用四种机器学习方法，结合特征重要性分析和特征工程优化，提升模型精度与物理一致性，并探讨方法在声学领域的迁移性。
AI.result: 改进的代理模型在STL预测中展现出更高的准确性与可解释性，同时揭示了其在其他声学问题中的潜在应用及模型局限性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习驱动的代理模型可有效解决声学仿真挑战，但需进一步研究其在复杂物理场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Zheng Huang,Jing Ma,Yushun Dong,Natasha Zhang Foutz,Jundong Li
title: Empowering Next POI Recommendation with Multi-Relational Modeling
title_zh: 通过多关系建模支持下一代 POI 推荐
abstract: With the wide adoption of mobile devices and web applications, location-based social networks (LBSNs) offer large-scale individual-level location-related activities and experiences. Next point-of-interest (POI) recommendation is one of the most important tasks in LBSNs, aiming to make personalized recommendations of next suitable locations to users by discovering preferences from users' historical activities. Noticeably, LBSNs have offered unparalleled access to abundant heterogeneous relational information about users and POIs (including user-user social relations, such as families or colleagues; and user-POI visiting relations). Such relational information holds great potential to facilitate the next POI recommendation. However, most existing methods either focus on merely the user-POI visits, or handle different relations based on over-simplified assumptions while neglecting relational heterogeneities. To fill these critical voids, we propose a novel framework, MEMO, which effectively utilizes the heterogeneous relations with a multi-network representation learning module, and explicitly incorporates the inter-temporal user-POI mutual influence with the coupled recurrent neural networks. Extensive experiments on real-world LBSN data validate the superiority of our framework over the state-of-the-art next POI recommendation methods.
summary: With the wide adoption of mobile devices and web applications, location-based social networks (LBSNs) offer large-scale individual-level location-related activities and experiences. Next point-of-interest (POI) recommendation is one of the most important tasks in LBSNs, aiming to make personalized recommendations of next suitable locations to users by discovering preferences from users' historical activities. Noticeably, LBSNs have offered unparalleled access to abundant heterogeneous relational information about users and POIs (including user-user social relations, such as families or colleagues; and user-POI visiting relations). Such relational information holds great potential to facilitate the next POI recommendation. However, most existing methods either focus on merely the user-POI visits, or handle different relations based on over-simplified assumptions while neglecting relational heterogeneities. To fill these critical voids, we propose a novel framework, MEMO, which effectively utilizes the heterogeneous relations with a multi-network representation learning module, and explicitly incorporates the inter-temporal user-POI mutual influence with the coupled recurrent neural networks. Extensive experiments on real-world LBSN data validate the superiority of our framework over the state-of-the-art next POI recommendation methods.
abstract_zh: 随着移动设备和 Web 应用程序的广泛采用，基于位置的社交网络 (LBSN) 提供大规模的个人级别的位置相关活动和体验。下一个兴趣点（POI）推荐是LBSN中最重要的任务之一，旨在通过从用户的历史活动中发现偏好，向用户个性化推荐下一个合适的位置。值得注意的是，LBSN 提供了对有关用户和 POI 的丰富异构关系信息（包括用户与用户的社会关系，例如家庭或同事；以及用户与 POI 访问关系）的无与伦比的访问。此类关系信息对于促进下一次 POI 推荐具有巨大的潜力。然而，大多数现有方法要么仅仅关注用户 POI 访问，要么基于过于简化的假设来处理不同的关系，而忽略了关系异质性。为了填补这些关键空白，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 MEMO，它有效地利用多网络表示学习模块的异构关系，并明确地将跨时用户 POI 相互影响与耦合的循环神经网络结合起来。对真实世界 LBSN 数据的大量实验验证了我们的框架相对于最先进的下一代 POI 推荐方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多关系建模的下一兴趣点（POI）推荐框架MEMO，以提升位置社交网络中的个性化推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注用户-POI访问关系或过度简化异构关系，未能充分利用位置社交网络中用户-用户社交关系和用户-POI访问关系等多源异构信息。
AI.method: 设计多网络表示学习模块处理异构关系，并通过耦合循环神经网络显式建模用户-POI的时序互影响。
AI.result: 在真实世界LBSN数据集上验证了MEMO框架优于现有最先进方法的推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效融合多源异构关系和时序动态影响，MEMO框架显著提升了下一POI推荐的准确性与个性化水平。

result: 在真实世界LBSN数据集上验证了MEMO框架优于现有最先进方法的推荐性能。
conclusion: 通过有效融合多源异构关系和时序动态影响，MEMO框架显著提升了下一POI推荐的准确性与个性化水平。
search_text: Empowering Next POI Recommendation with Multi-Relational Modeling 通过多关系建模支持下一代 POI 推荐 With the wide adoption of mobile devices and web applications, location-based social networks (LBSNs) offer large-scale individual-level location-related activities and experiences. Next point-of-interest (POI) recommendation is one of the most important tasks in LBSNs, aiming to make personalized recommendations of next suitable locations to users by discovering preferences from users' historical activities. Noticeably, LBSNs have offered unparalleled access to abundant heterogeneous relational information about users and POIs (including user-user social relations, such as families or colleagues; and user-POI visiting relations). Such relational information holds great potential to facilitate the next POI recommendation. However, most existing methods either focus on merely the user-POI visits, or handle different relations based on over-simplified assumptions while neglecting relational heterogeneities. To fill these critical voids, we propose a novel framework, MEMO, which effectively utilizes the heterogeneous relations with a multi-network representation learning module, and explicitly incorporates the inter-temporal user-POI mutual influence with the coupled recurrent neural networks. Extensive experiments on real-world LBSN data validate the superiority of our framework over the state-of-the-art next POI recommendation methods. 随着移动设备和 Web 应用程序的广泛采用，基于位置的社交网络 (LBSN) 提供大规模的个人级别的位置相关活动和体验。下一个兴趣点（POI）推荐是LBSN中最重要的任务之一，旨在通过从用户的历史活动中发现偏好，向用户个性化推荐下一个合适的位置。值得注意的是，LBSN 提供了对有关用户和 POI 的丰富异构关系信息（包括用户与用户的社会关系，例如家庭或同事；以及用户与 POI 访问关系）的无与伦比的访问。此类关系信息对于促进下一次 POI 推荐具有巨大的潜力。然而，大多数现有方法要么仅仅关注用户 POI 访问，要么基于过于简化的假设来处理不同的关系，而忽略了关系异质性。为了填补这些关键空白，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 MEMO，它有效地利用多网络表示学习模块的异构关系，并明确地将跨时用户 POI 相互影响与耦合的循环神经网络结合起来。对真实世界 LBSN 数据的大量实验验证了我们的框架相对于最先进的下一代 POI 推荐方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于多关系建模的下一兴趣点（POI）推荐框架MEMO，以提升位置社交网络中的个性化推荐效果。 Zheng Huang,Jing Ma,Yushun Dong,Natasha Zhang Foutz,Jundong Li cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mahmudul Hasan,Jakub R. Kaczmarzyk,David Paredes,Lyanne Oblein,Jaymie Oentoro,Shahira Abousamra,Michael Horowitz,Dimitris Samaras,Chao Chen,Tahsin Kurc,Kenneth R. Shroyer,Joel Saltz
title: A Novel Framework for Characterization of Tumor-Immune Spatial Relationships in Tumor Microenvironment
title_zh: 表征肿瘤微环境中肿瘤免疫空间关系的新框架
abstract: Understanding the impact of tumor biology on the composition of nearby cells often requires characterizing the impact of biologically distinct tumor regions. Biomarkers have been developed to label biologically distinct tumor regions, but challenges arise because of differences in the spatial extent and distribution of differentially labeled regions. In this work, we present a framework for systematically investigating the impact of distinct tumor regions on cells near the tumor borders, accounting their cross spatial distributions. We apply the framework to multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC) studies of pancreatic cancer and show its efficacy in demonstrating how biologically different tumor regions impact the immune response in the tumor microenvironment. Furthermore, we show that the proposed framework can be extended to largescale whole slide image analysis.
summary: Understanding the impact of tumor biology on the composition of nearby cells often requires characterizing the impact of biologically distinct tumor regions. Biomarkers have been developed to label biologically distinct tumor regions, but challenges arise because of differences in the spatial extent and distribution of differentially labeled regions. In this work, we present a framework for systematically investigating the impact of distinct tumor regions on cells near the tumor borders, accounting their cross spatial distributions. We apply the framework to multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC) studies of pancreatic cancer and show its efficacy in demonstrating how biologically different tumor regions impact the immune response in the tumor microenvironment. Furthermore, we show that the proposed framework can be extended to largescale whole slide image analysis.
abstract_zh: 了解肿瘤生物学对附近细胞组成的影响通常需要表征生物学上不同的肿瘤区域的影响。生物标记物已被开发用于标记生物学上不同的肿瘤区域，但由于差异标记区域的空间范围和分布的差异而出现了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，用于系统地研究不同肿瘤区域对肿瘤边界附近细胞的影响，并解释它们的跨空间分布。我们将该框架应用于胰腺癌的多重免疫组织化学 (mIHC) 研究，并展示了其在证明生物学上不同的肿瘤区域如何影响肿瘤微环境中的免疫反应方面的功效。此外，我们表明所提出的框架可以扩展到大规模整个幻灯片图像分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，用于系统分析肿瘤微环境中不同肿瘤区域对周围免疫细胞的空间影响。
AI.motivation: 现有生物标志物在标记肿瘤区域时存在空间分布差异，导致难以准确评估其对免疫微环境的影响。
AI.method: 开发基于空间分布分析的框架，结合多色免疫组化技术，量化肿瘤区域与免疫细胞的空间关系，并扩展至全切片图像分析。
AI.result: 框架有效揭示了胰腺癌中不同肿瘤区域对免疫反应的差异化影响，验证了其在大规模图像分析中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为解析肿瘤-免疫空间互作提供了新工具，有助于深入理解肿瘤微环境的异质性。

title: Data-Efficient Backdoor Attacks
title_zh: 数据高效的后门攻击
abstract: Recent studies have proven that deep neural networks are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Specifically, by mixing a small number of poisoned samples into the training set, the behavior of the trained model can be maliciously controlled. Existing attack methods construct such adversaries by randomly selecting some clean data from the benign set and then embedding a trigger into them. However, this selection strategy ignores the fact that each poisoned sample contributes inequally to the backdoor injection, which reduces the efficiency of poisoning. In this paper, we formulate improving the poisoned data efficiency by the selection as an optimization problem and propose a Filtering-and-Updating Strategy (FUS) to solve it. The experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-10 indicate that the proposed method is effective: the same attack success rate can be achieved with only 47% to 75% of the poisoned sample volume compared to the random selection strategy. More importantly, the adversaries selected according to one setting can generalize well to other settings, exhibiting strong transferability. The prototype code of our method is now available at https://github.com/xpf/Data-Efficient-Backdoor-Attacks.
summary: Recent studies have proven that deep neural networks are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Specifically, by mixing a small number of poisoned samples into the training set, the behavior of the trained model can be maliciously controlled. Existing attack methods construct such adversaries by randomly selecting some clean data from the benign set and then embedding a trigger into them. However, this selection strategy ignores the fact that each poisoned sample contributes inequally to the backdoor injection, which reduces the efficiency of poisoning. In this paper, we formulate improving the poisoned data efficiency by the selection as an optimization problem and propose a Filtering-and-Updating Strategy (FUS) to solve it. The experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-10 indicate that the proposed method is effective: the same attack success rate can be achieved with only 47% to 75% of the poisoned sample volume compared to the random selection strategy. More importantly, the adversaries selected according to one setting can generalize well to other settings, exhibiting strong transferability. The prototype code of our method is now available at https://github.com/xpf/Data-Efficient-Backdoor-Attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究证明深度神经网络很容易受到后门攻击。具体来说，通过将少量中毒样本混合到训练集中，可以恶意控制训练模型的行为。现有的攻击方法通过从良性集中随机选择一些干净的数据，然后将触发器嵌入其中来构建此类对手。然而，这种选择策略忽略了每个中毒样本对后门注入的贡献不均的事实，从而降低了中毒效率。在本文中，我们将通过选择来提高中毒数据效率作为优化问题，并提出过滤和更新策略（FUS）来解决它。在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-10上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法是有效的：与随机选择策略相比，仅需要47%至75%的中毒样本量即可实现相同的攻击成功率。更重要的是，根据一种设置选择的对手可以很好地推广到其他设置，表现出很强的可迁移性。我们方法的原型代码现在可以在 https://github.com/xpf/Data-Efficient-Backdoor-Attacks 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的数据投毒攻击方法，通过优化选择策略减少所需中毒样本数量。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击方法随机选择干净数据嵌入触发器，未考虑不同样本对攻击效果的贡献差异，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 将中毒样本选择建模为优化问题，提出过滤与更新策略（FUS），通过迭代筛选高价值样本提升攻击效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-10上实验表明，使用FUS可在仅需47%-75%中毒样本量时达到相同攻击成功率，且具有强跨设置迁移性。
AI.conclusion: FUS方法显著提升后门攻击的数据效率，验证了选择性优化策略的有效性，代码已开源验证方法可行性。

authors_text: Silvia Pagliarini,Sara Schneider,Christopher T. Kello,Anne S. Warlaumont
title: Low-dimensional representation of infant and adult vocalization acoustics
title_zh: 婴儿和成人发声声学的低维表示
abstract: During the first years of life, infant vocalizations change considerably, as infants develop the vocalization skills that enable them to produce speech sounds. Characterizations based on specific acoustic features, protophone categories, or phonetic transcription are able to provide a representation of the sounds infants make at different ages and in different contexts but do not fully describe how sounds are perceived by listeners, can be inefficient to obtain at large scales, and are difficult to visualize in two dimensions without additional statistical processing. Machine-learning-based approaches provide the opportunity to complement these characterizations with purely data-driven representations of infant sounds. Here, we use spectral features extraction and unsupervised machine learning, specifically Uniform Manifold Approximation (UMAP), to obtain a novel 2-dimensional spatial representation of infant and caregiver vocalizations extracted from day-long home recordings. UMAP yields a continuous and well-distributed space conducive to certain analyses of infant vocal development. For instance, we found that the dispersion of infant vocalization acoustics within the 2-D space over a day increased from 3 to 9 months, and then decreased from 9 to 18 months. The method also permits analysis of similarity between infant and adult vocalizations, which also shows changes with infant age.
summary: During the first years of life, infant vocalizations change considerably, as infants develop the vocalization skills that enable them to produce speech sounds. Characterizations based on specific acoustic features, protophone categories, or phonetic transcription are able to provide a representation of the sounds infants make at different ages and in different contexts but do not fully describe how sounds are perceived by listeners, can be inefficient to obtain at large scales, and are difficult to visualize in two dimensions without additional statistical processing. Machine-learning-based approaches provide the opportunity to complement these characterizations with purely data-driven representations of infant sounds. Here, we use spectral features extraction and unsupervised machine learning, specifically Uniform Manifold Approximation (UMAP), to obtain a novel 2-dimensional spatial representation of infant and caregiver vocalizations extracted from day-long home recordings. UMAP yields a continuous and well-distributed space conducive to certain analyses of infant vocal development. For instance, we found that the dispersion of infant vocalization acoustics within the 2-D space over a day increased from 3 to 9 months, and then decreased from 9 to 18 months. The method also permits analysis of similarity between infant and adult vocalizations, which also shows changes with infant age.
abstract_zh: 在生命的最初几年，婴儿的发声发生了很大的变化，因为婴儿发展了能够发出语音的发声技能。基于特定声学特征、原音类别或语音转录的表征能够提供婴儿在不同年龄和不同背景下发出的声音的表示，但不能完全描述听众如何感知声音，在大范围内获取声音的效率可能很低，并且在不进行额外统计处理的情况下很难在二维中可视化。基于机器学习的方法提供了用纯数据驱动的婴儿声音表示来补充这些特征的机会。在这里，我们使用频谱特征提取和无监督机器学习，特别是统一流形逼近（UMAP），来获得从全天家庭录音中提取的婴儿和护理人员发声的新颖的二维空间表示。 UMAP 产生连续且分布均匀的空间，有利于婴儿声音发育的某些分析。例如，我们发现婴儿发声声在二维空间内的分散度在一天内从 3 个月增加到 9 个月，然后从 9 个月减少到 18 个月。该方法还可以分析婴儿和成人发声之间的相似性，这也显示出随婴儿年龄的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习方法对婴儿和成人语音进行低维表示，以研究婴儿语音发展特征。
AI.motivation: 传统声学特征或语音转录方法难以全面描述声音感知、效率低且可视化困难，需数据驱动的新方法补充分析。
AI.method: 提取声谱特征并采用无监督机器学习方法（UMAP）生成婴儿及照顾者语音的二维空间表示。
AI.result: 发现婴儿语音在二维空间中的离散度3-9月增加、9-18月减少，且婴儿与成人语音相似性随年龄变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析婴儿语音发展及与成人语音的相似性提供了连续且可可视化的新型研究工具。

search_text: Low-dimensional representation of infant and adult vocalization acoustics 婴儿和成人发声声学的低维表示 During the first years of life, infant vocalizations change considerably, as infants develop the vocalization skills that enable them to produce speech sounds. Characterizations based on specific acoustic features, protophone categories, or phonetic transcription are able to provide a representation of the sounds infants make at different ages and in different contexts but do not fully describe how sounds are perceived by listeners, can be inefficient to obtain at large scales, and are difficult to visualize in two dimensions without additional statistical processing. Machine-learning-based approaches provide the opportunity to complement these characterizations with purely data-driven representations of infant sounds. Here, we use spectral features extraction and unsupervised machine learning, specifically Uniform Manifold Approximation (UMAP), to obtain a novel 2-dimensional spatial representation of infant and caregiver vocalizations extracted from day-long home recordings. UMAP yields a continuous and well-distributed space conducive to certain analyses of infant vocal development. For instance, we found that the dispersion of infant vocalization acoustics within the 2-D space over a day increased from 3 to 9 months, and then decreased from 9 to 18 months. The method also permits analysis of similarity between infant and adult vocalizations, which also shows changes with infant age. 在生命的最初几年，婴儿的发声发生了很大的变化，因为婴儿发展了能够发出语音的发声技能。基于特定声学特征、原音类别或语音转录的表征能够提供婴儿在不同年龄和不同背景下发出的声音的表示，但不能完全描述听众如何感知声音，在大范围内获取声音的效率可能很低，并且在不进行额外统计处理的情况下很难在二维中可视化。基于机器学习的方法提供了用纯数据驱动的婴儿声音表示来补充这些特征的机会。在这里，我们使用频谱特征提取和无监督机器学习，特别是统一流形逼近（UMAP），来获得从全天家庭录音中提取的婴儿和护理人员发声的新颖的二维空间表示。 UMAP 产生连续且分布均匀的空间，有利于婴儿声音发育的某些分析。例如，我们发现婴儿发声声在二维空间内的分散度在一天内从 3 个月增加到 9 个月，然后从 9 个月减少到 18 个月。该方法还可以分析婴儿和成人发声之间的相似性，这也显示出随婴儿年龄的变化。 本文利用机器学习方法对婴儿和成人语音进行低维表示，以研究婴儿语音发展特征。 Silvia Pagliarini,Sara Schneider,Christopher T. Kello,Anne S. Warlaumont eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Wendy Mendes,Albert Richard,Tähe-Kai Tillo,Gustavo Pinto,Kiev Gama,Alexander Nolte
title: Socio-technical constraints and affordances of virtual collaboration -- A study of four online hackathons
title_zh: 虚拟协作的社会技术限制和可供性——对四场在线黑客马拉松的研究
comment: Accepted in Proceedings of the ACM on Human Computer Interaction (CSCW'22)
comments: Accepted in Proceedings of the ACM on Human Computer Interaction (CSCW'22)
abstract: Hackathons and similar time-bounded events have become a popular form of collaboration. They are commonly organized as in-person events during which teams engage in intense collaboration over a short period of time to complete a project that is of interest to them. Most research to date has focused on studying how teams collaborate in a co-located setting, pointing towards the advantages of radical co-location. The global pandemic of 2020, however, has led to many hackathons moving online, which challenges our current understanding of how they function. In this paper, we address this gap by presenting findings from a multiple-case study of 10 hackathon teams that participated in 4 hackathons across two continents. By analyzing the collected data, we found that teams merged synchronous and asynchronous means of communication to maintain a common understanding of work progress as well as to maintain awareness of each other's tasks. Task division was self-assigned based on individual skills or interests, while leaders emerged from different strategies (e.g., participant experience, the responsibility of registering the team in an event). Some of the affordances of in-person hackathons, such as the radical co-location of team members, could be partially reproduced in teams that kept synchronous communication channels while working (i.e., shared audio territories), in a sort of "radical virtual co-location". However, others, such as interactions with other teams, easy access to mentors, and networking with other participants, decreased. In addition, the technical constraints of the different communication tools and platforms brought technical problems and were overwhelming to participants. Our work contributes to understanding the virtual collaboration of small teams in the context of online hackathons and how technologies and event structures proposed by organizers imply this collaboration.

Task division was self-assigned based on individual skills or interests, while leaders emerged from different strategies (e.g., participant experience, the responsibility of registering the team in an event). Some of the affordances of in-person hackathons, such as the radical co-location of team members, could be partially reproduced in teams that kept synchronous communication channels while working (i.e., shared audio territories), in a sort of "radical virtual co-location". However, others, such as interactions with other teams, easy access to mentors, and networking with other participants, decreased. In addition, the technical constraints of the different communication tools and platforms brought technical problems and were overwhelming to participants. abstract_zh: 黑客马拉松和类似的限时活动已成为一种流行的协作形式。它们通常被组织为面对面的活动，在此期间，团队在短时间内进行密切合作，以完成他们感兴趣的项目。迄今为止，大多数研究都集中在研究团队如何在同地办公环境中进行协作，指出激进的同地办公的优势。然而，2020 年的全球大流行导致许多黑客马拉松转移到线上，这挑战了我们目前对其运作方式的理解。在本文中，我们通过介绍对 10 个黑客马拉松团队进行的多案例研究的结果来解决这一差距，这些团队参加了横跨两大洲的 4 场黑客马拉松。通过分析收集到的数据，我们发现团队合并了同步和异步通信方式，以保持对工作进度的共同理解以及对彼此任务的了解。任务划分是根据个人技能或兴趣自行分配的，而领导者则根据不同的策略（例如参与者的经验、在活动中注册团队的责任）产生。现场黑客马拉松的一些功能，例如团队成员的激进共处一地，可以在工作时保持同步通信渠道（即共享音频区域）的团队中部分复制，以一种“激进的虚拟共处”的方式。然而，其他方面，例如与其他团队的互动、与导师的便捷联系以及与其他参与者的网络联系却有所减少。此外，不同通讯工具和平台的技术限制带来了技术问题，让参与者不知所措。我们的工作有助于理解在线黑客马拉松背景下小团队的虚拟协作，以及组织者提出的技术和活动结构如何意味着这种协作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线黑客松中虚拟协作的社会技术约束与可能性，通过分析四个在线黑客松中的10支团队，探讨其协作模式与挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统黑客松多为线下形式，但疫情导致大量活动转为线上，现有研究缺乏对虚拟协作机制的理解，需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用多案例研究方法，分析四个跨洲在线黑客松中10支团队的数据，关注沟通方式、任务分配、领导力形成及技术工具的影响。
AI.result: 团队混合使用同步与异步沟通维持协作，任务自行分配，领导力通过经验或责任产生。部分线下优势（如同步沟通）可虚拟实现，但跨团队互动与导师接触减少，技术工具的限制成为负担。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟协作需平衡技术工具与活动设计，同步沟通可部分替代线下共处，但需优化技术体验与社交机会以提升在线黑客松效果。

authors_text: Junghun Oh,Heewon Kim,Seungjun Nah,Cheeun Hong,Jonghyun Choi,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: Attentive Fine-Grained Structured Sparsity for Image Restoration
title_zh: 用于图像恢复的细致细粒度结构化稀疏性
abstract: Image restoration tasks have witnessed great performance improvement in recent years by developing large deep models. Despite the outstanding performance, the heavy computation demanded by the deep models has restricted the application of image restoration. To lift the restriction, it is required to reduce the size of the networks while maintaining accuracy. Recently, N:M structured pruning has appeared as one of the effective and practical pruning approaches for making the model efficient with the accuracy constraint. However, it fails to account for different computational complexities and performance requirements for different layers of an image restoration network. To further optimize the trade-off between the efficiency and the restoration accuracy, we propose a novel pruning method that determines the pruning ratio for N:M structured sparsity at each layer. Extensive experimental results on super-resolution and deblurring tasks demonstrate the efficacy of our method which outperforms previous pruning methods significantly. PyTorch implementation for the proposed methods is available at https://github.com/JungHunOh/SLS_CVPR2022.
summary: Image restoration tasks have witnessed great performance improvement in recent years by developing large deep models. Despite the outstanding performance, the heavy computation demanded by the deep models has restricted the application of image restoration. To lift the restriction, it is required to reduce the size of the networks while maintaining accuracy. Recently, N:M structured pruning has appeared as one of the effective and practical pruning approaches for making the model efficient with the accuracy constraint. However, it fails to account for different computational complexities and performance requirements for different layers of an image restoration network. To further optimize the trade-off between the efficiency and the restoration accuracy, we propose a novel pruning method that determines the pruning ratio for N:M structured sparsity at each layer. Extensive experimental results on super-resolution and deblurring tasks demonstrate the efficacy of our method which outperforms previous pruning methods significantly. PyTorch implementation for the proposed methods is available at https://github.com/JungHunOh/SLS_CVPR2022.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通过开发大型深度模型，图像恢复任务的性能得到了巨大的提高。尽管性能出色，但深层模型所需的大量计算限制了图像恢复的应用。为了解除限制，需要在保持准确性的同时减小网络的规模。最近，N:M 结构剪枝已成为一种有效且实用的剪枝方法，可在精度约束下使模型高效。然而，它未能考虑图像恢复网络不同层的不同计算复杂性和性能要求。为了进一步优化效率和恢复精度之间的权衡，我们提出了一种新颖的剪枝方法，该方法确定每层 N:M 结构稀疏性的剪枝比率。关于超分辨率和去模糊任务的大量实验结果证明了我们的方法的有效性，其显着优于以前的修剪方法。所提出方法的 PyTorch 实现可在 https://github.com/JungHunOh/SLS_CVPR2022 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种细粒度结构化稀疏性方法，通过动态调整各层剪枝比例，在保持图像修复精度的同时提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 现有N:M结构化剪枝方法未能考虑图像修复网络不同层的计算复杂度与性能需求差异，导致效率与精度难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的层自适应剪枝策略，为每个网络层独立确定最优N:M剪枝比例，实现细粒度结构化稀疏性优化。
AI.result: 在超分辨率和去模糊任务中显著优于现有剪枝方法，PyTorch实现代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过层级自适应剪枝有效平衡了模型效率与修复精度，为图像修复领域的模型压缩提供了新思路。
