search_text: Attentive Fine-Grained Structured Sparsity for Image Restoration 用于图像恢复的细致细粒度结构化稀疏性 Image restoration tasks have witnessed great performance improvement in recent years by developing large deep models. Despite the outstanding performance, the heavy computation demanded by the deep models has restricted the application of image restoration. To lift the restriction, it is required to reduce the size of the networks while maintaining accuracy. Recently, N:M structured pruning has appeared as one of the effective and practical pruning approaches for making the model efficient with the accuracy constraint. However, it fails to account for different computational complexities and performance requirements for different layers of an image restoration network. To further optimize the trade-off between the efficiency and the restoration accuracy, we propose a novel pruning method that determines the pruning ratio for N:M structured sparsity at each layer. Extensive experimental results on super-resolution and deblurring tasks demonstrate the efficacy of our method which outperforms previous pruning methods significantly. PyTorch implementation for the proposed methods is available at https://github.com/JungHunOh/SLS_CVPR2022. 近年来，通过开发大型深度模型，图像恢复任务的性能得到了巨大的提高。尽管性能出色，但深层模型所需的大量计算限制了图像恢复的应用。为了解除限制，需要在保持准确性的同时减小网络的规模。最近，N:M 结构剪枝已成为一种有效且实用的剪枝方法，可在精度约束下使模型高效。然而，它未能考虑图像恢复网络不同层的不同计算复杂性和性能要求。为了进一步优化效率和恢复精度之间的权衡，我们提出了一种新颖的剪枝方法，该方法确定每层 N:M 结构稀疏性的剪枝比率。关于超分辨率和去模糊任务的大量实验结果证明了我们的方法的有效性，其显着优于以前的修剪方法。所提出方法的 PyTorch 实现可在 https://github.com/JungHunOh/SLS_CVPR2022 上找到。 本文提出一种细粒度结构化稀疏性方法，通过动态调整各层剪枝比例，在保持图像修复精度的同时提升模型效率。 Junghun Oh,Heewon Kim,Seungjun Nah,Cheeun Hong,Jonghyun Choi,Kyoung Mu Lee cs.CV

title: Science Checker: Extractive-Boolean Question Answering For Scientific Fact Checking
title_zh: Science Checker：用于科学事实检查的提取布尔问答
abstract: With the explosive growth of scientific publications, making the synthesis of scientific knowledge and fact checking becomes an increasingly complex task. In this paper, we propose a multi-task approach for verifying the scientific questions based on a joint reasoning from facts and evidence in research articles. We propose an intelligent combination of (1) an automatic information summarization and (2) a Boolean Question Answering which allows to generate an answer to a scientific question from only extracts obtained after summarization. Thus on a given topic, our proposed approach conducts structured content modeling based on paper abstracts to answer a scientific question while highlighting texts from paper that discuss the topic. We based our final system on an end-to-end Extractive Question Answering (EQA) combined with a three outputs classification model to perform in-depth semantic understanding of a question to illustrate the aggregation of multiple responses. With our light and fast proposed architecture, we achieved an average error rate of 4% and a F1-score of 95.6%. Our results are supported via experiments with two QA models (BERT, RoBERTa) over 3 Million Open Access (OA) articles in the medical and health domains on Europe PMC.
summary: With the explosive growth of scientific publications, making the synthesis of scientific knowledge and fact checking becomes an increasingly complex task. In this paper, we propose a multi-task approach for verifying the scientific questions based on a joint reasoning from facts and evidence in research articles. We propose an intelligent combination of (1) an automatic information summarization and (2) a Boolean Question Answering which allows to generate an answer to a scientific question from only extracts obtained after summarization. Thus on a given topic, our proposed approach conducts structured content modeling based on paper abstracts to answer a scientific question while highlighting texts from paper that discuss the topic. We based our final system on an end-to-end Extractive Question Answering (EQA) combined with a three outputs classification model to perform in-depth semantic understanding of a question to illustrate the aggregation of multiple responses. With our light and fast proposed architecture, we achieved an average error rate of 4% and a F1-score of 95.6%. Our results are supported via experiments with two QA models (BERT, RoBERTa) over 3 Million Open Access (OA) articles in the medical and health domains on Europe PMC.
abstract_zh: 随着科学出版物的爆炸式增长，科学知识的综合和事实核查变得越来越复杂。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于研究文章中的事实和证据的联合推理来验证科学问题的多任务方法。我们提出了（1）自动信息摘要和（2）布尔问答的智能组合，它允许仅根据摘要后获得的摘录生成科学问题的答案。因此，对于给定的主题，我们提出的方法基于论文摘要进行结构化内容建模，以回答科学问题，同时突出显示讨论该主题的论文文本。我们的最终系统基于端到端提取问答（EQA），并结合三输出分类模型，对问题进行深入的语义理解，以说明多个响应的聚合。通过我们提出的轻量且快速的架构，我们实现了 4% 的平均错误率和 95.6% 的 F1 分数。我们的结果通过欧洲 PMC 上医疗和健康领域超过 300 万篇开放获取 (OA) 文章的两个 QA 模型（BERT、RoBERTa）实验得到支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合抽取式问答与布尔逻辑的科学事实核查系统，通过自动摘要与证据提取验证科学问题。
AI.motivation: 科学文献爆炸式增长导致知识综合与事实核查复杂化，传统方法难以高效处理大规模文献中的事实验证需求。
AI.method: 采用多任务框架，融合自动信息摘要与布尔问答技术，结合端到端抽取式问答模型及三输出分类器，实现基于论文摘要的结构化内容建模与多响应聚合。
AI.result: 在300万篇医学健康领域开放获取文献上，系统达到4%平均错误率和95.6% F1分数，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 轻量化架构在保持高精度的同时显著提升科学事实核查效率，为大规模学术文献验证提供可行方案。

title: Managing Reliability Skew in DNA Storage
title_zh: 管理 DNA 存储中的可靠性偏差
comment: In Proceedings of the International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA 2022)
comments: In Proceedings of the International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA 2022)
abstract: DNA is emerging as an increasingly attractive medium for data storage due to a number of important and unique advantages it offers, most notably the unprecedented durability and density. While the technology is evolving rapidly, the prohibitive cost of reads and writes, the high frequency and the peculiar nature of errors occurring in DNA storage pose a significant challenge to its adoption. In this work we make a novel observation that the probability of successful recovery of a given bit from any type of a DNA-based storage system highly depends on its physical location within the DNA molecule. In other words, when used as a storage medium, some parts of DNA molecules appear significantly more reliable than others. We show that large differences in reliability between different parts of DNA molecules lead to highly inefficient use of error-correction resources, and that commonly used techniques such as unequal error-correction cannot be used to bridge the reliability gap between different locations in the context of DNA storage. We then propose two approaches to address the problem. The first approach is general and applies to any types of data; it stripes the data and ECC codewords across DNA molecules in a particular fashion such that the effects of errors are spread out evenly across different codewords and molecules, effectively de-biasing the underlying storage medium. The second approach is application-specific, and seeks to leverage the underlying reliability bias by using application-aware mapping of data onto DNA molecules such that data that requires higher reliability is stored in more reliable locations, whereas data that needs lower reliability is stored in less reliable parts of DNA molecules. We show that the proposed data mapping can be used to achieve graceful degradation in the presence of high error rates, or to implement the concept of approximate storage in DNA.
summary: DNA is emerging as an increasingly attractive medium for data storage due to a number of important and unique advantages it offers, most notably the unprecedented durability and density. While the technology is evolving rapidly, the prohibitive cost of reads and writes, the high frequency and the peculiar nature of errors occurring in DNA storage pose a significant challenge to its adoption. In this work we make a novel observation that the probability of successful recovery of a given bit from any type of a DNA-based storage system highly depends on its physical location within the DNA molecule. In other words, when used as a storage medium, some parts of DNA molecules appear significantly more reliable than others. We show that large differences in reliability between different parts of DNA molecules lead to highly inefficient use of error-correction resources, and that commonly used techniques such as unequal error-correction cannot be used to bridge the reliability gap between different locations in the context of DNA storage. We then propose two approaches to address the problem. The first approach is general and applies to any types of data; it stripes the data and ECC codewords across DNA molecules in a particular fashion such that the effects of errors are spread out evenly across different codewords and molecules, effectively de-biasing the underlying storage medium. The second approach is application-specific, and seeks to leverage the underlying reliability bias by using application-aware mapping of data onto DNA molecules such that data that requires higher reliability is stored in more reliable locations, whereas data that needs lower reliability is stored in less reliable parts of DNA molecules. We show that the proposed data mapping can be used to achieve graceful degradation in the presence of high error rates, or to implement the concept of approximate storage in DNA.
abstract_zh: DNA 因其提供的许多重要且独特的优势，尤其是前所未有的耐用性和密度，正在成为一种越来越有吸引力的数据存储介质。虽然该技术正在迅速发展，但读取和写入的成本高昂、DNA 存储中发生错误的高频率和特殊性质对其采用构成了重大挑战。在这项工作中，我们进行了一项新颖的观察，即从任何类型的基于 DNA 的存储系统中成功恢复给定位的概率很大程度上取决于其在 DNA 分子中的物理位置。换句话说，当用作存储介质时，DNA 分子的某些部分看起来比其他部分更可靠。我们表明，DNA 分子不同部分之间可靠性的巨大差异导致纠错资源的使用效率极低，并且不等纠错等常用技术无法用来弥合 DNA 存储环境中不同位置之间的可靠性差距。然后我们提出两种方法来解决该问题。第一种方法是通用的，适用于任何类型的数据；它以特定的方式将数据和 ECC 码字跨 DNA 分子进行条带化，从而使错误的影响均匀地分布在不同的码字和分子上，从而有效地消除底层存储介质的偏差。第二种方法是特定于应用程序的，旨在通过使用应用程序感知的数据映射到 DNA 分子来利用潜在的可靠性偏差，以便需要更高可靠性的数据存储在更可靠的位置，而需要较低可靠性的数据存储在 DNA 分子的不太可靠的部分。我们表明，所提出的数据映射可用于在存在高错误率的情况下实现优雅的降级，或者实现 DNA 中近似存储的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何解决DNA存储中因分子不同位置可靠性差异导致的存储效率问题，提出两种方法优化纠错资源分配。
AI.motivation: DNA存储虽具高耐久性和密度优势，但其读写成本高、错误率高且现有纠错技术无法有效应对分子内可靠性差异，导致资源利用率低。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1）通用方法通过条带化分布数据和ECC码，均衡错误影响；2）应用特定方法根据数据可靠性需求，将数据映射到DNA分子不同可靠性区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法能有效缓解可靠性偏差问题，实现高错误率下的渐进式性能下降或近似存储。
AI.conclusion: 论文为DNA存储中的可靠性差异问题提供了创新解决方案，优化纠错资源使用，推动其实际应用可行性。

search_text: Managing Reliability Skew in DNA Storage 管理 DNA 存储中的可靠性偏差 DNA is emerging as an increasingly attractive medium for data storage due to a number of important and unique advantages it offers, most notably the unprecedented durability and density. While the technology is evolving rapidly, the prohibitive cost of reads and writes, the high frequency and the peculiar nature of errors occurring in DNA storage pose a significant challenge to its adoption. In this work we make a novel observation that the probability of successful recovery of a given bit from any type of a DNA-based storage system highly depends on its physical location within the DNA molecule. In other words, when used as a storage medium, some parts of DNA molecules appear significantly more reliable than others. We show that large differences in reliability between different parts of DNA molecules lead to highly inefficient use of error-correction resources, and that commonly used techniques such as unequal error-correction cannot be used to bridge the reliability gap between different locations in the context of DNA storage. We then propose two approaches to address the problem. The first approach is general and applies to any types of data; it stripes the data and ECC codewords across DNA molecules in a particular fashion such that the effects of errors are spread out evenly across different codewords and molecules, effectively de-biasing the underlying storage medium. The second approach is application-specific, and seeks to leverage the underlying reliability bias by using application-aware mapping of data onto DNA molecules such that data that requires higher reliability is stored in more reliable locations, whereas data that needs lower reliability is stored in less reliable parts of DNA molecules. We show that the proposed data mapping can be used to achieve graceful degradation in the presence of high error rates, or to implement the concept of approximate storage in DNA. DNA 因其提供的许多重要且独特的优势，尤其是前所未有的耐用性和密度，正在成为一种越来越有吸引力的数据存储介质。虽然该技术正在迅速发展，但读取和写入的成本高昂、DNA 存储中发生错误的高频率和特殊性质对其采用构成了重大挑战。在这项工作中，我们进行了一项新颖的观察，即从任何类型的基于 DNA 的存储系统中成功恢复给定位的概率很大程度上取决于其在 DNA 分子中的物理位置。换句话说，当用作存储介质时，DNA 分子的某些部分看起来比其他部分更可靠。我们表明，DNA 分子不同部分之间可靠性的巨大差异导致纠错资源的使用效率极低，并且不等纠错等常用技术无法用来弥合 DNA 存储环境中不同位置之间的可靠性差距。然后我们提出两种方法来解决该问题。第一种方法是通用的，适用于任何类型的数据；它以特定的方式将数据和 ECC 码字跨 DNA 分子进行条带化，从而使错误的影响均匀地分布在不同的码字和分子上，从而有效地消除底层存储介质的偏差。第二种方法是特定于应用程序的，旨在通过使用应用程序感知的数据映射到 DNA 分子来利用潜在的可靠性偏差，以便需要更高可靠性的数据存储在更可靠的位置，而需要较低可靠性的数据存储在 DNA 分子的不太可靠的部分。我们表明，所提出的数据映射可用于在存在高错误率的情况下实现优雅的降级，或者实现 DNA 中近似存储的概念。 本文研究如何解决DNA存储中因分子不同位置可靠性差异导致的存储效率问题，提出两种方法优化纠错资源分配。 Dehui Lin,Yasamin Tabatabaee,Yash Pote,Djordje Jevdjic cs.ET,cs.AR,cs.IT

authors_text: Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: Masked Spectrogram Modeling using Masked Autoencoders for Learning General-purpose Audio Representation
title_zh: 使用屏蔽自动编码器进行屏蔽频谱图建模以学习通用音频表示
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures. Under the review process
comments: 22 pages, 8 figures. Under the review process
abstract: Recent general-purpose audio representations show state-of-the-art performance on various audio tasks. These representations are pre-trained by self-supervised learning methods that create training signals from the input. For example, typical audio contrastive learning uses temporal relationships among input sounds to create training signals, whereas some methods use a difference among input views created by data augmentations. However, these training signals do not provide information derived from the intact input sound, which we think is suboptimal for learning representation that describes the input as it is. In this paper, we seek to learn audio representations from the input itself as supervision using a pretext task of auto-encoding of masked spectrogram patches, Masked Spectrogram Modeling (MSM, a variant of Masked Image Modeling applied to audio spectrogram). To implement MSM, we use Masked Autoencoders (MAE), an image self-supervised learning method. MAE learns to efficiently encode the small number of visible patches into latent representations to carry essential information for reconstructing a large number of masked patches. While training, MAE minimizes the reconstruction error, which uses the input as training signal, consequently achieving our goal. We conducted experiments on our MSM using MAE (MSM-MAE) models under the evaluation benchmark of the HEAR 2021 NeurIPS Challenge. Our MSM-MAE models outperformed the HEAR 2021 Challenge results on seven out of 15 tasks (e.g., accuracies of 73.4% on CREMA-D and 85.8% on LibriCount), while showing top performance on other tasks where specialized models perform better. We also investigate how the design choices of MSM-MAE impact the performance and conduct qualitative analysis of visualization outcomes to gain an understanding of learned representations. We make our code available online.

For example, typical audio contrastive learning uses temporal relationships among input sounds to create training signals, whereas some methods use a difference among input views created by data augmentations. However, these training signals do not provide information derived from the intact input sound, which we think is suboptimal for learning representation that describes the input as it is. In this paper, we seek to learn audio representations from the input itself as supervision using a pretext task of auto-encoding of masked spectrogram patches, Masked Spectrogram Modeling (MSM, a variant of Masked Image Modeling applied to audio spectrogram). To implement MSM, we use Masked Autoencoders (MAE), an image self-supervised learning method. MAE learns to efficiently encode the small number of visible patches into latent representations to carry essential information for reconstructing a large number of masked patches. While training, MAE minimizes the reconstruction error, which uses the input as training signal, consequently achieving our goal. We conducted experiments on our MSM using MAE (MSM-MAE) models under the evaluation benchmark of the HEAR 2021 NeurIPS Challenge. Our MSM-MAE models outperformed the HEAR 2021 Challenge results on seven out of 15 tasks (e.g., accuracies of 73.4% on CREMA-D and 85.8% on LibriCount), while showing top performance on other tasks where specialized models perform better. We also investigate how the design choices of MSM-MAE impact the performance and conduct qualitative analysis of visualization outcomes to gain an understanding of learned representations. We make our code available online.
abstract_zh: 最近的通用音频表示显示了各种音频任务的最先进的性能。这些表示是通过自监督学习方法进行预训练的，这些方法根据输入创建训练信号。例如，典型的音频对比学习使用输入声音之间的时间关系来创建训练信号，而一些方法使用由数据增强创建的输入视图之间的差异。然而，这些训练信号不提供从完整输入声音中派生的信息，我们认为这对于学习描述输入原样的表示来说不是最佳的。在本文中，我们寻求使用掩蔽频谱图补丁自动编码的借口任务从输入本身学习音频表示，即掩蔽频谱图建模（MSM，应用于音频频谱图的掩蔽图像建模的一种变体）。为了实现 MSM，我们使用 Masked Autoencoders (MAE)，一种图像自监督学习方法。 MAE 学习有效地将少量可见补丁编码为潜在表示，以携带重建大量屏蔽补丁所需的基本信息。在训练时，MAE 最小化重建误差，使用输入作为训练信号，从而达到我们的目标。我们在 HEAR 2021 NeurIPS 挑战赛的评估基准下使用 MAE (MSM-MAE) 模型对 MSM 进行了实验。我们的 MSM-MAE 模型在 15 项任务中的 7 项上优于 HEAR 2021 挑战赛的结果（例如，CREMA-D 上的准确度为 73.4%，LibriCount 上的准确度为 85.8%），同时在专用模型表现更好的其他任务上表现出最佳性能。我们还研究了 MSM-MAE 的设计选择如何影响性能，并对可视化结果进行定性分析，以了解学习到的表示。我们在线提供我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码自编码器的音频表示学习方法，通过掩码频谱图建模（MSM）从音频输入本身学习通用表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督音频表征方法依赖时间关系或数据增强生成训练信号，但缺乏对完整输入声学信息的利用，导致表征学习不充分。
AI.method: 采用图像领域掩码自编码器（MAE）框架，设计掩码频谱图块重建任务（MSM），通过最小化重建误差学习音频的通用表征。
AI.result: 在HEAR 2021挑战的15个任务中，MSM-MAE模型在7个任务上超越挑战结果（如CREMA-D准确率73.4%，LibriCount 85.8%），并在其他任务中达到最优表现。
AI.conclusion: MSM-MAE通过直接利用完整音频输入信息进行预训练，有效提升了音频表征的通用性，在多个基准任务中验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Matthew C. Dickson,Anna S. Bosman,Katherine M. Malan
title: Hybridised Loss Functions for Improved Neural Network Generalisation
title_zh: 用于改进神经网络泛化的混合损失函数
comment: Edited version of this paper appears in the proceedings of the PAAISS'22 conference
comments: Edited version of this paper appears in the proceedings of the PAAISS'22 conference
abstract: Loss functions play an important role in the training of artificial neural networks (ANNs), and can affect the generalisation ability of the ANN model, among other properties. Specifically, it has been shown that the cross entropy and sum squared error loss functions result in different training dynamics, and exhibit different properties that are complementary to one another. It has previously been suggested that a hybrid of the entropy and sum squared error loss functions could combine the advantages of the two functions, while limiting their disadvantages. The effectiveness of such hybrid loss functions is investigated in this study. It is shown that hybridisation of the two loss functions improves the generalisation ability of the ANNs on all problems considered. The hybrid loss function that starts training with the sum squared error loss function and later switches to the cross entropy error loss function is shown to either perform the best on average, or to not be significantly different than the best loss function tested for all problems considered. This study shows that the minima discovered by the sum squared error loss function can be further exploited by switching to cross entropy error loss function. It can thus be concluded that hybridisation of the two loss functions could lead to better performance in ANNs.
summary: Loss functions play an important role in the training of artificial neural networks (ANNs), and can affect the generalisation ability of the ANN model, among other properties. Specifically, it has been shown that the cross entropy and sum squared error loss functions result in different training dynamics, and exhibit different properties that are complementary to one another. It has previously been suggested that a hybrid of the entropy and sum squared error loss functions could combine the advantages of the two functions, while limiting their disadvantages. The effectiveness of such hybrid loss functions is investigated in this study. It is shown that hybridisation of the two loss functions improves the generalisation ability of the ANNs on all problems considered. The hybrid loss function that starts training with the sum squared error loss function and later switches to the cross entropy error loss function is shown to either perform the best on average, or to not be significantly different than the best loss function tested for all problems considered. This study shows that the minima discovered by the sum squared error loss function can be further exploited by switching to cross entropy error loss function. It can thus be concluded that hybridisation of the two loss functions could lead to better performance in ANNs.
abstract_zh: 损失函数在人工神经网络 (ANN) 的训练中发挥着重要作用，并且会影响 ANN 模型的泛化能力等属性。具体来说，已经证明交叉熵和误差平方和损失函数会导致不同的训练动态，并表现出彼此互补的不同属性。之前有人提出，熵和误差平方和损失函数的混合可以结合这两个函数的优点，同时限制它们的缺点。本研究研究了这种混合损失函数的有效性。结果表明，两个损失函数的混合提高了 ANN 对所有考虑问题的泛化能力。混合损失函数从平方和误差损失函数开始训练，然后切换到交叉熵误差损失函数，结果显示，它要么平均表现最好，要么与针对所有考虑的问题测试的最佳损失函数没有显着差异。这项研究表明，通过切换到交叉熵误差损失函数，可以进一步利用平方和误差损失函数发现的最小值。因此可以得出结论，两种损失函数的混合可以使人工神经网络获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合损失函数对人工神经网络泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 损失函数在神经网络训练中起着关键作用，不同的损失函数具有不同的训练动态和特性。交叉熵和平方和误差损失函数的互补特性可能通过混合使用来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 本文通过混合使用交叉熵和平方和误差损失函数，研究其在不同问题上的效果，并分析了从平方和误差损失函数切换到交叉熵损失函数的训练策略。
AI.result: 混合损失函数在所有测试问题中都提升了神经网络的泛化能力。从平方和误差开始训练，随后切换到交叉熵损失函数的策略表现最佳或与最佳损失函数无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 混合使用交叉熵和平方和误差损失函数可以提升神经网络的性能，利用平方和误差损失函数找到的最小值，再通过交叉熵损失函数进一步优化。

search_text: Hybridised Loss Functions for Improved Neural Network Generalisation 用于改进神经网络泛化的混合损失函数 Loss functions play an important role in the training of artificial neural networks (ANNs), and can affect the generalisation ability of the ANN model, among other properties. Specifically, it has been shown that the cross entropy and sum squared error loss functions result in different training dynamics, and exhibit different properties that are complementary to one another. It has previously been suggested that a hybrid of the entropy and sum squared error loss functions could combine the advantages of the two functions, while limiting their disadvantages. The effectiveness of such hybrid loss functions is investigated in this study. It is shown that hybridisation of the two loss functions improves the generalisation ability of the ANNs on all problems considered. The hybrid loss function that starts training with the sum squared error loss function and later switches to the cross entropy error loss function is shown to either perform the best on average, or to not be significantly different than the best loss function tested for all problems considered. This study shows that the minima discovered by the sum squared error loss function can be further exploited by switching to cross entropy error loss function. It can thus be concluded that hybridisation of the two loss functions could lead to better performance in ANNs. 损失函数在人工神经网络 (ANN) 的训练中发挥着重要作用，并且会影响 ANN 模型的泛化能力等属性。具体来说，已经证明交叉熵和误差平方和损失函数会导致不同的训练动态，并表现出彼此互补的不同属性。之前有人提出，熵和误差平方和损失函数的混合可以结合这两个函数的优点，同时限制它们的缺点。本研究研究了这种混合损失函数的有效性。结果表明，两个损失函数的混合提高了 ANN 对所有考虑问题的泛化能力。混合损失函数从平方和误差损失函数开始训练，然后切换到交叉熵误差损失函数，结果显示，它要么平均表现最好，要么与针对所有考虑的问题测试的最佳损失函数没有显着差异。这项研究表明，通过切换到交叉熵误差损失函数，可以进一步利用平方和误差损失函数发现的最小值。因此可以得出结论，两种损失函数的混合可以使人工神经网络获得更好的性能。 本文研究了混合损失函数对人工神经网络泛化能力的影响。 Matthew C. Dickson,Anna S. Bosman,Katherine M. Malan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Silvan Mertes,Dominik Schiller,Florian Lingenfelser,Thomas Kiderle,Valentin Kroner,Lama Diab,Elisabeth André
title: Intercategorical Label Interpolation for Emotional Face Generation with Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用条件生成对抗网络进行情感人脸生成的类别间标签插值
abstract: Generative adversarial networks offer the possibility to generate deceptively real images that are almost indistinguishable from actual photographs. Such systems however rely on the presence of large datasets to realistically replicate the corresponding domain. This is especially a problem if not only random new images are to be generated, but specific (continuous) features are to be co-modeled. A particularly important use case in \emph{Human-Computer Interaction} (HCI) research is the generation of emotional images of human faces, which can be used for various use cases, such as the automatic generation of avatars. The problem hereby lies in the availability of training data. Most suitable datasets for this task rely on categorical emotion models and therefore feature only discrete annotation labels. This greatly hinders the learning and modeling of smooth transitions between displayed affective states. To overcome this challenge, we explore the potential of label interpolation to enhance networks trained on categorical datasets with the ability to generate images conditioned on continuous features.
summary: Generative adversarial networks offer the possibility to generate deceptively real images that are almost indistinguishable from actual photographs. Such systems however rely on the presence of large datasets to realistically replicate the corresponding domain. This is especially a problem if not only random new images are to be generated, but specific (continuous) features are to be co-modeled. A particularly important use case in \emph{Human-Computer Interaction} (HCI) research is the generation of emotional images of human faces, which can be used for various use cases, such as the automatic generation of avatars. The problem hereby lies in the availability of training data. Most suitable datasets for this task rely on categorical emotion models and therefore feature only discrete annotation labels. This greatly hinders the learning and modeling of smooth transitions between displayed affective states. To overcome this challenge, we explore the potential of label interpolation to enhance networks trained on categorical datasets with the ability to generate images conditioned on continuous features.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络提供了生成与真实照片几乎无法区分的具有欺骗性的真实图像的可能性。然而，此类系统依赖于大型数据集的存在来实际复制相应的域。如果不仅要生成随机的新图像，而且要对特定（连续）特征进行联合建模，这尤其是一个问题。 \emph{人机交互}（HCI）研究中一个特别重要的用例是生成人脸情感图像，它可用于各种用例，例如自动生成头像。问题在于训练数据的可用性。最适合此任务的数据集依赖于分类情感模型，因此仅具有离散注释标签。这极大地阻碍了所显示的情感状态之间平滑过渡的学习和建模。为了克服这一挑战，我们探索标签插值的潜力，以增强在分类数据集上训练的网络，使其能够生成以连续特征为条件的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）的跨类别标签插值方法，用于生成具有连续情感特征的人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 现有情感人脸数据集依赖离散情绪标签，难以建模情绪状态间的平滑过渡，限制了生成模型对连续情感特征的表达能力。
AI.method: 通过在条件生成对抗网络中引入跨类别标签插值技术，将离散情绪标签转换为连续值，实现对情感连续体的建模。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成具有平滑情绪过渡的人脸图像，优于传统离散标签训练的生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 标签插值方法成功解决了离散情感数据集在连续情感生成中的局限性，为HCI领域的情绪化虚拟形象生成提供了新思路。

title: User Trust on an Explainable AI-based Medical Diagnosis Support System
title_zh: 用户对可解释的基于人工智能的医疗诊断支持系统的信任
abstract: Recent research has supported that system explainability improves user trust and willingness to use medical AI for diagnostic support. In this paper, we use chest disease diagnosis based on X-Ray images as a case study to investigate user trust and reliance. Building off explainability, we propose a support system where users (radiologists) can view causal explanations for final decisions. After observing these causal explanations, users provided their opinions of the model predictions and could correct explanations if they did not agree. We measured user trust as the agreement between the model's and the radiologist's diagnosis as well as the radiologists' feedback on the model explanations. Additionally, they reported their trust in the system. We tested our model on the CXR-Eye dataset and it achieved an overall accuracy of 74.1%. However, the experts in our user study agreed with the model for only 46.4% of the cases, indicating the necessity of improving the trust. The self-reported trust score was 3.2 on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0, showing that the users tended to trust the model but the trust still needs to be enhanced.
summary: Recent research has supported that system explainability improves user trust and willingness to use medical AI for diagnostic support. In this paper, we use chest disease diagnosis based on X-Ray images as a case study to investigate user trust and reliance. Building off explainability, we propose a support system where users (radiologists) can view causal explanations for final decisions. After observing these causal explanations, users provided their opinions of the model predictions and could correct explanations if they did not agree. We measured user trust as the agreement between the model's and the radiologist's diagnosis as well as the radiologists' feedback on the model explanations. Additionally, they reported their trust in the system. We tested our model on the CXR-Eye dataset and it achieved an overall accuracy of 74.1%. However, the experts in our user study agreed with the model for only 46.4% of the cases, indicating the necessity of improving the trust. The self-reported trust score was 3.2 on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0, showing that the users tended to trust the model but the trust still needs to be enhanced.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，系统的可解释性可以提高用户的信任度和使用医疗人工智能进行诊断支持的意愿。在本文中，我们以基于 X 射线图像的胸部疾病诊断作为案例研究，以调查用户的信任和依赖。基于可解释性，我们提出了一个支持系统，用户（放射科医生）可以在其中查看最终决策的因果解释。在观察这些因果解释后，用户提出了他们对模型预测的看法，如果不同意，可以纠正解释。我们将用户信任度衡量为模型与放射科医生的诊断之间的一致性以及放射科医生对模型解释的反馈。此外，他们还表达了对该系统的信任。我们在 CXR-Eye 数据集上测试了我们的模型，其总体准确率达到了 74.1%。然而，我们的用户研究中的专家仅在 46.4% 的案例中同意该模型，这表明有必要提高信任度。自我报告的信任得分为 3.2（范围为 1.0 到 5.0），表明用户倾向于信任该模型，但信任度仍需增强。

AI.tldr: 本文通过胸部疾病X光诊断案例，研究可解释AI系统对用户信任和依赖的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明系统可解释性可提升用户对医疗AI的信任度，但需进一步验证其在实际诊断场景中的效果及改进空间。
AI.method: 构建支持系统使放射科医生可查看模型的因果解释并反馈修正，通过诊断一致性和反馈评分衡量信任度，基于CXR-Eye数据集进行测试。
AI.result: 模型整体准确率达74.1%，但专家仅在46.4%的案例中同意诊断结果，用户自评信任度为3.2（满分5.0）。
AI.conclusion: 需提升AI解释的可信度与专家认知的一致性，以增强用户信任和系统实用性。

search_text: User Trust on an Explainable AI-based Medical Diagnosis Support System 用户对可解释的基于人工智能的医疗诊断支持系统的信任 Recent research has supported that system explainability improves user trust and willingness to use medical AI for diagnostic support. In this paper, we use chest disease diagnosis based on X-Ray images as a case study to investigate user trust and reliance. Building off explainability, we propose a support system where users (radiologists) can view causal explanations for final decisions. After observing these causal explanations, users provided their opinions of the model predictions and could correct explanations if they did not agree. We measured user trust as the agreement between the model's and the radiologist's diagnosis as well as the radiologists' feedback on the model explanations. Additionally, they reported their trust in the system. We tested our model on the CXR-Eye dataset and it achieved an overall accuracy of 74.1%. However, the experts in our user study agreed with the model for only 46.4% of the cases, indicating the necessity of improving the trust. The self-reported trust score was 3.2 on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0, showing that the users tended to trust the model but the trust still needs to be enhanced. 最近的研究表明，系统的可解释性可以提高用户的信任度和使用医疗人工智能进行诊断支持的意愿。在本文中，我们以基于 X 射线图像的胸部疾病诊断作为案例研究，以调查用户的信任和依赖。基于可解释性，我们提出了一个支持系统，用户（放射科医生）可以在其中查看最终决策的因果解释。在观察这些因果解释后，用户提出了他们对模型预测的看法，如果不同意，可以纠正解释。我们将用户信任度衡量为模型与放射科医生的诊断之间的一致性以及放射科医生对模型解释的反馈。此外，他们还表达了对该系统的信任。我们在 CXR-Eye 数据集上测试了我们的模型，其总体准确率达到了 74.1%。然而，我们的用户研究中的专家仅在 46.4% 的案例中同意该模型，这表明有必要提高信任度。自我报告的信任得分为 3.2（范围为 1.0 到 5.0），表明用户倾向于信任该模型，但信任度仍需增强。 本文通过胸部疾病X光诊断案例，研究可解释AI系统对用户信任和依赖的影响。 Yao Rong,Nora Castner,Efe Bozkir,Enkelejda Kasneci cs.HC

title: Context-Aware Sequence Alignment using 4D Skeletal Augmentation
title_zh: 使用 4D 骨骼增强进行上下文感知序列比对
comment: Project page: http://www.taeinkwon.com/projects/casa. Accepted to CVPR 2022 Oral
comments: Project page: http://www.taeinkwon.com/projects/casa. Accepted to CVPR 2022 Oral
abstract: Temporal alignment of fine-grained human actions in videos is important for numerous applications in computer vision, robotics, and mixed reality. State-of-the-art methods directly learn image-based embedding space by leveraging powerful deep convolutional neural networks. While being straightforward, their results are far from satisfactory, the aligned videos exhibit severe temporal discontinuity without additional post-processing steps. The recent advancements in human body and hand pose estimation in the wild promise new ways of addressing the task of human action alignment in videos. In this work, based on off-the-shelf human pose estimators, we propose a novel context-aware self-supervised learning architecture to align sequences of actions. We name it CASA. Specifically, CASA employs self-attention and cross-attention mechanisms to incorporate the spatial and temporal context of human actions, which can solve the temporal discontinuity problem. Moreover, we introduce a self-supervised learning scheme that is empowered by novel 4D augmentation techniques for 3D skeleton representations. We systematically evaluate the key components of our method. Our experiments on three public datasets demonstrate CASA significantly improves phase progress and Kendall's Tau scores over the previous state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Temporal alignment of fine-grained human actions in videos is important for numerous applications in computer vision, robotics, and mixed reality. State-of-the-art methods directly learn image-based embedding space by leveraging powerful deep convolutional neural networks. While being straightforward, their results are far from satisfactory, the aligned videos exhibit severe temporal discontinuity without additional post-processing steps. The recent advancements in human body and hand pose estimation in the wild promise new ways of addressing the task of human action alignment in videos. In this work, based on off-the-shelf human pose estimators, we propose a novel context-aware self-supervised learning architecture to align sequences of actions. We name it CASA. Specifically, CASA employs self-attention and cross-attention mechanisms to incorporate the spatial and temporal context of human actions, which can solve the temporal discontinuity problem. Moreover, we introduce a self-supervised learning scheme that is empowered by novel 4D augmentation techniques for 3D skeleton representations. We systematically evaluate the key components of our method. Our experiments on three public datasets demonstrate CASA significantly improves phase progress and Kendall's Tau scores over the previous state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 视频中细粒度人类动作的时间对齐对于计算机视觉、机器人和混合现实中的众多应用非常重要。最先进的方法通过利用强大的深度卷积神经网络直接学习基于图像的嵌入空间。虽然很简单，但他们的结果远不能令人满意，对齐的视频在没有额外的后处理步骤的情况下表现出严重的时间不连续性。人体和手部姿势估计的最新进展有望为解决视频中人类动作对齐的任务提供新的方法。在这项工作中，基于现成的人体姿势估计器，我们提出了一种新颖的上下文感知自我监督学习架构来对齐动作序列。我们将其命名为 CASA。具体来说，CASA采用自注意力和交叉注意力机制来整合人类行为的空间和时间背景，这可以解决时间不连续性问题。此外，我们引入了一种自我监督学习方案，该方案由用于 3D 骨架表示的新颖 4D 增强技术提供支持。我们系统地评估我们方法的关键组成部分。我们对三个公共数据集的实验表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，CASA 显着提高了阶段进度和 Kendall 的 Tau 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于4D骨骼增强的上下文感知序列对齐方法（CASA），用于解决视频中精细人体动作的时间不连续性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像嵌入的方法在视频动作对齐任务中存在严重的时间不连续性问题，而人体姿态估计技术的进步为利用骨骼信息解决此问题提供了新思路。
AI.method: 设计CASA架构，结合自注意力和跨注意力机制建模时空上下文，并引入4D骨骼增强的自监督学习方案对3D骨骼表示进行数据增强。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，CASA在相位进展和Kendall's Tau指标上均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合骨骼信息与上下文感知机制，CASA有效解决了视频动作对齐中的时间不连续性问题，验证了骨骼表示与自监督学习方案的有效性。

authors_text: Haoran Lyu,Yajie Wang,Yu-an Tan,Huipeng Zhou,Yuhang Zhao,Quanxin Zhang
title: Boosting Adversarial Transferability of MLP-Mixer
title_zh: 提高 MLP-Mixer 的对抗性可迁移性
abstract: The security of models based on new architectures such as MLP-Mixer and ViTs needs to be studied urgently. However, most of the current researches are mainly aimed at the adversarial attack against ViTs, and there is still relatively little adversarial work on MLP-mixer. We propose an adversarial attack method against MLP-Mixer called Maxwell's demon Attack (MA). MA breaks the channel-mixing and token-mixing mechanism of MLP-Mixer by controlling the part input of MLP-Mixer's each Mixer layer, and disturbs MLP-Mixer to obtain the main information of images. Our method can mask the part input of the Mixer layer, avoid overfitting of the adversarial examples to the source model, and improve the transferability of cross-architecture. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness and superior performance of the proposed MA. Our method can be easily combined with existing methods and can improve the transferability by up to 38.0% on MLP-based ResMLP. Adversarial examples produced by our method on MLP-Mixer are able to exceed the transferability of adversarial examples produced using DenseNet against CNNs. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first work to study adversarial transferability of MLP-Mixer.
summary: The security of models based on new architectures such as MLP-Mixer and ViTs needs to be studied urgently. However, most of the current researches are mainly aimed at the adversarial attack against ViTs, and there is still relatively little adversarial work on MLP-mixer. We propose an adversarial attack method against MLP-Mixer called Maxwell's demon Attack (MA). MA breaks the channel-mixing and token-mixing mechanism of MLP-Mixer by controlling the part input of MLP-Mixer's each Mixer layer, and disturbs MLP-Mixer to obtain the main information of images. Our method can mask the part input of the Mixer layer, avoid overfitting of the adversarial examples to the source model, and improve the transferability of cross-architecture. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness and superior performance of the proposed MA. Our method can be easily combined with existing methods and can improve the transferability by up to 38.0% on MLP-based ResMLP. Adversarial examples produced by our method on MLP-Mixer are able to exceed the transferability of adversarial examples produced using DenseNet against CNNs. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first work to study adversarial transferability of MLP-Mixer.
abstract_zh: 基于MLP-Mixer、ViTs等新架构的模型的安全性亟待研究。然而，目前大多数研究主要针对ViT的对抗性攻击，针对MLP-mixer的对抗性工作还相对较少。我们提出了一种针对 MLP-Mixer 的对抗性攻击方法，称为麦克斯韦恶魔攻击 (MA)。 MA通过控制MLP-Mixer各Mixer层的部分输入，打破MLP-Mixer的通道混合和令牌混合机制，干扰MLP-Mixer以获得图像的主要信息。我们的方法可以屏蔽 Mixer 层的部分输入，避免对抗性示例对源模型的过度拟合，并提高跨架构的可迁移性。广泛的实验评估证明了所提出的 MA 的有效性和优越性能。我们的方法可以轻松地与现有方法结合，并且可以在基于 MLP 的 ResMLP 上将可迁移性提高高达 38.0%。我们的方法在 MLP-Mixer 上生成的对抗性示例能够超过使用 DenseNet 针对 CNN 生成的对抗性示例的可转移性。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究 MLP-Mixer 的对抗性可迁移性的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对MLP-Mixer模型的对抗攻击方法Maxwell's demon Attack (MA)，通过破坏其通道混合和标记混合机制提升对抗样本的跨架构迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 当前研究主要关注ViT的对抗攻击，而MLP-Mixer等新型架构的安全性研究不足，亟需探索其对抗迁移性。
AI.method: 通过控制MLP-Mixer各Mixer层的部分输入，掩码关键信息以干扰模型信息获取，避免对抗样本过拟合源模型并提升跨架构迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明MA方法在ResMLP上提升迁移性38.0%，且生成的对抗样本迁移效果优于DenseNet对CNN的攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究MLP-Mixer的对抗迁移性，提出的MA方法有效且可与现有方法兼容，为新型架构安全研究提供新方向。

title: Urban Change Detection Using a Dual-Task Siamese Network and Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 使用双任务连体网络和半监督学习进行城市变化检测
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, to be published in 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium IGARSS
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, to be published in 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium IGARSS
abstract: In this study, a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) method for improving urban change detection from bi-temporal image pairs was presented. The proposed method adapted a Dual-Task Siamese Difference network that not only predicts changes with the difference decoder, but also segments buildings for both images with a semantics decoder. First, the architecture was modified to produce a second change prediction derived from the semantics predictions. Second, SSL was adopted to improve supervised change detection. For unlabeled data, we introduced a loss that encourages the network to predict consistent changes across the two change outputs. The proposed method was tested on urban change detection using the SpaceNet7 dataset. SSL achieved improved results compared to three fully supervised benchmarks.
summary: In this study, a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) method for improving urban change detection from bi-temporal image pairs was presented. The proposed method adapted a Dual-Task Siamese Difference network that not only predicts changes with the difference decoder, but also segments buildings for both images with a semantics decoder. First, the architecture was modified to produce a second change prediction derived from the semantics predictions. Second, SSL was adopted to improve supervised change detection. For unlabeled data, we introduced a loss that encourages the network to predict consistent changes across the two change outputs. The proposed method was tested on urban change detection using the SpaceNet7 dataset. SSL achieved improved results compared to three fully supervised benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，提出了一种半监督学习（SSL）方法，用于改进双时态图像对的城市变化检测。所提出的方法采用了双任务连体差异网络，该网络不仅可以使用差异解码器来预测变化，还可以使用语义解码器来分割两幅图像的建筑物。首先，修改架构以产生从语义预测导出的第二个变化预测。其次，采用 SSL 来改进监督变更检测。对于未标记的数据，我们引入了一种损失，鼓励网络预测两个变化输出之间的一致变化。使用 SpaceNet7 数据集对所提出的方法进行了城市变化检测测试。与三个完全监督的基准测试相比，SSL 取得了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合双任务暹罗网络和半监督学习的城市变化检测方法，通过改进网络结构和利用未标记数据提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 城市变化检测需要大量标注数据，但实际中获取标注数据困难且成本高，传统全监督方法受限于数据获取难度，需探索更高效的学习策略。
AI.method: 设计双任务暹罗网络，包含差分解码器（预测变化）和语义解码器（分割建筑）。通过生成第二变化预测并引入一致性损失，结合半监督学习利用未标记数据优化模型。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet7数据集上，该方法相比三个全监督基准模型取得了更优的变化检测结果。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习与双任务网络结合能有效提升城市变化检测性能，尤其在标注数据有限时具有显著优势。

search_text: Urban Change Detection Using a Dual-Task Siamese Network and Semi-Supervised Learning 使用双任务连体网络和半监督学习进行城市变化检测 In this study, a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) method for improving urban change detection from bi-temporal image pairs was presented. The proposed method adapted a Dual-Task Siamese Difference network that not only predicts changes with the difference decoder, but also segments buildings for both images with a semantics decoder. First, the architecture was modified to produce a second change prediction derived from the semantics predictions. Second, SSL was adopted to improve supervised change detection. For unlabeled data, we introduced a loss that encourages the network to predict consistent changes across the two change outputs. The proposed method was tested on urban change detection using the SpaceNet7 dataset. authors_text: Lianghao Xia,Chao Huang,Yong Xu,Jiashu Zhao,Dawei Yin,Jimmy Xiangji Huang
title: Hypergraph Contrastive Collaborative Filtering
title_zh: 超图对比协同过滤
comment: This paper has been published as a full paper at SIGIR 2022
comments: This paper has been published as a full paper at SIGIR 2022
abstract: Collaborative Filtering (CF) has emerged as fundamental paradigms for parameterizing users and items into latent representation space, with their correlative patterns from interaction data. Among various CF techniques, the development of GNN-based recommender systems, e.g., PinSage and LightGCN, has offered the state-of-the-art performance. However, two key challenges have not been well explored in existing solutions: i) The over-smoothing effect with deeper graph-based CF architecture, may cause the indistinguishable user representations and degradation of recommendation results. ii) The supervision signals (i.e., user-item interactions) are usually scarce and skewed distributed in reality, which limits the representation power of CF paradigms. To tackle these challenges, we propose a new self-supervised recommendation framework Hypergraph Contrastive Collaborative Filtering (HCCF) to jointly capture local and global collaborative relations with a hypergraph-enhanced cross-view contrastive learning architecture. In particular, the designed hypergraph structure learning enhances the discrimination ability of GNN-based CF paradigm, so as to comprehensively capture the complex high-order dependencies among users. Additionally, our HCCF model effectively integrates the hypergraph structure encoding with self-supervised learning to reinforce the representation quality of recommender systems, based on the hypergraph-enhanced self-discrimination. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our model over various state-of-the-art recommendation methods, and the robustness against sparse user interaction data. Our model implementation codes are available at https://github.com/akaxlh/HCCF.
summary: Collaborative Filtering (CF) has emerged as fundamental paradigms for parameterizing users and items into latent representation space, with their correlative patterns from interaction data. Among various CF techniques, the development of GNN-based recommender systems, e.g., PinSage and LightGCN, has offered the state-of-the-art performance. However, two key challenges have not been well explored in existing solutions: i) The over-smoothing effect with deeper graph-based CF architecture, may cause the indistinguishable user representations and degradation of recommendation results. ii) The supervision signals (i.e., user-item interactions) are usually scarce and skewed distributed in reality, which limits the representation power of CF paradigms. To tackle these challenges, we propose a new self-supervised recommendation framework Hypergraph Contrastive Collaborative Filtering (HCCF) to jointly capture local and global collaborative relations with a hypergraph-enhanced cross-view contrastive learning architecture. In particular, the designed hypergraph structure learning enhances the discrimination ability of GNN-based CF paradigm, so as to comprehensively capture the complex high-order dependencies among users. Additionally, our HCCF model effectively integrates the hypergraph structure encoding with self-supervised learning to reinforce the representation quality of recommender systems, based on the hypergraph-enhanced self-discrimination. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our model over various state-of-the-art recommendation methods, and the robustness against sparse user interaction data. Our model implementation codes are available at https://github.com/akaxlh/HCCF.
abstract_zh: 协同过滤（CF）已成为将用户和项目参数化到潜在表示空间中的基本范例，并具有来自交互数据的相关模式。在各种 CF 技术中，基于 GNN 的推荐系统（例如 PinSage 和 LightGCN）的开发提供了最先进的性能。然而，现有解决方案中还没有很好地探讨两个关键挑战：i）基于更深图的 CF 架构的过度平滑效果可能会导致用户表示难以区分和推荐结果退化。 ii）监督信号（即用户-项目交互）在现实中通常是稀缺且分布不均匀的，这限制了 CF 范式的表示能力。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的自监督推荐框架超图对比协作过滤（HCCF），通过超图增强的跨视图对比学习架构共同捕获本地和全局协作关系。特别是，设计的超图结构学习增强了基于GNN的CF范式的判别能力，从而全面捕获用户之间复杂的高阶依赖关系。此外，我们的 HCCF 模型有效地将超图结构编码与自监督学习相结合，以基于超图增强的自我辨别来增强推荐系统的表示质量。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的模型相对于各种最先进的推荐方法的优越性，以及针对稀疏用户交互数据的鲁棒性。我们的模型实现代码可在 https://github.com/akaxlh/HCCF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超图对比学习的协同过滤框架HCCF，以解决深度图神经网络在推荐系统中的过平滑问题及稀疏交互数据下的表示能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的推荐系统存在深度架构导致的过平滑问题，且用户-物品交互数据稀疏且分布不均，限制了模型的表示能力。
AI.method: 设计超图结构学习增强GNN的判别能力，通过超图增强的跨视图对比学习框架，结合自监督学习强化推荐系统的表示质量。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，HCCF在推荐效果上优于多种先进方法，并在稀疏用户交互数据下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HCCF通过超图结构与对比学习的结合，有效解决了协同过滤中的关键挑战，为稀疏数据下的推荐系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zixuan Su,Hao Zhang,Jingjing Chen,Lei Pang,Chong-Wah Ngo,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer
title_zh: 自适应分裂融合变压器
abstract: Neural networks for visual content understanding have recently evolved from convolutional ones (CNNs) to transformers. The prior (CNN) relies on small-windowed kernels to capture the regional clues, demonstrating solid local expressiveness. On the contrary, the latter (transformer) establishes long-range global connections between localities for holistic learning. Inspired by this complementary nature, there is a growing interest in designing hybrid models to best utilize each technique. Current hybrids merely replace convolutions as simple approximations of linear projection or juxtapose a convolution branch with attention, without concerning the importance of local/global modeling. To tackle this, we propose a new hybrid named Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer (ASF-former) to treat convolutional and attention branches differently with adaptive weights. Specifically, an ASF-former encoder equally splits feature channels into half to fit dual-path inputs. Then, the outputs of dual-path are fused with weighting scalars calculated from visual cues. We also design the convolutional path compactly for efficiency concerns. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks, such as ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, show that our ASF-former outperforms its CNN, transformer counterparts, and hybrid pilots in terms of accuracy (83.9% on ImageNet-1K), under similar conditions (12.9G MACs/56.7M Params, without large-scale pre-training). The code is available at: https://github.com/szx503045266/ASF-former.
summary: Neural networks for visual content understanding have recently evolved from convolutional ones (CNNs) to transformers. The prior (CNN) relies on small-windowed kernels to capture the regional clues, demonstrating solid local expressiveness. On the contrary, the latter (transformer) establishes long-range global connections between localities for holistic learning. Inspired by this complementary nature, there is a growing interest in designing hybrid models to best utilize each technique. Current hybrids merely replace convolutions as simple approximations of linear projection or juxtapose a convolution branch with attention, without concerning the importance of local/global modeling. To tackle this, we propose a new hybrid named Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer (ASF-former) to treat convolutional and attention branches differently with adaptive weights. Specifically, an ASF-former encoder equally splits feature channels into half to fit dual-path inputs. Then, the outputs of dual-path are fused with weighting scalars calculated from visual cues. We also design the convolutional path compactly for efficiency concerns. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks, such as ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, show that our ASF-former outperforms its CNN, transformer counterparts, and hybrid pilots in terms of accuracy (83.9% on ImageNet-1K), under similar conditions (12.9G MACs/56.7M Params, without large-scale pre-training). The code is available at: https://github.com/szx503045266/ASF-former.
abstract_zh: 用于视觉内容理解的神经网络最近已经从卷积神经网络（CNN）发展到 Transformer。先验（CNN）依靠小窗口内核来捕获区域线索，表现出扎实的局部表达能力。相反，后者（变压器）在各地之间建立远程全球联系，以实现整体学习。受这种互补性的启发，人们越来越有兴趣设计混合模型以最好地利用每种技术。当前的混合仅仅将卷积替换为线性投影的简单近似，或者将卷积分支与注意力并置，而不考虑局部/全局建模的重要性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为自适应分裂融合变压器（ASF-former）的新混合体，通过自适应权重以不同的方式处理卷积和注意力分支。具体来说，ASF 前编码器将特征通道平均分成两半以适应双路径输入。然后，双路径的输出与根据视觉线索计算的加权标量融合。出于效率考虑，我们还设计了紧凑的卷积路径。在 ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 等标准基准上进行的大量实验表明，在相似条件下（12.9G MAC/56.7M Params，无大规模预训练），我们的 ASF-former 在准确率方面优于 CNN、Transformer 对应物和混合导频（在 ImageNet-1K 上为 83.9%）。该代码位于：https://github.com/szx503045266/ASF-former。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer (ASF-former)的混合模型，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer的优势，以提升视觉内容理解的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有混合模型未能充分考虑局部与全局特征建模的重要性，仅简单替代或并行使用CNN与注意力机制，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 通过将特征通道均分为两路分别输入CNN与Transformer分支，利用视觉线索动态计算权重融合双路径输出，并设计紧凑的CNN路径以提高效率。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-10/100等基准测试中，ASF-former在相似计算量（12.9G MACs/56.7M Params）下达到83.9%的ImageNet-1K准确率，优于CNN、Transformer及现有混合模型。
AI.conclusion: 自适应融合局部与全局特征的双路径设计有效提升了模型性能，证明了平衡CNN与Transformer优势的混合架构的潜力。

search_text: Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer 自适应分裂融合变压器 Neural networks for visual content understanding have recently evolved from convolutional ones (CNNs) to transformers. The prior (CNN) relies on small-windowed kernels to capture the regional clues, demonstrating solid local expressiveness. On the contrary, the latter (transformer) establishes long-range global connections between localities for holistic learning. Inspired by this complementary nature, there is a growing interest in designing hybrid models to best utilize each technique. Current hybrids merely replace convolutions as simple approximations of linear projection or juxtapose a convolution branch with attention, without concerning the importance of local/global modeling. To tackle this, we propose a new hybrid named Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer (ASF-former) to treat convolutional and attention branches differently with adaptive weights. Specifically, an ASF-former encoder equally splits feature channels into half to fit dual-path inputs. Then, the outputs of dual-path are fused with weighting scalars calculated from visual cues. We also design the convolutional path compactly for efficiency concerns. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks, such as ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, show that our ASF-former outperforms its CNN, transformer counterparts, and hybrid pilots in terms of accuracy (83.9% on ImageNet-1K), under similar conditions (12.9G MACs/56.7M Params, without large-scale pre-training). The code is available at: https://github.com/szx503045266/ASF-former. 用于视觉内容理解的神经网络最近已经从卷积神经网络（CNN）发展到 Transformer。先验（CNN）依靠小窗口内核来捕获区域线索，表现出扎实的局部表达能力。相反，后者（变压器）在各地之间建立远程全球联系，以实现整体学习。受这种互补性的启发，人们越来越有兴趣设计混合模型以最好地利用每种技术。当前的混合仅仅将卷积替换为线性投影的简单近似，或者将卷积分支与注意力并置，而不考虑局部/全局建模的重要性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为自适应分裂融合变压器（ASF-former）的新混合体，通过自适应权重以不同的方式处理卷积和注意力分支。具体来说，ASF 前编码器将特征通道平均分成两半以适应双路径输入。然后，双路径的输出与根据视觉线索计算的加权标量融合。出于效率考虑，我们还设计了紧凑的卷积路径。在 ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 等标准基准上进行的大量实验表明，在相似条件下（12.9G MAC/56.7M Params，无大规模预训练），我们的 ASF-former 在准确率方面优于 CNN、Transformer 对应物和混合导频（在 ImageNet-1K 上为 83.9%）。该代码位于：https://github.com/szx503045266/ASF-former。 本文提出一种名为Adaptive Split-Fusion Transformer (ASF-former)的混合模型，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer的优势，以提升视觉内容理解的性能。 Zixuan Su,Hao Zhang,Jingjing Chen,Lei Pang,Chong-Wah Ngo,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Matteo Tiezzi,Simone Marullo,Lapo Faggi,Enrico Meloni,Alessandro Betti,Stefano Melacci
title: Stochastic Coherence Over Attention Trajectory For Continuous Learning In Video Streams
title_zh: 视频流中持续学习的注意力轨迹随机一致性
comment: Accepted for publication in the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022)
abstract: Devising intelligent agents able to live in an environment and learn by observing the surroundings is a longstanding goal of Artificial Intelligence. From a bare Machine Learning perspective, challenges arise when the agent is prevented from leveraging large fully-annotated dataset, but rather the interactions with supervisory signals are sparsely distributed over space and time. This paper proposes a novel neural-network-based approach to progressively and autonomously develop pixel-wise representations in a video stream. The proposed method is based on a human-like attention mechanism that allows the agent to learn by observing what is moving in the attended locations. Spatio-temporal stochastic coherence along the attention trajectory, paired with a contrastive term, leads to an unsupervised learning criterion that naturally copes with the considered setting. Differently from most existing works, the learned representations are used in open-set class-incremental classification of each frame pixel, relying on few supervisions. Our experiments leverage 3D virtual environments and they show that the proposed agents can learn to distinguish objects just by observing the video stream. Inheriting features from state-of-the art models is not as powerful as one might expect.
summary: Devising intelligent agents able to live in an environment and learn by observing the surroundings is a longstanding goal of Artificial Intelligence. From a bare Machine Learning perspective, challenges arise when the agent is prevented from leveraging large fully-annotated dataset, but rather the interactions with supervisory signals are sparsely distributed over space and time. This paper proposes a novel neural-network-based approach to progressively and autonomously develop pixel-wise representations in a video stream. The proposed method is based on a human-like attention mechanism that allows the agent to learn by observing what is moving in the attended locations. Spatio-temporal stochastic coherence along the attention trajectory, paired with a contrastive term, leads to an unsupervised learning criterion that naturally copes with the considered setting. Differently from most existing works, the learned representations are used in open-set class-incremental classification of each frame pixel, relying on few supervisions. Our experiments leverage 3D virtual environments and they show that the proposed agents can learn to distinguish objects just by observing the video stream. Inheriting features from state-of-the art models is not as powerful as one might expect.
abstract_zh: 设计能够生活在环境中并通过观察周围环境进行学习的智能代理是人工智能的长期目标。从纯粹的机器学习角度来看，当代理无法利用大型完全注释数据集，而是与监督信号的交互在空间和时间上稀疏分布时，就会出现挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的方法，以逐步、自主地开发视频流中的像素级表示。所提出的方法基于类人注意力机制，允许代理通过观察所关注位置中正在移动的物体来学习。沿着注意力轨迹的时空随机一致性，与对比项相结合，产生了一种无监督学习标准，可以自然地应对所考虑的设置。与大多数现有工作不同，学习到的表示用于每个帧像素的开放集类增量分类，依赖于很少的监督。我们的实验利用 3D 虚拟环境，结果表明所提出的代理可以通过观察视频流来学习区分对象。从最先进的模型继承特征并不像人们想象的那么强大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力轨迹的随机一致性方法，用于视频流中的持续学习，通过无监督方式实现像素级表示学习和开放集分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据，但实际场景中监督信号稀疏且分布不均，需开发无需密集标注的自主学习方法。
AI.method: 设计类人注意力机制，结合时空随机一致性与对比损失，构建无监督学习框架，实现视频流中像素级特征的连续学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在3D虚拟环境中仅通过视频流观察即可区分物体，且优于单纯继承现有模型特征的方法。
AI.conclusion: 注意力轨迹驱动的随机一致性机制有效支持视频流持续学习，证明了无监督特征学习在开放集分类中的潜力。

title: EmpHi: Generating Empathetic Responses with Human-like Intents
title_zh: EmpHi：以类似人类的意图产生同理心反应
abstract: In empathetic conversations, humans express their empathy to others with empathetic intents. However, most existing empathetic conversational methods suffer from a lack of empathetic intents, which leads to monotonous empathy. To address the bias of the empathetic intents distribution between empathetic dialogue models and humans, we propose a novel model to generate empathetic responses with human-consistent empathetic intents, EmpHi for short. Precisely, EmpHi learns the distribution of potential empathetic intents with a discrete latent variable, then combines both implicit and explicit intent representation to generate responses with various empathetic intents. Experiments show that EmpHi outperforms state-of-the-art models in terms of empathy, relevance, and diversity on both automatic and human evaluation. Moreover, the case studies demonstrate the high interpretability and outstanding performance of our model.
summary: In empathetic conversations, humans express their empathy to others with empathetic intents. However, most existing empathetic conversational methods suffer from a lack of empathetic intents, which leads to monotonous empathy. To address the bias of the empathetic intents distribution between empathetic dialogue models and humans, we propose a novel model to generate empathetic responses with human-consistent empathetic intents, EmpHi for short. Precisely, EmpHi learns the distribution of potential empathetic intents with a discrete latent variable, then combines both implicit and explicit intent representation to generate responses with various empathetic intents. Experiments show that EmpHi outperforms state-of-the-art models in terms of empathy, relevance, and diversity on both automatic and human evaluation. Moreover, the case studies demonstrate the high interpretability and outstanding performance of our model.
abstract_zh: 在同理心对话中，人类以同理心意图表达对他人的同理心。然而，大多数现有的共情对话方法缺乏共情意图，导致同理心单调。为了解决共情对话模型和人类之间共情意图分布的偏差，我们提出了一种新的模型来生成具有与人类一致的共情意图的共情响应，简称 EmpHi。准确地说，EmpHi 通过离散潜在变量学习潜在共情意图的分布，然后结合隐式和显式意图表示来生成具有各种共情意图的响应。实验表明，EmpHi 在自动评估和人工评估的同理心、相关性和多样性方面均优于最先进的模型。此外，案例研究证明了我们的模型的高可解释性和出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出EmpHi模型，生成符合人类共情意图的多样化回应
AI.motivation: 现有模型共情意图分布与人类不一致，导致回应单调，需改进
AI.method: 通过离散潜在变量学习意图分布，结合隐式与显式意图生成回应
AI.result: EmpHi在共情、相关性和多样性指标上优于现有模型，且具有高可解释性
AI.conclusion: EmpHi有效解决共情意图分布偏差，生成更符合人类意图的回应

search_text: EmpHi: Generating Empathetic Responses with Human-like Intents EmpHi：以类似人类的意图产生同理心反应 In empathetic conversations, humans express their empathy to others with empathetic intents. However, most existing empathetic conversational methods suffer from a lack of empathetic intents, which leads to monotonous empathy. To address the bias of the empathetic intents distribution between empathetic dialogue models and humans, we propose a novel model to generate empathetic responses with human-consistent empathetic intents, EmpHi for short. Precisely, EmpHi learns the distribution of potential empathetic intents with a discrete latent variable, then combines both implicit and explicit intent representation to generate responses with various empathetic intents. Experiments show that EmpHi outperforms state-of-the-art models in terms of empathy, relevance, and diversity on both automatic and human evaluation. Moreover, the case studies demonstrate the high interpretability and outstanding performance of our model. 在同理心对话中，人类以同理心意图表达对他人的同理心。然而，大多数现有的共情对话方法缺乏共情意图，导致同理心单调。为了解决共情对话模型和人类之间共情意图分布的偏差，我们提出了一种新的模型来生成具有与人类一致的共情意图的共情响应，简称 EmpHi。准确地说，EmpHi 通过离散潜在变量学习潜在共情意图的分布，然后结合隐式和显式意图表示来生成具有各种共情意图的响应。实验表明，EmpHi 在自动评估和人工评估的同理心、相关性和多样性方面均优于最先进的模型。此外，案例研究证明了我们的模型的高可解释性和出色的性能。 提出EmpHi模型，生成符合人类共情意图的多样化回应 Mao Yan Chen,Siheng Li,Yujiu Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Qize Jiang,Minhao Qin,Shengmin Shi,Weiwei Sun,Baihua Zheng
title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Traffic Signal Control through Universal Communication Method
title_zh: 通过通用通信方法进行交通信号控制的多智能体强化学习
abstract: How to coordinate the communication among intersections effectively in real complex traffic scenarios with multi-intersection is challenging. Existing approaches only enable the communication in a heuristic manner without considering the content/importance of information to be shared. In this paper, we propose a universal communication form UniComm between intersections. UniComm embeds massive observations collected at one agent into crucial predictions of their impact on its neighbors, which improves the communication efficiency and is universal across existing methods. We also propose a concise network UniLight to make full use of communications enabled by UniComm. Experimental results on real datasets demonstrate that UniComm universally improves the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods, and UniLight significantly outperforms existing methods on a wide range of traffic situations.
summary: How to coordinate the communication among intersections effectively in real complex traffic scenarios with multi-intersection is challenging. Existing approaches only enable the communication in a heuristic manner without considering the content/importance of information to be shared. In this paper, we propose a universal communication form UniComm between intersections. UniComm embeds massive observations collected at one agent into crucial predictions of their impact on its neighbors, which improves the communication efficiency and is universal across existing methods. We also propose a concise network UniLight to make full use of communications enabled by UniComm. Experimental results on real datasets demonstrate that UniComm universally improves the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods, and UniLight significantly outperforms existing methods on a wide range of traffic situations.
abstract_zh: 在多交叉口的真实复杂交通场景中，如何有效协调交叉口之间的通信是一个挑战。现有方法仅允许以启发式方式进行通信，而没有考虑要共享的信息的内容/重要性。在本文中，我们提出了一种交叉路口之间的通用通信形式 UniComm。 UniComm 将在一个代理处收集的大量观察结果嵌入到对其对其邻居的影响的关键预测中，这提高了通信效率并且在现有方法中具有通用性。我们还提出了一个简洁的网络 UniLight，以充分利用 UniComm 实现的通信。真实数据集上的实验结果表明，UniComm 普遍提高了现有最先进方法的性能，并且 UniLight 在各种交通情况下都显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用通信方法UniComm和网络结构UniLight，用于提升多交叉口交通信号控制中的通信效率与控制效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多交叉口通信中缺乏对信息内容及重要性的考虑，导致通信效率低下且难以适应复杂交通场景。
AI.method: 设计通用通信框架UniComm，将单个智能体的观测转化为对邻居的关键影响预测；结合简洁网络UniLight充分利用通信信息进行决策优化。
AI.result: 实验表明UniComm可普遍提升现有方法性能，UniLight在多种交通场景下显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通用通信方法与优化网络结构有效解决了多交叉口协同控制难题，为复杂交通场景提供了高效解决方案。

title: TranSiam: Fusing Multimodal Visual Features Using Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: TranSiam：使用 Transformer 融合多模态视觉特征进行医学图像分割
abstract: Automatic segmentation of medical images based on multi-modality is an important topic for disease diagnosis. Although the convolutional neural network (CNN) has been proven to have excellent performance in image segmentation tasks, it is difficult to obtain global information. The lack of global information will seriously affect the accuracy of the segmentation results of the lesion area. In addition, there are visual representation differences between multimodal data of the same patient. These differences will affect the results of the automatic segmentation methods. To solve these problems, we propose a segmentation method suitable for multimodal medical images that can capture global information, named TranSiam. TranSiam is a 2D dual path network that extracts features of different modalities. In each path, we utilize convolution to extract detailed information in low level stage, and design a ICMT block to extract global information in high level stage. ICMT block embeds convolution in the transformer, which can extract global information while retaining spatial and detailed information. Furthermore, we design a novel fusion mechanism based on cross attention and selfattention, called TMM block, which can effectively fuse features between different modalities. On the BraTS 2019 and BraTS 2020 multimodal datasets, we have a significant improvement in accuracy over other popular methods.
summary: Automatic segmentation of medical images based on multi-modality is an important topic for disease diagnosis. Although the convolutional neural network (CNN) has been proven to have excellent performance in image segmentation tasks, it is difficult to obtain global information. The lack of global information will seriously affect the accuracy of the segmentation results of the lesion area. In addition, there are visual representation differences between multimodal data of the same patient. These differences will affect the results of the automatic segmentation methods. To solve these problems, we propose a segmentation method suitable for multimodal medical images that can capture global information, named TranSiam. TranSiam is a 2D dual path network that extracts features of different modalities. In each path, we utilize convolution to extract detailed information in low level stage, and design a ICMT block to extract global information in high level stage. ICMT block embeds convolution in the transformer, which can extract global information while retaining spatial and detailed information. Furthermore, we design a novel fusion mechanism based on cross attention and selfattention, called TMM block, which can effectively fuse features between different modalities. On the BraTS 2019 and BraTS 2020 multimodal datasets, we have a significant improvement in accuracy over other popular methods.
abstract_zh: 基于多模态的医学图像自动分割是疾病诊断的重要课题。尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）已被证明在图像分割任务中具有出色的性能，但很难获得全局信息。全局信息的缺乏将严重影响病灶区域分割结果的准确性。此外，同一患者的多模态数据之间存在视觉表示差异。这些差异会影响自动分割方法的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种适合多模态医学图像、可以捕获全局信息的分割方法，称为TranSiam。 TranSiam 是一个 2D 双路径网络，可提取不同模态的特征。在每条路径中，我们利用卷积在低级阶段提取详细信息，并设计一个 ICMT 块在高级阶段提取全局信息。 ICMT块在变压器中嵌入卷积，可以提取全局信息，同时保留空间和细节信息。此外，我们设计了一种基于交叉注意力和自注意力的新型融合机制，称为TMM块，它可以有效地融合不同模态之间的特征。在 BraTS 2019 和 BraTS 2020 多模态数据集上，我们在准确性上比其他流行方法有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TranSiam方法，通过融合多模态医学图像的视觉特征，提升病变区域分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在医学图像分割中难以获取全局信息，且多模态数据间的视觉差异会影响分割效果。
AI.method: 设计2D双路径网络，结合卷积提取局部细节与ICMT块（融合卷积和Transformer）提取全局信息，并通过TMM块（基于交叉注意力和自注意力的融合机制）实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2019和2020数据集上，TranSiam相比其他方法显著提升了分割精度。
AI.conclusion: TranSiam通过Transformer机制有效捕捉全局信息并融合多模态特征，解决了CNN在医学图像分割中的局限性。

title: SkillNet-NLG: General-Purpose Natural Language Generation with a Sparsely Activated Approach
title_zh: SkillNet-NLG：采用稀疏激活方法的通用自然语言生成
abstract: We present SkillNet-NLG, a sparsely activated approach that handles many natural language generation tasks with one model. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the parameters, SkillNet-NLG selectively activates relevant parts of the parameters to accomplish a task, where the relevance is controlled by a set of predefined skills. The strength of such model design is that it provides an opportunity to precisely adapt relevant skills to learn new tasks effectively. We evaluate on Chinese natural language generation tasks. Results show that, with only one model file, SkillNet-NLG outperforms previous best performance methods on four of five tasks. SkillNet-NLG performs better than two multi-task learning baselines (a dense model and a Mixture-of-Expert model) and achieves comparable performance to task-specific models. Lastly, SkillNet-NLG surpasses baseline systems when being adapted to new tasks.
summary: We present SkillNet-NLG, a sparsely activated approach that handles many natural language generation tasks with one model. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the parameters, SkillNet-NLG selectively activates relevant parts of the parameters to accomplish a task, where the relevance is controlled by a set of predefined skills. The strength of such model design is that it provides an opportunity to precisely adapt relevant skills to learn new tasks effectively. We evaluate on Chinese natural language generation tasks. Results show that, with only one model file, SkillNet-NLG outperforms previous best performance methods on four of five tasks. SkillNet-NLG performs better than two multi-task learning baselines (a dense model and a Mixture-of-Expert model) and achieves comparable performance to task-specific models. Lastly, SkillNet-NLG surpasses baseline systems when being adapted to new tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SkillNet-NLG，这是一种稀疏激活的方法，可以使用一个模型处理许多自然语言生成任务。与始终激活所有参数的传统密集模型不同，SkillNet-NLG 选择性地激活参数的相关部分来完成任务，其中相关性由一组预定义的技能控制。这种模型设计的优点在于，它提供了精确调整相关技能以有效学习新任务的机会。我们评估中文自然语言生成任务。结果表明，仅使用一个模型文件，SkillNet-NLG 在五项任务中的四项上优于之前的最佳性能方法。 SkillNet-NLG 的性能优于两个多任务学习基线（密集模型和专家混合模型），并且实现了与特定任务模型相当的性能。最后，SkillNet-NLG 在适应新任务时超越了基线系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillNet-NLG，一种通过稀疏激活机制实现多任务自然语言生成的通用模型。
AI.motivation: 传统密集模型参数始终全量激活，导致效率低下且难以灵活适配新任务，需设计可选择性激活参数的模型架构。
AI.method: 基于预定义技能集，通过稀疏激活机制选择性调用相关参数模块，实现单模型多任务处理。
AI.result: 在中文NLG任务中，该模型在五个任务中四个超越先前最佳方法，优于两种多任务学习基线，且适应新任务时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏激活架构为通用自然语言生成提供了高效且灵活的解决方案，有效平衡了模型性能与计算资源消耗。

search_text: SkillNet-NLG: General-Purpose Natural Language Generation with a Sparsely Activated Approach SkillNet-NLG：采用稀疏激活方法的通用自然语言生成 We present SkillNet-NLG, a sparsely activated approach that handles many natural language generation tasks with one model. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the parameters, SkillNet-NLG selectively activates relevant parts of the parameters to accomplish a task, where the relevance is controlled by a set of predefined skills. The strength of such model design is that it provides an opportunity to precisely adapt relevant skills to learn new tasks effectively. We evaluate on Chinese natural language generation tasks. Results show that, with only one model file, SkillNet-NLG outperforms previous best performance methods on four of five tasks. SkillNet-NLG performs better than two multi-task learning baselines (a dense model and a Mixture-of-Expert model) and achieves comparable performance to task-specific models. Lastly, SkillNet-NLG surpasses baseline systems when being adapted to new tasks. 我们提出了 SkillNet-NLG，这是一种稀疏激活的方法，可以使用一个模型处理许多自然语言生成任务。与始终激活所有参数的传统密集模型不同，SkillNet-NLG 选择性地激活参数的相关部分来完成任务，其中相关性由一组预定义的技能控制。这种模型设计的优点在于，它提供了精确调整相关技能以有效学习新任务的机会。我们评估中文自然语言生成任务。结果表明，仅使用一个模型文件，SkillNet-NLG 在五项任务中的四项上优于之前的最佳性能方法。 SkillNet-NLG 的性能优于两个多任务学习基线（密集模型和专家混合模型），并且实现了与特定任务模型相当的性能。最后，SkillNet-NLG 在适应新任务时超越了基线系统。 本文提出SkillNet-NLG，一种通过稀疏激活机制实现多任务自然语言生成的通用模型。 Junwei Liao,Duyu Tang,Fan Zhang,Shuming Shi cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Collaborative Target Search with a Visual Drone Swarm: An Adaptive Curriculum Embedded Multistage Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 视觉无人机群的协作目标搜索：一种自适应课程嵌入式多级强化学习方法
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Equipping drones with target search capabilities is highly desirable for applications in disaster rescue and smart warehouse delivery systems. Multiple intelligent drones that can collaborate with each other and maneuver among obstacles show more effectiveness in accomplishing tasks in a shorter amount of time. However, carrying out collaborative target search (CTS) without prior target information is extremely challenging, especially with a visual drone swarm. In this work, we propose a novel data-efficient deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach called adaptive curriculum embedded multistage learning (ACEMSL) to address these challenges, mainly 3-D sparse reward space exploration with limited visual perception and collaborative behavior requirements. Specifically, we decompose the CTS task into several subtasks including individual obstacle avoidance, target search, and inter-agent collaboration, and progressively train the agents with multistage learning. Meanwhile, an adaptive embedded curriculum (AEC) is designed, where the task difficulty level (TDL) can be adaptively adjusted based on the success rate (SR) achieved in training. ACEMSL allows data-efficient training and individual-team reward allocation for the visual drone swarm. Furthermore, we deploy the trained model over a real visual drone swarm and perform CTS operations without fine-tuning. Extensive simulations and real-world flight tests validate the effectiveness and generalizability of ACEMSL. The project is available at https://github.com/NTU-UAVG/CTS-visual-drone-swarm.git.
summary: Equipping drones with target search capabilities is highly desirable for applications in disaster rescue and smart warehouse delivery systems. Multiple intelligent drones that can collaborate with each other and maneuver among obstacles show more effectiveness in accomplishing tasks in a shorter amount of time. However, carrying out collaborative target search (CTS) without prior target information is extremely challenging, especially with a visual drone swarm. In this work, we propose a novel data-efficient deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach called adaptive curriculum embedded multistage learning (ACEMSL) to address these challenges, mainly 3-D sparse reward space exploration with limited visual perception and collaborative behavior requirements. Specifically, we decompose the CTS task into several subtasks including individual obstacle avoidance, target search, and inter-agent collaboration, and progressively train the agents with multistage learning. Meanwhile, an adaptive embedded curriculum (AEC) is designed, where the task difficulty level (TDL) can be adaptively adjusted based on the success rate (SR) achieved in training. ACEMSL allows data-efficient training and individual-team reward allocation for the visual drone swarm. Furthermore, we deploy the trained model over a real visual drone swarm and perform CTS operations without fine-tuning. Extensive simulations and real-world flight tests validate the effectiveness and generalizability of ACEMSL. The project is available at https://github.com/NTU-UAVG/CTS-visual-drone-swarm.git.
abstract_zh: 为无人机配备目标搜索功能对于灾难救援和智能仓库配送系统的应用非常理想。多架智能无人机可以相互协作并在障碍物之间机动，可以更有效地在更短的时间内完成任务。然而，在没有先验目标信息的情况下进行协作目标搜索（CTS）极具挑战性，尤其是在视觉无人机群的情况下。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据高效深度强化学习（DRL）方法，称为自适应课程嵌入式多阶段学习（ACEMSL）来解决这些挑战，主要是视觉感知和协作行为要求有限的 3D 稀疏奖励空间探索。具体来说，我们将 CTS 任务分解为多个子任务，包括个体避障、目标搜索和智能体间协作，并通过多阶段学习逐步训练智能体。同时，设计了自适应嵌入式课程（AEC），可以根据训练的成功率（SR）自适应调整任务难度级别（TDL）。 ACEMSL 允许对视觉无人机群进行数据高效的训练和个人团队奖励分配。此外，我们将经过训练的模型部署在真实的视觉无人机群上，并无需微调即可执行 CTS 操作。广泛的模拟和真实飞行测试验证了 ACEMSL 的有效性和普遍性。该项目位于 https://github.com/NTU-UAVG/CTS-visual-drone-swarm.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应课程嵌入多阶段强化学习（ACEMSL）的方法，用于解决视觉无人机群在无先验目标信息下的协同目标搜索（CTS）问题。
AI.motivation: 多无人机协同搜索在灾难救援和智能仓储中具有重要意义，但面对稀疏奖励空间、视觉感知限制及协作要求时，传统方法难以高效训练。
AI.method: 将CTS任务分解为避障、目标搜索和协作三个子任务，通过多阶段学习逐步训练，并设计自适应嵌入课程（AEC）动态调整任务难度，实现数据高效训练与奖励分配。
AI.result: 仿真与真实飞行测试验证了ACEMSL在复杂环境中的有效性与泛化性，无需微调即可部署于实际视觉无人机群。
AI.conclusion: ACEMSL通过课程学习与多阶段训练有效解决了视觉无人机群协同搜索的挑战，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ishrat Jahan Ananya,Sarah Suad,Shadab Hafiz Choudhury,Mohammad Ashrafuzzaman Khan
title: A Comparative Study on Approaches to Acoustic Scene Classification using CNNs
title_zh: 使用 CNN 进行声学场景分类方法的比较研究
comment: Presented at 2021 Mexican International Conference on Artificial Intelligence. Published in Advances in Computational Intelligence, MICAI 2021, Lecture Notes in Computer Science. 12 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables
comments: Presented at 2021 Mexican International Conference on Artificial Intelligence. Published in Advances in Computational Intelligence, MICAI 2021, Lecture Notes in Computer Science. 12 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Acoustic scene classification is a process of characterizing and classifying the environments from sound recordings. The first step is to generate features (representations) from the recorded sound and then classify the background environments. However, different kinds of representations have dramatic effects on the accuracy of the classification. In this paper, we explored the three such representations on classification accuracy using neural networks. We investigated the spectrograms, MFCCs, and embeddings representations using different CNN networks and autoencoders. Our dataset consists of sounds from three settings of indoors and outdoors environments - thus the dataset contains sound from six different kinds of environments. We found that the spectrogram representation has the highest classification accuracy while MFCC has the lowest classification accuracy. We reported our findings, insights as well as some guidelines to achieve better accuracy for environment classification using sounds.
summary: Acoustic scene classification is a process of characterizing and classifying the environments from sound recordings. The first step is to generate features (representations) from the recorded sound and then classify the background environments. However, different kinds of representations have dramatic effects on the accuracy of the classification. In this paper, we explored the three such representations on classification accuracy using neural networks. We investigated the spectrograms, MFCCs, and embeddings representations using different CNN networks and autoencoders. Our dataset consists of sounds from three settings of indoors and outdoors environments - thus the dataset contains sound from six different kinds of environments. We found that the spectrogram representation has the highest classification accuracy while MFCC has the lowest classification accuracy. We reported our findings, insights as well as some guidelines to achieve better accuracy for environment classification using sounds.
abstract_zh: 声学场景分类是对录音中的环境进行表征和分类的过程。第一步是从录制的声音中生成特征（表示），然后对背景环境进行分类。然而，不同种类的表示对分类的准确性有巨大的影响。在本文中，我们使用神经网络探讨了分类准确性的三种表示形式。我们使用不同的 CNN 网络和自动编码器研究了频谱图、MFCC 和嵌入表示。我们的数据集由来自室内和室外环境的三种设置的声音组成 - 因此该数据集包含来自六种不同环境的声音。我们发现频谱图表示的分类精度最高，而 MFCC 的分类精度最低。我们报告了我们的发现、见解以及一些指南，以提高使用声音进行环境分类的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本论文比较了使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行声学场景分类的三种特征表示方法（频谱图、MFCC和嵌入）的效果。
AI.motivation: 不同特征表示对声学场景分类的准确性有显著影响，需探索最优表示方法以提高分类性能。
AI.method: 采用CNN和自编码器，对三种特征表示（频谱图、MFCC、嵌入）在包含六种环境（室内外各三类）的数据集上进行分类实验。
AI.result: 频谱图表示的分类准确率最高，MFCC表示最低，同时提出了提升环境分类准确性的指导建议。
AI.conclusion: 频谱图在声学场景分类任务中表现最优，应优先采用该特征表示结合CNN模型以提高分类效果。
