conclusion: 频谱图在声学场景分类任务中表现最优，应优先采用该特征表示结合CNN模型以提高分类效果。
search_text: A Comparative Study on Approaches to Acoustic Scene Classification using CNNs 使用 CNN 进行声学场景分类方法的比较研究 Acoustic scene classification is a process of characterizing and classifying the environments from sound recordings. The first step is to generate features (representations) from the recorded sound and then classify the background environments. However, different kinds of representations have dramatic effects on the accuracy of the classification. In this paper, we explored the three such representations on classification accuracy using neural networks. We investigated the spectrograms, MFCCs, and embeddings representations using different CNN networks and autoencoders. Our dataset consists of sounds from three settings of indoors and outdoors environments - thus the dataset contains sound from six different kinds of environments. We found that the spectrogram representation has the highest classification accuracy while MFCC has the lowest classification accuracy. We reported our findings, insights as well as some guidelines to achieve better accuracy for environment classification using sounds. 声学场景分类是对录音中的环境进行表征和分类的过程。第一步是从录制的声音中生成特征（表示），然后对背景环境进行分类。然而，不同种类的表示对分类的准确性有巨大的影响。在本文中，我们使用神经网络探讨了分类准确性的三种表示形式。我们使用不同的 CNN 网络和自动编码器研究了频谱图、MFCC 和嵌入表示。我们的数据集由来自室内和室外环境的三种设置的声音组成 - 因此该数据集包含来自六种不同环境的声音。我们发现频谱图表示的分类精度最高，而 MFCC 的分类精度最低。我们报告了我们的发现、见解以及一些指南，以提高使用声音进行环境分类的准确性。 本论文比较了使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行声学场景分类的三种特征表示方法（频谱图、MFCC和嵌入）的效果。 Ishrat Jahan Ananya,Sarah Suad,Shadab Hafiz Choudhury,Mohammad Ashrafuzzaman Khan cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhuqing Zhang,Yanmei Jiao,Shoudong Huang,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Map-based Visual-Inertial Localization: Consistency and Complexity
title_zh: 基于地图的视觉惯性定位：一致性和复杂性
abstract: Drift-free localization is essential for autonomous vehicles. In this paper, we address the problem by proposing a filter-based framework, which integrates the visual-inertial odometry and the measurements of the features in the pre-built map. In this framework, the transformation between the odometry frame and the map frame is augmented into the state and estimated on the fly. Besides, we maintain only the keyframe poses in the map and employ Schmidt extended Kalman filter to update the state partially, so that the uncertainty of the map information can be consistently considered with low computational cost. Moreover, we theoretically demonstrate that the ever-changing linearization points of the estimated state can introduce spurious information to the augmented system and make the original four-dimensional unobservable subspace vanish, leading to inconsistent estimation in practice. To relieve this problem, we employ first-estimate Jacobian (FEJ) to maintain the correct observability properties of the augmented system. Furthermore, we introduce an observability-constrained updating method to compensate for the significant accumulated error after the long-term absence (can be 3 minutes and 1 km) of map-based measurements. Through simulations, the consistent estimation of our proposed algorithm is validated. Through real-world experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed algorithm runs successfully on four kinds of datasets with the lower computational cost (20% time-saving) and the better estimation accuracy (45% trajectory error reduction) compared with the baseline algorithm VINS-Fusion, whereas VINS-Fusion fails to give bounded localization performance on three of four datasets because of its inconsistent estimation.
summary: Drift-free localization is essential for autonomous vehicles. In this paper, we address the problem by proposing a filter-based framework, which integrates the visual-inertial odometry and the measurements of the features in the pre-built map. In this framework, the transformation between the odometry frame and the map frame is augmented into the state and estimated on the fly. Besides, we maintain only the keyframe poses in the map and employ Schmidt extended Kalman filter to update the state partially, so that the uncertainty of the map information can be consistently considered with low computational cost. Moreover, we theoretically demonstrate that the ever-changing linearization points of the estimated state can introduce spurious information to the augmented system and make the original four-dimensional unobservable subspace vanish, leading to inconsistent estimation in practice. To relieve this problem, we employ first-estimate Jacobian (FEJ) to maintain the correct observability properties of the augmented system. Furthermore, we introduce an observability-constrained updating method to compensate for the significant accumulated error after the long-term absence (can be 3 minutes and 1 km) of map-based measurements. Through simulations, the consistent estimation of our proposed algorithm is validated. Through real-world experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed algorithm runs successfully on four kinds of datasets with the lower computational cost (20% time-saving) and the better estimation accuracy (45% trajectory error reduction) compared with the baseline algorithm VINS-Fusion, whereas VINS-Fusion fails to give bounded localization performance on three of four datasets because of its inconsistent estimation.
abstract_zh: 无漂移定位对于自动驾驶汽车至关重要。在本文中，我们通过提出一个基于过滤器的框架来解决这个问题，该框架集成了视觉惯性里程计和预建地图中特征的测量。在此框架中，里程计框架和地图框架之间的转换被增强到状态并动态估计。此外，我们只维护地图中的关键帧位姿，并采用施密特扩展卡尔曼滤波器来部分更新状态，从而可以以较低的计算成本一致地考虑地图信息的不确定性。此外，我们从理论上证明，估计状态不断变化的线性化点会给增强系统引入虚假信息，并使原始的四维不可观测子空间消失，从而导致实践中估计的不一致。为了缓解这个问题，我们采用首次估计雅可比行列式（FEJ）来维持增强系统的正确可观测性。此外，我们引入了可观测性约束的更新方法，以补偿长期缺少基于地图的测量（可以是 3 分钟和 1 公里）后的显着累积误差。通过仿真，验证了我们提出的算法的一致性估计。通过真实世界的实验，我们证明了我们提出的算法在四种数据集上成功运行，与基线算法 VINS-Fusion 相比，计算成本更低（节省 20% 时间），估计精度更高（轨迹误差减少 45%），而 VINS-Fusion 由于其估计不一致，无法在四分之三的数据集上提供有限的定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于地图的视觉惯性定位框架，通过整合视觉惯性里程计和预构建地图特征测量，实现无漂移的自主车辆定位。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉惯性定位方法在长期无地图测量时易出现不一致性，导致定位性能下降，需解决估计不一致性和计算复杂度问题。
AI.method: 提出滤波框架，将里程计与地图坐标系变换纳入状态估计，采用改进的施密特扩展卡尔曼滤波（SEKF）和首次估计雅可比（FEJ）保持可观测性，并引入可观测性约束更新方法补偿长期无地图测量误差。
AI.result: 仿真和真实实验验证了算法一致性，相比VINS-Fusion实现20%计算时间节省和45%轨迹误差降低，且在四个数据集中三个表现优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过理论分析与改进滤波技术，在保证计算效率的同时解决了视觉惯性定位中的不一致性问题，提升了长期定位鲁棒性。

search_text: Map-based Visual-Inertial Localization: Consistency and Complexity 基于地图的视觉惯性定位：一致性和复杂性 Drift-free localization is essential for autonomous vehicles. In this paper, we address the problem by proposing a filter-based framework, which integrates the visual-inertial odometry and the measurements of the features in the pre-built map. In this framework, the transformation between the odometry frame and the map frame is augmented into the state and estimated on the fly. Besides, we maintain only the keyframe poses in the map and employ Schmidt extended Kalman filter to update the state partially, so that the uncertainty of the map information can be consistently considered with low computational cost. Moreover, we theoretically demonstrate that the ever-changing linearization points of the estimated state can introduce spurious information to the augmented system and make the original four-dimensional unobservable subspace vanish, leading to inconsistent estimation in practice. To relieve this problem, we employ first-estimate Jacobian (FEJ) to maintain the correct observability properties of the augmented system. Furthermore, we introduce an observability-constrained updating method to compensate for the significant accumulated error after the long-term absence (can be 3 minutes and 1 km) of map-based measurements. Through simulations, the consistent estimation of our proposed algorithm is validated. Through real-world experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed algorithm runs successfully on four kinds of datasets with the lower computational cost (20% time-saving) and the better estimation accuracy (45% trajectory error reduction) compared with the baseline algorithm VINS-Fusion, whereas VINS-Fusion fails to give bounded localization performance on three of four datasets because of its inconsistent estimation. 无漂移定位对于自动驾驶汽车至关重要。在本文中，我们通过提出一个基于过滤器的框架来解决这个问题，该框架集成了视觉惯性里程计和预建地图中特征的测量。在此框架中，里程计框架和地图框架之间的转换被增强到状态并动态估计。此外，我们只维护地图中的关键帧位姿，并采用施密特扩展卡尔曼滤波器来部分更新状态，从而可以以较低的计算成本一致地考虑地图信息的不确定性。此外，我们从理论上证明，估计状态不断变化的线性化点会给增强系统引入虚假信息，并使原始的四维不可观测子空间消失，从而导致实践中估计的不一致。为了缓解这个问题，我们采用首次估计雅可比行列式（FEJ）来维持增强系统的正确可观测性。此外，我们引入了可观测性约束的更新方法，以补偿长期缺少基于地图的测量（可以是 3 分钟和 1 公里）后的显着累积误差。通过仿真，验证了我们提出的算法的一致性估计。通过真实世界的实验，我们证明了我们提出的算法在四种数据集上成功运行，与基线算法 VINS-Fusion 相比，计算成本更低（节省 20% 时间），估计精度更高（轨迹误差减少 45%），而 VINS-Fusion 由于其估计不一致，无法在四分之三的数据集上提供有限的定位性能。 本文提出了一种基于地图的视觉惯性定位框架，通过整合视觉惯性里程计和预构建地图特征测量，实现无漂移的自主车辆定位。 Zhuqing Zhang,Yanmei Jiao,Shoudong Huang,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong cs.RO

title: Budgeted Out-tree Maximization with Submodular Prizes
title_zh: 具有子模块奖励的预算外树最大化
abstract: We consider a variant of the prize collecting Steiner tree problem in which we are given a \emph{directed graph} $D=(V,A)$, a monotone submodular prize function $p:2^V \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+ \cup \{0\}$, a cost function $c:V \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}^{+}$, a root vertex $r \in V$, and a budget $B$. The aim is to find an out-subtree $T$ of $D$ rooted at $r$ that costs at most $B$ and maximizes the prize function. We call this problem \emph{Directed Rooted Submodular Tree} (\textbf{DRSO}). Very recently, Ghuge and Nagarajan [SODA\ 2020] gave an optimal quasi-polynomial-time $O\left(\frac{\log n'}{\log \log n'}\right)$-approximation algorithm, where $n'$ is the number of vertices in an optimal solution, for the case in which the costs are associated to the edges. In this paper, we give a polynomial-time algorithm for \textbf{DRSO} that guarantees an approximation factor of $O(\sqrt{B}/ε^3)$ at the cost of a budget violation of a factor $1+ε$, for any $ε\in (0,1]$. The same result holds for the edge-cost case, to the best of our knowledge this is the first polynomial-time approximation algorithm for this case. We further show that the unrooted version of \textbf{DRSO} can be approximated to a factor of $O(\sqrt{B})$ without budget violation, which is an improvement over the factor $O(Δ\sqrt{B})$ given in~[Kuo et al.\ IEEE/ACM\ Trans.\ Netw.\ 2015] for the undirected and unrooted case, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree of the graph. Finally, we provide some new/improved approximation bounds for several related problems, including the additive-prize version of \textbf{DRSO}, the maximum budgeted connected set cover problem, and the budgeted sensor cover problem.
summary: We consider a variant of the prize collecting Steiner tree problem in which we are given a \emph{directed graph} $D=(V,A)$, a monotone submodular prize function $p:2^V \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+ \cup \{0\}$, a cost function $c:V \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}^{+}$, a root vertex $r \in V$, and a budget $B$. The aim is to find an out-subtree $T$ of $D$ rooted at $r$ that costs at most $B$ and maximizes the prize function. We call this problem \emph{Directed Rooted Submodular Tree} (\textbf{DRSO}). Very recently, Ghuge and Nagarajan [SODA\ 2020] gave an optimal quasi-polynomial-time $O\left(\frac{\log n'}{\log \log n'}\right)$-approximation algorithm, where $n'$ is the number of vertices in an optimal solution, for the case in which the costs are associated to the edges. In this paper, we give a polynomial-time algorithm for \textbf{DRSO} that guarantees an approximation factor of $O(\sqrt{B}/ε^3)$ at the cost of a budget violation of a factor $1+ε$, for any $ε\in (0,1]$. The same result holds for the edge-cost case, to the best of our knowledge this is the first polynomial-time approximation algorithm for this case. We further show that the unrooted version of \textbf{DRSO} can be approximated to a factor of $O(\sqrt{B})$ without budget violation, which is an improvement over the factor $O(Δ\sqrt{B})$ given in~[Kuo et al.\ IEEE/ACM\ Trans.\ Netw.\ 2015] for the undirected and unrooted case, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree of the graph. Finally, we provide some new/improved approximation bounds for several related problems, including the additive-prize version of \textbf{DRSO}, the maximum budgeted connected set cover problem, and the budgeted sensor cover problem.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑奖励斯坦纳树问题的一个变体，其中给定一个 \emph{有向图} $D=(V,A)$、一个单调子模奖励函数 $p:2^V \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+ \cup \{0\}$、一个成本函数 $c:V \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}^{+}$、一个根顶点 $r \in V$ 和一个预算 $B$。目的是找到以 $r$ 为根的 $D$ 的外子树 $T$，其成本最多为 $B$ 并最大化奖励函数。我们称这个问题为\emph{有向有根子模树} (\textbf{DRSO})。最近，Ghuge 和 Nagarajan [SODA\ 2020] 给出了一种最佳拟多项式时间 $O\left(\frac{\log n'}{\log \log n'}\right)$ 逼近算法，其中 $n'$ 是最优解中的顶点数量，适用于成本与边相关的情况。在本文中，我们给出了 \textbf{DRSO} 的多项式时间算法，对于任何 $ε\in (0,1]$，它保证了 $O(\sqrt{B}/ε^3)$ 的逼近因子，但代价是违反预算 $1+ε$。对于边缘成本情况，同样的结果也成立，据我们所知，这是针对这种情况的第一个多项式时间逼近算法。我们进一步表明\textbf{DRSO} 的无根版本可以在不违反预算的情况下近似为 $O(\sqrt{B})$ 因子，这是对无向和无根情况的 $O(Δ\sqrt{B})$ 因子的改进，其中 $Δ$ 是图的最大度数。几个相关问题的新的/改进的近似界限，包括 \textbf{DRSO} 的附加奖版本、最大预算连接集覆盖问题和预算传感器覆盖问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在有向图中寻找根节点为r的子树，使其成本不超过预算B并最大化子模奖赏函数的问题，称为定向根子模树问题（DRSO）。
AI.motivation: 现有算法针对边成本场景的近似比为次多项式时间，但缺乏针对顶点成本的多项式时间算法，且未解决无根场景的优化问题。
AI.method: 设计多项式时间算法，通过预算违反因子1+ε实现O(√B/ε³)近似比，并扩展至边成本场景与无根版本，改进了相关问题的近似界。
AI.result: 首次提出DRSO的多项式时间算法，改进无根场景近似比至O(√B)，并优化了加法奖赏版DRSO、最大预算连通集覆盖等关联问题的界。
AI.conclusion: 本文为DRSO问题提供了高效近似算法，在多项式时间内实现更优近似比，同时扩展至多个相关场景，推动了预算约束子模优化领域的发展。

tldr: 本文研究了在有向图中寻找根节点为r的子树，使其成本不超过预算B并最大化子模奖赏函数的问题，称为定向根子模树问题（DRSO）。
motivation: 现有算法针对边成本场景的近似比为次多项式时间，但缺乏针对顶点成本的多项式时间算法，且未解决无根场景的优化问题。
method: 设计多项式时间算法，通过预算违反因子1+ε实现O(√B/ε³)近似比，并扩展至边成本场景与无根版本，改进了相关问题的近似界。
result: 首次提出DRSO的多项式时间算法，改进无根场景近似比至O(√B)，并优化了加法奖赏版DRSO、最大预算连通集覆盖等关联问题的界。
conclusion: 本文为DRSO问题提供了高效近似算法，在多项式时间内实现更优近似比，同时扩展至多个相关场景，推动了预算约束子模优化领域的发展。
search_text: Budgeted Out-tree Maximization with Submodular Prizes 具有子模块奖励的预算外树最大化 We consider a variant of the prize collecting Steiner tree problem in which we are given a \emph{directed graph} $D=(V,A)$, a monotone submodular prize function $p:2^V \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+ \cup \{0\}$, a cost function $c:V \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}^{+}$, a root vertex $r \in V$, and a budget $B$. The aim is to find an out-subtree $T$ of $D$ rooted at $r$ that costs at most $B$ and maximizes the prize function. We call this problem \emph{Directed Rooted Submodular Tree} (\textbf{DRSO}). Very recently, Ghuge and Nagarajan [SODA\ 2020] gave an optimal quasi-polynomial-time $O\left(\frac{\log n'}{\log \log n'}\right)$-approximation algorithm, where $n'$ is the number of vertices in an optimal solution, for the case in which the costs are associated to the edges. In this paper, we give a polynomial-time algorithm for \textbf{DRSO} that guarantees an approximation factor of $O(\sqrt{B}/ε^3)$ at the cost of a budget violation of a factor $1+ε$, for any $ε\in (0,1]$. The same result holds for the edge-cost case, to the best of our knowledge this is the first polynomial-time approximation algorithm for this case. We further show that the unrooted version of \textbf{DRSO} can be approximated to a factor of $O(\sqrt{B})$ without budget violation, which is an improvement over the factor $O(Δ\sqrt{B})$ given in~[Kuo et al.\ IEEE/ACM\ Trans.\ Netw.\ 2015] for the undirected and unrooted case, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree of the graph. Finally, we provide some new/improved approximation bounds for several related problems, including the additive-prize version of \textbf{DRSO}, the maximum budgeted connected set cover problem, and the budgeted sensor cover problem. 我们考虑奖励斯坦纳树问题的一个变体，其中给定一个 \emph{有向图} $D=(V,A)$、一个单调子模奖励函数 $p:2^V \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+ \cup \{0\}$、一个成本函数 $c:V \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}^{+}$、一个根顶点 $r \in V$ 和一个预算 $B$。目的是找到以 $r$ 为根的 $D$ 的外子树 $T$，其成本最多为 $B$ 并最大化奖励函数。我们称这个问题为\emph{有向有根子模树} (\textbf{DRSO})。最近，Ghuge 和 Nagarajan [SODA\ 2020] 给出了一种最佳拟多项式时间 $O\left(\frac{\log n'}{\log \log n'}\right)$ 逼近算法，其中 $n'$ 是最优解中的顶点数量，适用于成本与边相关的情况。在本文中，我们给出了 \textbf{DRSO} 的多项式时间算法，对于任何 $ε\in (0,1]$，它保证了 $O(\sqrt{B}/ε^3)$ 的逼近因子，但代价是违反预算 $1+ε$。对于边缘成本情况，同样的结果也成立，据我们所知，这是针对这种情况的第一个多项式时间逼近算法。我们进一步表明\textbf{DRSO} 的无根版本可以在不违反预算的情况下近似为 $O(\sqrt{B})$ 因子，这是对无向和无根情况的 $O(Δ\sqrt{B})$ 因子的改进，其中 $Δ$ 是图的最大度数。几个相关问题的新的/改进的近似界限，包括 \textbf{DRSO} 的附加奖版本、最大预算连接集覆盖问题和预算传感器覆盖问题。 本文研究了在有向图中寻找根节点为r的子树，使其成本不超过预算B并最大化子模奖赏函数的问题，称为定向根子模树问题（DRSO）。 Gianlorenzo D'Angelo,Esmaeil Delfaraz,Hugo Gilbert cs.DS

title: Coefficient Mutation in the Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm for Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 符号回归基因库最优混合进化算法中的系数变异
comment: preprint of paper accepted at GECCO 2022 Workshop on Symbolic Regression
comments: preprint of paper accepted at GECCO 2022 Workshop on Symbolic Regression
abstract: Currently, the genetic programming version of the gene-pool optimal mixing evolutionary algorithm (GP-GOMEA) is among the top-performing algorithms for symbolic regression (SR). A key strength of GP-GOMEA is its way of performing variation, which dynamically adapts to the emergence of patterns in the population. However, GP-GOMEA lacks a mechanism to optimize coefficients. In this paper, we study how fairly simple approaches for optimizing coefficients can be integrated into GP-GOMEA. In particular, we considered two variants of Gaussian coefficient mutation. We performed experiments using different settings on 23 benchmark problems, and used machine learning to estimate what aspects of coefficient mutation matter most. We find that the most important aspect is that the number of coefficient mutation attempts needs to be commensurate with the number of mixing operations that GP-GOMEA performs. We applied GP-GOMEA with the best-performing coefficient mutation approach to the data sets of SRBench, a large SR benchmark, for which a ground-truth underlying equation is known. We find that coefficient mutation can help re-discovering the underlying equation by a substantial amount, but only when no noise is added to the target variable. In the presence of noise, GP-GOMEA with coefficient mutation discovers alternative but similarly-accurate equations.
summary: Currently, the genetic programming version of the gene-pool optimal mixing evolutionary algorithm (GP-GOMEA) is among the top-performing algorithms for symbolic regression (SR). A key strength of GP-GOMEA is its way of performing variation, which dynamically adapts to the emergence of patterns in the population. However, GP-GOMEA lacks a mechanism to optimize coefficients. In this paper, we study how fairly simple approaches for optimizing coefficients can be integrated into GP-GOMEA. In particular, we considered two variants of Gaussian coefficient mutation. We performed experiments using different settings on 23 benchmark problems, and used machine learning to estimate what aspects of coefficient mutation matter most. We find that the most important aspect is that the number of coefficient mutation attempts needs to be commensurate with the number of mixing operations that GP-GOMEA performs. We applied GP-GOMEA with the best-performing coefficient mutation approach to the data sets of SRBench, a large SR benchmark, for which a ground-truth underlying equation is known. We find that coefficient mutation can help re-discovering the underlying equation by a substantial amount, but only when no noise is added to the target variable. In the presence of noise, GP-GOMEA with coefficient mutation discovers alternative but similarly-accurate equations.
abstract_zh: 目前，基因库最优混合进化算法 (GP-GOMEA) 的遗传编程版本是符号回归 (SR) 中性能最好的算法之一。 GP-GOMEA 的一个关键优势是其执行变异的方式，它可以动态适应群体中模式的出现。然而，GP-GOMEA缺乏优化系数的机制。在本文中，我们研究了如何将相当简单的系数优化方法集成到 GP-GOMEA 中。特别是，我们考虑了高斯系数突变的两种变体。我们使用不同的设置对 23 个基准问题进行了实验，并使用机器学习来估计系数突变的哪些方面最重要。我们发现最重要的方面是系数突变尝试的数量需要与 GP-GOMEA 执行的混合操作的数量相称。我们将具有最佳性能系数突变方法的 GP-GOMEA 应用于 SRBench（一个大型 SR 基准）的数据集，其基本事实方程是已知的。我们发现系数变异可以在很大程度上帮助重新发现基础方程，但前提是目标变量中没有添加噪声。在存在噪声的情况下，具有系数突变的 GP-GOMEA 发现了替代但类似准确的方程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在基因池最优混合进化算法（GP-GOMEA）中整合系数变异机制以提升符号回归性能。
AI.motivation: GP-GOMEA虽在符号回归中表现优异，但缺乏对数学表达式中系数的优化能力，限制了其发现精确方程的潜力。
AI.method: 提出两种高斯系数变异方法，通过23个基准测试问题实验，结合机器学习分析变异参数影响，并在SRBench数据集验证效果。
AI.result: 系数变异显著提升无噪声数据下底层方程的复现能力，但在有噪声场景下仅能找到相似精度的替代方程。
AI.conclusion: 系数变异需与GP-GOMEA的混合操作次数匹配，且其有效性依赖于数据噪声水平，为符号回归提供了新优化方向。

A key strength of GP-GOMEA is its way of performing variation, which dynamically adapts to the emergence of patterns in the population. However, GP-GOMEA lacks a mechanism to optimize coefficients. In this paper, we study how fairly simple approaches for optimizing coefficients can be integrated into GP-GOMEA. In particular, we considered two variants of Gaussian coefficient mutation. We performed experiments using different settings on 23 benchmark problems, and used machine learning to estimate what aspects of coefficient mutation matter most. We find that the most important aspect is that the number of coefficient mutation attempts needs to be commensurate with the number of mixing operations that GP-GOMEA performs. We applied GP-GOMEA with the best-performing coefficient mutation approach to the data sets of SRBench, a large SR benchmark, for which a ground-truth underlying equation is known. We find that coefficient mutation can help re-discovering the underlying equation by a substantial amount, but only when no noise is added to the target variable. In the presence of noise, GP-GOMEA with coefficient mutation discovers alternative but similarly-accurate equations. 目前，基因库最优混合进化算法 (GP-GOMEA) 的遗传编程版本是符号回归 (SR) 中性能最好的算法之一。 GP-GOMEA 的一个关键优势是其执行变异的方式，它可以动态适应群体中模式的出现。然而，GP-GOMEA缺乏优化系数的机制。在本文中，我们研究了如何将相当简单的系数优化方法集成到 GP-GOMEA 中。特别是，我们考虑了高斯系数突变的两种变体。我们使用不同的设置对 23 个基准问题进行了实验，并使用机器学习来估计系数突变的哪些方面最重要。我们发现最重要的方面是系数突变尝试的数量需要与 GP-GOMEA 执行的混合操作的数量相称。我们将具有最佳性能系数突变方法的 GP-GOMEA 应用于 SRBench（一个大型 SR 基准）的数据集，其基本事实方程是已知的。我们发现系数变异可以在很大程度上帮助重新发现基础方程，但前提是目标变量中没有添加噪声。在存在噪声的情况下，具有系数突变的 GP-GOMEA 发现了替代但类似准确的方程。 本文研究如何在基因池最优混合进化算法（GP-GOMEA）中整合系数变异机制以提升符号回归性能。 Marco Virgolin,Peter A. authors_text: Rufan Bai,Haoxing Lin,Xinyu Yang,Xiaowei Wu,Minming Li,Weijia Jia
title: Mixed Strategies for Security Games with General Defending Requirements
title_zh: 具有一般防御要求的安全游戏的混合策略
abstract: The Stackelberg security game is played between a defender and an attacker, where the defender needs to allocate a limited amount of resources to multiple targets in order to minimize the loss due to adversarial attack by the attacker. While allowing targets to have different values, classic settings often assume uniform requirements to defend the targets. This enables existing results that study mixed strategies (randomized allocation algorithms) to adopt a compact representation of the mixed strategies. In this work, we initiate the study of mixed strategies for the security games in which the targets can have different defending requirements. In contrast to the case of uniform defending requirement, for which an optimal mixed strategy can be computed efficiently, we show that computing the optimal mixed strategy is NP-hard for the general defending requirements setting. However, we show that strong upper and lower bounds for the optimal mixed strategy defending result can be derived. We propose an efficient close-to-optimal Patching algorithm that computes mixed strategies that use only few pure strategies. We also study the setting when the game is played on a network and resource sharing is enabled between neighboring targets. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in several large real-world datasets.
summary: The Stackelberg security game is played between a defender and an attacker, where the defender needs to allocate a limited amount of resources to multiple targets in order to minimize the loss due to adversarial attack by the attacker. While allowing targets to have different values, classic settings often assume uniform requirements to defend the targets. This enables existing results that study mixed strategies (randomized allocation algorithms) to adopt a compact representation of the mixed strategies. In this work, we initiate the study of mixed strategies for the security games in which the targets can have different defending requirements. In contrast to the case of uniform defending requirement, for which an optimal mixed strategy can be computed efficiently, we show that computing the optimal mixed strategy is NP-hard for the general defending requirements setting. However, we show that strong upper and lower bounds for the optimal mixed strategy defending result can be derived. We propose an efficient close-to-optimal Patching algorithm that computes mixed strategies that use only few pure strategies. We also study the setting when the game is played on a network and resource sharing is enabled between neighboring targets. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in several large real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: Stackelberg安全博弈是在防御者和攻击者之间进行的，防御者需要将有限的资源分配给多个目标，以尽量减少攻击者对抗性攻击造成的损失。虽然允许目标具有不同的值，但经典设置通常会假设防御目标的统一要求。这使得研究混合策略（随机分配算法）的现有结果能够采用混合策略的紧凑表示。在这项工作中，我们发起了安全博弈混合策略的研究，其中目标可以有不同的防御要求。与可以有效计算最佳混合策略的统一防御要求的情况相反，我们表明，对于一般防御要求设置，计算最佳混合策略是NP困难的。然而，我们表明可以得出最佳混合策略防御结果的强上限和下限。我们提出了一种高效的接近最优的修补算法，该算法仅使用很少的纯策略来计算混合策略。我们还研究了在网络上玩游戏并且在相邻目标之间启用资源共享时的设置。我们的实验结果证明了我们的算法在几个大型现实数据集中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在安全博弈中针对不同防御需求目标的混合策略问题，提出了一种高效的近似最优算法。
AI.motivation: 传统安全博弈假设目标具有统一防御需求，但实际场景中目标防御需求差异显著，需重新研究混合策略的求解方法。
AI.method: 证明了通用防御需求下最优混合策略计算为NP难问题，并提出基于上下界分析的Patching算法，仅使用少量纯策略生成近似解。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在多个大规模现实数据集上表现有效，能够处理网络环境下的资源共享场景。
AI.conclusion: 尽管通用防御需求下最优解难以高效求得，但通过设计Patching算法可获得接近最优的实用解，为实际安全部署提供新思路。

search_text: Mixed Strategies for Security Games with General Defending Requirements 具有一般防御要求的安全游戏的混合策略 The Stackelberg security game is played between a defender and an attacker, where the defender needs to allocate a limited amount of resources to multiple targets in order to minimize the loss due to adversarial attack by the attacker. While allowing targets to have different values, classic settings often assume uniform requirements to defend the targets. This enables existing results that study mixed strategies (randomized allocation algorithms) to adopt a compact representation of the mixed strategies. In this work, we initiate the study of mixed strategies for the security games in which the targets can have different defending requirements. We also study the setting when the game is played on a network and resource sharing is enabled between neighboring targets. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in several large real-world datasets. Stackelberg安全博弈是在防御者和攻击者之间进行的，防御者需要将有限的资源分配给多个目标，以尽量减少攻击者对抗性攻击造成的损失。虽然允许目标具有不同的值，但经典设置通常会假设防御目标的统一要求。这使得研究混合策略（随机分配算法）的现有结果能够采用混合策略的紧凑表示。在这项工作中，我们发起了安全博弈混合策略的研究，其中目标可以有不同的防御要求。与可以有效计算最佳混合策略的统一防御要求的情况相反，我们表明，对于一般防御要求设置，计算最佳混合策略是NP困难的。然而，我们表明可以得出最佳混合策略防御结果的强上限和下限。我们提出了一种高效的接近最优的修补算法，该算法仅使用很少的纯策略来计算混合策略。我们还研究了在网络上玩游戏并且在相邻目标之间启用资源共享时的设置。我们的实验结果证明了我们的算法在几个大型现实数据集中的有效性。 本文研究了在安全博弈中针对不同防御需求目标的混合策略问题，提出了一种高效的近似最优算法。 Rufan Bai,Haoxing Lin,Xinyu Yang,Xiaowei Wu,Minming Li,Weijia Jia cs.GT,cs.AI

title: ClothFormer:Taming Video Virtual Try-on in All Module
title_zh: ClothFormer：全模块驯服视频虚拟试穿
abstract: The task of video virtual try-on aims to fit the target clothes to a person in the video with spatio-temporal consistency. Despite tremendous progress of image virtual try-on, they lead to inconsistency between frames when applied to videos. Limited work also explored the task of video-based virtual try-on but failed to produce visually pleasing and temporally coherent results. Moreover, there are two other key challenges: 1) how to generate accurate warping when occlusions appear in the clothing region; 2) how to generate clothes and non-target body parts (e.g. arms, neck) in harmony with the complicated background; To address them, we propose a novel video virtual try-on framework, ClothFormer, which successfully synthesizes realistic, harmonious, and spatio-temporal consistent results in complicated environment. In particular, ClothFormer involves three major modules. First, a two-stage anti-occlusion warping module that predicts an accurate dense flow mapping between the body regions and the clothing regions. Second, an appearance-flow tracking module utilizes ridge regression and optical flow correction to smooth the dense flow sequence and generate a temporally smooth warped clothing sequence. Third, a dual-stream transformer extracts and fuses clothing textures, person features, and environment information to generate realistic try-on videos. Through rigorous experiments, we demonstrate that our method highly surpasses the baselines in terms of synthesized video quality both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: The task of video virtual try-on aims to fit the target clothes to a person in the video with spatio-temporal consistency. Despite tremendous progress of image virtual try-on, they lead to inconsistency between frames when applied to videos. Limited work also explored the task of video-based virtual try-on but failed to produce visually pleasing and temporally coherent results. Moreover, there are two other key challenges: 1) how to generate accurate warping when occlusions appear in the clothing region; 2) how to generate clothes and non-target body parts (e.g. arms, neck) in harmony with the complicated background; To address them, we propose a novel video virtual try-on framework, ClothFormer, which successfully synthesizes realistic, harmonious, and spatio-temporal consistent results in complicated environment. In particular, ClothFormer involves three major modules. First, a two-stage anti-occlusion warping module that predicts an accurate dense flow mapping between the body regions and the clothing regions. Second, an appearance-flow tracking module utilizes ridge regression and optical flow correction to smooth the dense flow sequence and generate a temporally smooth warped clothing sequence. Third, a dual-stream transformer extracts and fuses clothing textures, person features, and environment information to generate realistic try-on videos. Through rigorous experiments, we demonstrate that our method highly surpasses the baselines in terms of synthesized video quality both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 视频虚拟试穿的任务旨在以时空一致性的方式将目标衣服适合视频中的人。尽管图像虚拟试戴取得了巨大进步，但应用于视频时会导致帧间不一致。有限的工作还探索了基于视频的虚拟试穿任务，但未能产生视觉上令人愉悦且时间连贯的结果。此外，还有另外两个关键挑战：1）当衣服区域出现遮挡时如何生成准确的变形； 2）如何生成与复杂背景相协调的衣服和非目标身体部位（例如手臂、颈部）；为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视频虚拟试穿框架ClothFormer，它成功地在复杂的环境中合成了真实、和谐、时空一致的结果。具体来说，ClothFormer涉及三大模块。首先，两级抗遮挡变形模块可预测身体区域和衣服区域之间的准确密集流映射。其次，外观流跟踪模块利用脊回归和光流校正来平滑密集流序列并生成时间平滑的扭曲服装序列。第三，双流变压器提取并融合服装纹理、人物特征和环境信息，生成逼真的试穿视频。通过严格的实验，我们证明我们的方法在合成视频质量方面无论在质量上还是在数量上都远远超过了基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClothFormer框架，解决视频虚拟试衣中衣物与人体在时空一致性上的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有图像虚拟试衣方法在视频应用时易导致帧间不一致，且难以处理遮挡区域的精确变形及复杂背景下的衣物与人体和谐生成。
AI.method: 设计包含三模块的框架：1) 两阶段抗遮挡变形模块预测人体与衣物区域的密集流映射；2) 外观-流跟踪模块通过岭回归与光流修正生成时序平滑的衣物序列；3) 双流Transformer融合衣物纹理、人体特征与环境信息生成真实试衣视频。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在合成视频质量上显著优于基线方法，定性与定量指标均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ClothFormer有效解决了视频虚拟试衣中的时空一致性、遮挡处理及背景融合难题，生成高质量真实感视频。

title: Where and What: Driver Attention-based Object Detection
title_zh: 地点和内容：基于驾驶员注意力的物体检测
abstract: Human drivers use their attentional mechanisms to focus on critical objects and make decisions while driving. As human attention can be revealed from gaze data, capturing and analyzing gaze information has emerged in recent years to benefit autonomous driving technology. Previous works in this context have primarily aimed at predicting "where" human drivers look at and lack knowledge of "what" objects drivers focus on. Our work bridges the gap between pixel-level and object-level attention prediction. Specifically, we propose to integrate an attention prediction module into a pretrained object detection framework and predict the attention in a grid-based style. Furthermore, critical objects are recognized based on predicted attended-to areas. We evaluate our proposed method on two driver attention datasets, BDD-A and DR(eye)VE. Our framework achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance in the attention prediction on both pixel-level and object-level but is far more efficient (75.3 GFLOPs less) in computation.
summary: Human drivers use their attentional mechanisms to focus on critical objects and make decisions while driving. As human attention can be revealed from gaze data, capturing and analyzing gaze information has emerged in recent years to benefit autonomous driving technology. Previous works in this context have primarily aimed at predicting "where" human drivers look at and lack knowledge of "what" objects drivers focus on. Our work bridges the gap between pixel-level and object-level attention prediction. Specifically, we propose to integrate an attention prediction module into a pretrained object detection framework and predict the attention in a grid-based style. Furthermore, critical objects are recognized based on predicted attended-to areas. We evaluate our proposed method on two driver attention datasets, BDD-A and DR(eye)VE. Our framework achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance in the attention prediction on both pixel-level and object-level but is far more efficient (75.3 GFLOPs less) in computation.
abstract_zh: 人类驾驶员在驾驶时利用注意力机制来关注关键物体并做出决策。由于可以从注视数据中揭示人类的注意力，因此近年来出现了捕获和分析注视信息的技术，这有利于自动驾驶技术。之前在这方面的工作主要旨在预测人类驾驶员的视线“在哪里”，但缺乏对驾驶员关注的“什么”物体的了解。我们的工作弥合了像素级和对象级注意力预测之间的差距。具体来说，我们建议将注意力预测模块集成到预训练的对象检测框架中，并以基于网格的方式预测注意力。此外，根据预测的关注区域来识别关键对象。我们在两个驾驶员注意力数据集 BDD-A 和 DR(eye)VE 上评估我们提出的方法。我们的框架在像素级和对象级的注意力预测方面实现了具有竞争力的最先进性能，但计算效率更高（少了 75.3 GFLOP）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于驾驶员注意力的物体检测方法，旨在同时预测驾驶员注视的位置（Where）和关注的物体（What）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注预测驾驶员注视位置，但缺乏对注视物体内容的识别，无法全面理解驾驶员注意力机制。
AI.method: 将注意力预测模块集成到预训练的物体检测框架中，通过网格化风格预测注意力区域，并基于预测区域识别关键物体。
AI.result: 在BDD-A和DR(eye)VE数据集上，该方法在像素级和物体级注意力预测中均达到先进水平，计算量减少75.3 GFLOPs。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了像素级与物体级注意力预测的差距，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了计算效率。

authors_text: Rui Tian,Zuxuan Wu,Qi Dai,Han Hu,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Deeper Insights into the Robustness of ViTs towards Common Corruptions
title_zh: 更深入地了解 ViT 对常见腐败的鲁棒性
abstract: With Vision Transformers (ViTs) making great advances in a variety of computer vision tasks, recent literature have proposed various variants of vanilla ViTs to achieve better efficiency and efficacy. However, it remains unclear how their unique architecture impact robustness towards common corruptions. In this paper, we make the first attempt to probe into the robustness gap among ViT variants and explore underlying designs that are essential for robustness. Through an extensive and rigorous benchmarking, we demonstrate that simple architecture designs such as overlapping patch embedding and convolutional feed-forward network (FFN) can promote the robustness of ViTs. Moreover, since training ViTs relies heavily on data augmentation, whether previous CNN-based augmentation strategies that are targeted at robustness purposes can still be useful is worth investigating. We explore different data augmentation on ViTs and verify that adversarial noise training is powerful while fourier-domain augmentation is inferior. Based on these findings, we introduce a novel conditional method of generating dynamic augmentation parameters conditioned on input images, offering state-of-the-art robustness towards common corruptions.
summary: With Vision Transformers (ViTs) making great advances in a variety of computer vision tasks, recent literature have proposed various variants of vanilla ViTs to achieve better efficiency and efficacy. However, it remains unclear how their unique architecture impact robustness towards common corruptions. In this paper, we make the first attempt to probe into the robustness gap among ViT variants and explore underlying designs that are essential for robustness. Through an extensive and rigorous benchmarking, we demonstrate that simple architecture designs such as overlapping patch embedding and convolutional feed-forward network (FFN) can promote the robustness of ViTs. Moreover, since training ViTs relies heavily on data augmentation, whether previous CNN-based augmentation strategies that are targeted at robustness purposes can still be useful is worth investigating. We explore different data augmentation on ViTs and verify that adversarial noise training is powerful while fourier-domain augmentation is inferior. Based on these findings, we introduce a novel conditional method of generating dynamic augmentation parameters conditioned on input images, offering state-of-the-art robustness towards common corruptions.
abstract_zh: 随着视觉变换器 (ViT) 在各种计算机视觉任务中取得巨大进步，最近的文献提出了各种普通 ViT 的变体，以实现更好的效率和功效。然而，目前尚不清楚它们独特的架构如何影响对常见腐败的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们首次尝试探讨 ViT 变体之间的鲁棒性差距，并探索对鲁棒性至关重要的底层设计。通过广泛而严格的基准测试，我们证明了简单的架构设计（例如重叠补丁嵌入和卷积前馈网络（FFN））可以提高 ViT 的鲁棒性。此外，由于训练 ViT 在很大程度上依赖于数据增强，因此之前针对鲁棒性目的的基于 CNN 的增强策略是否仍然有用，值得研究。我们探索了 ViT 上的不同数据增强，并验证了对抗性噪声训练很强大，而傅里叶域增强则较差。基于这些发现，我们引入了一种新颖的条件方法，可以根据输入图像生成动态增强参数，从而为常见损坏提供最先进的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉Transformer（ViT）在常见干扰下的鲁棒性，并探索了影响其鲁棒性的关键设计因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在计算机视觉任务中取得进展，但其不同变体的架构对鲁棒性的影响尚不明确，需深入分析以提升模型可靠性。
AI.method: 通过广泛基准测试分析ViT架构设计（如重叠补丁嵌入、卷积FFN），并对比不同数据增强策略（如对抗噪声训练、傅里叶域增强），提出动态生成增强参数的条件方法。
AI.result: 发现重叠补丁嵌入和卷积FFN可提升鲁棒性，对抗噪声训练有效而傅里叶域增强效果较差，动态增强方法在常见干扰下达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 简单架构改进和动态数据增强策略能显著提升ViT的鲁棒性，为未来模型设计提供关键指导。

search_text: Deeper Insights into the Robustness of ViTs towards Common Corruptions 更深入地了解 ViT 对常见腐败的鲁棒性 With Vision Transformers (ViTs) making great advances in a variety of computer vision tasks, recent literature have proposed various variants of vanilla ViTs to achieve better efficiency and efficacy. However, it remains unclear how their unique architecture impact robustness towards common corruptions. In this paper, we make the first attempt to probe into the robustness gap among ViT variants and explore underlying designs that are essential for robustness. Through an extensive and rigorous benchmarking, we demonstrate that simple architecture designs such as overlapping patch embedding and convolutional feed-forward network (FFN) can promote the robustness of ViTs. Moreover, since training ViTs relies heavily on data augmentation, whether previous CNN-based augmentation strategies that are targeted at robustness purposes can still be useful is worth investigating. We explore different data augmentation on ViTs and verify that adversarial noise training is powerful while fourier-domain augmentation is inferior. Based on these findings, we introduce a novel conditional method of generating dynamic augmentation parameters conditioned on input images, offering state-of-the-art robustness towards common corruptions. 随着视觉变换器 (ViT) 在各种计算机视觉任务中取得巨大进步，最近的文献提出了各种普通 ViT 的变体，以实现更好的效率和功效。然而，目前尚不清楚它们独特的架构如何影响对常见腐败的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们首次尝试探讨 ViT 变体之间的鲁棒性差距，并探索对鲁棒性至关重要的底层设计。通过广泛而严格的基准测试，我们证明了简单的架构设计（例如重叠补丁嵌入和卷积前馈网络（FFN））可以提高 ViT 的鲁棒性。此外，由于训练 ViT 在很大程度上依赖于数据增强，因此之前针对鲁棒性目的的基于 CNN 的增强策略是否仍然有用，值得研究。我们探索了 ViT 上的不同数据增强，并验证了对抗性噪声训练很强大，而傅里叶域增强则较差。基于这些发现，我们引入了一种新颖的条件方法，可以根据输入图像生成动态增强参数，从而为常见损坏提供最先进的鲁棒性。 本文研究了视觉Transformer（ViT）在常见干扰下的鲁棒性，并探索了影响其鲁棒性的关键设计因素。 Rui Tian,Zuxuan Wu,Qi Dai,Han Hu,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV

title: Neural Maximum A Posteriori Estimation on Unpaired Data for Motion Deblurring
title_zh: 用于运动去模糊的不成对数据的神经极大值后验估计
abstract: Real-world dynamic scene deblurring has long been a challenging task since paired blurry-sharp training data is unavailable. Conventional Maximum A Posteriori estimation and deep learning-based deblurring methods are restricted by handcrafted priors and synthetic blurry-sharp training pairs respectively, thereby failing to generalize to real dynamic blurriness. To this end, we propose a Neural Maximum A Posteriori (NeurMAP) estimation framework for training neural networks to recover blind motion information and sharp content from unpaired data. The proposed NeruMAP consists of a motion estimation network and a deblurring network which are trained jointly to model the (re)blurring process (i.e. likelihood function). Meanwhile, the motion estimation network is trained to explore the motion information in images by applying implicit dynamic motion prior, and in return enforces the deblurring network training (i.e. providing sharp image prior). The proposed NeurMAP is an orthogonal approach to existing deblurring neural networks, and is the first framework that enables training image deblurring networks on unpaired datasets. Experiments demonstrate our superiority on both quantitative metrics and visual quality over state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/NeurMAP-deblur.
summary: Real-world dynamic scene deblurring has long been a challenging task since paired blurry-sharp training data is unavailable. Conventional Maximum A Posteriori estimation and deep learning-based deblurring methods are restricted by handcrafted priors and synthetic blurry-sharp training pairs respectively, thereby failing to generalize to real dynamic blurriness. To this end, we propose a Neural Maximum A Posteriori (NeurMAP) estimation framework for training neural networks to recover blind motion information and sharp content from unpaired data. The proposed NeruMAP consists of a motion estimation network and a deblurring network which are trained jointly to model the (re)blurring process (i.e. likelihood function). Meanwhile, the motion estimation network is trained to explore the motion information in images by applying implicit dynamic motion prior, and in return enforces the deblurring network training (i.e. providing sharp image prior). The proposed NeurMAP is an orthogonal approach to existing deblurring neural networks, and is the first framework that enables training image deblurring networks on unpaired datasets. Experiments demonstrate our superiority on both quantitative metrics and visual quality over state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/NeurMAP-deblur.
abstract_zh: 由于无法获得配对的模糊-清晰训练数据，现实世界的动态场景去模糊长期以来一直是一项具有挑战性的任务。传统的最大后验估计和基于深度学习的去模糊方法分别受到手工先验和合成模糊-锐利训练对的限制，因此无法推广到真实的动态模糊。为此，我们提出了一种神经最大后验（NeurMAP）估计框架，用于训练神经网络从不配对的数据中恢复盲运动信息和清晰内容。所提出的 NeruMAP 由运动估计网络和去模糊网络组成，它们经过联合训练以对（重新）模糊过程（即似然函数）进行建模。同时，运动估计网络被训练为通过应用隐式动态运动先验来探索图像中的运动信息，并作为回报强制执行去模糊网络训练（即提供清晰的图像先验）。所提出的 NeurMAP 是现有去模糊神经网络的正交方法，并且是第一个能够在不配对数据集上训练图像去模糊网络的框架。实验证明我们在定量指标和视觉质量方面都优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/yjzhang96/NeurMAP-deblur 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的无配对数据最大后验估计框架NeurMAP，用于从无配对数据中恢复运动模糊图像的清晰内容。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的运动去模糊因缺乏配对的模糊-清晰训练数据而困难，传统方法受限于手工先验或合成数据，难以泛化到真实动态模糊场景。
AI.method: 设计NeurMAP框架，包含联合训练的运动估计网络和去模糊网络，通过隐式动态运动先验建模重模糊过程，并利用运动网络提供的清晰图像先验指导去模糊网络训练。
AI.result: 在定量指标和视觉质量上优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NeurMAP是首个在无配对数据集上训练去模糊网络的框架，为真实场景运动去模糊提供了新思路。

title: Mirror Games Against an Open Book Player
title_zh: 与开卷玩家进行镜像游戏
abstract: Mirror games were invented by Garg and Schnieder (ITCS 2019). Alice and Bob take turns (with Alice playing first) in declaring numbers from the set {1,2, ...2n}. If a player picks a number that was previously played, that player loses and the other player wins. If all numbers are declared without repetition, the result is a draw. Bob has a simple mirror strategy that assures he won't lose and requires no memory. On the other hand, Garg and Schenier showed that every deterministic Alice needs memory of size linear in $n$ in order to secure a draw. Regarding probabilistic strategies, previous work showed that a model where Alice has access to a secret random perfect matching over {1,2, ...2n} allows her to achieve a draw in the game w.p. a least 1-1/n and using only polylog bits of memory. We show that the requirement for secret bits is crucial: for an `open book' Alice with no secrets (Bob knows her memory but not future coin flips) and memory of at most n/4c bits for any c>2, there is a Bob that wins w.p. close to 1-2^{-c/2}.
summary: Mirror games were invented by Garg and Schnieder (ITCS 2019). Alice and Bob take turns (with Alice playing first) in declaring numbers from the set {1,2, ...2n}. If a player picks a number that was previously played, that player loses and the other player wins. If all numbers are declared without repetition, the result is a draw. Bob has a simple mirror strategy that assures he won't lose and requires no memory. On the other hand, Garg and Schenier showed that every deterministic Alice needs memory of size linear in $n$ in order to secure a draw. Regarding probabilistic strategies, previous work showed that a model where Alice has access to a secret random perfect matching over {1,2, ...2n} allows her to achieve a draw in the game w.p. a least 1-1/n and using only polylog bits of memory. We show that the requirement for secret bits is crucial: for an `open book' Alice with no secrets (Bob knows her memory but not future coin flips) and memory of at most n/4c bits for any c>2, there is a Bob that wins w.p. close to 1-2^{-c/2}.
abstract_zh: 镜像游戏由 Garg 和 Schnieder 发明（ITCS 2019）。 Alice 和 Bob 轮流（Alice 先玩）声明集合 {1,2, ...2n} 中的数字。如果玩家选择了之前玩过的号码，则该玩家输，另一玩家赢。如果所有号码都被宣布且没有重复，则结果为平局。鲍勃有一个简单的镜像策略，可以确保他不会输并且不需要记忆。另一方面，Garg 和 Schenier 表明，每个确定性 Alice 都需要 $n$ 大小的线性内存才能确保平局。关于概率策略，之前的工作表明，Alice 可以访问 {1,2, ...2n} 上的秘密随机完美匹配的模型允许她在游戏中实现平局。至少 1-1/n 并且仅使用内存的多对数位。我们表明，对秘密位的要求至关重要：对于一本没有秘密的“开放书”爱丽丝（鲍勃知道她的记忆，但不知道未来的硬币翻转），并且对于任何 c>2，最多记忆 n/4c 位，有一个鲍勃赢得了 w.p。接近 1-2^{-c/2}。

AI.tldr: 本文研究镜像游戏中，当Alice无秘密信息（开放书策略）时，Bob如何利用其有限记忆确保胜利。
AI.motivation: 探讨镜像游戏中秘密信息对Alice实现平局的必要性，验证此前研究中秘密匹配的关键作用。
AI.method: 通过博弈论分析与概率方法，证明在无秘密且记忆受限条件下，Bob存在高概率获胜策略。
AI.result: 当Alice记忆容量不超过n/4c（c>2）时，Bob可近似以1-2^{-c/2}概率获胜，凸显秘密信息的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 秘密信息是Alice实现平局的核心条件，无秘密且记忆受限时，Bob可高效利用策略确保胜利。

search_text: Mirror Games Against an Open Book Player 与开卷玩家进行镜像游戏 Mirror games were invented by Garg and Schnieder (ITCS 2019). Alice and Bob take turns (with Alice playing first) in declaring numbers from the set {1,2, ...2n}. If a player picks a number that was previously played, that player loses and the other player wins. If all numbers are declared without repetition, the result is a draw. Bob has a simple mirror strategy that assures he won't lose and requires no memory. On the other hand, Garg and Schenier showed that every deterministic Alice needs memory of size linear in $n$ in order to secure a draw. Regarding probabilistic strategies, previous work showed that a model where Alice has access to a secret random perfect matching over {1,2, ...2n} allows her to achieve a draw in the game w.p. a least 1-1/n and using only polylog bits of memory. We show that the requirement for secret bits is crucial: for an `open book' Alice with no secrets (Bob knows her memory but not future coin flips) and memory of at most n/4c bits for any c>2, there is a Bob that wins w.p. close to 1-2^{-c/2}. 镜像游戏由 Garg 和 Schnieder 发明（ITCS 2019）。 Alice 和 Bob 轮流（Alice 先玩）声明集合 {1,2, ...2n} 中的数字。如果玩家选择了之前玩过的号码，则该玩家输，另一玩家赢。如果所有号码都被宣布且没有重复，则结果为平局。鲍勃有一个简单的镜像策略，可以确保他不会输并且不需要记忆。另一方面，Garg 和 Schenier 表明，每个确定性 Alice 都需要 $n$ 大小的线性内存才能确保平局。关于概率策略，之前的工作表明，Alice 可以访问 {1,2, ...2n} 上的秘密随机完美匹配的模型允许她在游戏中实现平局。至少 1-1/n 并且仅使用内存的多对数位。我们表明，对秘密位的要求至关重要：对于一本没有秘密的“开放书”爱丽丝（鲍勃知道她的记忆，但不知道未来的硬币翻转），并且对于任何 c>2，最多记忆 n/4c 位，有一个鲍勃赢得了 w.p。接近 1-2^{-c/2}。 本文研究镜像游戏中，当Alice无秘密信息（开放书策略）时，Bob如何利用其有限记忆确保胜利。 Roey Magen,Moni Naor cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS

title: Reformulating Speaker Diarization as Community Detection With Emphasis On Topological Structure
title_zh: 将说话者二值化重新表述为强调拓扑结构的社区检测
abstract: Clustering-based speaker diarization has stood firm as one of the major approaches in reality, despite recent development in end-to-end diarization. However, clustering methods have not been explored extensively for speaker diarization. Commonly-used methods such as k-means, spectral clustering, and agglomerative hierarchical clustering only take into account properties such as proximity and relative densities. In this paper we propose to view clustering-based diarization as a community detection problem. By doing so the topological structure is considered. This work has four major contributions. First it is shown that Leiden community detection algorithm significantly outperforms the previous methods on the clustering of speaker-segments. Second, we propose to use uniform manifold approximation to reduce dimension while retaining global and local topological structure. Third, a masked filtering approach is introduced to extract "clean" speaker embeddings. Finally, the community structure is applied to an end-to-end post-processing network to obtain diarization results. The final system presents a relative DER reduction of up to 70 percent. The breakdown contribution of each component is analyzed.
summary: Clustering-based speaker diarization has stood firm as one of the major approaches in reality, despite recent development in end-to-end diarization. However, clustering methods have not been explored extensively for speaker diarization. Commonly-used methods such as k-means, spectral clustering, and agglomerative hierarchical clustering only take into account properties such as proximity and relative densities. In this paper we propose to view clustering-based diarization as a community detection problem. By doing so the topological structure is considered. This work has four major contributions. First it is shown that Leiden community detection algorithm significantly outperforms the previous methods on the clustering of speaker-segments. Second, we propose to use uniform manifold approximation to reduce dimension while retaining global and local topological structure. Third, a masked filtering approach is introduced to extract "clean" speaker embeddings. Finally, the community structure is applied to an end-to-end post-processing network to obtain diarization results. The final system presents a relative DER reduction of up to 70 percent. The breakdown contribution of each component is analyzed.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在端到端二值化方面取得了进展，但基于聚类的说话者二值化仍然是现实中的主要方法之一。然而，聚类方法尚未被广泛探索用于说话人分类。 k 均值、谱聚类和凝聚层次聚类等常用方法仅考虑邻近度和相对密度等属性。在本文中，我们建议将基于聚类的二值化视为社区检测问题。通过这样做，可以考虑拓扑结构。这项工作有四个主要贡献。首先，莱顿社区检测算法在说话人片段的聚类方面明显优于以前的方法。其次，我们建议使用均匀流形近似来降低维度，同时保留全局和局部拓扑结构。第三，引入掩蔽过滤方法来提取“干净”的说话人嵌入。最后，将社区结构应用于端到端的后处理网络以获得二值化结果。最终系统的 DER 相对减少量高达 70%。分析了每个组件的击穿贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文将说话人分割任务重构为社区检测问题，强调拓扑结构的重要性，提出结合图神经网络和流形学习的新型分割方法。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法在说话人分割中未充分考虑语音片段的拓扑关系，导致分割结果不理想，需探索更符合语义结构的建模方式。
AI.method: 提出四步方法：1）采用Leiden算法进行社区检测；2）使用统一流形近似保留拓扑结构；3）引入掩码过滤提取纯净说话人嵌入；4）将社区结构应用于端到端后处理网络。
AI.result: 实验显示系统相对DER降低达70%，各组件贡献度分析验证了拓扑结构建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过拓扑结构建模的社区检测方法显著提升说话人分割性能，为分割任务提供新研究视角。

title: Instance-Specific Feature Propagation for Referring Segmentation
title_zh: 用于参考分割的实例特定特征传播
abstract: Referring segmentation aims to generate a segmentation mask for the target instance indicated by a natural language expression. There are typically two kinds of existing methods: one-stage methods that directly perform segmentation on the fused vision and language features; and two-stage methods that first utilize an instance segmentation model for instance proposal and then select one of these instances via matching them with language features. In this work, we propose a novel framework that simultaneously detects the target-of-interest via feature propagation and generates a fine-grained segmentation mask. In our framework, each instance is represented by an Instance-Specific Feature (ISF), and the target-of-referring is identified by exchanging information among all ISFs using our proposed Feature Propagation Module (FPM). Our instance-aware approach learns the relationship among all objects, which helps to better locate the target-of-interest than one-stage methods. Comparing to two-stage methods, our approach collaboratively and interactively utilizes both vision and language information for synchronous identification and segmentation. In the experimental tests, our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on all three RefCOCO series datasets.
summary: Referring segmentation aims to generate a segmentation mask for the target instance indicated by a natural language expression. There are typically two kinds of existing methods: one-stage methods that directly perform segmentation on the fused vision and language features; and two-stage methods that first utilize an instance segmentation model for instance proposal and then select one of these instances via matching them with language features. In this work, we propose a novel framework that simultaneously detects the target-of-interest via feature propagation and generates a fine-grained segmentation mask. In our framework, each instance is represented by an Instance-Specific Feature (ISF), and the target-of-referring is identified by exchanging information among all ISFs using our proposed Feature Propagation Module (FPM). Our instance-aware approach learns the relationship among all objects, which helps to better locate the target-of-interest than one-stage methods. Comparing to two-stage methods, our approach collaboratively and interactively utilizes both vision and language information for synchronous identification and segmentation. In the experimental tests, our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on all three RefCOCO series datasets.
abstract_zh: 参考分割旨在为自然语言表达指示的目标实例生成分割掩码。现有的方法通常有两种：一是直接对融合的视觉和语言特征进行分割的一阶段方法；二是直接对融合的视觉和语言特征进行分割的一阶段方法。以及两阶段方法，首先利用实例分割模型进行实例提议，然后通过将它们与语言特征进行匹配来选择其中一个实例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架可以通过特征传播同时检测感兴趣的目标并生成细粒度的分割掩模。在我们的框架中，每个实例都由实例特定特征（ISF）表示，并且通过使用我们提出的特征传播模块（FPM）在所有 ISF 之间交换信息来识别引用目标。我们的实例感知方法可以学习所有对象之间的关系，这比单阶段方法有助于更好地定位感兴趣的目标。与两阶段方法相比，我们的方法协作且交互式地利用视觉和语言信息进行同步识别和分割。在实验测试中，我们的方法在所有三个 RefCOCO 系列数据集上都优于之前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于指称分割的新框架，通过实例特定特征传播同时检测目标并生成精细分割掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在定位目标实例时存在不足，一阶段方法难以准确捕捉语义关联，两阶段方法则缺乏视觉与语言信息的协同处理。
AI.method: 设计实例特定特征（ISF）表示每个对象，并通过特征传播模块（FPM）在实例间交换信息，实现目标识别与分割的联合优化。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO系列三个数据集上均超越现有最先进方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过视觉-语言信息的协同利用，实现了更精确的目标定位与分割，为指称分割任务提供了新思路。

In the experimental tests, our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on all three RefCOCO series datasets. 参考分割旨在为自然语言表达指示的目标实例生成分割掩码。现有的方法通常有两种：一是直接对融合的视觉和语言特征进行分割的一阶段方法；二是直接对融合的视觉和语言特征进行分割的一阶段方法。以及两阶段方法，首先利用实例分割模型进行实例提议，然后通过将它们与语言特征进行匹配来选择其中一个实例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架可以通过特征传播同时检测感兴趣的目标并生成细粒度的分割掩模。在我们的框架中，每个实例都由实例特定特征（ISF）表示，并且通过使用我们提出的特征传播模块（FPM）在所有 ISF 之间交换信息来识别引用目标。我们的实例感知方法可以学习所有对象之间的关系，这比单阶段方法有助于更好地定位感兴趣的目标。与两阶段方法相比，我们的方法协作且交互式地利用视觉和语言信息进行同步识别和分割。在实验测试中，我们的方法在所有三个 RefCOCO 系列数据集上都优于之前最先进的方法。 本文提出一种用于指称分割的新框架，通过实例特定特征传播同时检测目标并生成精细分割掩码。 Chang Liu,Xudong Jiang,Henghui Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Zhuqing Zhang,Yang Song,Shoudong Huang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: Toward Consistent and Efficient Map-based Visual-inertial Localization: Theory Framework and Filter Design
title_zh: 实现一致且高效的基于地图的视觉惯性定位：理论框架和滤波器设计
abstract: This paper focuses on designing a consistent and efficient filter for map-based visual-inertial localization. First, we propose a new Lie group with its algebra, based on which a novel invariant extended Kalman filter (invariant EKF) is designed. We theoretically prove that, when we do not consider the uncertainty of the map information, the proposed invariant EKF can naturally maintain the correct observability properties of the system. To consider the uncertainty of the map information, we introduce a Schmidt filter. With the Schmidt filter, the uncertainty of the map information can be taken into consideration to avoid over-confident estimation while the computation cost only increases linearly with the size of the map keyframes. In addition, we introduce an easily implemented observability-constrained technique because directly combining the invariant EKF with the Schmidt filter cannot maintain the correct observability properties of the system that considers the uncertainty of the map information. Finally, we validate our proposed system's high consistency, accuracy, and efficiency via extensive simulations and real-world experiments.
summary: This paper focuses on designing a consistent and efficient filter for map-based visual-inertial localization. First, we propose a new Lie group with its algebra, based on which a novel invariant extended Kalman filter (invariant EKF) is designed. We theoretically prove that, when we do not consider the uncertainty of the map information, the proposed invariant EKF can naturally maintain the correct observability properties of the system. To consider the uncertainty of the map information, we introduce a Schmidt filter. With the Schmidt filter, the uncertainty of the map information can be taken into consideration to avoid over-confident estimation while the computation cost only increases linearly with the size of the map keyframes. In addition, we introduce an easily implemented observability-constrained technique because directly combining the invariant EKF with the Schmidt filter cannot maintain the correct observability properties of the system that considers the uncertainty of the map information. Finally, we validate our proposed system's high consistency, accuracy, and efficiency via extensive simulations and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注为基于地图的视觉惯性定位设计一致且高效的过滤器。首先，我们提出了一个新的李群及其代数，在此基础上设计了一种新颖的不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（不变EKF）。我们从理论上证明，当我们不考虑地图信息的不确定性时，所提出的不变EKF可以自然地保持系统正确的可观测性。为了考虑地图信息的不确定性，我们引入施密特滤波器。使用施密特滤波器，可以考虑地图信息的不确定性，避免过度自信的估计，同时计算成本仅随着地图关键帧的大小线性增加。此外，我们引入了一种易于实现的可观测性约束技术，因为直接将不变的EKF与施密特滤波器相结合不能维持考虑地图信息不确定性的系统的正确可观测性属性。最后，我们通过广泛的模拟和实际实验验证了我们提出的系统的高一致性、准确性和效率。

AI.tldr: 设计一种一致且高效的基于地图的视觉惯性定位滤波器，解决地图信息不确定性下的可观测性与计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理地图信息不确定性时存在估计过度自信和计算成本高的问题，需提高定位一致性与效率。
AI.method: 提出基于李群的不变EKF，结合Schmidt滤波器与可观测性约束技术，有效处理地图不确定性，保持系统可观测性且计算复杂度线性增长。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验证明系统在保持正确可观测性的同时，具有高一致性、准确性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在理论和实验上均有效，为视觉惯性定位提供了新的框架与高效滤波设计。

authors_text: Yu Li,Yaling Yi,Dongwei Ren,Qince Li,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Learning Dual-Pixel Alignment for Defocus Deblurring
title_zh: 学习双像素对齐以进行散焦去模糊
abstract: It is a challenging task to recover sharp image from a single defocus blurry image in real-world applications. On many modern cameras, dual-pixel (DP) sensors create two-image views, based on which stereo information can be exploited to benefit defocus deblurring. Despite the impressive results achieved by existing DP defocus deblurring methods, the misalignment between DP image views is still not studied, leaving room for improving DP defocus deblurring. In this work, we propose a Dual-Pixel Alignment Network (DPANet) for defocus deblurring. Generally, DPANet is an encoder-decoder with skip-connections, where two branches with shared parameters in the encoder are employed to extract and align deep features from left and right views, and one decoder is adopted to fuse aligned features for predicting the sharp image. Due to that DP views suffer from different blur amounts, it is not trivial to align left and right views. To this end, we propose novel encoder alignment module (EAM) and decoder alignment module (DAM). In particular, a correlation layer is suggested in EAM to measure the disparity between DP views, whose deep features can then be accordingly aligned using deformable convolutions. DAM can further enhance the alignment of skip-connected features from encoder and deep features in decoder. By introducing several EAMs and DAMs, DP views in DPANet can be well aligned for better predicting latent sharp image. Experimental results on real-world datasets show that our DPANet is notably superior to state-of-the-art deblurring methods in reducing defocus blur while recovering visually plausible sharp structures and textures.
summary: It is a challenging task to recover sharp image from a single defocus blurry image in real-world applications. On many modern cameras, dual-pixel (DP) sensors create two-image views, based on which stereo information can be exploited to benefit defocus deblurring. Despite the impressive results achieved by existing DP defocus deblurring methods, the misalignment between DP image views is still not studied, leaving room for improving DP defocus deblurring. In this work, we propose a Dual-Pixel Alignment Network (DPANet) for defocus deblurring. Generally, DPANet is an encoder-decoder with skip-connections, where two branches with shared parameters in the encoder are employed to extract and align deep features from left and right views, and one decoder is adopted to fuse aligned features for predicting the sharp image. Due to that DP views suffer from different blur amounts, it is not trivial to align left and right views. To this end, we propose novel encoder alignment module (EAM) and decoder alignment module (DAM). In particular, a correlation layer is suggested in EAM to measure the disparity between DP views, whose deep features can then be accordingly aligned using deformable convolutions. DAM can further enhance the alignment of skip-connected features from encoder and deep features in decoder. By introducing several EAMs and DAMs, DP views in DPANet can be well aligned for better predicting latent sharp image. Experimental results on real-world datasets show that our DPANet is notably superior to state-of-the-art deblurring methods in reducing defocus blur while recovering visually plausible sharp structures and textures.
abstract_zh: 在现实应用中，从单个散焦模糊图像中恢复清晰图像是一项具有挑战性的任务。在许多现代相机上，双像素 (DP) 传感器会创建两个图像视图，基于该视图可以利用立体信息来实现散焦去模糊。尽管现有的 DP 离焦去模糊方法取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但 DP 图像视图之间的失准仍然没有被研究，这为改进 DP 离焦去模糊留下了空间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于散焦去模糊的双像素对齐网络（DPANet）。一般来说，DPANet是一种具有跳跃连接的编码器-解码器，其中编码器中具有共享参数的两个分支用于从左视图和右视图中提取和对齐深层特征，并且采用一个解码器来融合对齐的特征以预测清晰图像。由于 DP 视图受到不同模糊量的影响，因此对齐左右视图并非易事。为此，我们提出了新颖的编码器对齐模块（EAM）和解码​​器对齐模块（DAM）。特别是，在 EAM 中建议使用相关层来测量 DP 视图之间的差异，然后可以使用可变形卷积来相应地对齐其深层特征。 DAM 可以进一步增强编码器中的跳跃连接特征和解码器中的深层特征的对齐。通过引入多个 EAM 和 DAM，DPANet 中的 DP 视图可以很好地对齐，以更好地预测潜在的清晰图像。真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 DPANet 在减少散焦模糊同时恢复视觉上合理的清晰结构和纹理方面明显优于最先进的去模糊方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双像素对齐的网络（DPANet），用于解决单张失焦模糊图像的复原问题。
AI.motivation: 现有双像素（DP）去模糊方法未充分研究DP图像视图间的错位问题，导致去模糊效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含编码器-解码器结构的DPANet，通过共享参数的编码器分支提取并对齐左右视图特征，引入编码器对齐模块（EAM）和解码器对齐模块（DAM）利用相关层和可变形卷积实现精确对齐。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，DPANet在减少失焦模糊和恢复视觉合理细节方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效对齐双像素视图，DPANet提升了失焦模糊图像的复原质量，为实际应用提供了更优解决方案。

title: Centimeter-level Positioning by Instantaneous Lidar-aided GNSS Ambiguity Resolution
title_zh: 瞬时激光雷达辅助 GNSS 模糊度解析实现厘米级定位
comment: 14 pages, 12 figures. Submitted to Measurement Science and Technology
comments: 14 pages, 12 figures. Submitted to Measurement Science and Technology
abstract: High-precision vehicle positioning is key to the implementation of modern driving systems in urban environments. Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) carrier phase measurements can provide millimeter- to centimeter-level positioning, provided that the integer ambiguities are correctly resolved. Abundant code measurements are often used to facilitate integer ambiguity resolution (IAR), however, they suffer from signal blockage and multipath in urban canyons. In this contribution, a lidar-aided instantaneous ambiguity resolution method is proposed. Lidar measurements, in the form of 3D keypoints, are generated by a learning-based point cloud registration method using a pre-built HD map and integrated with GNSS observations in a mixed measurement model to produce precise float solutions, which in turn increase the ambiguity success rate. Closed-form expressions of the ambiguity variance matrix and the associated Ambiguity Dilution of Precision (ADOP) are developed to provide a priori evaluation of such lidar-aided ambiguity resolution performance. Both analytical and experimental results show that the proposed method enables successful instantaneous IAR with limited GNSS satellites and frequencies, leading to centimeter-level vehicle positioning.
summary: High-precision vehicle positioning is key to the implementation of modern driving systems in urban environments. Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) carrier phase measurements can provide millimeter- to centimeter-level positioning, provided that the integer ambiguities are correctly resolved. Abundant code measurements are often used to facilitate integer ambiguity resolution (IAR), however, they suffer from signal blockage and multipath in urban canyons. In this contribution, a lidar-aided instantaneous ambiguity resolution method is proposed. Lidar measurements, in the form of 3D keypoints, are generated by a learning-based point cloud registration method using a pre-built HD map and integrated with GNSS observations in a mixed measurement model to produce precise float solutions, which in turn increase the ambiguity success rate. Closed-form expressions of the ambiguity variance matrix and the associated Ambiguity Dilution of Precision (ADOP) are developed to provide a priori evaluation of such lidar-aided ambiguity resolution performance. Both analytical and experimental results show that the proposed method enables successful instantaneous IAR with limited GNSS satellites and frequencies, leading to centimeter-level vehicle positioning.
abstract_zh: 高精度车辆定位是在城市环境中实施现代驾驶系统的关键。只要正确解决整数模糊度，全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 载波相位测量就可以提供毫米到厘米级的定位。大量的代码测量通常用于促进整数模糊度解析（IAR），但是，它们在城市峡谷中会受到信号阻塞和多径的影响。在这篇文章中，提出了一种激光雷达辅助的瞬时模糊度解析方法。激光雷达测量以 3D 关键点的形式，通过基于学习的点云配准方法使用预先构建的高清地图生成，并在混合测量模型中与 GNSS 观测集成，以产生精确的浮动解决方案，从而提高模糊度成功率。开发了模糊度方差矩阵和相关的模糊度精度稀释 (ADOP) 的闭合形式表达式，以提供对此类激光雷达辅助模糊度解析性能的先验评估。分析和实验结果表明，该方法能够在有限的 GNSS 卫星和频率下成功实现瞬时 IAR，从而实现厘米级车辆定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合激光雷达辅助的GNSS模糊度实时分辨率方法，实现城市环境中厘米级车辆定位。
AI.motivation: GNSS载波相位测量可提供高精度定位，但城市峡谷中信号遮挡和多径效应导致传统码测量辅助的模糊度分辨率（IAR）效果受限，需寻求新方法提升性能。
AI.method: 基于预构建高清地图的点云注册算法生成激光雷达3D关键点，与GNSS观测值构建混合测量模型，推导模糊度协方差矩阵及ADOP解析表达式，提升浮点解精度和模糊度成功率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在有限GNSS卫星和频点条件下可实现瞬时IAR，车辆定位精度达厘米级，验证了激光雷达辅助的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合激光雷达与GNSS的混合模型显著提升城市复杂环境下模糊度分辨率性能，为高精度车辆定位提供可行方案。

title: Convergence of neural networks to Gaussian mixture distribution
title_zh: 神经网络向高斯混合分布的收敛
abstract: We give a proof that, under relatively mild conditions, fully-connected feed-forward deep random neural networks converge to a Gaussian mixture distribution as only the width of the last hidden layer goes to infinity. We conducted experiments for a simple model which supports our result. Moreover, it gives a detailed description of the convergence, namely, the growth of the last hidden layer gets the distribution closer to the Gaussian mixture, and the other layer successively get the Gaussian mixture closer to the normal distribution.
summary: We give a proof that, under relatively mild conditions, fully-connected feed-forward deep random neural networks converge to a Gaussian mixture distribution as only the width of the last hidden layer goes to infinity. We conducted experiments for a simple model which supports our result. Moreover, it gives a detailed description of the convergence, namely, the growth of the last hidden layer gets the distribution closer to the Gaussian mixture, and the other layer successively get the Gaussian mixture closer to the normal distribution.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，在相对温和的条件下，全连接前馈深度随机神经网络收敛到高斯混合分布，因为只有最后一个隐藏层的宽度趋于无穷大。我们对一个支持我们结果的简单模型进行了实验。而且，它给出了收敛的详细描述，即最后一个隐藏层的增长使分布更接近高斯混合，而其他层依次使高斯混合更接近正态分布。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在温和条件下，全连接前馈深度随机神经网络随着最后一层隐藏层宽度趋于无穷大时，会收敛到高斯混合分布，并通过实验验证了该结论。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络在宽度增加时的收敛性质，为理论分析提供基础并指导实际应用中的网络设计。
AI.method: 通过数学证明结合实验验证，分析网络层宽度变化对分布的影响，详细描述收敛过程。
AI.result: 理论证明了网络收敛到高斯混合分布，实验支持结论，且发现其他层依次使分布更接近正态分布。
AI.conclusion: 该结果深化了对深度网络行为的理解，为理论研究和实际应用中的网络设计提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Arun Narayanan,James Walker,Sankaran Panchapagesan,Nathan Howard,Yuma Koizumi
title: Mask scalar prediction for improving robust automatic speech recognition
title_zh: 用于改进鲁棒自动语音识别的掩模标量预测
abstract: Using neural network based acoustic frontends for improving robustness of streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is challenging because of the causality constraints and the resulting distortion that the frontend processing introduces in speech. Time-frequency masking based approaches have been shown to work well, but they need additional hyper-parameters to scale the mask to limit speech distortion. Such mask scalars are typically hand-tuned and chosen conservatively. In this work, we present a technique to predict mask scalars using an ASR-based loss in an end-to-end fashion, with minimal increase in the overall model size and complexity. We evaluate the approach on two robust ASR tasks: multichannel enhancement in the presence of speech and non-speech noise, and acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). Results show that the presented algorithm consistently improves word error rate (WER) without the need for any additional tuning over strong baselines that use hand-tuned hyper-parameters: up to 16% for multichannel enhancement in noisy conditions, and up to 7% for AEC.
summary: Using neural network based acoustic frontends for improving robustness of streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is challenging because of the causality constraints and the resulting distortion that the frontend processing introduces in speech. Time-frequency masking based approaches have been shown to work well, but they need additional hyper-parameters to scale the mask to limit speech distortion. Such mask scalars are typically hand-tuned and chosen conservatively. In this work, we present a technique to predict mask scalars using an ASR-based loss in an end-to-end fashion, with minimal increase in the overall model size and complexity. We evaluate the approach on two robust ASR tasks: multichannel enhancement in the presence of speech and non-speech noise, and acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). Results show that the presented algorithm consistently improves word error rate (WER) without the need for any additional tuning over strong baselines that use hand-tuned hyper-parameters: up to 16% for multichannel enhancement in noisy conditions, and up to 7% for AEC.
abstract_zh: 由于因果关系限制以及前端处理在语音中引入的失真，使用基于神经网络的声学前端来提高流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的鲁棒性具有挑战性。基于时频掩蔽的方法已被证明效果良好，但它们需要额外的超参数来缩放掩蔽以限制语音失真。这种掩模标量通常是手动调整和保守选择的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用基于 ASR 的损失以端到端方式预测掩模标量的技术，并且总体模型大小和复杂性的增加最小。我们在两个强大的 ASR 任务上评估该方法：存在语音和非语音噪声的多通道增强，以及声学回声消除 (AEC)。结果表明，所提出的算法持续改善了字错误率 (WER)，无需对使用手动调整超参数的强基线进行任何额外调整：噪声条件下的多通道增强高达 16%，AEC 高达 7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过端到端预测掩码标量来提升流式自动语音识别（ASR）系统鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于神经网络的声学前端在处理流式ASR时因因果约束和前端处理引入的失真而面临挑战，而现有时间-频率掩码方法需依赖人工调优的超参数，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 通过端到端框架利用ASR损失函数直接预测掩码标量，无需额外超参数调优，仅轻微增加模型复杂度，并在多通道增强和声学回声消除任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 在噪声环境下多通道增强任务中词错误率（WER）降低最高16%，在声学回声消除任务中降低最高7%，且无需额外调参。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动预测掩码标量有效提升了ASR鲁棒性，在多个任务中均优于传统手动调参基线，且模型复杂度增加有限。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过自动预测掩码标量有效提升了ASR鲁棒性，在多个任务中均优于传统手动调参基线，且模型复杂度增加有限。

tldr: 本文提出了一种通过端到端预测掩码标量来提升流式自动语音识别（ASR）系统鲁棒性的方法。
motivation: 传统基于神经网络的声学前端在处理流式ASR时因因果约束和前端处理引入的失真而面临挑战，而现有时间-频率掩码方法需依赖人工调优的超参数，限制了性能提升。
method: 通过端到端框架利用ASR损失函数直接预测掩码标量，无需额外超参数调优，仅轻微增加模型复杂度，并在多通道增强和声学回声消除任务中验证效果。
result: 在噪声环境下多通道增强任务中词错误率（WER）降低最高16%，在声学回声消除任务中降低最高7%，且无需额外调参。
conclusion: 该方法通过自动预测掩码标量有效提升了ASR鲁棒性，在多个任务中均优于传统手动调参基线，且模型复杂度增加有限。
search_text: Mask scalar prediction for improving robust automatic speech recognition 用于改进鲁棒自动语音识别的掩模标量预测 Using neural network based acoustic frontends for improving robustness of streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is challenging because of the causality constraints and the resulting distortion that the frontend processing introduces in speech. Time-frequency masking based approaches have been shown to work well, but they need additional hyper-parameters to scale the mask to limit speech distortion. Such mask scalars are typically hand-tuned and chosen conservatively. In this work, we present a technique to predict mask scalars using an ASR-based loss in an end-to-end fashion, with minimal increase in the overall model size and complexity. We evaluate the approach on two robust ASR tasks: multichannel enhancement in the presence of speech and non-speech noise, and acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). Results show that the presented algorithm consistently improves word error rate (WER) without the need for any additional tuning over strong baselines that use hand-tuned hyper-parameters: up to 16% for multichannel enhancement in noisy conditions, and up to 7% for AEC. 由于因果关系限制以及前端处理在语音中引入的失真，使用基于神经网络的声学前端来提高流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的鲁棒性具有挑战性。基于时频掩蔽的方法已被证明效果良好，但它们需要额外的超参数来缩放掩蔽以限制语音失真。这种掩模标量通常是手动调整和保守选择的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用基于 ASR 的损失以端到端方式预测掩模标量的技术，并且总体模型大小和复杂性的增加最小。我们在两个强大的 ASR 任务上评估该方法：存在语音和非语音噪声的多通道增强，以及声学回声消除 (AEC)。结果表明，所提出的算法持续改善了字错误率 (WER)，无需对使用手动调整超参数的强基线进行任何额外调整：噪声条件下的多通道增强高达 16%，AEC 高达 7%。 本文提出了一种通过端到端预测掩码标量来提升流式自动语音识别（ASR）系统鲁棒性的方法。 Arun Narayanan,James Walker,Sankaran Panchapagesan,Nathan Howard,Yuma Koizumi eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Ryoya Mizuno,Keita Takahashi,Michitaka Yoshida,Chihiro Tsutake,Toshiaki Fujii,Hajime Nagahara
title: Acquiring a Dynamic Light Field through a Single-Shot Coded Image
title_zh: 通过单次编码图像获取动态光场
comment: ef:2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: We propose a method for compressively acquiring a dynamic light field (a 5-D volume) through a single-shot coded image (a 2-D measurement). We designed an imaging model that synchronously applies aperture coding and pixel-wise exposure coding within a single exposure time. This coding scheme enables us to effectively embed the original information into a single observed image. The observed image is then fed to a convolutional neural network (CNN) for light-field reconstruction, which is jointly trained with the camera-side coding patterns. We also developed a hardware prototype to capture a real 3-D scene moving over time. We succeeded in acquiring a dynamic light field with 5x5 viewpoints over 4 temporal sub-frames (100 views in total) from a single observed image. Repeating capture and reconstruction processes over time, we can acquire a dynamic light field at 4x the frame rate of the camera. To our knowledge, our method is the first to achieve a finer temporal resolution than the camera itself in compressive light-field acquisition. Our software is available from our project webpage
summary: We propose a method for compressively acquiring a dynamic light field (a 5-D volume) through a single-shot coded image (a 2-D measurement). We designed an imaging model that synchronously applies aperture coding and pixel-wise exposure coding within a single exposure time. This coding scheme enables us to effectively embed the original information into a single observed image. The observed image is then fed to a convolutional neural network (CNN) for light-field reconstruction, which is jointly trained with the camera-side coding patterns. We also developed a hardware prototype to capture a real 3-D scene moving over time. We succeeded in acquiring a dynamic light field with 5x5 viewpoints over 4 temporal sub-frames (100 views in total) from a single observed image. Repeating capture and reconstruction processes over time, we can acquire a dynamic light field at 4x the frame rate of the camera. To our knowledge, our method is the first to achieve a finer temporal resolution than the camera itself in compressive light-field acquisition. Our software is available from our project webpage
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过单次编码图像（2D 测量）压缩获取动态光场（5D 体积）的方法。我们设计了一种成像模型，可在单个曝光时间内同步应用孔径编码和逐像素曝光编码。这种编码方案使我们能够有效地将原始信息嵌入到单个观察到的图像中。然后将观察到的图像输入卷积神经网络（CNN）进行光场重建，并与相机端编码模式联合训练。我们还开发了一个硬件原型来捕捉随时间移动的真实 3D 场景。我们成功地从单个观察到的图像中获取了 4 个时间子帧（总共 100 个视图）的 5x5 视点的动态光场。随着时间的推移重复捕获和重建过程，我们可以以相机帧速率 4 倍的速度获取动态光场。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个在压缩光场采集中实现比相机本身更精细的时间分辨率的方法。我们的软件可从我们的项目网页获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过单次拍摄的编码图像压缩获取动态光场（5-D体积）的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统光场采集方法难以同时实现高时空分辨率，且动态场景的压缩感知存在效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计同步应用光阑编码与像素级曝光编码的成像模型，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与相机端编码模式联合训练，开发硬件原型实现动态场景捕捉。
AI.result: 从单张图像重建5×5视点×4时序子帧的动态光场（共100视点），时空分辨率突破相机原生帧率4倍。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现压缩感知光场采集的时序分辨率超越相机硬件极限，开源软件可复现成果。

title: U-Net with ResNet Backbone for Garment Landmarking Purpose
title_zh: U-Net 与 ResNet 主干用于服装地标目的
comment: A draft for purpose of archive, not intended for official academic uses
comments: A draft for purpose of archive, not intended for official academic uses
abstract: We build a heatmap-based landmark detection model to locate important landmarks on 2D RGB garment images. The main goal is to detect edges, corners and suitable interior region of the garments. This let us re-create 3D garments in modern 3D editing software by incorporate landmark detection model and texture unwrapping. We use a U-net architecture with ResNet backbone to build the model. With an appropriate loss function, we are able to train a moderately robust model.
summary: We build a heatmap-based landmark detection model to locate important landmarks on 2D RGB garment images. The main goal is to detect edges, corners and suitable interior region of the garments. This let us re-create 3D garments in modern 3D editing software by incorporate landmark detection model and texture unwrapping. We use a U-net architecture with ResNet backbone to build the model. With an appropriate loss function, we are able to train a moderately robust model.
abstract_zh: 我们构建了一个基于热图的地标检测模型来定位 2D RGB 服装图像上的重要地标。主要目标是检测服装的边缘、角落和合适的内部区域。这让我们可以通过结合地标检测模型和纹理展开，在现代 3D 编辑软件中重新创建 3D 服装。我们使用带有 ResNet 主干的 U-net 架构来构建模型。通过适当的损失函数，我们能够训练一个适度鲁棒的模型。

AI.tldr: 开发基于热图的服装关键点检测模型，用于在2D图像中定位关键点以辅助3D服装重建。
AI.motivation: 通过检测服装关键点，实现从2D图像到3D服装模型的重建，提升服装设计和编辑的自动化水平。
AI.method: 采用U-Net架构结合ResNet主干网络，配合适当的损失函数进行模型训练。
AI.result: 成功训练出能够准确检测服装边缘、角落及内部区域的模型，为3D重建提供可靠的关键点数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了服装关键点检测，为基于2D图像的3D服装重建和编辑提供了可行的技术方案。
